centers.english: to move

examples.english: Every time I move I get a pain in my left shoulder.
examples.chinese: 我每动一下左肩就疼。

examples.english: Don't move, there's a spider on your back.
examples.chinese: 不要动，你背上有只蜘蛛。

examples.english: Sarah moved away from the window.
examples.chinese: 萨拉从窗口移开了。

examples.english: My mother moved forward and grabbed my wrist.
examples.chinese: 我母亲往前移并抓住我的手腕。

examples.english: I can hear someone moving around downstairs!
examples.chinese: 我能听到楼下有人在四处走动！

examples.english: Any movement will set off the alarm.
examples.chinese: 任何动静都会触响警报器。

examples.english: He watched her graceful movements as she came towards him.
examples.chinese: 她向他走近时，他看着她优雅的步态。

examples.english: The doctor thinks she'll recover quite a lot of movement, though maybe not all.
examples.chinese: 医生认为她能够恢复很多活动能力，虽然可能无法全部恢复。

examples.english: the movement of the human heart
examples.chinese: 人类心脏的运动

examples.english: Make gentle sweeping movements across the hedge so that the blade can cut on both sides.
examples.chinese: 以轻快的动作挥过树篱，这样刀锋可以割到两边。

examples.english: I crept to the door, and with a sudden movement, opened it wide.
examples.chinese: 我蹑手蹑脚地走到门边，突然一下子把门开得大大的。

examples.english: The sleeping child stirred and opened her eyes.
examples.chinese: 睡着的孩子微微动了一下，睁开双眼。

examples.english: The crowd began to stir as the band walked on stage.
examples.chinese: 乐队走上台时人群开始微微有些骚动。

examples.english: ‘The dog won't touch you,’ she said , ‘unless you make a move towards me.’
examples.chinese: “这狗不会咬你的，”她说，“除非你对我有动作。”

examples.english: He made a move to kiss me, but I turned away.
examples.chinese: 他上来要吻我，但我把头扭向一边。

examples.english: Move over a bit, I'm falling out of bed.
examples.chinese: 挪过去点儿，我要从床上掉下去了。

examples.english: Penelope moved over and took the driver's seat.
examples.chinese: 佩内洛普移到了司机的座位上。

examples.english: Jonas stood and listened, shifting uncomfortably from one foot to the other.
examples.chinese: 乔纳斯站着听，不自在地把身体重心从一只脚换到另一只脚。

examples.english: The sun had shifted to the west.
examples.chinese: 太阳移到了西边。

examples.english: She shifted her gaze from me to Bobby with a look of suspicion.
examples.chinese: 她一脸疑惑地把目光从我移到博比身上。

examples.english: The building's foundation has shifted, which is why there are cracks in the plaster.
examples.chinese: 建筑的地基移动了，所以灰泥上出现了裂缝。

examples.english: Tell Alan to shift his feet so Maggie can sit down.
examples.chinese: 告诉艾伦把脚移一移好让玛吉坐下来。

examples.english: The leather armchair creaked as Roberts shifted his bulk.
examples.chinese: 这把皮扶手椅在罗伯茨移动他那庞大身躯时嘎吱作响。

centers.english: moving

examples.english: The authorities believe the body was thrown from a moving vehicle.
examples.chinese: 当局认为这具尸体是从行驶的车辆上扔下来的。

examples.english: All the moving parts of the engine must be kept well-oiled.
examples.chinese: 发动机上所有的活动部件都必须上足润滑油。

examples.english: Do not distract the driver while the vehicle is in motion.
examples.chinese: 车辆行驶时不要让司机分心。

centers.english: able to move

examples.english: He won't be mobile for some time. It's a bad knee sprain.
examples.chinese: 他有一段时间不能走动，那是严重的膝扭伤。

examples.english: Ethel needed help on the stairs, but was otherwise mobile.
examples.chinese: 埃塞尔上下楼梯时需要帮助，除此之外她能走动。

examples.english: Remote areas are served by a number of weekly mobile clinics.
examples.chinese: 一些流动诊所每周一次到边远地区提供医疗服务。

examples.english: Neuman revealed that she nearly quit showbusiness to run a mobile massage parlour.
examples.chinese: 诺伊曼透露说她差一点离开娱乐界去开一个流动按摩院。

examples.english: The community currently receives service from a rural mobile library.
examples.chinese: 现在该社区得到一家乡村流动图书馆提供的服务。

examples.english: You'll experience some loss of mobility for a few weeks after the operation.
examples.chinese: 手术后几星期你会丧失部分活动能力。

examples.english: The weakening of bone tissue has a considerable effect on an elderly person's mobility.
examples.chinese: 骨质疏松对老年人的活动能力会产生很大的影响。

centers.english: to keep moving your body or part of your body
centers.chinese: 不停地移动身体或身体的一部分

examples.english: Stop fidgeting, Sally, and pay attention.
examples.chinese: 别乱动，萨莉，注意力要集中。

examples.english: She glared at the little boy, who had started fidgeting in his chair.
examples.chinese: 那个小男孩开始在椅子上坐立不安起来，她对他怒目而视。

examples.english: Diana fidgeted nervously with her pencil.
examples.chinese: 戴安娜拿着铅笔焦虑不安地动个不停。

examples.english: I was so excited that I couldn't keep still.
examples.chinese: 我太激动了，无法安静不动。

examples.english: Frankie has a lot of energy; he can hardly keep still for more than a few minutes.
examples.chinese: 弗朗姬精力充沛，他无法静坐哪怕几分钟。

examples.english: The cat was squirming and he put it down.
examples.chinese: 他见猫挣扭着，就把它放下了。

examples.english: Diane squirmed wildly as Gavin tickled her.
examples.chinese: 加文搔黛安娜的痒时，她使劲扭动起来。

examples.english: The little boy squirmed in his seat, anxious to get up and leave the table.
examples.chinese: 小男孩在座位上扭动着，急着要站起来离开桌子。

examples.english: Laura's face reddened and she squirmed with embarrassment.
examples.chinese: 劳拉满脸通红，窘迫地扭来扭去。

examples.english: The dog wriggled under the fence and escaped into the street.
examples.chinese: 那狗在篱笆下扭动身子钻了过去，逃到了大街上。

examples.english: Shelly tried to wriggle free from him, but he held her firmly.
examples.chinese: 谢利想挣开他，但他牢牢地把她按住。

examples.english: As he received each blow, he writhed on the floor and cried out.
examples.chinese: 他每挨一拳就在地板上扭动，并且大声喊叫。

examples.english: Sarah was writhing in agony, clutching her leg.
examples.chinese: 萨拉紧抱住自己的腿痛得扭动着身子。

examples.english: A muscle on Yang's face twitched.
examples.chinese: 扬脸上有块肌肉抽搐了一下。

examples.english: My right eyelid wouldn't stop twitching.
examples.chinese: 我的右眼睑不停地颤动。

examples.english: It's just a nervous twitch.
examples.chinese: 那只不过是神经性抽搐。

examples.english: There was a twitch in my left cheek which I couldn't control.
examples.chinese: 我无法控制左脸的抽搐。

centers.english: to move from side to side

examples.english: A light wind was making the branches sway.
examples.chinese: 一阵轻风吹得树枝摇动。

examples.english: Donny swayed drunkenly as he walked back to his car.
examples.chinese: 唐尼醉醺醺的，摇摇晃晃地向自己的汽车走回去。

examples.english: The ski lifts were swaying alarmingly from side to side.
examples.chinese: 上山吊椅骇人地左右摇晃着。

examples.english: Waves from a passing freighter rocked their boat.
examples.chinese: 一艘驶过的货船激起的波浪使他们的小船摇晃起来。

examples.english: The chair squeaked as I rocked back and forth.
examples.chinese: 我前后摇动时椅子嘎吱作响。

examples.english: Uncle Maury laughed until he was rocking back and forth.
examples.chinese: 莫里舅舅笑得前仰后合。

examples.english: Glenda sat beside the cradle, gently rocking it from side to side.
examples.chinese: 格伦达坐在摇篮边，轻轻地摇着它。

examples.english: We began the workout by swinging our arms.
examples.chinese: 我们摆动双臂开始了这次训练。

examples.english: The only sound was the creak of a sign swinging in the wind.
examples.chinese: 仅有的声音是在风中摆动的告示牌的嘎吱声。

examples.english: Doors swung open and then shut as hospital porters pushed a patient down the corridor.
examples.chinese: 医院搬运工把一名病人沿走廊推运下去时，一扇扇门摆动着打开又关上。

examples.english: The wooden bridge swung from side to side in a terrifying fashion.
examples.chinese: 木桥吓人地左右晃动。

centers.english: to move something from one place or position to another
centers.chinese: 将某物从某一地点或位置移至另一处

examples.english: Will you move your car, please? It's blocking the road.
examples.chinese: 请你把车移开行吗？它堵住了路。

examples.english: It took three men to move the piano.
examples.chinese: 搬这架钢琴需要三个人。

examples.english: We'll have to move the table into the hall.
examples.chinese: 我们只好把桌子搬到门厅里。

examples.english: Transfer the mixture to a heavy cooking pan and add all remaining ingredients.
examples.chinese: 把混合物转到厚重的烧锅内，再将所有余下的材料加进去。

examples.english: Could I transfer $500 from my savings to my checking account?
examples.chinese: 我把500美元存款转到活期存款账户行吗？

examples.english: When are you going to shift all this rubbish? It's making the place look a real mess.
examples.chinese: 你什么时候把这些垃圾搬走？这个地方看上去实在是太乱了。

examples.english: Come on Des, give me a hand to shift these and then we can go home.
examples.chinese: 来吧，德斯，帮我把这些东西搬走，然后我们就能回家了。

examples.english: She swung the ax, hitting the log squarely in the middle.
examples.chinese: 她挥动斧子，劈在原木的正中心。

examples.english: As you swing the golf club back, try to keep your eye on the ball.
examples.chinese: 当你把高尔夫球杆挥向身后时，要把目光盯在高尔夫球上。

examples.english: With a heavy swing of the mallet, he drove the post into the ground.
examples.chinese: 他用木槌一记重敲将柱子打入地里。

examples.english: Mark jerked the phone away from the girl.
examples.chinese: 马克猛地从那女孩手中把电话抢走。

examples.english: Graham had to jerk the steering wheel to the left to avoid a crash.
examples.chinese: 格雷厄姆只得猛地把方向盘转向左边以免撞车。

examples.english: The train moved off with a jerk.
examples.chinese: 列车猝然一动驶离了站台。

centers.english: to move a company or its people to another place
centers.chinese: 将公司或其人员转至另一个地方

examples.english: The Education Department is considering moving 500 full-time staff to Runcorn.
examples.chinese: 教育部正在考虑把500名全职员工迁到朗科恩。

examples.english: The company says it will move its distribution center to Chicago early next year.
examples.chinese: 该公司说明年初将把发货中心搬到芝加哥。

examples.english: Davidson transferred to another department last October.
examples.chinese: 去年10月份戴维森被调到另一部门去了。

examples.english: One option would be to transfer Struthers from London to New York.
examples.chinese: 有一种选择就是把斯特拉瑟斯从伦敦调往纽约。

examples.english: Harding has been transferred to Albany prison, where he will complete his sentence.
examples.chinese: 哈丁被转到奥尔巴尼监狱，他将在那里服满刑期。

examples.english: She's put in for a transfer asked to be transferred to the Los Angeles office.
examples.chinese: 她要求调往洛杉矶的办事处。

examples.english: If rents continue to rise, many local businesses may decide to relocate.
examples.chinese: 如果房租继续上涨，许多当地公司可能会考虑搬迁。

examples.english: The federal government is offering attractive tax breaks to corporations that relocate in areas of high unemployment.
examples.chinese: 联邦政府向搬迁到高失业率地区的公司提供诱人的减税优惠。

examples.english: We're relocating our educational software division to North Carolina.
examples.chinese: 我们正在把教育软件部门搬迁到北卡罗来纳。

examples.english: Salary and other benefits are excellent and include a company car and help with relocation.
examples.chinese: 薪水和其他津贴很高，还包括配给一辆公司汽车以及帮助搬家。

examples.english: Does the company pay relocation expenses?
examples.chinese: 公司支付搬家费吗？

examples.english: I'm sick of being shunted from one department to another.
examples.chinese: 我对自己一直被人从一个部门调到另一个部门感到厌烦。

examples.english: The company's solution to dealing with incompetent staff seems to be to shunt them into clerical jobs.
examples.chinese: 公司对付不能胜任工作的员工的方法好像就是把他们调去做文书工作。

centers.english: to move to a new home

examples.english: ‘Do they still live on Reighton Road?’ ‘No, they've moved.’
examples.chinese: “他们仍住在雷顿路吗？”“不，他们已搬家了。”

examples.english: The Chandlers are planning to move house in the next year or so.
examples.chinese: 钱德勒一家打算明年前后搬家。

examples.english: Moving house can be extremely stressful.
examples.chinese: 搬家可能是件压力很大的事。

examples.english: Did you know that Karen's moving to the US in August?
examples.chinese: 你知道卡伦8月份要搬到美国去了吗?

examples.english: They moved from Burlington to Stowe about three months ago.
examples.chinese: 他们大约三个月前从伯灵顿搬到斯托去了。

examples.english: She moved into the new house as soon as the papers were signed.
examples.chinese: 文件一签好她就搬进了新房屋。

centers.english: to move something or someone that is difficult to move
centers.chinese: 移动非常难以移动的某物或某人

examples.english: I tried to open the door, but I couldn't move it an inch.
examples.chinese: 我想打开门，但无法使它移动分毫。

examples.english: The sculpture is heavy and very difficult to move.
examples.chinese: 这件雕塑很重，极难移动。

examples.english: The sofa is stuck in the doorway and I can't shift it.
examples.chinese: 沙发卡在门口，我无法移动它。

examples.english: There's no point trying to shift the car by ourselves -- we'll have to get a truck to pull us out.
examples.chinese: 我们想要自己推动汽车简直是枉费力气——得叫辆拖吊车把我们拖出去。

examples.english: We're going to need some rope to help free the girl.
examples.chinese: 我们需要些绳子来帮助那姑娘解脱。

examples.english: Kirk battled for eight hours to free himself from the wreckage.
examples.chinese: 柯克奋斗了八个小时才从残骸中挣脱出来。

examples.english: Susan managed to free her right hand from her attacker with a violent twisting movement.
examples.chinese: 苏珊猛力一扭，使自己的右手从袭击者手里挣脱开来。

examples.english: The horse's eyes were filled with terror as it struggled to free itself from the deep, sucking mud.
examples.chinese: 那匹马要从越陷越深的泥沼里挣脱出来时眼里充满着恐惧。

examples.english: The bolts can only be released with a wrench.
examples.chinese: 这些螺栓只有使用活动扳钳才能松开。

examples.english: Try to release the clamp gently.
examples.chinese: 要轻轻地把夹钳松开。

centers.english: when it is difficult to move something

examples.english: Elsie was so frightened that she couldn't move.
examples.chinese: 埃尔茜被惊吓得无法动弹。

examples.english: I can't move my leg - I think it's broken.
examples.chinese: 我的腿动弹不得，我想是骨折了。

examples.english: I can't open the window - it's stuck.
examples.chinese: 我无法把这扇窗户打开—它卡住了。

examples.english: The elevator was stuck between two floors.
examples.chinese: 电梯卡在两个楼层之间不动了。

examples.english: They tried to drive through the snow, but the car got stuck.
examples.chinese: 他们想在雪中行车，可是汽车被卡住无法动弹。

examples.english: Sorry I'm late. I got stuck in traffic.
examples.chinese: 抱歉我来迟了。我遇上了交通堵塞。

examples.english: The drawer's jammed - I can't get it open.
examples.chinese: 抽屉卡住了，我打不开。

examples.english: The paper has got jammed in the printer again.
examples.chinese: 复印机里纸又卡住了。

examples.english: I woke up with a stiff neck this morning.
examples.chinese: 今天早晨我醒来时脖子僵硬。

examples.english: After a twelve hour plane ride, my back was stiff and sore.
examples.chinese: 乘了12个小时飞机后我的背又僵又疼。

examples.english: I felt really stiff after playing basketball last week.
examples.chinese: 上周我打过篮球之后感觉身体一动就很疼。

examples.english: A car crash in 1997 left him completely paralysed.
examples.chinese: 1997年的一次车祸使他完全瘫痪。

examples.english: Deborah stood at the side of the stage, paralyzed with fear.
examples.chinese: 德博拉站在舞台边怕得呆住了。

examples.english: After the flood, hundreds of stranded vehicles lined the roads.
examples.chinese: 洪水退去后，数以百计滞留的车辆在路上排列成行。

examples.english: Whales occasionally swim too close to shore and become stranded in the shallow water.
examples.chinese: 鲸有时游到离岸太近的地方在浅水区搁浅。

examples.english: My car broke down, and I was left stranded by the side of the road.
examples.chinese: 我的车子抛锚了，我被困在路边。

examples.english: His hands were entangled in the ropes.
examples.chinese: 他的双手被绳索缠住了。

examples.english: My glasses were caught up in my hair and I couldn't take them off.
examples.chinese: 我的眼镜被头发缠住了，拿不下来。

examples.english: A child swimming in the river had become entangled in the weeds and been drowned.
examples.chinese: 一个在河里游泳的孩子被水草缠住，淹死了。

examples.english: Our umbrellas got caught up as we tried to squeeze past each other.
examples.chinese: 我们都想从对方的身边挤过去，结果，我们的伞钩在了一起。

examples.english: Could you give me a hand with this box? It won't budge.
examples.chinese: 你能帮我搬这个箱子吗？我搬不动它。

examples.english: The dresser was so heavy that I couldn't even budge it.
examples.chinese: 这个食具橱这么重，我无法把它动一动。

examples.english: I tried to raise the window, but it wouldn't budge an inch.
examples.chinese: 我想把窗抬起来，可它动都不动。

centers.english: not moving

examples.english: There was no wind and the trees were completely still.
examples.chinese: 无风吹过，树木纹丝不动。

examples.english: Anna looked out across the still waters of the lake.
examples.chinese: 安娜向外朝湖面上静止不动的湖水望去。

examples.english: Keep still while I tie your shoes.
examples.chinese: 我给你系鞋带时别动。

examples.english: Percy was so thrilled he could hardly sit still.
examples.chinese: 珀西激动得都坐不住了。

examples.english: The truck swerved and hit a stationary vehicle.
examples.chinese: 卡车急转弯撞到了一辆停着的车。

examples.english: a four-mile queue of stationary traffic
examples.chinese: 四英里长的停着的车辆队伍

examples.english: Traffic was at a standstill on the motorway.
examples.chinese: 高速公路上交通停滞不动。

examples.english: A severe storm brought rail services to a standstill yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天一场强烈的暴风雨使铁路运输瘫痪。

examples.english: The sea was dead calm.
examples.chinese: 大海平静极了。

examples.english: The night was calm and warm.
examples.chinese: 那夜温暖无风。

examples.english: It was a calm, clear, beautiful day.
examples.chinese: 那天天静无风，天色清朗明媚。

examples.english: Four motionless figures stood on the pier.
examples.chinese: 四个人形一动不动地站在长堤上。

examples.english: I could see my father standing motionless in the doorway.
examples.chinese: 我能看到爸爸一动不动地站在门口。

examples.english: Kemp sat motionless as the verdict was read.
examples.chinese: 宣读判决时肯普一动不动地坐着。

examples.english: Brigg was immobile, his eyes fixed on the horizon.
examples.chinese: 布里格怔怔地望着地平线，一动也不动。

examples.english: I stood there, immobile with terror.
examples.chinese: 我站在那里，吓得一动不动。

expressions.text: be glued to the TV/your chair etc

examples.english: Dad was glued to the TV all day long.
examples.chinese: 爸爸整天一动不动地看电视。

examples.english: We were glued to our chairs and listening intently to every word.
examples.chinese: 我们动也不动地坐在椅子上仔细听每一个字。

examples.english: I was rooted to the spot, unable to take my eyes off the strange creature.
examples.chinese: 我像是粘在了地上似的一动不动，没法不去看那个怪物。

examples.english: She hid behind the door, not moving a muscle.
examples.chinese: 她躲在门背后一动不动。

examples.english: I didn't dare move a muscle. He would have shot me.
examples.chinese: 我一动也不敢动，他会开枪打死我的。

centers.english: what you say to tell someone not to move
centers.chinese: 告诉某人不要动的说法

examples.english: Don't move or they'll see us.
examples.chinese: 别动，否则他们会看到我们的。

examples.english: Don't move. I'll be back in five minutes.
examples.chinese: 别动，我五分钟后就回来。

examples.english: If you can't keep still, how can I cut your hair?
examples.chinese: 如果你不能保持不动，我怎么给你理发呢？

examples.english: Can you keep still for a minute, Kim?
examples.chinese: 金，你能不能安定一分钟？

examples.english: Be quiet and stay still.
examples.chinese: 别吵，也别动。

examples.english: ‘Freeze! Drop your weapons!’ shouted the policeman.
examples.chinese: “不许动！放下武器！”警察喊道。

examples.english: Stay where you are! Don't come any closer.
examples.chinese: 待着别动，不要过来。

examples.english: I'm going to look for a telephone. You stay right where you are until I come back.
examples.chinese: 我去找电话，你原地待着等我回来。

centers.english: to go past a place, person, or thing

examples.english: He walked straight past her without looking at her.
examples.chinese: 他没看她，径直从她身边走了过去。

examples.english: Will you be going past the library on your way home?
examples.chinese: 你回家路上经过图书馆吗？

examples.english: Drivers sped past, heading for Oxford.
examples.chinese: 司机们飞驰而过，往牛津方向驶去。

examples.english: I lay on the grass and watched the clouds floating by.
examples.chinese: 我躺在草地上，看着白云飘过。

examples.english: One woman reported seeing a man go by on a motorcycle.
examples.chinese: 一位女士报告说，她看见一名男子骑摩托车经过。

examples.english: I'll get you some aspirin - I pass the drugstore on the way to work.
examples.chinese: 我会给你买些阿司匹林来—上班路上我经过药房。

examples.english: They kept quiet until the soldiers had passed.
examples.chinese: 他们默不作声，直到士兵们都走了过去。

examples.english: A big Cadillac passed us as we walked up the hill.
examples.chinese: 我们步行上山时，一辆大凯迪拉克车从我们身边驶过。

examples.english: They could hardly hear themselves talk above the noise from the passing traffic
examples.chinese: 车来车往，十分嘈杂，他们几乎听不见自己的谈话声。

examples.english: He hailed a passing taxi.
examples.chinese: 他招呼一辆路过的出租车。

examples.english: Before you start to overtake, make sure the road is clear ahead of you.
examples.chinese: 超车前，一定要确定前方道路没有障碍物。

examples.english: On the way, we overtook a battered old Renault.
examples.chinese: 路上，我们驾车超过了一辆残破的旧雷诺车。

centers.english: not far away

examples.english: We camped in a forest near a large lake.
examples.chinese: 我们在靠近大湖的一个森林里扎了营。

examples.english: Don't go near the fire.
examples.chinese: 不要靠近火。

examples.english: Have you ever been to Versailles? It's near Paris.
examples.chinese: 你去过凡尔赛吗？在巴黎附近。

examples.english: The place where we were going was much nearer than I thought.
examples.chinese: 我们要去的地方比我想的要近多了。

examples.english: Bob was standing near enough to hear what they were saying.
examples.chinese: 鲍勃站得离他们很近，能听到他们的谈话。

examples.english: If we moved to Dallas we'd be nearer to my parents.
examples.chinese: 如果我们搬到达拉斯，就会离我父母近些。

examples.english: Only the people who were nearest to the speaker could actually hear what he said.
examples.chinese: 只有离演讲者最近的那些人才能够听到他的话。

examples.english: The accident happened somewhere near here.
examples.chinese: 事故就发生在这附近。

examples.english: As we approached Abbeville, the gunfire sounded very close.
examples.chinese: 我们快到阿比维尔时，枪声听上去离我们非常近。

examples.english: Don't drive so close to the edge of the road.
examples.chinese: 不要把车开得这么靠近路边。

examples.english: Suddenly we heard footsteps close behind us.
examples.chinese: 突然，我们听到身后有脚步声靠近。

examples.english: The houses were built very close together, and the gardens were rather small.
examples.chinese: 这些房子都建得紧挨在一起，花园也相当小。

examples.english: Nancy came over and sat close beside me on the bed.
examples.chinese: 南希走过来，紧挨着我坐在床上。

examples.english: Is there a gas station close by?
examples.chinese: 附近有加油站吗？

examples.english: I'd parked my car a short distance away, just around the corner.
examples.chinese: 我把车停在附近，就在拐弯处。

examples.english: Harvard University is only a short distance from the center of Boston.
examples.chinese: 哈佛大学离波士顿市中心只有一点点路程。

expressions.text: a short distance to the south/north etc

examples.english: The source of the river is a short distance to the south of here.
examples.chinese: 这条河的源头在这里往南不远的地方。

examples.english: ‘How far's the station?’ ‘Oh, not far - about ten minutes by car.’
examples.chinese: “车站有多远？”“噢，不远一坐车大约十分钟。”

examples.english: Asti is not far from the French border.
examples.chinese: 阿斯蒂镇离法国边境不远。

examples.english: Our hotel was in the centre of town but the beach wasn't far away.
examples.chinese: 我们的酒店在镇中心，但离海滩不是很远。

examples.english: Dave, who was sitting nearby, laughed when he heard this.
examples.chinese: 坐在近旁的戴夫听到这话就大笑起来。

examples.english: The house is really nice, and a lot of my friends live nearby.
examples.chinese: 这房子很不错，而且我有许多朋友住在附近。

examples.english: It was very convenient having the garage nearby.
examples.chinese: 附近有汽车修理厂，非常方便。

examples.english: Lucy was staying with her aunt in the nearby town of Hamilton.
examples.chinese: 露西跟她姑妈一起住在附近的哈密尔顿镇上。

examples.english: The fair attracted thousands of people from neighbouring areas.
examples.chinese: 集市吸引了邻近地区数以千计的人。

examples.english: Soldiers and firemen from 13 neighboring towns wrestled with the blaze for hours.
examples.chinese: 来自13个邻镇的士兵和消防员与烈火搏斗了好几个小时。

examples.english: A white van was seen in the vicinity at about the time when the murder took place.
examples.chinese: 凶杀案发生时，有人看到一辆白色小货车停在附近。

examples.english: In the past ten years there have been more cases of cancer in the vicinity of nuclear installations.
examples.chinese: 在过去十年里，核设施周围的癌症病例有所增加。

centers.english: near where you live

examples.english: Volunteers like Joyce go round local schools helping children with their reading problems.
examples.chinese: 像乔伊丝一样的志愿者经常到当地的各学校帮助儿童解决阅读困难。

examples.english: You can find all these books in your local library.
examples.chinese: 所有这些书都可以在当地的图书馆里找到。

examples.english: Polzeath is our local beach, but there are better surfing beaches further away.
examples.chinese: 波尔西是我们附近的一个海滩，但是再远些还有一些更好的可以冲浪的海滩。

examples.english: We prefer to do all our shopping locally.
examples.chinese: 我们所有的东西都喜欢在附近购买。

examples.english: Do you work locally?
examples.chinese: 你在附近上班吗？

examples.english: We're very lucky to have the park right on our doorstep.
examples.chinese: 我们非常幸运，公园就在家旁边。

examples.english: Homelessness is a problem that too many people ignore. Yet it's happening on our own doorstep.
examples.chinese: 无家可归的问题为太多人所忽视，然而它就发生在我们身边。

examples.english: Most people want the new airport so long as it isn't in their own backyard.
examples.chinese: 只要新机场不建在自己家附近，大多数人还是同意的。

centers.english: easy to get to

examples.english: There are several good restaurants within walking distance.
examples.chinese: 不远处有几家不错的餐厅。

examples.english: Dr Goldthorpe lived within walking distance of the University.
examples.chinese: 戈德索普博士住在离大学几步路远的地方。

expressions.text: within easy walking etc distance (of something)

examples.english: Fortunately the house that we were renting was within easy driving distance of the shops.
examples.chinese: 幸好我们租的房子离商店很近，开车不一会就到。

examples.english: It was just lucky that we were within reach of a hospital.
examples.chinese: 正巧，医院离我们很近。

examples.english: Around Salzburg there are literally dozens of exciting places to visit -- all within easy reach.
examples.chinese: 萨尔茨堡周围确实有许许多多引人入胜的地方可去—它们都在很近便的地方。

expressions.text: convenient/handy for something/ convenient to something

examples.english: The place where we live now is very convenient for the school - it's only a couple of minutes on foot.
examples.chinese: 我们现在住的地方离学校很近—一只要走几分钟就能到达。

examples.english: My husband works in London so we're looking for a house that's handy for the station.
examples.chinese: 我丈夫在伦敦工作，所以我们想找一幢离车站近便的房子。

examples.english: We found an apartment convenient to campus and public transportation.
examples.chinese: 我们找到了一套离校园近、公共交通便捷的公寓。

examples.english: The campsite was conveniently situated, close to the beach.
examples.chinese: 营地位置方便，离沙滩很近。

expressions.text: around the corner/ round the corner

examples.english: ‘Is there a bank near here?’ ‘Sure, it's just around the corner.’
examples.chinese: “这儿附近有银行吗？”“有，就在不远处。”

examples.english: She won't be long, she's only gone round the corner.
examples.chinese: 她不会去很久的，她只在附近走走。

examples.english: We met in a bar just around the corner from my apartment.
examples.chinese: 我们就在离我公寓不远的一个酒吧碰头。

examples.english: The Exhibition Centre is a great day out, with plenty of parking and all the attractions of Manchester close at hand.
examples.chinese: 到展览中心玩一天很不错，那里车位多，而且曼彻斯特所有的景点都在近旁。

examples.english: I'm very glad that, when my children were small, my mother was always close at hand.
examples.chinese: 我非常庆幸，我的孩子小的时候，我母亲总是在我身边。

examples.english: We come up here regularly from London; it's no distance.
examples.chinese: 我们经常从伦敦过来，两地相距不远。

examples.english: It's no distance from here to Fifth Avenue. We can easily walk it.
examples.chinese: 这儿离第五大街不远，走路很容易就到。

examples.english: I was born in Wembley, a stone's throw from the football stadium!
examples.chinese: 我在温布利出生，离那足球场近得很！

expressions.text: only a stone's throw from something

examples.english: Stanford Hospital is only a stone's throw from where I live.
examples.chinese: 斯坦福医院离我住的地方只有几步之遥。

expressions.text: within a stone's throw of something

examples.english: The river's within a stone's throw of our apartment - we can see it from the window.
examples.chinese: 那条河离我们住的公寓很近一从窗口可以看到。

centers.english: the nearest house/shop/station etc
centers.chinese: 最近的房子/商店/车站等

examples.english: Excuse me, where's the nearest subway station?
examples.chinese: 请问，最近的地铁站在哪儿？

examples.english: The people in the next apartment were making a lot of noise.
examples.chinese: 隔壁那套公寓里的人发出很多噪音。

examples.english: I had to move the car. It's just around the corner in the next street.
examples.chinese: 我得移动一下车子，它就在附近，隔壁的那条街上。

centers.english: the fact of being near

examples.english: The price of villas varies considerably, according to their facilities and their nearness to the sea.
examples.chinese: 别墅的价格相差很大，要视乎设施和离海边的距离而定。

examples.english: Some of the people took advantage of their village's closeness to the border and made profits from smuggling.
examples.chinese: 有些人利用自己村子离边境近的优势走私获利。

examples.english: San Francisco has a significant immigrant population because of its proximity to Asia.
examples.chinese: 圣弗朗西斯科因为距离亚洲较近而拥有大量的移民人口。

examples.english: The proximity of schools, stores, hospitals, and so on is an important factor when purchasing a house.
examples.chinese: 学校、商店、医院等是否近便，是买房子时应该考虑的一个重要因素。

centers.english: near enough to pick up/touch/hit
centers.chinese: 近得可以拿到/触到/打到的

examples.english: Make sure you keep your passport and ticket handy.
examples.chinese: 护照和机票一定要放在手边。

examples.english: A lot of people in the States have a gun handy at night and when they travel.
examples.chinese: 许多美国人在夜间或出行的时候都放一把枪在身边。

examples.english: As soon as she was within reach he grabbed her wrist.
examples.chinese: 她一靠近，他就一把抓住了她的手腕。

examples.english: Roy pulled the ashtray towards him so that it was within easy reach.
examples.chinese: 罗伊把烟灰缸拉过来，放在容易够到的地方。

examples.english: At this exploratory stage, small children will want to touch anything you leave within their reach.
examples.chinese: 小孩子在这个探索性阶段，你放什么东西在他们拿得到的地方，他们都要去碰一碰。

examples.english: Once its prey is within range, the snake's head shoots forward to attack.
examples.chinese: 猎物一旦进入攻击范围，蛇就飞快地把头伸出去袭击。

examples.english: The village is well within range of the rockets which are being fired.
examples.chinese: 那村子完全在要发射的火箭弹的射程之内。

examples.english: A day later, the ‘Tiger’ convoy came within range of air attack.
examples.chinese: 一天之后，“猛虎”护航队进入了空袭的范围之内。

examples.english: The men broke into the building at the dead of night, and shot their victims point-blank as they slept.
examples.chinese: 那些人在夜深人静的时候闯入大楼内，趁着被害人熟睡之际近距离开枪打死了他们。

examples.english: Police say that she died as a result of a single bullet fired at point-blank range.
examples.chinese: 警方说她因近距离中了一枪而丧命。

centers.english: near enough to see or hear clearly
centers.chinese: 近得能清楚地看到或听到的

examples.english: If you look at the painting close up you can see that it's a fake.
examples.chinese: 如果你靠近看这幅画，就会发现它是赝品。

examples.english: Dragging a chair close up to the television screen, she sat down to watch the film.
examples.chinese: 她拖了一把椅子靠近电视机屏幕，坐下来看这部电影。

examples.english: From our hiding place we were able to observe the animals at close quarters.
examples.chinese: 从我们躲藏的地方可以近距离地观察动物。

examples.english: This was the first time I had seen such poverty at close quarters.
examples.chinese: 这是我第一次非常近距离地感受这种贫困。

examples.english: Brigit looked great from a distance, but when she came up close you could see that she wore a lot of make-up.
examples.chinese: 布丽吉特远看很漂亮，可当她走近时你会发现她化妆很浓。

examples.english: ‘All you have to do is to get up close,’ Woolley said, ‘ and shoot straight.’
examples.chinese: “你只要靠近，”伍利说，“然后直射。》

examples.english: She brought the camera forward to get a close-up of the actor's face.
examples.chinese: 她把相机举向前面，给这位演员拍一个脸部特写。

examples.english: Each butterfly had been photographed in close-up so that you could see every detail.
examples.chinese: 每只蝴蝶拍的都是特写，可以看到每一个细节部分。

centers.english: to get nearer to someone or something

examples.english: As Kay got near the house she began to feel nervous.
examples.chinese: 凯走近房子时开始紧张起来。

examples.english: We had been traveling for two hours and I knew that we must be getting close to Vancouver.
examples.chinese: 我们已经走了两个小时了，我想我们一定快到温哥华了。

expressions.text: get near/close enough to do something

examples.english: I couldn't get close enough to see what was happening.
examples.chinese: 我无法走得太近，看不到发生了什么事。

examples.english: People were running for shelter. The hurricane was getting closer and closer.
examples.chinese: 人们奔走着寻找躲避的地方，飓风越来越近了。

examples.english: Every day the Russian tanks were getting nearer to Berlin.
examples.chinese: 苏联坦克一天天地逼近柏林。

examples.english: The train slowed down as it started to approach the station.
examples.chinese: 火车减慢了速度，开始进站。

examples.english: We could hear footsteps approaching down the corridor.
examples.chinese: 我们听到走廊上的脚步声越来越近。

examples.english: The speed of the approaching car was close to 80 mph.
examples.chinese: 正驶近的那辆车时速接近80英里。

examples.english: Well-organized bands of rebels began to close in on the capital.
examples.chinese: 组织有序的叛军开始逼近首都。

examples.english: The divers were surrounded by three sharks which were rapidly closing in on them.
examples.chinese: 潜水员周围有三条鲨鱼向他们迅速靠近。

examples.english: TV crews closed in on Geldof as soon as he stepped out of his car.
examples.chinese: 格尔多夫一下车，电视台的摄影队就一拥而上。

examples.english: As she neared her home she could see a light in the window.
examples.chinese: 她接近家门时，看到窗户里有灯光。

examples.english: The two men were talking, but as we drew near they turned and stared at us.
examples.chinese: 那两个人正在交谈，但是我们走近时，他们转过身来盯着我们看。

examples.english: Madge drew a little nearer so that she could hear what he was saying.
examples.chinese: 玛奇走近一点，以便能听到他的话。

examples.english: The rebels hoped that many of the government troops would join them when they drew near to the city.
examples.chinese: 叛军希望在逼近该市的时候，会有许多政府军加入他们。

centers.english: to be getting nearer to a person or vehicle in front of you

examples.english: On the last lap of the race, Gemma started to catch up, and it looked as though she could still win.
examples.chinese: 跑最后一圈的时候，杰玛开始追上了，看来她还有可能胜出。

examples.english: Looking back I could see that the rest of the group were catching up with us.
examples.chinese: 我回头看到组里的其他人快要赶上我们了。

examples.english: Donna looked in her rear-view mirror and saw with alarm that the Audi was still gaining on her.
examples.chinese: 唐娜看了一眼后视镜，惊惶地发现那辆奥迪还在追她。

examples.english: Now ‘Australia II’ is closing on the American yacht and it could still win this race.
examples.chinese: 现在“澳大利亚二号”正渐渐追上美国队的帆船，它还是有可能赢得这场比赛的。

centers.english: to stay very near to someone or something
centers.chinese: 留在离某人或某物很近的地方

examples.english: While the eggs are hatching the mother bird stays close to the nest.
examples.chinese: 蛋在孵化的时候，雌鸟守在鸟巢的旁边。

examples.english: Once we're inside the cave, we must all keep close together. We don't want anyone to get lost.
examples.chinese: 一旦我们进入山洞就必须留在一起，我们不想有人走失。

examples.english: It's quite common for a child to cling to his or her mother on the first day at school.
examples.chinese: 小孩子上学第一天紧依着母亲不放是很常见的。

examples.english: One of the girls was clinging to me all night at the disco. I just couldn't get rid of her.
examples.chinese: 有一个女孩在迪斯科舞会上整晚都缠着我，我怎么也摆脱不了她。

examples.english: The new road will stretch from Barcelona to the Adriatic, hugging the Mediterranean coast.
examples.chinese: 新的道路将沿着地中海沿岸，从巴塞罗那延伸到亚得里亚海。

examples.english: A row of tiny feeding fish were hugging the rock surface where I stood.
examples.chinese: 一排摄食的小鱼紧贴着我站着的那块岩石的表面。

examples.english: After Dunseverik, the path hugs the clifftop near Brebane Head.
examples.chinese: 过了顿塞弗里克，在布雷汉岬附近，山路绕着崖顶而行。

centers.english: to not go near to a person or place

examples.english: You'd better not come near me. I've got a bad cold.
examples.chinese: 你最好别靠近我，我得了重感冒。

examples.english: People didn't go anywhere near the place at night. They were frightened of ghosts.
examples.chinese: 夜里人们不到那地方附近去，他们怕鬼。

examples.english: Don't go too near the fire!
examples.chinese: 别太靠近火！

examples.english: Stay away from the edge of the cliff.
examples.chinese: 别走近悬崖的边缘。

examples.english: If I were you I'd keep well away from him. He doesn't have a good reputation.
examples.chinese: 要是我的话，就离他远点，他这人声誉不好。

examples.english: Police warned the public to keep their distance if they saw a man fitting this description.
examples.chinese: 警方提醒民众，若看到与所描述特征相符的男子，不要接近他。

examples.english: Stick to the paths, and make sure you keep your distance from nesting birds.
examples.chinese: 沿着小路走，而且要远离筑巢的鸟儿。

examples.english: Keep back, everyone! The tree may come down at any moment.
examples.chinese: 大家往后退！这棵树随时都会倒下。

examples.english: She lit the bonfire and told the children to stay well back.
examples.chinese: 她点燃篝火，叫孩子们离得远远的。

centers.english: to stay in a place and not leave it

examples.english: Stay where you are and don't move.
examples.chinese: 待在原地别动。

examples.english: I'm coming too. I'm not staying here on my own.
examples.chinese: 我也要去，我可不想一个人待在这里。

examples.english: Neighbors keep to themselves around here, they stay inside.
examples.chinese: 这里邻居之间互不往来，他们都待在自己家里。

examples.english: He stayed with the baby until she fell asleep.
examples.chinese: 他陪着宝宝直到她睡着。

examples.english: John only stayed at the party for a couple of hours.
examples.chinese: 聚会上约翰只逗留了几个小时。

examples.english: Don't go so soon -- can't you stay just a little longer?
examples.chinese: 不要这么快就走—你就不能再待一会儿吗？

expressions.text: stay for dinner/a drink/a game of cards etc

examples.english: You're welcome to stay for lunch, you know.
examples.chinese: 欢迎你留下来吃午饭！

examples.english: Are you staying for a drink, or do you have to go?
examples.chinese: 你留下来喝一杯呢，还是一定要走？

examples.english: Mom always seated me next to him whenever he stayed to supper.
examples.chinese: 他每次留下来吃晚饭，妈妈总让我坐在他的旁边。

examples.english: Are you staying to watch the game?
examples.chinese: 你留下来看比赛吗?

examples.english: He stayed behind after class to ask the teacher a few questions.
examples.chinese: 他课后留下来问老师几个问题。

expressions.gram: intransitive verb not usually in progressive

examples.english: Some 2,000 students, lecturers and university workers remained inside, refusing to leave.
examples.chinese: 有2,000名大学师生和职员留在里面，拒绝离开。

examples.english: He was determined to remain out west until he had made his fortune.
examples.chinese: 他下决心留在西部发财。

examples.english: The judge ruled that Borkin should remain in jail until his case is heard.
examples.chinese: 法官判博尔金待在狱中等候听证。

examples.english: He had finished, but he remained at the microphone for a few minutes, gazing at the audience.
examples.chinese: 他讲完了，但是在麦克风旁边待了几分钟，看着观众。

examples.english: The children will remain with their mother.
examples.chinese: 孩子们将留下来和母亲在一起。

examples.english: The others were dismissed, but Harwood was asked to remain behind.
examples.chinese: 其他人都解散了，但哈伍德被留了下来。

examples.english: He won't stay put long enough for me to take his photo.
examples.chinese: 他不肯站着不动，给我足够的时间拍照。

examples.english: I've decided to stay put until after Christmas, but after that I want to start looking for a new apartment.
examples.chinese: 我决定在原来的地方住到圣诞节以后，过完圣诞节我想开始找新的公寓。

examples.english: You sit tight while I go and get some help.
examples.chinese: 你待着别动，我去喊人来帮忙。

examples.english: I've got to stay in and look after my sister on Friday night.
examples.chinese: 星期五晚上我得待在家里照顾我妹妹。

examples.english: So, are you going out or stopping in tonight?
examples.chinese: 那么，今天晚上你是出去呢，还是待在家里？

examples.english: If you don't feel like sticking around here, we could find a place to get some coffee.
examples.chinese: 如果你不想待在这里，我们可以找个地方喝咖啡。

expressions.text: stick around for ten minutes/a while etc

examples.english: Do you guys want to stick around for a while?
examples.chinese: 你们几个想在这里待一会吗？

examples.english: I'm not stopping, I've just popped in to pick up some books.
examples.chinese: 我不久留了，只是过来拿几本书。

expressions.text: stop for tea/a chat/a cup of coffee etc

examples.english: Why don't you stop for lunch -- there's loads of food.
examples.chinese: 为什么不留下吃午饭呢一有很多东西吃啊。

centers.english: to stay in the same job, school etc and not leave it
centers.chinese: 继续做原来的工作、继续在原来的学校上学等

examples.english: Do you think she'd stay if we offered her a raise?
examples.chinese: 如果我们给她加薪，你觉得她会留下来吗?

examples.english: I've stayed at the same company for seven years, and I'd like to stick around for a while longer.
examples.chinese: 我在这家公司待了七年，还想继续待下去。

examples.english: I didn't want to stay with Jordan's all my life -- I wanted a real career, one with a future.
examples.chinese: 我不想一辈子都待在乔丹公司。我想有一个真正的事业、一个有发展前途的事业。

examples.english: Most students stay at school until they are 16 or 17.
examples.chinese: 大多数学生都继续上学，直到十六七岁左右。

examples.english: We're trying to persuade our daughter to stay in school for another year.
examples.chinese: 我们在想办法劝女儿在学校再待一年。

examples.english: Alice has never stayed in the same job for more than a year.
examples.chinese: 艾丽丝从来没有干一份工作超过一年的。

examples.english: Alvin came here initially as a session musician, but he stayed on.
examples.chinese: 阿尔文最初来这里是做录音乐师，后来他就留了下来。

examples.english: There was little encouragement for those over 65 to stay on after retirement.
examples.chinese: 不大鼓励65岁以上的人退休后继续留下来。

examples.english: He stayed on at college for an extra year to do a Master's degree.
examples.chinese: 他在大学里多待了一年攻读硕士学位。

examples.english: Forty-four per cent of fifth formers now choose to stay on at school.
examples.chinese: 五年级的学生中，有44%的人现在都选择继续上学。

examples.english: He entered University College to study zoology and stayed on to work in genetics.
examples.chinese: 他进大学学院修读动物学，后来就留了下来研究遗传学。

examples.english: He's decided to remain in his present job for the time being.
examples.chinese: 他决定暂时留下来继续做现在的工作。

examples.english: Williams was offered $200,000 to remain with the Defense Department.
examples.chinese: 他们给了威廉斯20万美元让他继续留在国防部。

examples.english: Sir Rocco Forte will remain as chief executive of the UK hotels company.
examples.chinese: 罗科·福特爵士将继续留任英国酒店管理公司的总经理。

examples.english: If you stay put, you'll be even more miserable in a year's time.
examples.chinese: 如果你待在原处，一年以后甚至会更不愉快。

centers.english: to stay somewhere a little longer

examples.english: The others went back to the hotel, but I stayed on in the bar, chatting to Alan.
examples.chinese: 其他人都回宾馆了，但我留在酒吧里陪艾伦聊天。

examples.english: It's okay, I'll stay on until you're ready to leave.
examples.chinese: 没关系，我再待到你们准备好可以走了。

examples.english: About 40 members of the audience stayed on after the performance for a glass of wine.
examples.chinese: 演出结束后，观众中大约有40个人留下来喝杯葡萄酒。

examples.english: I'll be late home -- I'm staying on to help organize the exhibition.
examples.chinese: 我要晚点回家—我要留下来帮助安排展览。

examples.english: Employees regularly stay late to complete tasks, but they are not paid overtime.
examples.chinese: 雇员经常为完成工作留得很晚，但是却拿不到加班费。

examples.english: In those days, teachers enjoyed running reading clubs, and stayed late after the bell to do so.
examples.chinese: 那时候老师爱办读书俱乐部，他们放学后会留到很晚才回家。

examples.english: If Sean failed to complete any of his classwork assignments, he had to stay after school until they were finished.
examples.chinese: 肖恩如果不能完成课堂作业，就得下课后留在学校把作业做完。

examples.english: Jack lingered for a while in the hall, hoping to get the chance to talk with her.
examples.chinese: 杰克在大厅里逗留了一会，希望有机会同她交谈。

examples.english: She lingered for a moment, uncertain what to do, then turned on her heel and left abruptly.
examples.chinese: 她不知所措地待了一会儿，然后突然转身走了。

examples.english: As she lingered over her coffee, the sky began to darken and heavy rain clouds swept in.
examples.chinese: 她慢慢地喝着咖啡，天色开始暗了下来，天空中乌云密布。

examples.english: A few fans lingered on after the concert was over.
examples.chinese: 音乐会结束后，一些乐迷仍不愿离去。

centers.english: to stay somewhere too long

examples.english: Isn't it time your friends left? They've outstayed their welcome a bit.
examples.chinese: 你的朋友是不是该走了？他们待得太久了。

examples.english: She was so worried about overstaying her welcome that she left after only one night.
examples.chinese: 她担心待得太久会惹人嫌，所以只住了一个晚上就走了。

centers.english: to stay in someone's house or at a hotel
centers.chinese: 住在某人的家里或旅馆里

examples.english: Where in New Hampshire were you staying?
examples.chinese: 你在新罕布什尔住在哪里？

examples.english: How long are you staying?
examples.chinese: 你要住多久?

expressions.text: stay (for) a few months/two weeks etc

examples.english: I was having such a good time in Paris that I phoned my mother to say I was staying another week.
examples.chinese: 我在巴黎过得非常开心，所以我打电话给母亲说我还要待一个星期。

examples.english: I stayed at my brother's house for a couple of weeks.
examples.chinese: 我在哥哥家里住了几个星期。

examples.english: Which hotel are you staying at?
examples.chinese: 你住在哪家旅馆？

examples.english: You could stay with John and Anne while you're in London.
examples.chinese: 你去伦敦的时候可以住在约翰和安妮家里。

examples.english: Is it all right if I stay the night?
examples.chinese: 我在这里过夜行吗？

examples.english: You can stay over, Gail, if it would help.
examples.chinese: 盖尔，你可以在这里过夜，如果这样对你有帮助的话。

examples.english: One of Sarah's friends is coming to stay with us this summer.
examples.chinese: 今年夏天萨拉的一个朋友要来和我们一起住。

examples.english: I went to visit her last winter and I really had a great time.
examples.chinese: 去年冬天我去看望过她，真的很开心。

examples.english: How much do you visit with your Mom and Dad while you're here?
examples.chinese: 你在这里的时候，常去看你父母吗？

examples.english: So are you just visiting friends out here or something?
examples.chinese: 那你来这里只是看看朋友什么的，是吗？

examples.english: She sent me some photographs of when she visited in December.
examples.chinese: 她给我寄来了她12月份来这里时拍的一些照片。

examples.english: Phoebe boards here during the week and goes home at weekends.
examples.chinese: 菲比平时在这里吃住，周末回家。

examples.english: I boarded with the Jansens until I found a place of my own.
examples.chinese: 我自己找到地方住之前借住在詹森家里。

examples.english: Mrs Gould and her niece are lodging in the Rising Sun.
examples.chinese: 古尔德夫人和她的侄女住在旭日酒店。

examples.english: His wife and kids were forced to lodge with friends until they found a place of their own.
examples.chinese: 他的妻儿只得寄住在朋友家里，直到他们自己找到住的地方。

centers.english: someone who is staying in a hotel or someone's house
centers.chinese: 住在旅馆或别人家里的人

examples.english: The hotel bar is for guests only.
examples.chinese: 旅馆酒吧仅供住店客人使用。

examples.english: I'm really busy - I'm expecting guests this weekend.
examples.chinese: 我真的很忙—这个周末有客人要来。

examples.english: Police evacuated hotel guests after staff received a bomb threat.
examples.chinese: 员工收到炸弹恐吓以后，警方疏散了酒店客人。

examples.english: We had guests over Christmas - three of them stayed until the New Year.
examples.chinese: 圣诞节的时候我们家来了客人，有三个客人一直待到了新年。

examples.english: Are you still looking for a lodger?
examples.chinese: 你还在寻找房客吗?

examples.english: This young lady's our new lodger.
examples.chinese: 这位小姐是我们的新房客。

expressions.text: have a lodger/have somebody as a lodger

examples.english: We had lodgers all through the war, most of them evacuees.
examples.chinese: 战争期间我们一直都有房客，大多数都是疏散出来的人。

examples.english: If you're having trouble paying your mortgage, consider taking in a lodger or at least renting out a room.
examples.chinese: 如果你在偿还抵押贷款方面有困难，可以考虑收个房客，或者至少把一个房间租出去。

centers.english: a place where you can stay for a short period of time
centers.chinese: 可以小住一段时间的地方

expressions.text: a place to stay/somewhere to stay

examples.english: She needs somewhere to stay while she's at college.
examples.chinese: 她上大学需要个住的地方。

examples.english: If I can't find a place to stay, maybe I could stay at your pad.
examples.chinese: 如果我找不到住的地方，也许要住在你家。

examples.english: The price includes flights, accommodation and transport.
examples.chinese: 这个价格包括机票、住宿和交通。

examples.english: You won't find any really luxurious accommodations, but there are adequate hotels and guest houses.
examples.chinese: 你不会找到任何很豪华的住宿，但是宾馆和小旅馆有很多。

examples.english: The cost of the six-day trip includes meals and motel accommodations.
examples.chinese: 六日游的价格包括膳食和汽车旅馆的住宿。

examples.english: The cost of rented accommodation keeps going up.
examples.chinese: 租房的费用不停地在上涨。

examples.english: The Henstocks were lucky enough to find lodgings in the village while they awaited a new home.
examples.chinese: 亨斯托克一家人很幸运，他们在等着搬新家的时候，在村子里租到了一个公寓。

examples.english: She's going to stay in lodgings until she finds a place of her own.
examples.chinese: 她在找到地方自己住之前，打算租住别人的公寓。

examples.english: She was given free board and lodgings at the school where she worked.
examples.chinese: 她工作的学校给她提供免费食宿。

examples.english: They told me the old cinema had been turned into a guest house.
examples.chinese: 他们告诉我说，那家旧电影院已经改建成小旅馆了。

examples.english: We pulled up at a little guest house, but there were no vacancies there.
examples.chinese: 我们在一家小旅馆停了车，但是那里已经客满了。

examples.english: He took two rooms in a private boarding house.
examples.chinese: 他在一个私人家庭旅馆里包了两个房间。

examples.english: Some of the boarding houses we stayed in were really run-down.
examples.chinese: 我们住的家庭旅馆中有几个实在很破旧。

examples.english: We found a cheap bed and breakfast near the coast.
examples.chinese: 我们在海边找了一家提供廉价住宿和早餐的小旅馆。

examples.english: ‘Where will you stay when you get there?’ ‘Oh, a B and B or a little guest house I expect.’
examples.chinese: “你到了那里之后会住在什么地方呢？”“噢，可能会住个包早餐的旅馆，或是一个家庭小旅馆。”

examples.english: In our third year at university, we moved into digs in Elm Street.
examples.chinese: 我们在大学三年级的时候搬到榆树街租来的地方去住了。

centers.english: to let someone stay in your home

expressions.text: have somebody to stay/have somebody staying

examples.english: I'm busy all next week - I've got people to stay.
examples.chinese: 下星期我都很忙，有人要来我家住。

examples.english: Don't plan anything for next weekend because I might be having my sister to stay.
examples.chinese: 下个周末不要做什么安排，我妹妹有可能要来住几天。

examples.english: We often had overseas students staying with us over the summer.
examples.chinese: 夏天经常有留学生来住在我们家里。

examples.english: ‘Where are you staying?’ ‘Carole's putting us up for a couple of days.’
examples.chinese: “你住在哪里？”“卡罗尔留我们住几天。”

examples.english: They put me up in the spare room for a few days while I sorted things out.
examples.chinese: 他们让我在客房住了几天，我就把事情想个清楚。

examples.english: For every child we take in, thousands are left to look after themselves on the streets.
examples.chinese: 我们收留了一个个孩子，但还有成千上万的孩子仍然流落街头。

examples.english: When Mary's parents threw her out, my mother took her in.
examples.chinese: 玛丽的父母把她赶出家门，我母亲收留了她。

centers.english: the time when you stay somewhere

examples.english: So how was the rest of your stay?
examples.chinese: 那么，后来几天你在那里怎么样？

examples.english: I met her during my stay in Venice.
examples.chinese: 我在威尼斯暂住的时候认识了她。

examples.english: It was my first visit to my wife's parents’ house.
examples.chinese: 那是我第一次上岳父母家。

examples.english: She took the whole class out there for a visit.
examples.chinese: 她把全班同学带到那里参观。

centers.english: to remain

examples.english: Jones scored with only two minutes left in the fourth quarter.
examples.chinese: 第四节仅剩下最后两分钟时，琼斯得分了。

examples.english: Is there any milk left?
examples.chinese: 还有牛奶剩下吗？

examples.english: By 5 o'clock there was no one left in the office.
examples.chinese: 5点钟时办公室已没有人了。

examples.english: How much time do we have left to finish this?
examples.chinese: 我们还剩下多少时间完成它？

examples.english: If Tracey leaves, I'll be the only girl left in the class.
examples.chinese: 如果特蕾西离开的话，我就成了唯一留在班上的女孩了。

examples.english: I pay all the bills and save any money that is left over.
examples.chinese: 我支付所有的账单，并把余下的钱存起来。

examples.english: Was there any food left over from the party?
examples.chinese: 聚会上有吃的东西剩下吗?

examples.english: Toy bears left over from an ad campaign will be donated to the children's hospital.
examples.chinese: 广告宣传活动后留下的玩具熊将捐赠给儿童医院。

examples.english: We have dealt with most things, but a few small problems remain.
examples.chinese: 我们已把大部分事情处理完毕，但还留下一些小问题。

examples.english: Some elements of the old class system still remain.
examples.chinese: 旧的社会等级制度中的一些要素仍保留至今。

examples.english: Not much remained of the house after the fire.
examples.chinese: 火灾之后，这房子已所剩无几了。

examples.english: A few problems remain to be discussed.
examples.chinese: 还有几个问题留待讨论。

examples.english: Many Roman roads still survive today.
examples.chinese: 许多古罗马的道路仍保存至今。

examples.english: The English language contains many Saxon words that have survived for over 1000 years.
examples.chinese: 英语里有许多撒克逊语单词，它们经历1,000多年仍继续存在。

examples.english: Very few government buildings survived the bombing in Hanoi.
examples.chinese: 河内被轰炸后，政府大楼所剩无几了。

examples.english: After the earthquake only a few houses were still standing.
examples.chinese: 地震之后只剩下几栋房子。

examples.english: Many of the trees Mrs. Socci planted are still standing, a hundred years later.
examples.chinese: 索奇太太种下的树中有许多在一百年之后仍然存活着。

examples.english: A stone chimney was the only thing left standing.
examples.chinese: 唯一留存下来的是一根石烟囱。

examples.english: The old barracks are still standing on the north side of the island.
examples.chinese: 那些旧兵营仍屹立在岛的北面。

examples.english: If you have time to spare, consider volunteering at your local school.
examples.chinese: 如果你有空余时间，考虑一下到当地学校去做义工。

examples.english: We arrived at the station with only a few seconds to spare before the train left.
examples.chinese: 我们到达火车站时，离开车时间只剩下几秒钟了。

examples.english: Russia is large enough that you could fit the United States inside it with room to spare.
examples.chinese: 俄罗斯大得足以把美国放进去后还有多余的地方。

examples.english: Only another mile to go!
examples.chinese: 只剩下一英里了！

examples.english: We've got another couple of hours to go before finishing.
examples.chinese: 我们还有几小时才结束。

examples.english: Evans scored with only two minutes to go in the game.
examples.chinese: 埃文斯在比赛结束前仅两分钟时得分了。

centers.english: words for describing someone or something that remains
centers.chinese: 描述剩下的人或物的词语

examples.english: Combine the remaining ingredients, mixing well.
examples.chinese: 把余下的材料混在一起拌匀。

examples.english: The remaining black bears are at risk from development in the area.
examples.chinese: 剩下的黑熊因该地区在开发而受到威胁。

examples.english: the Navy's one remaining aircraft-carrier
examples.chinese: 海军剩下的一艘航空母舰

examples.english: I need to get some more film; this is my last roll.
examples.chinese: 我还需要些胶卷，这是最后一卷了。

examples.english: The last five winners will be named next Tuesday.
examples.chinese: 下周二将宣布最后五名获胜者。

examples.english: Are there any spare chairs we can borrow?
examples.chinese: 有多余的椅子我们可以借用吗？

examples.english: You can stay with us, we have a spare bedroom.
examples.chinese: 你可以留下来和我们在一起，我们有一间备用的卧室。

examples.english: I put my spare change in a charity collection box.
examples.chinese: 我把备用零钱放入一个慈善募捐箱内。

examples.english: A lot of kids don't have enough to do in their spare time, and that's when they get into trouble.
examples.chinese: 许多小孩在空闲时间没事可干，所以就闯祸了。

examples.english: Use leftover turkey in casseroles and sandwiches.
examples.chinese: 把剩下的火鸡放到炖锅菜和三明治里去。

examples.english: She used leftover scraps of fabric to make a patchwork apron.
examples.chinese: 她利用余下的织物碎块拼凑了一件围裙。

examples.english: Take all your leftover bottles to be recycled.
examples.chinese: 把你剩下来的所有瓶子都拿去回收吧。

examples.english: We need time to catch up with outstanding orders.
examples.chinese: 我们需要时间来完成逾期的订单。

examples.english: Any outstanding claims must be settled by the end of the year.
examples.chinese: 任何未清偿的索赔都必须在年底付清。

examples.english: There are a few problems still outstanding.
examples.chinese: 还有几个问题尚未解决。

centers.english: the part of something that remains

examples.english: You carry these two bags and I'll bring the rest.
examples.chinese: 这两个包你拿，其余的我来拿。

examples.english: Homes were found for about 5,000 of the animals, but the rest had to be killed.
examples.chinese: 已经为这些动物中的5,000头左右找到了住处，但其余的就只好宰杀了。

examples.english: What will you do with the rest of the money?
examples.chinese: 其余的钱你打算怎么用?

examples.english: He'll be in a wheelchair for the rest of his life.
examples.chinese: 他的余生都要在轮椅上度过。

expressions.text: what is left of something/what remains of something

examples.english: Soldiers were firing on what remained of the church.
examples.chinese: 士兵们在教堂的废墟上开火。

examples.english: At last she went, and I settled down to enjoy what was left of the afternoon.
examples.chinese: 她终于走了，我就安下心来享受下午剩下的时间。

examples.english: The last of the tickets were sold Thursday.
examples.chinese: 余下的门票在星期四也售完了。

examples.english: This is the last of the paint, and I don't think it's going to be enough.
examples.chinese: 这是最后一点油漆了，我觉得不够用。

examples.english: The judge sentenced the last of the three defendants in the case to 10 years.
examples.chinese: 法官将本案的最后三名被告判了十年徒刑。

examples.english: £100 of the purchase price must be paid now, and the remainder is to be paid off in monthly installments.
examples.chinese: 买价中的100英镑必须现在支付，余下的每月分期付款。

examples.english: Simmer the soup uncovered for the remainder of the cooking time.
examples.chinese: 余下的烹调时间内要把汤开着盖用文火炖。

examples.english: The school board agreed to suspend Linda Cole for the remainder of the school year.
examples.chinese: 校董会一致同意勒令琳达·科尔于本学年余下时间内停学。

examples.english: Archaeologists have discovered the remains of an ancient Roman village.
examples.chinese: 考古学家发现了一座古罗马村落的遗迹。

examples.english: Each pile of gray ash was the remains of a house.
examples.chinese: 每一堆灰色的灰烬都是一幢房子的遗迹。

examples.english: We used the leftovers to make soup the next day.
examples.chinese: 第二天我们用剩菜做了个汤。

examples.english: It's a great way to use up leftovers.
examples.chinese: 这可是个利用剩菜的好办法。

examples.english: In Greece we spent a lot of time exploring old churches and ruins.
examples.chinese: 在希腊，我们花了许多时间考察古教堂和古建筑遗迹。

examples.english: the ancient Mayan ruins at Chichen Itza
examples.chinese: 位于奇琴伊察的古代玛雅遗迹

examples.english: Lumber was salvaged from the ruins of burned-out houses.
examples.chinese: 从焚毁的房屋废墟里抢救出了木材。

examples.english: Archeologists are worried that the ancient steps, walls, and other remnants may be lost forever.
examples.chinese: 考古学家担心古老的台阶、墙壁及其他残迹会永远找不到了。

examples.english: Two stained glass windows were remnants from when the building had been used as a church.
examples.chinese: 两块彩色玻璃窗是这座建筑物以前用作教堂时留下的残迹。

examples.english: Rescuers dug through the remnants of 342 cities, towns, and villages demolished in the earthquake.
examples.chinese: 营救人员在被地震摧毁的342座城镇和村庄的废墟中挖掘。

examples.english: The two leaders promised to work to remove any remnants of Cold War hostility.
examples.chinese: 那两位领导人允诺要努力消除冷战时的敌对状态遗下的任何残迹。

centers.english: a very old object, custom etc that still exists
centers.chinese: 仍然存在的十分古老的物件、风俗等

examples.english: The treaty is now a Cold War relic.
examples.chinese: 这条约现已成为冷战的遗物。

examples.english: The town is a relic from California's gold rush.
examples.chinese: 这座小镇是加州淘金热的遗迹。

examples.english: Voters passed a bill to remove a law that is a relic of the state's racist past.
examples.chinese: 投票者通过了一项提案，废除国内种族主义历史上遗留下来的一条法律。

examples.english: She knew that her feeling of awkwardness in social situations was a hangover from her schooldays
examples.chinese: 她知道自己在社交场合的尴尬感是从学生时代遗留下来的。

examples.english: The company's debt is a hangover from its attempts to expand too rapidly.
examples.chinese: 公司的债务是它试图过急地扩展业务而遗留下来的问题。

centers.english: to stop doing something

examples.english: He wrote quickly, but from time to time he stopped and looked out of the window.
examples.chinese: 他写得很快，但不时停下来看看窗外。

examples.english: I stopped reading and turned out the light.
examples.chinese: 我放下手中的书，关上了灯。

examples.english: Please will you all stop making so much noise!
examples.chinese: 请你们别这么大声好不好！

examples.english: Could you stop what you are doing and pay attention, please?
examples.chinese: 你们停下手头的事注意听，好吗？

examples.english: What time do you want to stop for lunch?
examples.chinese: 你们想什么时候停下来吃午饭？

examples.english: She spoke for ten minutes, and when she had finished the audience cheered.
examples.chinese: 她讲了十分钟，结束后听众欢呼了起来。

examples.english: We should have finished the job by next week.
examples.chinese: 下个星期我们应该做完这工作了。

examples.english: Have you finished reading the papers?
examples.chinese: 你看完报纸了吗？

examples.english: After you've finished painting the house you can start on the garage.
examples.chinese: 你油漆好房子之后，可以开始油漆车库。

examples.english: I wish he'd quit bothering me.
examples.chinese: 我希望他别来烦我。

examples.english: They should quit complaining and just get on with their job!
examples.chinese: 他们应该停止抱怨，好好干活！

examples.english: All conversation ceased as the two police officers entered.
examples.chinese: 两名警察进来，所有谈话都停止了。

examples.english: The factory has now ceased production and will close next month.
examples.chinese: 现在工厂已经停止生产，下个月就要关闭了。

examples.english: The mill ceased operating commercially two years ago.
examples.chinese: 这家工厂两年前停止商业运营。

examples.english: Many of these firms have now ceased to exist.
examples.chinese: 这些公司有很多现在已经不存在了。

centers.english: what you say when you tell someone to stop doing something
centers.chinese: 叫某人停止做某事时说的话

examples.english: Stop what you're doing when the buzzer sounds.
examples.chinese: 蜂鸣器一响就停下来。

examples.english: Will you please stop talking and listen to me!
examples.chinese: 你们不要讲话，听我说好不好！

examples.english: Stop it! You're hurting me.
examples.chinese: 住手！你弄痛我了。

examples.english: Quit that! You're driving me crazy.
examples.chinese: 停止！你都快把我逼疯了。

examples.english: I hated the way she was teasing me. ‘Quit it!’ I said.
examples.chinese: 我不喜欢她这样取笑我。“闭嘴！”我说道。

examples.english: Quit fooling around and pay attention.
examples.chinese: 别再瞎闹，专心一点。

expressions.text: cut it out/ pack it in

examples.english: Come on, you two, cut it out!
examples.chinese: 好了，你们俩，快住手！

examples.english: Just cut it out, Jim. Stop acting like a kid.
examples.chinese: 好了，吉姆，别表现得像小孩子一样。

examples.english: Oh, pack it in you lot, or we're going straight home.
examples.chinese: 噢，你们别闹了，否则我们直接回家。

examples.english: Look, I don't want to argue with you, so just lay off.
examples.chinese: 你听我说，我不想和你吵，所以别来烦我。

examples.english: Lay off the swearing, if you don't mind.
examples.chinese: 我求求你不要再咒骂了，好不好。

examples.english: Hey, lay off Vinnie, will you? He hasn't done you any harm.
examples.chinese: 嘿，放过文尼好吗？他又没犯着你。

centers.english: to stop doing something without successfully completing it
centers.chinese: 没有做成而停止做某事

examples.english: I made several attempts to repair the damage, but gave up in the end.
examples.chinese: 我几次试图修理破损的地方，但最后都放弃了。

examples.english: Come on, don't give up yet!
examples.chinese: 好了，不要现在就放弃！

examples.english: We will never give up our struggle.
examples.chinese: 我们永远不会放弃我们的斗争。

examples.english: I've given up trying to get her to change her mind.
examples.chinese: 我已经放弃劝她改变主意了。

examples.english: We did start a protest, but gave it up when we realized we would never be successful.
examples.chinese: 我们是发起过抗议，但是后来意识到我们是不可能成功的，所以就放弃了。

examples.english: Bill was cold, hungry and tired and he wanted to quit.
examples.chinese: 比尔又冷又饿又累，他想不干了。

examples.english: She was having a lot of trouble finding a job, but she refused to quit.
examples.chinese: 她找工作碰到不少困难，但她不愿放弃。

examples.english: I knew I'd never be any good at school, so I just quit trying.
examples.chinese: 我自知在学校里成绩不会好的，所以就放弃了努力。

examples.english: The government has now abandoned its plans to privatize parts of the health service.
examples.chinese: 政府现已放弃了将部分医疗保健服务私有化的方案。

examples.english: All attempts to find a peaceful solution to the conflict have now been abandoned.
examples.chinese: 和平解决这场冲突的所有努力，现在都已经放弃了。

examples.english: Owing to rough weather, the coast guard had been forced to abandon the search.
examples.chinese: 由于天气恶劣，海岸警卫队被迫放弃搜索。

examples.english: Because of strong opposition, the government has dropped plans to increase taxes on fuel.
examples.chinese: 由于遭到强烈的反对，政府已放弃了提高燃油税的方案。

examples.english: I'm too busy to just drop everything and go out for the day.
examples.chinese: 我太忙了，不可能放下一切出去一天。

examples.english: We've got most of the heavy work done, so I think we can leave it at that for today.
examples.chinese: 繁重的工作大多已经做好了，所以我想今天我们就到此为止吧。

centers.english: to stop doing an activity that you used to do regularly
centers.chinese: 停止以前经常做的活动

examples.english: I used to play a lot of tennis, but I had to stop when I injured my knee.
examples.chinese: 我以前经常打网球，但是后来膝盖受伤了，就只得停止。

examples.english: I stopped going to church after I left home.
examples.chinese: 我离开家之后就不再去教堂了。

examples.english: There's not much demand for this type of car, so we stopped making them.
examples.chinese: 这种类型的汽车需求量不大，所以我们就停止生产了。

examples.english: As he grew older he gave up going for walks and seldom went out.
examples.chinese: 随着年龄越来越大，他放弃了散步的习惯，很少出门了。

examples.english: After the accident she had to give up riding and farming.
examples.chinese: 发生事故以后，她放弃了骑马，也不干农活了。

examples.english: He gave up his job so that he could look after his wife.
examples.chinese: 他辞去工作以便照顾妻子。

examples.english: I used to really enjoy dancing, but I had to give it up after I became ill.
examples.chinese: 我以前很喜欢跳舞，可是生病以后，我就不得不放弃这个爱好。

examples.english: I think I may drop French next year and concentrate on my other languages.
examples.chinese: 我想下个学期可能要放弃学习法语，集中精力学其他语言。

examples.english: You can drop one subject at the end of this year if you're finding you've got too much work.
examples.chinese: 如果你觉得功课太重，年底的时候可以放弃一门学科。

centers.english: to stop a bad or unhealthy habit

examples.english: She had smoked for nearly twenty years before she finally managed to stop.
examples.chinese: 她抽了将近20年的烟，后来终于戒掉了。

examples.english: The health advice to people is simple - stop eating so much fat and eat more fruit and vegetables.
examples.chinese: 给人们的健康忠告很简单——不要吃那么多脂肪，要多吃水果和蔬菜。

examples.english: If you've smoked for a long time it can be very difficult to quit.
examples.chinese: 如果你抽了很长时间的烟就很难戒掉。

examples.english: They told me at the hospital to quit drinking for a while.
examples.chinese: 医院里的医生叫我暂时戒一段时间酒。

examples.english: I quit taking the pills because they were making me put on weight.
examples.chinese: 我把药停了，因为这些药使我体重增加了。

examples.english: If you smoke, try to give up or at least cut down.
examples.chinese: 如果你抽烟，那就尽量戒掉，或最起码要少抽。

examples.english: She gave up drinking over 10 years ago.
examples.chinese: 十多年前她戒了酒。

examples.english: The centre provides help for addicts who have kicked their habit and want to stay away from drugs.
examples.chinese: 这个中心为已经戒毒并且想远离毒品的人提供帮助。

examples.english: Some smokers use hypnosis to help them kick the habit.
examples.chinese: 有些抽烟者借助催眠术来戒烟。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in passive

examples.english: The doctor told me I could come off the drugs six months after the operation.
examples.chinese: 医生告诉我，动完手术六个月以后，我可以不用服药了。

examples.english: People need help to come off hard drugs like heroin and cocaine.
examples.chinese: 人们要依靠帮助来戒除海洛因和可卡因这一类硬毒品。

examples.english: Wetting the bed is a common problem, but children nearly always grow out of it.
examples.chinese: 尿床是个常见的问题，不过小孩子大了差不多都会改掉的。

examples.english: He became obsessed with football at the age of four, and he's never grown out of it!
examples.chinese: 他在四岁的时候开始迷上足球，就一直沉湎其中！

centers.english: to stop having a particular type of food or drink
centers.chinese: 停止食用某种食物或饮料

examples.english: With this diet, I have to cut out bread, cookies, and cakes.
examples.chinese: 按这样的饮食规定，我不能吃面包、曲奇饼和蛋糕。

examples.english: Try cutting out red meat and dairy produce, and see if your symptoms improve.
examples.chinese: 试试不吃红肉和乳制品，看你的症状会不会好转。

examples.english: I'm trying to lay off rich food for a while to lose some weight.
examples.chinese: 我想停吃油腻的食物一段时间来减点体重。

examples.english: If he really wants to write the book, he'll need to lay off the drink until he does it.
examples.chinese: 如果他真的想写这本书，就应该戒酒，写完后再喝。

centers.english: to stop working at the end of the day or during the day
centers.chinese: 一天结束时或一天当中停止工作

examples.english: We stop work at half past three on Fridays.
examples.chinese: 我们逢星期五3点半下班。

examples.english: They stopped work for a few minutes to consider his offer.
examples.chinese: 他们停止工作几分钟，考虑他的提议。

examples.english: What time do you finish work?
examples.chinese: 你什么时候下班？

examples.english: I don't finish until seven tonight, so I'll be late home.
examples.chinese: 我今晚7点才可以下班，所以要晚一点回家。

examples.english: Is it OK if I knock off a little early tonight?
examples.chinese: 我今晚稍早些下班行吗?

examples.english: I usually knock off at about six.
examples.chinese: 我通常6点钟左右下班。

examples.english: We realized we weren't going to get the job finished, so we decided to call it a day.
examples.chinese: 我们意识到我们完成不了这工作，于是决定今天到此为止。

examples.english: Look, we're all tired - let's call it a day.
examples.chinese: 瞧，我们都累了一今天就到此为止吧。

examples.english: Everyone packed up and went home.
examples.chinese: 大家都收工回家了。

examples.english: OK, guys - it's time to pack up now.
examples.chinese: 好了，各位，现在该收工了。

centers.english: to stop working at the end of your working life

examples.english: Mrs Davies retired after 45 years with the company.
examples.chinese: 戴维斯夫人在公司干了45年以后退休了。

examples.english: Everyone should have the right to a pension when they retire.
examples.chinese: 每个人在退休的时候都应该有权领取养老金。

examples.english: My father retired at 65.
examples.chinese: 我父亲在65岁退休。

examples.english: Since her retirement she's been spending more time with her grandchildren.
examples.chinese: 自退休以后，她花了更多的时间和孙辈们在一起。

examples.english: He was determined to enjoy his retirement.
examples.chinese: 他下决心要好好享受退休的生活。

examples.english: More and more police officers are taking early retirement.
examples.chinese: 越来越多的警察提前退休。

centers.english: words for describing something that you are unable to stop doing
centers.chinese: 描述某事没法停下不做的词语

examples.english: Her problem is her compulsive eating.
examples.chinese: 她有强迫性进食的问题。

examples.english: Compulsive behaviour is often a symptom of deeper psychological problems.
examples.chinese: 强迫性行为往往是更深层的心理问题的一个症状。

examples.english: He's a compulsive liar -- you can't believe a word he says.
examples.chinese: 他说谎成性—一个字都不能相信。

centers.english: to stop walking, running etc

examples.english: I was exhausted, and had to stop and rest.
examples.chinese: 我累极了，只得停下来休息。

examples.english: Stop! Wait a minute!
examples.chinese: 停下来！等一会儿！

examples.english: I saw Maria and stopped to say hello.
examples.chinese: 我看到玛丽亚，于是停下来打了个招呼。

examples.english: We stopped at the next village to get supplies.
examples.chinese: 我们在临近的一个村子停下来补充物资。

examples.english: The group of tourists came to a halt outside the museum.
examples.chinese: 旅游团在博物馆外面停了下来。

examples.english: He walked back across the restaurant and came to a halt beside our table.
examples.chinese: 他从餐厅的那头折回来，在我们的桌子旁边停了下来。

expressions.text: stop dead/stop dead in your tracks

examples.english: Katie stopped dead and stared at him.
examples.chinese: 凯蒂突然停了下来盯着他看。

examples.english: Francesca stopped dead in her tracks. ‘What did you just say?’ she demanded.
examples.chinese: 弗朗西丝卡一怔，“你刚才说什么？”她问道。

examples.english: I froze, and listened. Someone was in my apartment.
examples.chinese: 我站着不动地听着，有人在我的屋里。

examples.english: Captain O'Leary raised his gun and shouted ‘Freeze!’
examples.chinese: 奥利里上尉举起枪喊道：“不许动！”

centers.english: when a vehicle stops moving

examples.english: Could you stop just here on the left?
examples.chinese: 你就在这里靠左边停下来好吗？

examples.english: We'd better stop at the next gas station.
examples.chinese: 我们最好在下一个加油站停一停。

examples.english: A yellow car stopped outside the house.
examples.chinese: 一辆黄色的汽车停在房子的外面。

examples.english: We pulled up at a small cafe just outside Bordeaux.
examples.chinese: 我们在波尔多外面的一家小咖啡馆门前停了车。

examples.english: A blue van pulled up behind us.
examples.chinese: 一辆蓝色的小型货车在我们后面停了下来。

examples.english: I rounded the corner, looking for a place to pull in.
examples.chinese: 我绕过弯角，找地方停靠。

examples.english: Jeff parked in front of the house and I pulled in beside him.
examples.chinese: 杰夫把车停在房子前面，我也开到他旁边停了下来。

examples.english: A policeman was standing by the side of the road, signalling to me to pull over.
examples.chinese: 一名警察站在路旁，示意我把车停在路边。

examples.english: I pulled over and looked at the map.
examples.chinese: 我在路边停下来查看地图。

examples.english: The truck pulled over and a man got out.
examples.chinese: 卡车在路边停下来，一名男子走出来。

expressions.text: come to a stop/come to a halt

examples.english: The taxi came to a stop outside the hotel.
examples.chinese: 出租车在旅馆外面停了下来。

examples.english: The bus slowed down and came to a halt at some traffic lights.
examples.chinese: 公共汽车在一个红绿灯处减速停了下来。

examples.english: As Jamie spoke, the train came to an abrupt halt, nearly throwing us all on the floor.
examples.chinese: 杰米正说着，火车突然停车，差一点把我们都摔到地板上去。

expressions.text: come to a standstill/grind to a halt

examples.english: The train came to a standstill about a mile outside Abbeville and didn't move for 20 minutes.
examples.chinese: 火车在阿比维尔以外一英里的地方停了下来，等了20分钟。

examples.english: Traffic in the city ground to a halt as the streets filled with angry demonstrators.
examples.chinese: 满街都是愤怒的示威者，市内交通陷于停顿。

examples.english: I saw a roadblock ahead, and braked.
examples.chinese: 我看到前面有路障，就踩了刹车。

examples.english: A bus came round the corner and braked sharply.
examples.chinese: 一辆公共汽车从转弯的地方开过来，并紧急刹车。

examples.english: I slammed on the brakes, skidding to a stop.
examples.chinese: 我猛力踩下刹车，汽车滑着停了下来。

centers.english: when a bus, train etc regularly stops at particular places
centers.chinese: 公共汽车、火车等定时在某地停靠

examples.english: Does this train stop at Lyon?
examples.chinese: 这列火车在里昂停吗?

examples.english: The bus stops at the top of the hill.
examples.chinese: 那辆公共汽车在山顶停靠。

examples.english: Excuse me, could you tell me what the next stop is?
examples.chinese: 请问下一站是哪里？

examples.english: We need to get off at the next stop.
examples.chinese: 我们要在下一站下车。

examples.english: This is the 14:30 to Bristol, calling at Reading and Bath.
examples.chinese: 本班车于14：30开往布里斯托尔，沿途停靠雷丁和巴斯。

examples.english: Does this train call at York?
examples.chinese: 这列火车在约克停吗？

centers.english: to make someone stop moving

examples.english: The police are stopping drivers to ask questions about the accident.
examples.chinese: 警察截停司机查问事故的经过。

examples.english: The truck was stopped by customs officers for a routine check.
examples.chinese: 卡车被海关人员拦下来做例行检查。

examples.english: A man stopped me in the street and asked if I knew where the theatre was.
examples.chinese: 街上有个人把我叫住，问我剧院在哪里。

examples.english: It took three men to restrain him.
examples.chinese: 三个男人才制住了他。

examples.english: Mary got up to go after them, but I put out my arm to restrain her.
examples.chinese: 玛丽站起来追他们，我张开手臂拦住了她。

examples.english: They put up huge barriers to hold back the crowd.
examples.chinese: 他们设了很大的障碍来拦人群。

examples.english: My father held me back, otherwise I would have rushed up onto the stage.
examples.chinese: 要不是我父亲拦着我，我早就冲上台去了。

expressions.text: stop somebody dead/stop somebody (dead) in their tracks

examples.english: Seeing the policeman there stopped me dead. I didn't know what to do.
examples.chinese: 看到有警察，我一下子呆住了，不知道怎么办。

examples.english: Jim was stopped in his tracks by the sound of a rifle behind him.
examples.chinese: 吉姆听到身后的枪声，一下子怔住了。

examples.english: I managed to flag down a passing car and ask for help.
examples.chinese: 我设法拦下一辆过路的车请求帮助。

examples.english: The patrolman stepped out in front of the truck to flag it down.
examples.chinese: 巡警走出来站到卡车前面，挥手示意让它停下。

examples.english: The police pulled me over and checked my licence.
examples.chinese: 警察让我把车开到路边停下，检查我的驾驶执照。

examples.english: He got pulled over on the way home and had to take a breath test.
examples.chinese: 他在回家的路上被拦下来做呼气测醉试验。

examples.english: Two British ships were sent to intercept the convoy.
examples.chinese: 两艘英国船被派去拦截船队。

examples.english: All three fighter planes were intercepted and destroyed.
examples.chinese: 三架战斗机都被拦截并击毁了。

centers.english: to stop happening

examples.english: It seemed the fighting would never stop.
examples.chinese: 这场战斗似乎永远不会结束。

examples.english: Catherine stood watching the rain, hoping it would stop soon.
examples.chinese: 凯瑟琳站着看雨，希望它快点停。

examples.english: Suddenly, the cheering stopped and there was a deathly silence.
examples.chinese: 突然，欢呼声停了，出现了一片死寂。

examples.english: This waste of the earth's resources must stop.
examples.chinese: 这种浪费地球资源的行为必须停止。

examples.english: When we had children, all our trips to theatres and cinemas came to an end.
examples.chinese: 我们有了孩子之后，就再也没有去看过戏和电影了。

examples.english: Research at the college came to an end in 1870.
examples.chinese: 1870年，学院里的研究工作结束了。

examples.english: All good things must come to an end.
examples.chinese: 好的事情都有终结的时候。

examples.english: Hostilities between the two countries have now ceased.
examples.chinese: 两国之间现在已经停战。

examples.english: Presently, the rain ceased and the sun came out.
examples.chinese: 此刻，雨停了，太阳出来了。

examples.english: The sound of gunfire gradually receded and then ceased altogether.
examples.chinese: 炮火声渐渐平息，后来完全停了。

centers.english: to gradually stop happening

examples.english: Their romance fizzled out after a few months.
examples.chinese: 他们的浪漫情事几个月以后就告吹了。

examples.english: The movie made a great start, but the action seemed to fizzle out halfway through.
examples.chinese: 这部电影开头很不错，但是从中间开始就越演越差，最后草草收场。

examples.english: By midday the rain had petered out.
examples.chinese: 中午时分，雨渐渐停了。

examples.english: The road petered out into a muddy track.
examples.chinese: 路越来越窄，最后成了一条泥泞的小径。

examples.english: The protest campaign petered out after a few weeks.
examples.chinese: 几个星期以后，抗议活动渐渐平息。

examples.english: The effects of the anaesthetic will wear off within a few hours.
examples.chinese: 麻醉效果会在几个小时里逐渐消失。

examples.english: The shock has not worn off yet and he seems to be walking around in a daze.
examples.chinese: 震惊还没有过去，他好像游魂似的，精神恍惚地四处走。

examples.english: The kids spent hours on the computer at first, but the novelty soon wore off.
examples.chinese: 起初孩子们花很长时间玩电脑，但是新鲜感很快就消失了。

examples.english: He waited until the sound of the engines had faded away.
examples.chinese: 他等到引擎声逐渐消失。

examples.english: As the music faded away the audience broke into enthusiastic applause.
examples.chinese: 音乐渐渐停止，观众中爆发出热烈的掌声。

centers.english: to make something stop happening or continuing
centers.chinese: 使某事停止发生或继续下去

examples.english: The referee stopped the fight when one of the boxers was badly injured.
examples.chinese: 其中一名拳击手严重受伤，裁判就终止了这场拳赛。

examples.english: It is now time to stop the war and begin negotiations for peace.
examples.chinese: 是时候结束战争，开始和平谈判了。

examples.english: Officials are planning to take court action to stop publication of the book.
examples.chinese: 官员们打算采取法律手段，阻止这本书的出版。

examples.english: I gave my little brother some chocolate to stop him crying.
examples.chinese: 我给我的小弟弟一些巧克力让他别哭。

examples.english: An injury like this could put an end to her dancing career.
examples.chinese: 像这样的伤有可能会结束她的舞蹈生涯。

examples.english: The outbreak of war put an end to their romance.
examples.chinese: 战争的爆发结束了他俩的恋爱。

examples.english: A treaty was signed which finally brought the conflict to an end.
examples.chinese: 条约的签订终于使冲突结束了。

examples.english: There are calls for the Prime Minister to bring to an end the uncertainty about the election date.
examples.chinese: 各方在呼吁首相结束这种没有确定选举日期的局面。

examples.english: The government is determined to halt the trade in illegal animal furs.
examples.chinese: 政府决心停止非法的动物毛皮交易。

examples.english: All his efforts had failed to halt the increase in street crime.
examples.chinese: 他的种种努力都未能阻止街头犯罪的增长。

examples.english: The union decided to call off the strike when they were offered a 10% pay rise.
examples.chinese: 工资提升10%以后，工会决定取消这次罢工。

examples.english: The meeting was called off at the last minute.
examples.chinese: 这次会议在最后一刻取消了。

examples.english: The hunt for the missing boy had to be called off because of severe weather conditions.
examples.chinese: 由于天气恶劣，寻找失踪男孩的行动不得不终止。

examples.english: She was forced to cut short her holiday and return to the UK.
examples.chinese: 她只得提早结束假期，回到英国。

examples.english: His education was cut short when his father died of a sudden illness.
examples.chinese: 父亲突然因病去世，他的教育就中断了。

examples.english: The mission was aborted after news came of the capture of the city.
examples.chinese: 有消息说该市已被攻占，这次任务就终止了。

examples.english: The plane had already started its descent when the pilot received orders to abort his landing.
examples.chinese: 飞机已经开始降落，可这时飞行员接到命令，要求终止着陆。

examples.english: We have decided to suspend all production at the factory until safety checks can be carried out.
examples.chinese: 我们决定暂停工厂所有的生产活动，直到完成安全检查。

examples.english: All pay increases are to be suspended until further notice.
examples.chinese: 所有加薪计划都将暂停执行，直至另行通知。

examples.english: The trial was suspended after threats were made against witnesses.
examples.chinese: 证人受到恐吓以后，案件暂停审理。

examples.english: The President has announced the suspension of all military action in the region.
examples.chinese: 总统已经宣布暂停这个地区的所有军事活动。

examples.english: The city council has pulled the plug on the new housing development.
examples.chinese: 市议会已经终止了这个新的住宅开发项目。

examples.english: Over 1000 workers lost their jobs when the company pulled the plug on plans to open ten new stores.
examples.chinese: 公司终止了开办十家新商店的计划，一千多名工作者丢失了饭碗。

examples.english: The company has announced that it intends to freeze all salaries for a year.
examples.chinese: 公司宣布打算将所有工资冻结一年。
