examples.english: All government employees have had their salaries frozen at last year's levels.
examples.chinese: 所有政府雇员的工资都被冻结在去年的水平。

examples.english: The prime minister has announced a freeze on income tax for two years.
examples.chinese: 首相宣布将所得税冻结两年。

centers.english: to stop something quickly before it has time to develop
centers.chinese: 迅速制止某事，不让它发展

examples.english: If I'd known about their plan I could have nipped it in the bud there and then.
examples.chinese: 我要是早知道他们这个计划，当时就会立即加以阻止。

examples.english: It's important to nip this problem in the bud.
examples.chinese: 对这种问题一开始就加以阻止是很重要的。

examples.english: Her lawyers acted quickly to squash any of her husband's claims on her property.
examples.chinese: 她的律师立即作出反应，驳倒她丈夫分她财产的任何要求。

examples.english: The chairman acted quickly to squash rumours of a takeover bid.
examples.chinese: 董事会主席迅速采取行动，遏制了有人企图收购公司的谣言。

examples.english: Losing funding now would kill the project.
examples.chinese: 现在失去资金来源会使这个项目终止。

examples.english: Mr Howard released a statement in an effort to kill speculation in the press.
examples.chinese: 霍华德先生发表声明，试图压住媒体的种种猜测。

centers.english: to stop normal work or services from continuing
centers.chinese: 使正常的工作或服务不能继续下去

examples.english: Strike action has paralysed the region's public transport system.
examples.chinese: 罢工行动使该地区的公共交通系统陷入瘫痪状态。

examples.english: Over Illinois, the storm broke, paralyzing the state with blizzards and freezing temperatures.
examples.chinese: 在伊利诺伊州，风暴突然来临，暴风雪和冰冻的天气使整个州陷入了瘫痪状态。

examples.english: Unexpected bad weather has brought London to a standstill.
examples.chinese: 突如其来的恶劣天气使伦敦陷入了瘫痪。

examples.english: Further interest rate rises may bring the manufacturing industry to a standstill.
examples.chinese: 进一步调高利率可能会使制造业陷入瘫痪。

examples.english: Rail services have been brought to a standstill by severe flooding in many areas.
examples.chinese: 由于许多地区遭受严重水灾，铁路服务已陷入停顿状态。

expressions.text: bring something to a virtual standstill

examples.english: Traffic was brought to a virtual standstill as protestors drove in convoy along the motorways.
examples.chinese: 抗议者结成车队在高速公路上行驶，交通几乎全面瘫痪。

centers.english: to end the use of a system, service, or organization
centers.chinese: 废除某一制度，取消某种服务，关闭某个机构

examples.english: Ministers agreed to phase out the old voting system within two years.
examples.chinese: 各位部长同意在两年之内逐渐废除旧的选举制度。

examples.english: Older prisons will be phased out over the next few years.
examples.chinese: 在今后几年里，一些较旧的监狱将陆续关闭。

examples.english: The committee acknowledged that these chemicals are highly dangerous, and agreed to phase them out gradually.
examples.chinese: 委员会承认这些化学物非常危险，同意逐步停止使用。

examples.english: Doctors decided to discontinue the treatment when it became clear that the boy had no chance of recovering.
examples.chinese: 这个男孩显然已经没有治愈的希望，医生决定中止治疗。

examples.english: If fewer than ten students sign up, the course will be discontinued.
examples.chinese: 如果报名的学生不足十名，这门课就会停办。

centers.english: to stop something bad or illegal that people are doing
centers.chinese: 阻止人们的不良行为或违法行为

examples.english: We must take action to stop this illegal trade in ivory.
examples.chinese: 我们必须采取措施，阻止这种非法的象牙交易。

examples.english: All the staff are determined to stop bullying in the school.
examples.chinese: 所有教职工都下决心要杜绝学校里欺负弱小同学的行为。

examples.english: The new measures are intended to stop troublemakers from travelling abroad to football matches.
examples.chinese: 这些新的措施旨在阻止喜欢闹事的人出国观看足球比赛。

examples.english: Using children in this way is pure exploitation, and it's time we put a stop to it!
examples.chinese: 这样利用儿童纯粹是剥削，是时候制止这种行为了！

examples.english: She knew that if she didn't put a stop to their squabbling now, it could go on for weeks.
examples.chinese: 她知道，如果现在不结束他们的这场争吵，那就要吵好几个星期了。

examples.english: The police have introduced new measures to help stamp out violence on the city's streets.
examples.chinese: 警方采取了新的措施来帮助消除城市里的街头暴力事件。

examples.english: We are determined to stamp out prostitution in this neighborhood.
examples.chinese: 我们坚决要取缔本区的卖淫活动。

examples.english: The authorities are determined to crack down on terrorism.
examples.chinese: 当局下决心严厉打击恐怖主义。

examples.english: Teachers must crack down on bullying as soon as they become aware of it.
examples.chinese: 老师一旦发现有恃强欺弱的行为，就必须严格加以制止。

examples.english: Only by cracking down on dealers, can we stop young people getting involved with drugs.
examples.chinese: 只有严厉打击贩毒分子，我们才能阻止青少年吸毒。

examples.english: Davies was eventually caught during a government crack-down on tax evasion.
examples.chinese: 戴维斯在政府打击逃税行为的一次行动中终于被抓住了。

examples.english: The government has called a halt to the exporting of live animals.
examples.chinese: 政府已停止出口活畜。

examples.english: Companies must call a halt to the dumping of toxic waste at sea.
examples.chinese: 所有公司必须停止倾倒有毒废料入海的行为。

examples.english: The new, tougher laws are intended clamp down on the carrying of knives and other weapons.
examples.chinese: 这些新的、更严厉的法律旨在打击携带刀具等武器的行为。

examples.english: If we don't clamp down on these troublemakers now, the situation could get out of control.
examples.chinese: 如果我们现在不对这些肇事者采取严厉措施，事态可能会失控。

examples.english: Police say the clampdown on drink-driving has been highly successful.
examples.chinese: 警方说打击酒后驾车的举措卓有成效。

examples.english: The new administration has promised a clampdown on corruption.
examples.chinese: 新政府承诺要严厉打击腐败行为。

examples.english: The only way to curb the spread of the disease is by immunizing the entire population.
examples.chinese: 控制疾病蔓延的唯一途径是让所有人都接种疫苗。

examples.english: The government is introducing new measures aimed at curbing inflation.
examples.chinese: 政府正在采取新的措施，致力于抑制通货膨胀。

centers.english: to stop opposition to a government

examples.english: The army acted swiftly to suppress the uprising.
examples.chinese: 军队迅速作出反应，镇压暴动。

examples.english: Any opposition to the regime is ruthlessly suppressed.
examples.chinese: 任何反政府活动都遭到残酷镇压。

examples.english: The authorities suppressed publication of the journal.
examples.chinese: 当局禁止这份刊物的出版。

examples.english: The uprising was quickly put down.
examples.chinese: 起义很快就被镇压下去了。

examples.english: The rebellion was put down and its leaders were executed.
examples.chinese: 叛乱遭到镇压，领导的人也被处决。

examples.english: The police were instructed to break up the demonstration and arrest the ringleaders.
examples.chinese: 警方奉命驱散示威群众，逮捕为首的人。

examples.english: The protest continued peacefully until government troops moved in to break it up.
examples.chinese: 抗议活动一直和平进行，直到政府军进来驱散了人群。

examples.english: The soldiers managed to subdue the angry crowd.
examples.chinese: 士兵们终于制伏了愤怒的人群。

examples.english: The army has been used to subdue unrest in the country's capital.
examples.chinese: 该国首都发生暴动，动用了军队去镇压。

examples.english: The rebellion was quickly crushed by forces loyal to the President.
examples.chinese: 叛乱被效忠于总统的部队迅速镇压了。

examples.english: The army is stationed near the capital, ready to crush any signs of a revolt.
examples.chinese: 军队驻扎在首都附近，一旦出现叛乱的迹象，随时准备镇压。

examples.english: Extra police were called in to quell the disturbance.
examples.chinese: 增加了警力来平定骚乱。

examples.english: An anti-government riot was promptly quelled by soldiers using guns and teargas.
examples.chinese: 一场反政府的暴乱迅即被士兵们用枪和催泪弹镇压了下去。

centers.english: to end a relationship

examples.english: The affair ended after it was made public by the newspapers.
examples.chinese: 他们的暧昧关系被报纸公开后就结束了。

examples.english: Our relationship just isn't working. I've decided to end it.
examples.chinese: 我们俩的关系就是好不起来，我决定结束算了。

examples.english: We had a huge row, which marked the end of our friendship.
examples.chinese: 我们大吵了一场，结束了我们之间的友谊。

examples.english: The Senator has been urged to break off all links with arms companies.
examples.chinese: 参议员被敦促断绝与军火公司的所有联系。

examples.english: In the wake of the bombing, the UK is threatening to break off diplomatic relations.
examples.chinese: 爆炸事件发生之后，英国威胁说要断绝外交关系。

examples.english: His girlfriend has just told him that she wants to break off their engagement.
examples.chinese: 他的女友刚刚对他说要解除婚约。

examples.english: Since the job required that he be politically neutral, he had to sever his links with the Socialist Party.
examples.chinese: 由于工作需要他在政治上保持中立，所以他不得不与社会党断绝联系。

examples.english: Britain immediately severed relations with the three countries involved.
examples.chinese: 英国立即与三个涉事国家断交。

centers.english: a process that cannot be stopped

examples.english: Political change is now unstoppable, and the regime will eventually collapse.
examples.chinese: 政治改革现在已经势不可挡，这个政权最终将会瓦解。

examples.english: The war could unleash unstoppable political and economic changes.
examples.chinese: 这场战争可能会引发不可制止的政治经济变革。

examples.english: Her rise to fame seems to be unstoppable.
examples.chinese: 她的成名似乎势在必然。

examples.english: The remorseless spread of the virus has led to the deaths of thousands.
examples.chinese: 病毒的持续蔓延已经造成成千上万的人死亡。

examples.english: the remorseless advance of the invading army
examples.chinese: 侵略军不断的向前推进

examples.english: The destruction of the rainforests has gone on remorselessly for the past 30 years.
examples.chinese: 过去30年来热带雨林持续不断地遭到破坏。

examples.english: His jealousy sets him on an inexorable course towards murder.
examples.chinese: 嫉妒使他走上一条杀人的不归路。

examples.english: the inexorable decline in Britain's manufacturing industry
examples.chinese: 英国制造业无法遏止的衰退

examples.english: The story moves inexorably towards its tragic climax.
examples.chinese: 这个故事势所必然地推向悲剧性的高潮。

examples.english: New technology has brought about irreversible changes in society.
examples.chinese: 新的科技给社会带来了不可逆转的变化。

examples.english: Despite claims made by skincare manufacturers, the effects of ageing are irreversible.
examples.chinese: 尽管护肤品生产商有各种说法，衰老是不可逆转的。

centers.english: to prevent someone from doing what they want to do
centers.chinese: 阻止某人做他们想做的事情

examples.english: A leg injury may prevent Shearer from playing in tomorrow's game.
examples.chinese: 腿部受伤可能会使希勒不能参加明天的比赛。

examples.english: There were reports that some people had been prevented from voting in the election.
examples.chinese: 有报道称有些人被阻止在选举中投票。

examples.english: I've made up my mind to leave home, and you can't stop me.
examples.chinese: 我已经下定决心要离开这个家，你是拦不住我的。

examples.english: My parents tried to stop me seeing Anne.
examples.chinese: 我父母试图阻止我和安妮来往。

examples.english: The government has taken legal action to stop the BBC from broadcasting a documentary about the Secret Service.
examples.chinese: 政府采取法律行动，阻止英国广播公司播映一部有关特工部门的纪录片。

examples.english: Staying busy kept her from thinking about her illness.
examples.chinese: 她一直使自己忙碌，那就不会去想自己的病了。

examples.english: It was all I could do to keep myself from hitting him.
examples.chinese: 只有这样，我才能忍住不去揍他。

examples.english: Roger stepped forward and Martin put out his arm to restrain him.
examples.chinese: 罗杰跨步上前，马丁伸手拦住了他。

examples.english: She wanted to ask him all about his private life, but wisely restrained herself.
examples.chinese: 她很想问问他的私生活，不过还是理智地控制住了自己。

examples.english: His arm was hurting him and he had to be restrained from doing too much.
examples.chinese: 他手臂痛，只得限制自己不要做太多的事情。

examples.english: The police had already erected crash barriers to hold back the advancing crowds.
examples.chinese: 警方已经竖起防撞护栏，阻挡人群前进。

examples.english: The poor economic situation has held back investment in new technology.
examples.chinese: 经济形势不好妨碍了对新技术的投资。

examples.english: Bill leapt to his feet to go after the girl, but the others held him back.
examples.chinese: 比尔立刻跳起来去追那女孩，但是其他人拦住了他。

examples.english: She always felt that being a woman had held her back in her career.
examples.chinese: 她总是觉得身为女性妨碍了她事业的发展。

examples.english: Don't let your social life get in the way of your education.
examples.chinese: 不要让社交生活影响你的学业。

examples.english: Higher taxes are likely to discourage investment.
examples.chinese: 调高税收可能会打击投资意愿。

examples.english: It is a well known fact that a negative working environment discourages creativity.
examples.chinese: 不良的工作环境抑制人的创造力，这是人所共知的事实。

examples.english: Higher cigarette prices do not seem to discourage people from smoking.
examples.chinese: 调高香烟价格似乎阻止不了人们抽烟。

centers.english: to make sure that something does not happen

examples.english: Many people now believe that a good diet can help to prevent cancer.
examples.chinese: 现在许多人认为均衡的饮食可以帮助预防癌症。

examples.english: The new laws are designed to stop discrimination in the workplace.
examples.chinese: 这些新的法律是为了防止工作场所出现歧视而制定的。

examples.english: A special valve prevents the waste gases from escaping.
examples.chinese: 有一个特别的阀阻止废气外逸。

examples.english: Stretch the rope out to stop it getting twisted and tangled up.
examples.chinese: 把绳子拉开，以免缠结在一起。

examples.english: How does a healthy diet help in the prevention of heart attacks?
examples.chinese: 健康的饮食如何能防止心脏病的发作?

examples.english: The police are very happy to talk to local groups about crime prevention.
examples.chinese: 警方非常乐意和当地的一些团体讨论预防犯罪的问题。

examples.english: The company is anxious to avoid an expensive court case.
examples.chinese: 该公司急切地想避免一场昂贵的官司。

examples.english: We take every precaution to avoid accidents.
examples.chinese: 我们采取一切预防措施避免事故发生。

examples.english: Civilian casualties must be avoided at all costs.
examples.chinese: 必须不惜一切代价避免平民伤亡。

examples.english: It may already be too late to avert another disaster.
examples.chinese: 现在要避免另一场灾难的发生可能为时已晚。

examples.english: Talks will be held today in a final attempt to avert strike action.
examples.chinese: 今天将举行会谈，为避免罢工作最后一次努力。

examples.english: They agreed to meet government ministers in an attempt to head off a major conflict.
examples.chinese: 为了避免发生重大的冲突，他们同意与政府各部长见面。

examples.english: We managed to head off a financial crisis last year, but we may not be so lucky this year.
examples.chinese: 去年我们设法避免了一场金融危机，但今年我们就不一定这么幸运了。

examples.english: The city council is taking emergency measures to guard against flooding in the city centre.
examples.chinese: 市议会正在采取紧急措施，预防市中心洪水泛滥。

examples.english: Use sunscreen on your skin to help guard against skin cancer.
examples.chinese: 使用防晒产品帮助预防皮肤癌。

centers.english: to prevent a plan or action from succeeding
centers.chinese: 阻止某个计划或行动的成功

examples.english: Britain has threatened to block new EU legislation on human rights.
examples.chinese: 英国威胁说要阻止欧盟新的人权法规。

examples.english: The deal was blocked by the chairman, who was unwilling to commit so much company money to a risky investment.
examples.chinese: 这交易受到董事会主席的阻拦，他不愿意在一项高风险的投资上投入这么多公司资金。

examples.english: The House of Lords has been accused of obstructing change and preventing scientific progress.
examples.chinese: 上议院被指控阻挠变革，妨碍科学发展。

examples.english: It is an offence to obstruct the police during the course of their duty.
examples.chinese: 妨碍警察执行公务属违法行为。

examples.english: The counting of votes was delayed in some areas because of obstruction by local officials.
examples.chinese: 由于当地官员的阻挠，有些地区推迟了清点选票。

examples.english: He was arrested and charged with the obstruction of a police officer.
examples.chinese: 他遭到逮捕，并以妨碍警察执行公务的罪名被起诉。

examples.english: Harry knew now that nothing could thwart his plans.
examples.chinese: 哈里现在已经明白，什么都阻挠不了他的计划。

examples.english: An attempt to smuggle heroin worth £30 million into the country has been thwarted by customs officials.
examples.chinese: 走私一批价值3,000万英镑的海洛因入境的图谋被海关官员挫败了。

examples.english: The government has foiled an attempted military coup.
examples.chinese: 政府挫败了一次军事政变阴谋。

examples.english: The burglar was foiled by a passer-by who noticed the broken window and phoned the police.
examples.chinese: 窃贼被一名路人识破，这位路人发现窗户破了，于是报了警。

centers.english: to stop people from expressing their opinions

examples.english: The Mafia uses threats of physical violence or death to silence any opposition.
examples.chinese: 黑手党用暴力或死亡作威胁，把任何反对的声音压下去。

examples.english: Opponents of the regime are quickly silenced.
examples.chinese: 该政权的反对者很快就被封嘴了。

examples.english: Democracy activists have been effectively muzzled by these tough new laws.
examples.chinese: 这几条新的法律很严厉，有效地钳制了民主积极分子的言论。

examples.english: Attempts to muzzle the country's media have failed.
examples.chinese: 压制国内媒体的企图失败了。

examples.english: The government has once again used concerns about "National Security' as an excuse to gag the press.
examples.chinese: 政府又一次以担心“国家安全”为由，堵住了媒体的嘴。

examples.english: The prime minister has been accused of attempting to gag members of his government who do not agree with his policies.
examples.chinese: 首相被指控企图压制他政府里不同意他的政策的人，不让他们发言。

centers.english: to stop yourself from having or showing a feeling
centers.chinese: 不让自己产生或流露出某种情感

examples.english: Jack held back his tears and pretended not to be disappointed.
examples.chinese: 杰克忍住眼泪，假装他并没有感到失望。

examples.english: Sarah held back a sob of relief.
examples.chinese: 萨拉如释重负，但是忍住了没哭出来。

examples.english: I wanted to laugh, but I managed to hold it back.
examples.chinese: 我想笑，但是设法忍住了。

examples.english: She struggled to hold her feelings back.
examples.chinese: 她拼命地控制住自己的感情。

examples.english: She stifled a yawn as the boss read out the sales figures.
examples.chinese: 她忍住呵欠，听老板宣读销售额。

examples.english: Maria looked away and stifled a giggle.
examples.chinese: 玛丽亚转过头去，憋住没笑出来。

examples.english: I suppressed an urge to laugh.
examples.chinese: 我忍住想笑的冲动。

examples.english: He looked at me, waiting with suppressed anger.
examples.chinese: 他看着我，压住怒火等着。

examples.english: It's not good to suppress your feelings.
examples.chinese: 压抑情感是不好的。

examples.english: She managed to overcome her shyness, and stepped forward to introduce herself.
examples.chinese: 她克服了自己的腼腆，走上前介绍自己。

examples.english: Hilton stepped into the room, fighting to conquer his feelings of disgust.
examples.chinese: 希尔顿走进房间，努力克制自己的厌恶情绪。

centers.english: a problem that prevents you from achieving something
centers.chinese: 阻止你做成某事的问题

examples.english: The lack of money is a serious obstacle that could prevent the project from succeeding.
examples.chinese: 缺少资金是一个很大的障碍，可能会使项目做不成。

examples.english: The greatest obstacle to economic progress has been mass unemployment.
examples.chinese: 经济发展的最大障碍是大量失业。

examples.english: She had to overcome a lot of obstacles to finally make it to drama college.
examples.chinese: 她克服了许多障碍，最后终于考入戏剧学院。

examples.english: His disability was no bar to his entry into the profession.
examples.chinese: 他生理上的缺陷并没有成为他从事这一行业的障碍。

examples.english: Differences in religious beliefs are not necessarily a bar to a good relationship.
examples.chinese: 宗教信仰不同并不一定会妨碍人们建立良好的关系。

examples.english: I found the lack of available reference books very limiting.
examples.chinese: 我发现没有参考书可用限制很大。

examples.english: There is a lot of research that still needs to be done, but money is an important limiting factor.
examples.chinese: 仍有许多研究工作尚待完成，但是资金是一个重大的制约因素。

centers.english: to prevent someone from going somewhere

examples.english: There's a car in the way and I can't get out of the garage.
examples.chinese: 车库门口有一辆车挡着，我无法出去。

examples.english: Could you move please Sonia. You're in my way.
examples.chinese: 请你挪一挪好吗？索尼娅，你挡着我的路了。

examples.english: A big truck had turned over on its side, and it was blocking the road.
examples.chinese: 一辆大卡车向一侧翻倒了，挡住了道路。

examples.english: Hundreds of protesters blocked the entrance to the President's palace.
examples.chinese: 数百名抗议者堵住了总统府的入口。

examples.english: A small aircraft now obstructed the runway.
examples.chinese: 现在有一架小型飞机挡着跑道。

examples.english: The driveway was obstructed by piles of stones and gravel.
examples.chinese: 车道上有一堆堆的碎石瓦砾挡了路。

examples.english: A truck was causing an obstruction on the road.
examples.chinese: 一辆卡车造成了道路堵塞。

examples.english: Construction workers building the tunnel have encountered a number of obstructions.
examples.chinese: 修筑隧道的建筑工人遇到了许多障碍。

examples.english: The automatic barrier lifted as we drove up.
examples.chinese: 我们开车过去，自动道闸升了起来。

examples.english: The driver slowed down as he approached the police barrier.
examples.chinese: 驾驶员驶近警方设置的路障时减速了。

examples.english: Only a flimsy barrier stops the crowd from spilling onto the field.
examples.chinese: 只有一道不是很结实的护栏挡着观众，不让他们涌到球场上去。

examples.english: In June 1948 the Russians blockaded the western sectors of Berlin.
examples.chinese: 1948年6月，苏联人封锁了柏林西区。

examples.english: A US fleet blockaded the port of Veracruz.
examples.chinese: 一支美军舰队封锁了韦拉克鲁斯港。

examples.english: Getting food supplies through the blockade is almost impossible.
examples.chinese: 把食品供给运过封锁线几乎是不可能的。

centers.english: intended to prevent something happening

examples.english: We should spend more money educating people about preventive medicine.
examples.chinese: 我们应该花更多的钱来教育人们认识预防性药物。

examples.english: Schools must take preventative measures so that this type of tragedy never happens again.
examples.chinese: 学校必须采取预防措施，杜绝这种悲剧再次发生。

examples.english: Preventative action can easily be taken to avoid damp occurring in your house.
examples.chinese: 家里采取防潮措施是很容易的。

examples.english: The US says it is prepared to launch a pre-emptive strike with nuclear weapons if it is threatened.
examples.chinese: 美国称已作好准备，一旦受到威胁，会以核武器实施先发制人的打击。

centers.english: something that can be prevented

examples.english: Whooping cough and measles are both preventable diseases.
examples.chinese: 百日咳和麻疹都是可预防的疾病。

examples.english: Many of these deaths each year are preventable.
examples.chinese: 每年的这些死亡个案中，有许多都是可避免的。

examples.english: Running out of gas is annoying and easily avoidable.
examples.chinese: 汽油用完很令人气恼，但也是很容易避免的。

examples.english: Too many children are still injured in avoidable accidents.
examples.chinese: 仍有许许多多的儿童在本可避免的意外事故中受伤。

centers.english: to wait

examples.english: Wait here until I get back.
examples.chinese: 在这里等我回来。

examples.english: Hurry up, everyone's waiting.
examples.chinese: 快点，大家都在等着呢。

examples.english: I'll stay here and wait for Suzie.
examples.chinese: 我会待在这儿等苏齐。

examples.english: We spent almost an hour just waiting for the bus.
examples.chinese: 我们等公共汽车就花了将近一小时。

expressions.text: wait (for) a minute/two hours/a long time etc

examples.english: Where have you been? I've been waiting since 7:00.
examples.chinese: 你去哪儿了？我从7点起就在等了。

examples.english: You'll have to wait a few minutes - I'm not ready yet.
examples.chinese: 你得等几分钟—我还没准备好呢。

examples.english: Are you waiting to use the phone?
examples.chinese: 你在等着用电话吗？

expressions.text: wait for somebody/something to do something

examples.english: She waited for him to reply.
examples.chinese: 她等他的答复。

examples.english: He waited for the applause to die down before he continued speaking.
examples.chinese: 他等掌声平息下来再继续讲话。

examples.english: I'm so sorry I kept you waiting.
examples.chinese: 对不起，让你久等了。

examples.english: I've done as much as I can - now all I can do is wait and see what happens.
examples.chinese: 我已尽力而为了一现在我能做的就是等等看会发生什么。

examples.english: The airline industry has adopted a wait-and-see attitude to the report's proposals.
examples.chinese: 对于这份报告的建议，航空业采取了观望态度。

examples.english: Captain Damas decided it was best to hold on and wait for the other ship to arrive.
examples.chinese: 达马斯船长决定最好再等一下，等另一艘船到来。

examples.english: We knew that if we hung on long enough, things were bound to change.
examples.chinese: 我们知道，只要坚持下去，事情肯定会改变的。

examples.english: Sally hung around for over an hour but no-one came.
examples.chinese: 萨莉空等了一个多小时，但一个人也没来。

examples.english: I wish we could get on with the job. I hate all this hanging about.
examples.chinese: 我希望我们能继续把工作干下去，我不喜欢这么干等。

examples.english: We spent half an hour hanging about for Kerry.
examples.chinese: 我们干等了克里半小时。

examples.english: We were hanging around for hours before they opened the gates.
examples.chinese: 我们等候了几个小时他们才开门。

examples.english: We can't keep our troops hanging around forever, doing nothing.
examples.chinese: 我们不能让军队永远这么耗着，无所事事。

examples.english: The family stood by, knowing that she might wake up any minute.
examples.chinese: 一家人守候着，知道她可能随时醒过来。

examples.english: The crew was ordered to stand by for take-off.
examples.chinese: 机组人员奉命作好起飞准备。

examples.english: The Foreign Minister had a helicopter standing by to whisk him to the northern city of Afula.
examples.chinese: 外交部长有一架直升机，随时待命迅速将他送往阿富拉北部城市。

examples.english: Everyone has to wait their turn.
examples.chinese: 所有人都得轮候。

expressions.text: wait your turn to do something

examples.english: A long line of people waited their turn to shake his hand.
examples.chinese: 长长的一队人等着与他握手。

examples.english: If the plane's late, there's nothing we can do except sit it out.
examples.chinese: 要是飞机误点，我们只能耐心等候。

examples.english: Tony forced himself to sit the play out.
examples.chinese: 托尼逼自己耐着性子坐到那出戏演完。

examples.english: Like many people in the community, we sat out the storm at home, hoping no disasters would occur.
examples.chinese: 与社区里的许多人一样，我们在家里等待暴风雨过去，希望不会发生灾害。

examples.english: The committee is awaiting a decision from head office before it takes any action.
examples.chinese: 委员会在等待总部作出决定之后再采取行动。

examples.english: Two men have been charged with murder and are now in prison awaiting trial.
examples.chinese: 两个男人被控谋杀，现在在押候审。

examples.english: The next morning we received the long-awaited order to attack.
examples.chinese: 第二天早上，我们接到等了很久的进攻命令。

examples.english: It is hoped that these measures will trigger the long-awaited upturn in the economy.
examples.chinese: 希望这些措施能带来盼望已久的经济复苏。

centers.english: what you say to tell someone to wait

examples.english: Wait, I have a better idea.
examples.chinese: 等一下，我想到了一个更好的主意。

examples.english: Wait! We haven't talked to Vicky yet.
examples.chinese: 等一下！我们还没跟维基说呢！

examples.english: Wait a minute. I forgot to turn off the lights.
examples.chinese: 且慢，我忘记关灯了。

examples.english: Wait a second, don't rush off!
examples.chinese: 等一等，别急！

examples.english: Just a minute, I'm almost ready.
examples.chinese: 稍等一下，我马上就准备好。

examples.english: Just a second, let me just check I've got my keys with me.
examples.chinese: 稍等一会，让我看看是不是把钥匙带上了。

examples.english: Hold on - I haven't finished yet.
examples.chinese: 等等，我还没做完呢。

examples.english: Hang on a minute while I find her phone number.
examples.chinese: 等一会儿，我来找她的电话号码。

examples.english: ‘So what's this surprise you've got for me then?’ ‘Wait and see.’
examples.chinese: “那么你给我带来什么惊喜呢？”“等着看吧。”

examples.english: I'm not going to tell you who else I've invited - you'll just have to wait and see.
examples.chinese: 我不会告诉你还邀请了谁，你等着看就是了。

examples.english: Let's load up the program and see how things go.
examples.chinese: 我们把程序装好再看情况。

examples.english: See how things go for another week, and if you're no better we'll change the treatment.
examples.chinese: 再观察一个星期，要是没有好转，我们就改变疗法。

examples.english: Wait up, you guys! I can't walk that fast.
examples.chinese: 等一下，各位！我走不了那么快。

expressions.text: I'll be right with you/be right there

examples.english: I'm sorry for the delay, sir - I'll be right with you.
examples.chinese: 先生，对不起耽搁了—我很快就到。

examples.english: Hang your coat up and make yourself at home - I'll be right there.
examples.chinese: 把外套挂起来，别拘束—我马上就来。

examples.english: If you'll just bear with me, I'll explain.
examples.chinese: 你们要是有耐心，我就解释给你们听。

examples.english: Bear with me for just a couple of minutes while I find my notes.
examples.chinese: 耐心等我几分钟，我在找我的笔记。

examples.english: Hold your horses - I haven't even said I'll do the job yet!
examples.chinese: 别急，我还没说我要干这工作呢！

examples.english: ‘When are we going to open the presents?’ ‘All in good time.’
examples.chinese: “我们什么时候把礼物打开呢？”“不急。〕

centers.english: a period of time when you have to wait

examples.english: I'm sorry you have had such a long wait.
examples.chinese: 对不起让你久等了。

examples.english: Relatives now face an anxious wait while the emergency services search the wreckage for survivors.
examples.chinese: 紧急应变机构在残骸中搜寻生还者的时候，亲属在焦急地等待。

examples.english: After a four-hour wait at the airport, we finally got on a flight to New York.
examples.chinese: 在机场等了四小时后，我们终于登上了飞往纽约的班机。

examples.english: A lot of patients face a two-year wait for treatment.
examples.chinese: 许多病人要等待两年才能得到治疗。

centers.english: to make someone wait

examples.english: I'm sorry to keep you waiting.
examples.chinese: 对不起让你久等了。

examples.english: She was annoyed because she had been kept waiting.
examples.chinese: 老是让她等着，她生气了。

examples.english: Lott kept us waiting for 40 minutes while he attended another meeting.
examples.chinese: 洛特参加了另一个会议，让我们等了40分钟。

examples.english: Shaw made us wait a few days before giving us an answer.
examples.chinese: 肖故意让我们等了几天才告诉我们答案。

examples.english: They made me wait for half an hour before allowing me to see my father.
examples.chinese: 他们故意让我等了半个小时才允许我见父亲。

examples.english: Come on - don't keep us in suspense - who won?
examples.chinese: 好啦—别让我们心悬着—谁赢了？

examples.english: The audience is kept in suspense to the very end of the play.
examples.chinese: 观众焦急地一直等到戏演完了。

examples.english: They kept me hanging on for three weeks before they finally told me they weren't going to give me the job.
examples.chinese: 他们让我空等了三个星期，最后才告诉我不会给我那份工作。

centers.english: when you stand in a line of people waiting

examples.english: Students were queuing up at the bus-stop.
examples.chinese: 学生在公共汽车站排队等候。

examples.english: It's worth queuing up to get the best tickets.
examples.chinese: 排队买最好的票是值得的。

examples.english: I hope we don't have to queue for tickets.
examples.chinese: 我希望我们不需要排队买票。

examples.english: Go and wait in line like everyone else.
examples.chinese: 跟别人一样去排队。

examples.english: There were about 50 people standing in line for tickets outside the club.
examples.chinese: 俱乐部外有50人左右在排队买票。

expressions.text: stand/wait in line to do something

examples.english: People stood in line to touch him, believing his body had healing powers.
examples.chinese: 人们排着队要来摸他，相信他的身体有治病的能力。

examples.english: The guard ordered us to line up by the wall.
examples.chinese: 卫兵命令我们靠墙排好队。

examples.english: Christopher and the other children lined up to receive their awards.
examples.chinese: 克里斯托弗和其他孩子排队领奖。

examples.english: The queue went right round the block.
examples.chinese: 队伍就绕着街区排了起来。

examples.english: There was a long queue for the toilets.
examples.chinese: 厕所门口排起了长队。

examples.english: After waiting for an hour, we finally got to the front of the line.
examples.chinese: 等了一小时，我们终于排到了队伍的前面。

examples.english: I joined the queue for a taxi.
examples.chinese: 我排队等出租车。

examples.english: Two people tried to get in line ahead of us.
examples.chinese: 两个人试图在我们前面插队。

expressions.text: be in the queue /be in (the) lin

examples.english: While I was in the queue at the bank I met an old school friend.
examples.chinese: 我在银行排队时遇到了一位老同学。

examples.english: Kerry started talking to the people who were in line ahead of us.
examples.chinese: 克里开始与排在我们前面的人交谈起来。

examples.english: Several people in the line for the rollercoaster gave up and left.
examples.chinese: 有几个排队坐过山车的人放弃排队离开了。

examples.english: My official uniform meant that we could jump the queue.
examples.chinese: 我的官式制服意味着我们可以插队。

examples.english: While ordinary citizens had to wait months to get hospital treatment, government officials were able to jump the queue.
examples.chinese: 普通公民要等好几个月才得到住院治疗，而政府官员却能插队。

examples.english: I hate people who push in in front of me!
examples.chinese: 我讨厌人家在我前面插队。

examples.english: Hey, that guy just cut in line!
examples.chinese: 嗨，那家伙插队了！

centers.english: when someone is waiting for something to happen

examples.english: I'm sure she'll write soon. Just try to be patient.
examples.chinese: 我相信她很快就会写信来的，耐心点吧。

examples.english: Halle was patient, waiting for the boy to finish his explanation.
examples.chinese: 哈利很有耐心，等那男孩子解释完。

examples.english: The audience waited patiently for the show to begin.
examples.chinese: 观众耐心地等待演出开始。

examples.english: It's easy to grow your own plants - all you need is a little time and patience.
examples.chinese: 种植花草很简单—需要的只是一点点时间和耐心。

examples.english: Don't be so impatient. I'm working as fast as I can.
examples.chinese: 别那么没有耐心，我已在尽快干了。

examples.english: By this time there was a queue of impatient customers waiting to be served.
examples.chinese: 这时，已经有一队很不耐烦的顾客在等着有人去招呼他们。

examples.english: The new minister was almost immediately the object of attack by politicians and press impatient for results.
examples.chinese: 新部长几乎立即成了没有耐心等待结果的政客和媒体攻击的目标。

examples.english: I could see that Max was getting impatient with me.
examples.chinese: 我看得出马克斯对我越来越不耐烦了。

examples.english: The customs officer waved them on impatiently.
examples.chinese: 海关官员不耐烦地挥手叫他们往前走。

examples.english: People were beginning to show signs of impatience.
examples.chinese: 人们开始表现出不耐烦的迹象了。

examples.english: I'm really looking forward to this trip to Japan.
examples.chinese: 我非常期待这次日本之行。

examples.english: We used to look forward to the weekends because that was when we could spend some time together.
examples.chinese: 我们过去常常盼望周末，因为周末我们就可以有时间在一起了。

expressions.text: look forward to to doing something

examples.english: I look forward to meeting you next month.
examples.chinese: 我盼望着下个月跟你见面。

examples.english: We're flying to Austria on Friday. I can't wait!
examples.chinese: 我们星期五就要坐飞机去奥地利；我都等不及了！

examples.english: I can't wait for Christmas!
examples.chinese: 我迫不及待要过圣诞节了！

examples.english: School is so boring. I can't wait for the holidays to come.
examples.chinese: 上学很没劲，我迫不及待要放假了。

examples.english: I can't wait to see their new house.
examples.chinese: 我迫不及待想看他们的新房子。

examples.english: She couldn't wait to quit her job and get married.
examples.chinese: 她巴不得辞职结婚去。

examples.english: Rachel held her breath as she waited for his answer.
examples.chinese: 雷切尔屏住呼吸，等他的回答。

examples.english: The art world will be holding its breath to see how much these paintings sell for at auction.
examples.chinese: 艺术界将屏息以待想看看这些画在拍卖会上可以卖得多少钱。

examples.english: Bright expectant faces were turned upward toward the stage.
examples.chinese: 一张张欢快的、充满期待的脸都抬起来转向舞台。

examples.english: Expectant crowds waited outside the theatre.
examples.chinese: 期待的人群在剧院外等候。

examples.english: The darkened assembly room became suddenly hushed and expectant as the picture appeared on the screen.
examples.chinese: 屏幕上出现图像时，黑漆漆的会议室里顿时安静下来，充满了期待。

examples.english: Patrick looked at me expectantly.
examples.chinese: 帕特里克满心期待地看着我。

centers.english: to go away from a place

examples.english: Just as I was leaving, the phone rang.
examples.chinese: 我正要走，电话铃响了。

examples.english: I want to see you before I leave.
examples.chinese: 我走之前想见见你。

examples.english: The police wanted to know what time he had left the office.
examples.chinese: 警方想知道他是什么时候离开办公室的。

examples.english: Hand back the identity card when you leave the building.
examples.chinese: 离开大楼时把身份牌交回去。

examples.english: When does the next bus go?
examples.chinese: 下班车什么时候开?

examples.english: We stayed another ten minutes and then we went.
examples.chinese: 我们又逗留了十分钟，然后就走了。

examples.english: I'll have to go soon - was there anything else you wanted to talk about?
examples.chinese: 我马上就得走了—你还有别的什么想谈的吗？

examples.english: Don't go just yet - it's not that late!
examples.chinese: 别现在就走—还没那么晚呢！

examples.english: I'm just going out for a minute, I won't be long.
examples.chinese: 我只是出去一会儿，不会很久的。

examples.english: As she went out of the room she slammed the door.
examples.chinese: 她走出房间的时候把门“砰”的一声关上。

examples.english: He's just gone out to buy some bread.
examples.chinese: 他刚刚出去买面包了。

examples.english: I'm going away next week. Would you mind feeding the cat for me?
examples.chinese: 我下个星期要外出，你能否帮我喂一下猫？

examples.english: ‘Are you going away this summer?’ ‘Yes, we're going to Greece in August.’
examples.chinese: “这个夏天你要外出度假吗？”“要呀，我们打算8月份去希腊。”

examples.english: He's been really unhappy since she went away.
examples.chinese: 自从她走了以后，他很不开心。

examples.english: They just went off, without even saying goodbye.
examples.chinese: 他们说走就走，连再见也没说一声。

examples.english: Many trainees don't finish the course and go off and work in other areas.
examples.chinese: 许多受训者不等课程结束就走掉干别的去了。

examples.english: When we could not find out what was wrong with the car, Billy went off to find a phone.
examples.chinese: 我们找不出汽车故障出在哪里，比利就走开去找电话了。

centers.english: what you say when you are going to leave

examples.english: Okay, I'm off now.
examples.chinese: 好了，我现在要走了。

examples.english: Right. I'm off to bed.
examples.chinese: 好了，我要去睡觉了。

examples.english: That's it. I'm outta here!
examples.chinese: 够了，我要走了！

examples.english: Anyway, I gotta go. Catch up with you later.
examples.chinese: 好了，我现在得走了，回头再找你。

examples.english: I must be going. I've got to pick the kids up at four.
examples.chinese: 我得走了，我4点钟要接孩子。

examples.english: I'll have another coffee ,and then I must dash.
examples.chinese: 我再喝杯咖啡就得赶紧走了。

expressions.text: I'd better make tracks/ I'd better make a move

examples.english: We'd better make tracks, or we'll miss our train.
examples.chinese: 我们得马上出发了，否则会赶不上火车的。

examples.english: I think we'd better make a move before it gets dark.
examples.chinese: 我想我们最好趁天黑之前就走。

examples.english: Oh no. It's him again. I'm getting out of here!
examples.chinese: 噢，不好，又是他，我得赶快离开这里！

centers.english: ways of telling someone to leave

examples.english: I wish you'd all just go away and leave me alone!
examples.chinese: 我希望你们都走开，让我一个人待着！

examples.english: Major Ferguson opened a window, and shouted to the waiting reporters: ‘You're wasting your time. Go away!’
examples.chinese: 弗格森少校打开一扇窗户，朝等在外面的记者喊道：“你们这是在浪费时间，走吧！”

examples.english: Get out! Just get out will you? I never want to see you again!
examples.chinese: 出去！你出去好不好？我再也不想见到你！

examples.english: Get out of here and leave me alone!
examples.chinese: 走开，别管我！

examples.english: I've told you before that we don't need our windows cleaning, so just clear off and don't come back!
examples.chinese: 我以前跟你说过我们的窗户不需要清洁，你滚吧，不要再来了！

examples.english: Look, just push off will you. You're getting on my nerves.
examples.chinese: 你滚吧，烦死我了。

examples.english: Get lost you creep! Stop following me.
examples.chinese: 滚开，你这讨厌鬼！不要再跟着我。

examples.english: Beat it, you two. I've had enough of you for one day.
examples.chinese: 你们两个快走开，我一天就受够了你们。

centers.english: to leave at the start of a journey

examples.english: I have to leave early tomorrow morning to fly to Detroit.
examples.chinese: 我明天得一早出发乘飞机去底特律。

examples.english: Her plane leaves Hong Kong at 10.00.
examples.chinese: 她的飞机10点钟从香港起飞。

examples.english: When are you leaving to go on holiday?
examples.chinese: 你们什么时候去度假？

examples.english: When we arrived at the bus station, the bus had just left.
examples.chinese: 我们赶到车站的时候，公共汽车刚刚开走。

examples.english: I'm leaving for Paris on Tuesday.
examples.chinese: 我星期二启程去巴黎。

examples.english: Coaches leave from Victoria every hour.
examples.chinese: 每个小时都有长途公共汽车从维多利亚开出。

examples.english: The trip is all planned - we're going in September.
examples.chinese: 旅行都安排好了—我们9月份动身。

examples.english: Do you know what time the next bus goes?
examples.chinese: 你知道下一班公共汽车什么时候开吗？

examples.english: I've packed all my bags, and I'm ready to go.
examples.chinese: 我的行李都收拾好了，准备好出发了。

examples.english: If we set off early in the morning we should reach the coast before dark.
examples.chinese: 如果我们一大早动身，天黑前应该能到达海岸。

examples.english: We set off for Brighton in good spirits.
examples.chinese: 我们兴致勃勃地动身前往布赖顿。

examples.english: I think we'd better be off now - it'll take at least an hour to get to the airport.
examples.chinese: 我觉得最好现在就出发—到机场至少要一个小时。

examples.english: When are you off to Canada?
examples.chinese: 你什么时候动身去加拿大？

examples.english: The bus was due to depart at any moment.
examples.chinese: 公共汽车马上就要开出。

examples.english: The 12.15 shuttle service to Atlanta will depart from platform 16.
examples.chinese: 12点15分去亚特兰大的往返列车将从16号站台开出。

examples.english: The 06:33 Pullman will depart from London Euston from platform 4.
examples.chinese: 6点33分的普尔曼式卧铺列车将从伦敦尤斯顿的4号站台开出。

examples.english: The train departs Waterloo at 09:00 hours on Saturday.
examples.chinese: 火车在星期六早上9点钟从滑铁卢车站开出。

examples.english: The departure of flight BA 121 to Milan has been delayed by fog.
examples.chinese: 去米兰的BA121航班因大雾而延迟起飞。

examples.english: There are hourly departures to Washington during the week.
examples.chinese: 平日每小时都有一班车开往华盛顿。

examples.english: Children spent hours watching the planes take off and land.
examples.chinese: 孩子们花了好几个小时观看飞机起降。

examples.english: This is your Captain speaking. We are due to take off in five minutes.
examples.chinese: 我是机长。我们五分钟后就要起飞了。

examples.english: Planes were unable to take off from Gatwick owing to high winds.
examples.chinese: 飞机由于大风不能从盖特威克机场起飞。

examples.english: Seat-belts must remain fastened until after takeoff.
examples.chinese: 安全带必须系到飞机起飞之后。

examples.english: Eddie ran out of the house, jumped into his car, and drove off.
examples.chinese: 埃迪跑出房子，跳进汽车，然后开车离去。

examples.english: Someone had smashed into her car, and then just driven off.
examples.chinese: 有人撞了她的汽车就开车跑了。

examples.english: Adrian just had time to see his father jump into the truck and drive off in a cloud of dust.
examples.chinese: 阿德里安只来得及看见父亲跳入卡车，在一阵飞扬的尘土中疾驶而去。

examples.english: We got there just as the train was pulling out.
examples.chinese: 我们就在火车正要离站的时候赶到。

examples.english: Thousands of people stood waving on the quay as the Titanic set sail.
examples.chinese: “泰坦尼克”号起锚开航，成千上万的人站在码头上挥手送别。

examples.english: In November 1928, she set sail for India and arrived in Calcutta seven weeks later.
examples.chinese: 1928年11月，她启航前往印度，七个星期之后来到了加尔各答。

examples.english: It was a bitterly cold morning when we sailed from Dover.
examples.chinese: 那是一个寒冷刺骨的早晨，我们从多佛尔启航出发了。

centers.english: to leave a room or building for a short time
centers.chinese: 暂时离开一个房间或建筑物

examples.english: I'm just nipping out to get some milk. Does anyone want anything?
examples.chinese: 我出去买点牛奶，有人需要什么东西吗?

examples.english: She just stepped out for a breath of fresh air.
examples.chinese: 她只是出去透透气。

centers.english: to leave quickly in order to avoid trouble, danger etc
centers.chinese: 为避免麻烦、危险等赶紧离开

examples.english: They ran off as soon as they heard the police car coming.
examples.chinese: 他们一听到警车来就赶紧逃跑。

examples.english: My brother ran away to South America to escape his debts.
examples.chinese: 我弟弟逃到了南美去躲债。

examples.english: Zimmerman was so scared, he just ran off.
examples.chinese: 齐默尔曼非常害怕，就逃走了。

examples.english: Why did you run off like that? Was Joey nasty to you?
examples.chinese: 你为什么逃得那么快？乔伊欺负你了吗？

examples.english: Arthur shot off before anyone could say anything.
examples.chinese: 大家还没说什么，阿瑟就溜走了。

examples.english: I've really got to shoot off - I said I'd be home ten minutes ago.
examples.chinese: 我真得赶紧走了一我十分钟前就说要回家的。

examples.english: If you tell him it's his turn to buy the drinks, you won't see him for dust!
examples.chinese: 如果你说轮到他买饮料了，你就不会见到他的人影！

examples.english: You'd better make yourselves scarce before the manager gets here.
examples.chinese: 你们最好在经理来之前离开。

examples.english: When Gary and Clare began to argue, Reg decided to make himself scarce.
examples.chinese: 加里和克莱尔吵了起来，雷吉决定开溜。

centers.english: to leave after doing something wrong or illegal
centers.chinese: 做错事或犯法之后逃跑

examples.english: Police surrounded the building, but somehow the gunman managed to escape.
examples.chinese: 警察包围了大楼，但是那名持枪歹徒还是设法逃跑了。

examples.english: He was one of nine men who escaped from prison in July.
examples.chinese: 他是7月份越狱的九名犯人之一。

examples.english: Four prisoners escaped through a hole in the fence.
examples.chinese: 四名犯人穿过围篱上的一个洞口逃跑了。

examples.english: Thieves escaped with jewelry and $130,000 in cash.
examples.chinese: 盗贼带着珠宝和13万美元现金逃之夭夭。

examples.english: The gang had planned their escape thoroughly.
examples.chinese: 这帮匪徒已详细制定了逃跑计划。

examples.english: We ran after the mugger as fast as we could, but he got away.
examples.chinese: 我们尽快追赶行凶抢劫的歹徒，但他还是逃走了。

examples.english: He got away down a back alley.
examples.chinese: 他从一条后巷逃走了。

examples.english: Thieves got away with silver and several valuable paintings, including one by Picasso.
examples.chinese: 窃贼偷走了银器和几幅很值钱的画，其中有一幅是毕加索的。

examples.english: The robbers made their getaway in a stolen car, which was waiting for them outside the bank.
examples.chinese: 劫匪钻进一辆偷来的车里逃跑了，那车就停在银行外面接应他们。

centers.english: to leave quietly or secretly

examples.english: Occasionally she and a friend would sneak off during their free study hour.
examples.chinese: 偶尔，她会在上自习课的时候和一位朋友溜出去。

examples.english: I don't know what he's up to, but he sneaks away from work early every Tuesday.
examples.chinese: 我不知道他在搞些什么，每个星期二都要提前下班溜走。

examples.english: Annie had sneaked out to the bar, hoping that her parents wouldn't notice she was gone.
examples.chinese: 安妮偷偷地溜到酒吧去了，她希望父母不会发觉自己走了。

examples.english: Harriet glanced around, wondering if she could slip out unnoticed.
examples.chinese: 哈丽雅特看了看四周，在想能不能趁人不备溜出去。

examples.english: When everyone was busy talking I slipped away to join Beth for a quiet drink.
examples.chinese: 趁大家都忙于谈话，我悄悄地溜出去和贝丝安安静静地喝了一杯。

examples.english: While the manager was away, Brian took the opportunity to slope off home an hour early every day.
examples.chinese: 经理不在期间，布赖恩每天都趁机提早一小时溜回家。

examples.english: ‘Where's Sam?’ ‘I saw him sloping off to the pub half an hour ago.’
examples.chinese: “萨姆在哪儿？”“半小时前我看见他溜到酒吧去了。

examples.english: Alyssia had dumped her fiancé just two weeks before the wedding, and then slunk off to the south of France.
examples.chinese: 就在婚礼的两个星期之前，阿莉西娅抛弃了未婚夫，溜到法国南部去了。

centers.english: to leave somewhere angrily

examples.english: Furious by now, I walked out, leaving him sitting there shocked and white-faced.
examples.chinese: 我这时已气愤至极，于是愤然离去，留下他坐在那儿惊愕得脸色发白。

examples.english: She yelled at me and stormed out, slamming the door behind her.
examples.chinese: 她朝着我叫喊着，然后怒气冲冲地冲出屋子，“砰”地一声摔上了门。

examples.english: He has been known to storm out of meetings on several occasions.
examples.chinese: 据说，他有好几次在开会时愤怒地离场。

examples.english: ‘I'm not putting up with your sexist comments any more,’ said Gilly, flouncing out.
examples.chinese: “我再也忍受不了你那些性别歧视的言论。”吉莉说完，愤然离去。

examples.english: She flounced out of the restaurant, got into her car, and drove off into the night.
examples.chinese: 她愤怒地冲出饭馆，钻进车子，然后开着车在夜色中消失。

centers.english: to leave unwillingly

examples.english: The view was so magnificent that it was difficult to tear ourselves away.
examples.chinese: 景色非常壮丽，我们流连忘返。

examples.english: Jake watched as police officers examined the body. It was a horrible sight, but he couldn't tear himself away from it.
examples.chinese: 杰克看着警察检查尸体。那场面很是可怕，然而他又不忍离去。

expressions.text: can't bear to leave/go/find it difficult to leave

examples.english: Kim couldn't bear to leave Danny, and cried all the way to the airport.
examples.chinese: 金舍不得离开丹尼，一路哭到机场。

examples.english: Ballesteros has always found it difficult to leave his home in Pedrena.
examples.chinese: 巴列斯特罗斯总是舍不得离开他在佩德雷拉的家。

examples.english: We'd had such a great vacation, we could hardly bear to leave.
examples.chinese: 我们的假期过得非常愉快，真不愿意离去。

centers.english: to make someone leave a room or building
centers.chinese: 使某人离开房间或大楼

expressions.text: throw/kick somebody out/ chuck somebody out

examples.english: If you don't stop shouting, they'll throw us all out.
examples.chinese: 如果你还要又喊又叫的，他们会把我们全都赶出去的。

examples.english: They got kicked out of the bar for starting a fight.
examples.chinese: 他们因为打起来而被赶出了酒吧。

examples.english: A couple of security guards showed me the door after they saw my camera.
examples.chinese: 几名保安人员看到我的照相机就请我离开。

examples.english: She lost her temper, started screaming, and was immediately shown the door.
examples.chinese: 她发脾气尖叫了起来，立即就被撵了出去。

examples.english: The manager threatened to have them ejected if there was any more trouble.
examples.chinese: 经理威胁说如果再有麻烦就把他们赶走。

examples.english: Several demonstrators were ejected from the hall.
examples.chinese: 数名示威者被赶出大厅。

centers.english: when an army leaves a place, for example after a battle
centers.chinese: 军队撤离某地，如战斗结束之后

examples.english: Lieutenant Peterson shouted the order to retreat.
examples.chinese: 彼得森中尉大声下令撤退。

examples.english: In 1443, the Hungarian army advanced into Serbia, and the Turks were forced to retreat.
examples.chinese: 1443年，匈牙利军队进军塞尔维亚，土耳其人被迫撤退。

examples.english: Napoleon's retreat from Moscow
examples.chinese: 拿破仑从莫斯科撤退

examples.english: An army in retreat can be even more dangerous than one that is advancing.
examples.chinese: 溃退之军甚至比挺进之军更为可怕。

examples.english: As a result of the Paris peace negotiations, most American forces withdrew from Vietnam in 1973.
examples.chinese: 巴黎和谈的结果是，大部分美国军队于1973年撤出越南。

examples.english: There are proposals for the immediate withdrawal of federal troops from the province.
examples.chinese: 有人提议，联邦军队应立即撤离该省。

examples.english: Troops began pulling out of the region as soon as the order was given.
examples.chinese: 军队一接到命令就开始从该地区撤军。

centers.english: when a crowd of people leave a place

examples.english: Twenty five officers were injured when police moved in to disperse a crowd of 200-300 youths.
examples.chinese: 警察进来驱散一个由二三百名青年组成的人群时，有25名警员受了伤。

examples.english: The crowd began dispersing as soon as the ambulance had driven away.
examples.chinese: 救护车一开走，人群就开始散开。

examples.english: The arrival of armed police made the students disperse.
examples.chinese: 武装警察赶到，学生就散开了。

examples.english: There was a sudden crack of gunfire, and the crowd scattered.
examples.chinese: 突然一声枪响，人群四散而逃。

examples.english: The demonstrators suddenly turned and scattered in all directions.
examples.chinese: 示威人群突然转身四散奔逃。

centers.english: to permanently leave the house where you live

examples.english: This has been such a lovely home - I'll be sorry to leave.
examples.chinese: 这个家是多么可爱啊，我真舍不得离开。

examples.english: He left his hometown when he was 16, and he hasn't been back there since.
examples.chinese: 他16岁离开家乡，从此就再也没有回去过。

examples.english: Thousands of people have already left the capital in order to get away from the fighting.
examples.chinese: 成千上万的人已经逃离首都躲避战争。

examples.english: If the landlord raises the rent again, we'll just have to move out.
examples.chinese: 如果房东再提高房租，我们就不得不搬走。

examples.english: Diana and I aren't together any more. I've moved out.
examples.chinese: 黛安娜和我已不住在一起，我搬出去住了。

examples.english: Tom moved out of his apartment in Toronto last month.
examples.chinese: 汤姆上个月搬出了他在多伦多的公寓。

examples.english: Gwen had left home at 18 to find a job in New York.
examples.chinese: 格温18岁离开家，在纽约找了一份工作。

examples.english: The house is getting too big for us now that both the children have left home.
examples.chinese: 现在两个孩子都已经离开家，这房子我们住就太大了。

examples.english: Jane was sure that her decision to leave home and marry Joe was the right one.
examples.chinese: 简确信，她离开家嫁给乔的决定是正确的。

examples.english: I ran away at the age of twelve, but my Dad came and found me at the bus station before I could leave town.
examples.chinese: 12岁时我曾离家出走，但还未出城，爸爸就赶来在公共汽车站找到了我。

examples.english: At the age of fifteen, Malcolm ran away to California.
examples.chinese: 马尔科姆15岁那年离家出走，去了加利福尼亚。

examples.english: Thousands of children run away from home each year.
examples.chinese: 每年有成千上万名儿童离家出走。

examples.english: This hostel helps runaways who don't want to go back to their families.
examples.chinese: 这家收容所收容离家出走后不愿返家的孩子。

examples.english: Guests are requested to vacate their rooms before 12 o'clock on the day of departure.
examples.chinese: 客人须在离店当天12时之前退房。

centers.english: to leave your house and go to live in another one

examples.english: We're moving tomorrow, so I won't be at work for a couple of days.
examples.chinese: 明天我们搬家，我要几天不来上班。

examples.english: We're hoping to move to a bigger house by the end of the year.
examples.chinese: 我们希望年底前能搬到一个较大的房子里居住。

examples.english: In her early years her family had moved from one town to another, and she had never felt settled anywhere.
examples.chinese: 小时候，她家经常从这个镇搬到那个镇，到哪里她都从未有过安定的感觉。

examples.english: Some of our furniture got broken in the move while we were moving.
examples.chinese: 我们的一些家具在搬迁过程中损坏了。

examples.english: I'm not looking forward to moving house -- it'll be a lot of work.
examples.chinese: 我可不希望搬家—这要花很多工夫。

examples.english: ‘When are you moving house?’ ‘Next week, if everything goes to plan.’
examples.chinese: “你们什么时候搬家？”“下个星期，如果一切都照计划进行的话。”

centers.english: to make someone leave the house where they live
centers.chinese: 使某人离开他们居住的房子

expressions.text: throw/kick somebody out/ chuck somebody out

examples.english: Why were you thrown out of your apartment?
examples.chinese: 你怎么会被赶出公寓的？

examples.english: Their landlord's threatening to chuck them out.
examples.chinese: 他们的房东威胁要赶他们出来。

expressions.text: throw somebody out on the street

examples.english: She was thrown out on the street when her family discovered she was pregnant.
examples.chinese: 家人发现她怀孕后，她就被赶出了家门。

examples.english: If we are evicted, we'll have nowhere to go.
examples.chinese: 如果我们被赶出去，就无处可去了。

examples.english: They had been evicted for non-payment of rent.
examples.chinese: 他们因为付不出房租被赶了出去。

examples.english: Her mother, who has now been evicted from her home too, is staying with friends.
examples.chinese: 她母亲现在也被赶出了家门，住在朋友那里。

examples.english: He faces eviction because he has not paid his rent.
examples.chinese: 他因为没有付房租，快要被赶出来了。

examples.english: How many weeks’ notice does your landlord have to give you?
examples.chinese: 你的房东必须提前几个星期通知你搬走？

examples.english: It came as a complete surprise to them when they were given notice to quit their premises within six days.
examples.chinese: 这完全出乎他们的意料——他们接到通知要在六天之内搬出经营场地。

centers.english: to leave your country or the area where you live
centers.chinese: 离开自己的国家或居住的地区

examples.english: Millie's brother Dennis, and his wife Joan, decided to emigrate the following year.
examples.chinese: 米莉的哥哥丹尼斯，以及他的妻子琼，决定第二年移居国外。

examples.english: They later got married and emigrated to Australia in 1936.
examples.chinese: 他们后来结了婚，并于1936年移居澳大利亚。

examples.english: My parents emigrated from Britain to New Zealand just before I was born.
examples.chinese: 就在我出生之前，父母从英国移民到了新西兰。

examples.english: A major reason for emigration was the higher salaries that could be earned in some other countries.
examples.chinese: 移民的一个主要原因是，在一些别的国家可以赚到更高的工资。

examples.english: How do birds know when to migrate, and how do they find their way back home?
examples.chinese: 鸟类是如何知道何时迁徙，它们又是如何找到归家之路的呢？

examples.english: Where there are areas of high unemployment, workers tend to migrate to other, wealthier parts of the country.
examples.chinese: 在失业率高的地方，工人们往往会迁移到国内其他更富裕的地区。

examples.english: Dr Baker has made detailed studies of the migration patterns of many birds.
examples.chinese: 贝克博士详细研究了许多鸟类的迁徙模式。

examples.english: The migrants travelled many miles before finally finding a suitable place to settle.
examples.chinese: 移民们走了很远的路，终于找到合适的地方安定下来。

examples.english: The exodus of refugees continued throughout the autumn.
examples.chinese: 整个秋季都有大批难民离开。

examples.english: The island is facing a mass exodus of its young people.
examples.chinese: 岛上面临着大批年轻人离开。

centers.english: to make someone leave a country

examples.english: The new government banned books, seized passports, expelled foreigners, and legalized detention without trial.
examples.chinese: 新政府上台后开始禁书、没收护照、驱逐外国人，并将未经审讯实行监禁的做法合法化。

examples.english: Two foreign diplomats were expelled form Ethiopia on March 31.
examples.chinese: 3月31日，两名外国外交官被逐出埃塞俄比亚。

examples.english: When war was announced the government called for the immediate expulsion of all foreign journalists from the country.
examples.chinese: 国家宣布进入战争状态之后，政府要求立即把所有的外国记者都驱逐出境。

examples.english: The man has been deported back to the Irish Republic where he will face terrorism charges.
examples.chinese: 此人已被逐回爱尔兰共和国，在那儿，他将面临恐怖主义的指控。

examples.english: Several football supporters were deported from Italy during the World Cup.
examples.chinese: 世界杯赛期间，有几名足球迷被逐出意大利。

examples.english: The US government has ordered his deportation.
examples.chinese: 美国政府已下令将他驱逐出境。

examples.english: The drug baron was extradited to the United States from Colombia.
examples.chinese: 这名毒枭从哥伦比亚被引渡至美国。

examples.english: Spanish authorities are seeking to have the couple extradited to answer further charges.
examples.chinese: 西班牙当局正在设法把这对夫妇引渡回国，对进一步的指控作出答辩。

examples.english: The US government is seeking the extradition of the two men to face charges in the 2001 hijacking attacks.
examples.chinese: 美国政府正在设法引渡这两个人，使他们面对2001年劫机事件的指控。

examples.english: Italy is using military helicopters to repatriate 292 Albanian refugees.
examples.chinese: 意大利使用军用直升机遣送292名阿尔巴尼亚难民回国。

examples.english: There was to be a cease-fire, and all prisoners of war were to be repatriated.
examples.chinese: 要实行停火了，所有战俘都要被遣送回国。

examples.english: A spokesman said that forced repatriation was unlikely to start before November.
examples.chinese: 一位发言人说，11月份之前不大可能采取强行遣返的行动。

examples.english: The leader of the coup was exiled and the others imprisoned.
examples.chinese: 这次政变的领导人被流放，其他人则被监禁。

examples.english: The Prince and his family were sent into exile after the revolution.
examples.chinese: 这场革命之后，王子和他的家人被流放了。

examples.english: a radio station run by Cuban exiles in the United States
examples.chinese: 美国一个由古巴流亡分子经营的电台

examples.english: For many years she lived in exile in France.
examples.chinese: 她在法国过了许多年的流放生活。

examples.english: Napoleon was banished to the island of St Helena in 1815.
examples.chinese: 拿破仑于1815年被放逐到圣海伦娜岛。

centers.english: to permanently leave your school, college etc
centers.chinese: 永久地离开学校、大学等

examples.english: I hated school and couldn't wait to leave.
examples.chinese: 我厌恶上学，恨不得马上就离开。

examples.english: I worked in an office when I first left school.
examples.chinese: 我刚从学校毕业就在一家公司工作。

examples.english: In the past, girls tended to leave full-time education earlier than boys.
examples.chinese: 过去，女孩子往往早于男孩子结束全日制教育。

examples.english: What are you going to do after you graduate?
examples.chinese: 你毕业后想干什么?

examples.english: When I graduate I want to study law at the Northeastern university.
examples.chinese: 我毕业后想在东北大学读法律。

examples.english: We both graduated from the same high school in Queens.
examples.chinese: 我们俩毕业于昆斯区的同一所高中。

examples.english: One third of the city's students drop out before graduation.
examples.chinese: 该市有1/3的学生没毕业就辍学了。

examples.english: He dropped out of art college and joined a band.
examples.chinese: 他从艺术学院辍学，参加了一个乐队。

centers.english: someone who leaves school or college

examples.english: Most towns have a careers service to help school-leavers find suitable jobs.
examples.chinese: 大多数城镇都有一家就业服务机构来帮助学校毕业生找到合适的工作。!

examples.english: Fashion retailer seeks Sales Assistant - would suit enthusiastic school-leaver.
examples.chinese: 招聘时装店营业员一适合充满热诚的学校毕业生。

examples.english: His mother is a high-school dropout, trying to raise four children on less than $500 a month.
examples.chinese: 他母亲没上完高中就辍学了，靠一个月不足500美元的钱抚养着四个孩子。

centers.english: to make someone leave school or college

examples.english: The principal expelled John for stealing.
examples.chinese: 校长因为约翰偷东西而把他开除了。

examples.english: If they catch you dealing drugs, you'll get expelled.
examples.chinese: 如果他们抓到你在卖毒品，你会被开除的。

examples.english: The threat of expulsion was enough to frighten the girls into improving their behaviour.
examples.chinese: 学校威胁要开除足以令这些女孩端正行为。

examples.english: There have been five expulsions in this academic year alone.
examples.chinese: 光是这一学年已有五人被开除。

examples.english: She said she'd kick us out if she caught us doing it again.
examples.chinese: 她说要是再发现我们做这事就开除我们。

examples.english: Do your parents know you've been kicked out of school yet?
examples.chinese: 你的父母亲是否知道你已被学校开除?

examples.english: He got chucked out of the LSE.
examples.chinese: 他被伦敦政治经济学院除名了。

examples.english: The report concluded that far more boys were excluded each year than girls.
examples.chinese: 这篇报告得出结论说，每年被开除的男生人数远远超过女生。

examples.english: The governing body decided to exclude Declan for two weeks.
examples.chinese: 主管机构决定将德克兰停课两周。

examples.english: Kids who are excluded from school often end up getting into trouble with the police.
examples.chinese: 被学校开除的孩子最后往往和警察惹上麻烦。

examples.english: There is concern about the growing number of school exclusions in the area.
examples.chinese: 这地区被开除的学生人数日渐增多引起了关注。

examples.english: Exclusion - especially permanent exclusion - should only be used as a very last resort.
examples.chinese: 除名——尤其是永久除名——只能用作最后的手段。

centers.english: to leave a job or organization
centers.chinese: 离开一份工作或一个组织

examples.english: ‘Where's Marcia?’ ‘Oh, she left last week to have her baby.’
examples.chinese: “马西娅在哪儿？”“噢，她上个月离职去生孩子了。”

examples.english: The directors did not want Daniel to leave, but they knew he could earn much more somewhere else.
examples.chinese: 董事们不希望丹尼尔走，但是他们知道，他到其他地方赚的钱可以多得多。

examples.english: I left my last job because I couldn't get along with my boss.
examples.chinese: 我辞去前一个工作是因为我和老板合不来。

examples.english: Chamberlain was a Cabinet Minister until he left the Liberal party in 1886.
examples.chinese: 张伯伦是一名内阁大臣，直到1886年他退出了自由党。

examples.english: After leaving the Navy, he started a new career in journalism.
examples.chinese: 他离开海军之后，开始了一项新的事业—从事新闻工作。

examples.english: I've had enough of the way I'm treated here -- I quit!
examples.chinese: 我在这儿受够了—我不干了！

examples.english: She quite her job and went traveling in South America.
examples.chinese: 她辞去工作到南美旅行去了。

examples.english: Harkness quit as director of the Olympic Regional Development Authority soon afterwards.
examples.chinese: 不久以后，哈克尼斯辞去了奥运会地区发展局主任的职务。

examples.english: Nixon was the first US President to resign before the end of his term of office.
examples.chinese: 尼克松是第一位在任期内辞职的美国总统。

examples.english: I wanted to resign, but my boss persuaded me to stay.
examples.chinese: 我想辞职，但老板劝我留下。

examples.english: She resigned from the board after profits fell by a further 3%.
examples.chinese: 利润又下跌了3%之后，她辞去了董事会的职务。

examples.english: Roberts replaces Jacob Winters, who resigned from the firm last month.
examples.chinese: 罗伯茨取代了雅各布·温特斯的职位，后者于上个月辞职离开了公司。

examples.english: The following years, he resigned as chairman of the committee.
examples.chinese: 第二年，他辞去了委员会主席的职位。

examples.english: The manager was forced to resign his post after allegations of corruption.
examples.chinese: 经理被指控有腐败行为之后被迫辞去职位。

examples.english: There have been several calls for the Chancellor's resignation.
examples.chinese: 人们多次要求总理辞职。

examples.english: In the UK, men usually retire in their late 50s or early 60s.
examples.chinese: 在英国，男子通常在60岁左右退休。

examples.english: If you retire at 50, you won't get your full pension.
examples.chinese: 如果你50岁退休，就拿不到全额养老金。

examples.english: When Jean retired from modelling, she moved to Cornwall.
examples.chinese: 琼退出模特儿生涯后，搬到了康沃尔。

examples.english: Jim Rutland retired from the Navy last year.
examples.chinese: 吉姆·拉特兰去年从海军退役。

examples.english: He retired as Principal ten years ago, but still does a lot of fund-raising for the school.
examples.chinese: 他十年前从校长职位上退下来，但仍为学校做许多募集资金的工作。

examples.english: The people who cope best with retirement are those who have a number of hobbies and interests to occupy their time.
examples.chinese: 退休生活过得最好的是那些有一些兴趣爱好可以打发时间的人。

examples.english: On his retirement Mr Willis received a gold watch from his colleagues.
examples.chinese: 威利斯先生退休时收到同事们送给他的一块金表。

examples.english: The number of teachers taking early retirement rose from 7,574 to 12,343 during the same period.
examples.chinese: 同一时期，提前退休的教师人数从7,574名上升到了12,343名。

examples.english: You have to hand in your notice at least four weeks before you leave.
examples.chinese: 你必须在走之前至少提早四个星期递交辞职通知。

examples.english: The Foreign Minister officially handed in his resignation on December 11th.
examples.chinese: 12月11日，外交部长正式提交辞呈。

examples.english: Look if it's such a boring job, why don't you just jack it in?
examples.chinese: 听我说，如果是这么无聊的一个工作，你为什么不索性辞掉它?

examples.english: Sometimes I feel like packing it all in and going off on a round-the-world trip.
examples.chinese: 有时候我很想把工作辞了，去周游世界。

centers.english: when someone is forced to leave their job

examples.english: After she lost her job, she got more and more depressed and started drinking heavily.
examples.chinese: 她丢了工作后，变得越来越沮丧，并开始酗起酒来。

examples.english: Many people won't complain about pay and conditions because they're terrified of losing their jobs.
examples.chinese: 许多人不会抱怨报酬和工作条件，因为他们害怕失业。

examples.english: The company announced 22,000 job losses over the next two years.
examples.chinese: 公司宣布在接下来的两年里将减少22,000个职位。

examples.english: They're meeting to decide how to prevent further job losses.
examples.chinese: 他们将开会决定如何防止进一步的职位损失。

examples.english: He was just impossible to work with, and in the end they fired him.
examples.chinese: 他根本没法与人共事，最后他们解雇了他。

examples.english: Harris was caught stealing, and was dismissed immediately.
examples.chinese: 哈里斯行窃被抓住，立即被开除了。

examples.english: You're fired!
examples.chinese: 你被解雇了！

examples.english: She was fired for serious professional misconduct.
examples.chinese: 她因为严重失职而被开除。

examples.english: When Max was fired from his job the whole family had to pack up and leave town.
examples.chinese: 马克斯被开除后，全家人不得不收拾行李，离开城镇。

examples.english: A New York art teacher who refused to take part in the daily flag ceremony was dismissed from her post.
examples.chinese: 纽约一名教艺术的老师因拒绝参加每天的升旗仪式而被免职。

examples.english: She is claiming it is a case of unfair dismissal.
examples.chinese: 她声称自己被解雇是不公平的。

examples.english: We can't really give him the sack just because he's unpopular.
examples.chinese: 我们不能就因为他不讨人喜欢便真的开除他。

examples.english: He was sacked for being drunk in the office.
examples.chinese: 他因为在办公室里喝醉酒被炒鱿鱼了。

examples.english: He had the good luck to work in an old family firm when nobody ever got the sack.
examples.chinese: 他运气好，在一家古老的家族公司上班，那里从来没有人被解雇过。

examples.english: Thompson told how his sacking had been a terrible shock that had left him feeling completely devastated.
examples.chinese: 汤普森讲述了他被解雇一事对他造成的打击如何之大，使他有一种被彻底摧毁的感觉。

examples.english: 3000 car workers have been laid off at the factory in Cleveland.
examples.chinese: 克利夫兰的汽车厂有3,000名汽车工人被裁员。

examples.english: At least 2,000 computer programmers have been made redundant in the past year.
examples.chinese: 过去一年里至少有2,000名电脑程序员被裁。

examples.english: We lost our home when my husband was made redundant five years ago.
examples.chinese: 五年之前我丈夫被裁员之后，我们就失去了自己的住宅。

examples.english: These redundancies are necessary for the company to be able to survive.
examples.chinese: 公司若要生存下去，裁掉这些人员是必需的。

examples.english: The board are planning a restructuring which could mean hundreds of redundancies.
examples.chinese: 董事会正在计划进行重组，这可能会导致几百人被裁员。

examples.english: We hope to achieve staffing cuts through voluntary redundancy and a freeze on recruitment.
examples.chinese: 我们希望通过员工自愿离职和暂时停止招聘的方式来达到裁员的目的。

examples.english: Two senior officials have been suspended on full pay pending a second internal inquiry.
examples.chinese: 两名高级官员被全薪停职，等待第二次内部调查。

examples.english: The Police Department has suspended six officers from duty while they investigate claims of fraud and corruption.
examples.chinese: 警察局已勒令六名警员停职以调查他们是否有欺诈腐败的行为。

examples.english: The company are planning to close down, and we've all been given two weeks’ notice.
examples.chinese: 公司打算停业，我们都提前两周收到了解雇通知。

examples.english: In the course of restructuring, over half the workforce were given their notice.
examples.chinese: 在重组过程中，超过一半的工人收到了解雇通知。

examples.english: The Chief Inspector has been relieved of his duties pending another investigation by fellow officers.
examples.chinese: 总督察在接受同僚的另一次调查期间，被暂时解除了职务。

examples.english: The authorities have decided to relieve the professor of his post at the university until further notice, after complaints were made by one of his female students.
examples.chinese: 校方收到该教授的一位女学生的投诉之后，已决定解除他在大学里的职务直到另行通知。

centers.english: to make someone leave a political party etc
centers.chinese: 使某人离开一个政党等

examples.english: They threatened to expel him if he didn't follow the party line.
examples.chinese: 他们威胁说，如果他不遵循党的路线，就开除他。

examples.english: In May the Nationalists were expelled from the government.
examples.chinese: 5月份，民族党被逐出了政府。

examples.english: At the age of fourteen she was kicked out of the Young Communist League.
examples.chinese: 她14岁的时候被逐出了共青团。

examples.english: They are relying on the fact that Britain cannot be thrown out of the European Union.
examples.chinese: 他们相信英国是不会被踢出欧盟的。

centers.english: something that is given when someone leaves

examples.english: Are you going to Katie's leaving party on Friday?
examples.chinese: 星期五你打算去参加凯蒂的送别会吗？

examples.english: She received a beautiful Waterford Crystal clock as a farewell present from all her colleagues.
examples.chinese: 她收到一个漂亮的沃特福德水晶钟，是她全体同事送给她的临别赠礼。

examples.english: A farewell dinner was given in her honour.
examples.chinese: 为她举行了钱别宴会。

examples.english: Eisenhower's farewell address to the American people
examples.chinese: 艾森豪威尔向美国人民所作的告别演说

centers.english: when someone leaves the army, air force, or navy
centers.chinese: 某人离开陆军、空军或海军

examples.english: The three men had tried to desert, but were brought back to camp and shot.
examples.chinese: 这三个人擅自离营，但是被带回军营击毙了。

examples.english: He obtained the grenades from a friend who had deserted from the army.
examples.chinese: 这些手榴弹是他从一个逃兵朋友那里得来的。

examples.english: The punishment for desertion leaving the army etc without permission was death.
examples.chinese: 对开小差的惩罚就是处死。

examples.english: a US Army deserter
examples.chinese: 美军的一名逃兵

examples.english: He went AWOL while on duty in Northern Ireland.
examples.chinese: 他在北爱尔兰执勤时曾擅离职守。

examples.english: When Danny was discharged in 1961, he went to Los Angeles, looking for work.
examples.chinese: 丹尼于1961年退役后去了洛杉矶找工作。

examples.english: He lost both his legs in an explosion and was discharged from the navy.
examples.chinese: 他在一次爆炸中失去双腿，便从海军退役。

examples.english: Tony wanted to get married as soon as he got his discharge from the army.
examples.chinese: 托尼想一经批准退伍就结婚。

centers.english: to leave your husband, wife, girlfriend etc
centers.chinese: 离开丈夫、妻子、女朋友等

examples.english: She promised faithfully that she would never leave him.
examples.chinese: 她信誓旦旦地说永不离开他。

examples.english: Simon has left me for his secretary, after fifteen years of marriage.
examples.chinese: 西蒙与我有15年的婚姻，他却离开了我去找他的秘书。

examples.english: I was three months pregnant when Peter walked out.
examples.chinese: 我怀孕三个月时，彼得离弃了我。

examples.english: She remembered the day her father had walked out on them and how her mother had just sat on the stairs and cried.
examples.chinese: 她仍记得父亲离弃他们出走的那一天，她母亲就坐在楼梯上哭泣。

examples.english: His wife ran off with one of the doctors at the hospital.
examples.chinese: 他妻子和医院里的一位医生私奔了。

examples.english: Mrs Hasan was deserted by her husband and had to support four children on her own.
examples.chinese: 哈森夫人被丈夫抛弃，只得独自抚养四个孩子。

examples.english: His father had deserted the family when Graham was three years old.
examples.chinese: 格雷厄姆三岁的时候，他父亲抛弃家庭走了。

examples.english: a deserted wife with two children, living on income support
examples.chinese: 被丈夫抛弃、带着两个孩子的女人，靠着收入补贴维持生活

examples.english: The baby was found abandoned outside a local mosque.
examples.chinese: 这婴儿被发现遗弃在当地一所清真寺的外面。

examples.english: My sister abandoned her husband and three children and went to live in Holland.
examples.chinese: 我姐姐抛下丈夫和三个孩子移居荷兰了。

examples.english: a home for abandoned kittens and puppies
examples.chinese: 收养被遗弃的小猫小狗的收容所

centers.english: to make a husband, wife, girlfriend etc leave
centers.chinese: 使丈夫、妻子、女朋友等离开

examples.english: He threw her out when he heard she was seeing other guys.
examples.chinese: 他听说她和别的男人约会，就把她赶走了。

centers.english: to arrive somewhere

examples.english: What time do you think we'll arrive?
examples.chinese: 你说我们什么时候会到达？

examples.english: Did my package arrive?
examples.chinese: 我的包裹到了吗?

examples.english: Give me a call to let me know you've arrived safely.
examples.chinese: 来电话告诉我你已安全到达。

examples.english: It was already dark by the time they arrived at their hotel.
examples.chinese: 他们到达旅馆的时候，天已经黑了。

examples.english: The British Prime Minister arrived in Tokyo today.
examples.chinese: 英国首相今天抵达东京。

examples.english: When Uncle Guy arrived from Dublin he brought them an enormous box of chocolates.
examples.chinese: 盖伊叔叔从都柏林来的时候给他们买了一大盒巧克力。

examples.english: When I first arrived here none of the other students would talk to me.
examples.chinese: 我初来乍到，没有一个同学愿意和我说话。

examples.english: It'll take us about half an hour to get to the airport.
examples.chinese: 我们到机场大概要半小时。

examples.english: Turn left, and walk down the street until you get to some traffic lights.
examples.chinese: 左转，再沿着街走到红绿灯的地方。

examples.english: I'll call her when I get back to Chicago.
examples.chinese: 我回到芝加哥再打电话给她。

examples.english: What time do you usually get home in the evening?
examples.chinese: 你晚上一般什么时候回家？

examples.english: I want to get there before the store closes.
examples.chinese: 我想在商店关门之前到达那里。

examples.english: When the visitors come, send them up to my office.
examples.chinese: 访客来了的话，叫他们到我办公室里去。

examples.english: Has the mail come yet?
examples.chinese: 邮件来了吗?

examples.english: My mother's saying she won't come if Richard's here.
examples.chinese: 我母亲在说，要是有理查德在，她就不来。

examples.english: What time is Dad coming home?
examples.chinese: 爸爸什么时候回家？

examples.english: It took more than three days to reach the top of the mountain.
examples.chinese: 要花三天多的时间才到达山顶。

examples.english: Snow prevented workers from reaching the broken pipeline.
examples.chinese: 下雪使工人们没法到达管道爆裂的地方。

examples.english: Susan, your friends are here.
examples.chinese: 苏珊，你的朋友来了。

examples.english: Is Andy here yet?
examples.chinese: 安迪来了没有？

examples.english: Here they are. Go and open the door, will you?
examples.chinese: 他们来了，你去开门好吗？

examples.english: Steve turned up half an hour late as usual.
examples.chinese: 史蒂夫照例又迟到了半小时。

examples.english: Some of the people I invited never showed up.
examples.chinese: 我邀请的人中有些根本就没来。

examples.english: If Tina shows up, tell her we waited as long as we could.
examples.chinese: 如果蒂娜来了，就告诉她我们尽量等她了。

examples.english: If we don't make it on time, start without us.
examples.chinese: 如果我们不能及时赶到，就不要等我们，先开始吧。

examples.english: We just made it to the hospital before the baby arrived.
examples.chinese: 我们才赶到医院，婴儿就出生了。

examples.english: Chris finally rolled in at about 4:00 am.
examples.chinese: 凌晨4点，克里斯总算来了。

examples.english: Rebecca usually rolls in around noon.
examples.chinese: 丽贝卡通常是到了中午前后才慢吞吞地来。

examples.english: What time did you get in last night?
examples.chinese: 你昨晚什么时候到家的?

examples.english: Mark just got in a few minutes ago.
examples.chinese: 马克几分钟前才到家。

centers.english: a plane, ship, train, bus etc arrives
centers.chinese: 飞机、船、火车、公共汽车等到达

examples.english: What time does his flight arrive?
examples.chinese: 他乘的班机什么时候到？

examples.english: The train isn't due to arrive until 4.30.
examples.chinese: 火车4点30分才会到达。

examples.english: Our flight arrived in Osaka two hours ahead of schedule.
examples.chinese: 我们的班机提前两小时到了大阪。

examples.english: Supply ships have started arriving at ports along the East coast.
examples.chinese: 物资供应船只已经开始抵达东海岸港口。

examples.english: Would passengers awaiting the arrival of flight 405 from Honolulu please make their way to Gate 14.
examples.chinese: 等候从火奴鲁鲁到达本港的405号航班的乘客，请前往14号门登机。

examples.english: What time does your flight get in?
examples.chinese: 你的航班什么时候到达?

examples.english: Hopefully the bus will get in by 8 o'clock.
examples.chinese: 公共汽车可望在8点之前到达。

examples.english: The ferry gets in to Harwich around noon.
examples.chinese: 渡轮在中午前后到达哈里奇。

examples.english: Despite severe weather conditions, the Boeing 727 landed as scheduled.
examples.chinese: 尽管天气恶劣，那架波音727还是按时着陆了。

examples.english: When the plane landed at JFK, it was three hours late.
examples.chinese: 飞机在肯尼迪国际机场降落时，已经晚点三个小时。

examples.english: Before landing in Algiers, we circled the airport several times.
examples.chinese: 在阿尔及尔着陆前，我们在机场上空盘旋了好几圈。

examples.english: There's a plane coming in to land now.
examples.chinese: 现在有一架飞机正要进港降落。

examples.english: Has the Air India flight come in yet?
examples.chinese: 印度航空公司的航班到了没有？

examples.english: Crowds had gathered at the harbour to watch the ship come in.
examples.chinese: 人群聚集在港口，观看轮船进港。

examples.english: When the ship docked at Southampton its cargo was immediately inspected.
examples.chinese: 轮船在南安普敦靠岸以后，船上的货物立即接受了检查。

examples.english: We finally docked in Portland, Maine, happy to be on dry land again.
examples.chinese: 我们终于在缅因州的波特兰靠岸，真高兴又回到了陆地上。

examples.english: Finally the bus pulled in, forty minutes late.
examples.chinese: 公共汽车终于到站了，迟到了40分钟。

examples.english: Just as the train was pulling in, there was a shout and someone fell onto the track.
examples.chinese: 就在火车进站时传来一声大叫，有人跌入了轨道。

examples.english: Their plane's in, but it'll take them a little while to get through customs.
examples.chinese: 他们的飞机已经到了，不过还要花一小会儿时间通过海关。

examples.english: As her train wasn't in yet, she went to the bookstall and flipped through the magazines.
examples.chinese: 因为火车还没到，她就到书摊上去翻翻杂志。

examples.english: All incoming flights are being delayed by fog.
examples.chinese: 所有进港的班机都因大雾误点了。

examples.english: The crash occurred when a freight train collided with an incoming passenger train.
examples.chinese: 一辆货运列车与一辆进站的客运列车相撞，发生了事故。

centers.english: when something or someone arrives

examples.english: Let me know the date and time of your arrival.
examples.chinese: 告诉我你的抵达日期和时间。

examples.english: Joe's sudden arrival spoiled all our plans.
examples.chinese: 乔的突然到来把我们所有的计划都打乱了。

examples.english: The show begins with the arrival of the Europeans in the New World.
examples.chinese: 节目开始是讲欧洲人如何抵达新世界。

examples.english: TV crews from around the world filmed President Mandela's arrival at the airport.
examples.chinese: 来自世界各地的电视摄制人员拍摄了曼德拉总统抵达机场的情形。

examples.english: On arrival in Addis Ababa please report to the Ministry of Education.
examples.chinese: 抵达亚的斯亚贝巴后请向教育部报到。

examples.english: She was rushed to the hospital but was pronounced dead on arrival.
examples.chinese: 她被迅速送往医院，但是到了医院就被宣布已经死亡。

centers.english: to arrive somewhere without intending to
centers.chinese: 到达并未打算去的某地

examples.english: I fell asleep on the bus and ended up in Denver.
examples.chinese: 我在巴士上睡着了，醒来竟到了丹佛。

examples.english: I thought we were going straight home, but we all ended up at Tom's place.
examples.chinese: 我以为我们是直接回家，想不到却都来到了汤姆的家里。

examples.english: We were walking through the woods when we came to a waterfall.
examples.chinese: 我们在树林里走着走着，不觉来到了一个瀑布旁边。

examples.english: Ian stopped at the next house he came to and asked to use the phone.
examples.chinese: 伊恩走到第二幢房子外面停了下来，要求借用一下电话。

examples.english: After wandering around, we found ourselves back at the hotel.
examples.chinese: 走着走着，我们发现自己又回到了酒店。

examples.english: Sammler opened a big glass door and found himself in an empty lobby.
examples.chinese: 萨姆勒打开一扇很大的玻璃门，发现自己身处一个空荡荡的大堂之中。

centers.english: to arrive unexpectedly

examples.english: We were just having breakfast when Amy appeared.
examples.chinese: 我们正在吃早餐时，埃米来了。

examples.english: Neil appeared at my house around 9 o'clock.
examples.chinese: 9点左右，尼尔来到了我家。

examples.english: All these people seem to have appeared from nowhere.
examples.chinese: 所有这些人好像是不知从什么地方冒出来似的。

examples.english: Brian has a habit of turning up just at the wrong moment.
examples.chinese: 布赖恩一向都来得不是时候。

examples.english: At midnight Joanne's boyfriend showed up drunk.
examples.chinese: 半夜时分琼的男朋友突然来了，喝得醉醺醺的。

expressions.gram: intransitive phrasal verb not in progressive

examples.english: We were having a good time until Ronnie came along.
examples.chinese: 我们正玩得开心，没想到龙尼来了。

examples.english: Bill and I waited an hour for a bus, and then four of them came along at once.
examples.chinese: 我和比尔等公共汽车等了一个小时，后来一下子来了四辆。

expressions.text: talk of the devil /speak of the devi

examples.english: Talk of the devil! I was just telling everyone about your promotion.
examples.chinese: 真是说谁谁就到！我正在跟大家说你提升的事呢。

examples.english: Let's ask Amy what she thinks - speak of the devil, here she is!
examples.chinese: 让我们问问埃米她怎么想—说曹操，曹操就到，她来了！
