examples.english: I wanted to talk to her before she left the hotel, but she gave me the slip.
examples.chinese: 我想在她离开酒店之前和她谈谈，可她却躲开我溜走了。

examples.english: He made the calls from different pay phones around the city to throw the police off the scent.
examples.chinese: 他使用市里不同的公用电话，使警察没法追踪。

examples.english: Mailer disappeared into a dark basement, hoping to shake off the gang.
examples.chinese: 梅勒躲进一个黑漆漆的地下室，希望能甩掉那伙人。

examples.english: You're going to have to drive faster if you want to shake them off.
examples.chinese: 你要甩掉他们就得开快些。

examples.english: Police have found the helicopters that the terrorists used to make their getaway.
examples.chinese: 警方已经找到恐怖分子逃跑使用的直升机。

examples.english: The robbers hopped into a waiting car and made a clean getaway.
examples.chinese: 盗贼跳上一辆等候的汽车，逃得无影无踪。

examples.english: Despite a $25,000 reward on his head, he continues to elude the authorities.
examples.chinese: 尽管当局悬赏25,000美元要把他缉拿归案，可他还是没有被抓住。

examples.english: Lt. Forney managed to elude capture by enemy forces for several weeks.
examples.chinese: 福尼上尉设法躲过敌军好几个星期的追捕。

centers.english: when someone escapes

examples.english: They had planned their escape very carefully.
examples.chinese: 他们为逃跑计划得非常周密。

examples.english: ‘Tunnel to Tanto Grande’ is the story of a daring escape staged by political prisoners in Peru.
examples.chinese: 《通往大坦途的隧道》是讲秘鲁的政治犯所策划的大胆的逃亡计划。

examples.english: Until his escape from the camps, he was beaten nearly every day by his captors.
examples.chinese: 他从营地出逃之前，几乎天天受到捉他进去的那些人的殴打。

examples.english: It was a narrow escape - a couple of minutes later the whole place went up in flames.
examples.chinese: 那真是死里逃生——没几分钟整个地方就成了一片火海。

examples.english: Prison governors met today to discuss ways of preventing similar breakouts in the future.
examples.chinese: 监狱长今天聚在一起讨论如何防止今后再发生类似的越狱事件。

examples.english: As many as 20 guards may have been involved in the jailbreak.
examples.chinese: 这次越狱事件可能涉及多达20名狱警。

examples.english: There was a mass breakout from a city center prison yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天市中心的一座监狱里发生了大规模越狱行动。

centers.english: someone who has escaped

examples.english: Police are on the lookout for three escaped prisoners.
examples.chinese: 警方正在密切注意三名越狱潜逃的囚犯。

examples.english: Sherwood, an escaped convict, hunted down his ex-girlfriend and killed her.
examples.chinese: 舍伍德，一名已经定罪的逃犯，追杀了他以前的女友。

expressions.text: be on the loose/be at large

examples.english: There's a killer on the loose, and we've got to find him.
examples.chinese: 一名杀人凶手在逃，我们必须找到他。

examples.english: Carillo's murderer remained at large yesterday as investigators continued their search.
examples.chinese: 昨天，杀害卡里洛的凶手仍然逍遥法外，而探员在继续搜捕。

examples.english: After the train robbery he spent three years on the run.
examples.chinese: 火车劫案发生以后，他潜逃了三年。

examples.english: Dean was a drug addict who was constantly on the run from the police.
examples.chinese: 迪安是个吸毒者，经常在逃避警方的追缉。

examples.english: Porter escaped in 1995 and remains a fugitive.
examples.chinese: 波特于1995年出逃，目前仍然在东躲西藏。

examples.english: a fugitive from Stalin's oppressive regime
examples.chinese: 该政权统治下的逃亡者

centers.english: to escape from a difficult/embarrassing/boring situation
centers.chinese: 从困难/尴尬/无聊的情形中脱身

examples.english: He decided to tell me all about his trip to Majorca, and I just couldn't get away.
examples.chinese: 他硬是要跟我讲他去马略卡岛旅行的全部经过，我根本脱不了身。

examples.english: Let's see if we can escape before the speeches start.
examples.chinese: 我们想想办法，看能不能在演讲开始之前溜出去。

examples.english: Once they realized that I had been lying, it was almost impossible to extricate myself.
examples.chinese: 一旦他们意识到我在扯谎，我要想脱身几乎就不可能了。

examples.english: At that time, the US was on the verge of extricating itself from the unpopular war.
examples.chinese: 那个时候，美国正要摆脱这场得不到支持的战争。

examples.english: I don't know how she's going to talk her way out of this one.
examples.chinese: 我不知道这次她又会找什么借口来开脱。

examples.english: Phil never does his homework, but he always manages to talk his way out of it.
examples.chinese: 菲尔从来不做家庭作业，但是他总能找到借口躲过去。

centers.english: unable to escape

examples.english: I've locked all the doors and windows - he can't get out.
examples.chinese: 我已把所有的门窗都锁住了——他逃不掉的。

examples.english: Two of the children couldn't escape, and died in the fire.
examples.chinese: 有两名儿童逃不出来，被火烧死。

examples.english: The miners have been trapped underground for three days.
examples.chinese: 矿工被困在地下已经三天了。

examples.english: He was beginning to feel trapped in his job.
examples.chinese: 他开始觉得被工作缠住了。

examples.english: The two trapped firefighters were rescued on the second day.
examples.chinese: 两名被困的消防队员第二天被营救了出来。

examples.english: I don't want to be stuck in an office all my life.
examples.chinese: 我可不想一辈子都困在一个办公室里。

examples.english: I'm tired of being stuck here with the kids all day.
examples.chinese: 我已厌了整天都被孩子缠住。

examples.english: I didn't want to be cooped up in a small hotel room, while everyone else enjoyed the sea.
examples.chinese: 大家都出去享受大海，我可不想把自己关在宾馆的小房间里。

examples.english: I don't know how she survives being cooped up with three screaming kids all day!
examples.chinese: 她整天被三个乱喊乱叫的孩子缠住，我不知道她日子是怎么过的！

examples.english: Don't even try to get out of here - there's no escape.
examples.chinese: 别想从这里出去—根本逃不出去的。

examples.english: There seems to be no escape from the noise and confusion of city life.
examples.chinese: 城市生活喧嚣而纷乱，你好像无处可逃。

examples.english: Some of these old people are imprisoned in their own homes by the threat of violence on the streets.
examples.chinese: 这些老人中，有的因为受到街头暴力的威胁就把自己关在家里，足不出户。

examples.english: The door was locked from the outside, and suddenly they realized they were prisoners.
examples.chinese: 门从外面锁上了，顿时他们意识到，自己被人囚禁了。

examples.english: In some respects I'm a prisoner of my past - I don't feel I can just start over.
examples.chinese: 在有些方面，我犹如一个囚徒，被自己的过去牢牢困住——根本无法重新开始。

centers.english: make progress when you are trying to do something

examples.english: Far too many people are still unemployed, but we are making progress.
examples.chinese: 太多的人仍然失业，但是我们正在取得进展。

examples.english: At Yalta, Russia and Ukraine made progress in several aspects of their bilateral relations.
examples.chinese: 在雅尔塔，俄罗斯与乌克兰在双边关系的几个方面取得进展。

examples.english: Rapid progress has been made on the development of drugs for the treatment of Aids .
examples.chinese: 在研制治疗艾滋病的药物方面已取得飞速进展。

examples.english: The talks were aimed at making progress towards greater European union.
examples.chinese: 会谈的目标是逐步走向更大的欧洲联盟。

examples.english: Work on the ship progressed quickly.
examples.chinese: 这艘船的建造工程进展迅速。

examples.english: Bob was a very good football coach, and the team progressed very well.
examples.chinese: 鲍勃是个很好的足球教练，该队进步很快。

examples.english: So far the building work has progressed according to plan.
examples.chinese: 到目前为止，建筑工程一直按计划进行。

examples.english: Fiona says that her new teaching job is going really well.
examples.chinese: 菲奥娜说她新的教学工作进行得很顺利。

examples.english: Things went better after the new computer system was installed.
examples.chinese: 安装了新的电脑系统后，情况改善了。

examples.english: ‘How are your exams going, Luke?’ ‘Fine, thanks.’
examples.chinese: “卢克，考试情况怎么样？”“很好，谢谢。”

examples.english: I feel very happy about the way the project's going so far.
examples.chinese: 我对该工程目前的进展情况很高兴。

examples.english: The company had a lot of problems initially, but they're getting there now.
examples.chinese: 该公司起初有大量的问题，但现在已有所进展。

examples.english: It's been a struggle paying off all our debts, but I think at last we're getting there.
examples.chinese: 要把所有的债都还清是件费劲的事，但我想我们终于要成功了。

examples.english: Computer technology is advancing very rapidly.
examples.chinese: 计算机技术进步很快。

examples.english: Our knowledge of the deepest parts of the ocean has advanced considerably over the last ten years.
examples.chinese: 我们对于海洋最深处的知识在过去的十年里取得了相当大的进步。

examples.english: Sylvia's teachers all say that she has made great headway this term.
examples.chinese: 西尔维娅的老师都说这学期她进步很大。

examples.english: The new agreement indicated that the government was at last making headway against the terrorists.
examples.chinese: 新协议表明政府在对抗恐怖分子方面终于取得了进展。

examples.english: If either side is to make any headway in these negotiations, they must be prepared to compromise.
examples.chinese: 不管哪方想要在谈判中有所进展，他们一定得作好妥协的准备。

examples.english: Things moved quickly once we had agreed a price on the house.
examples.chinese: 我们一旦就房价达成一致，事情进展就快了。

examples.english: I think that the trade agreement is moving in the right direction.
examples.chinese: 我认为贸易协议的商讨正在朝正确的方向发展。

examples.english: Police say that the investigation is moving slowly, and they are hoping that more witnesses will come forward.
examples.chinese: 警方称调查工作进展缓慢，他们希望有更多证人挺身而出。

examples.english: Mary's reading and writing has really started to come along recently.
examples.chinese: 近来玛丽的读写确实开始进步了。

examples.english: The work on the new school sports centre is coming on very well.
examples.chinese: 学校的新体育中心的建造工作进展非常顺利。

examples.english: ‘How's your project coming along?’ ‘Oh, fine, thanks.’
examples.chinese: “你的项目进展如何？”“哦，很好，谢谢。〕〕

centers.english: to make progress very rapidly

examples.english: Science has made great strides since the 1970s.
examples.chinese: 自20世纪70年代以来，科学已取得了很大进步。

examples.english: Great strides have been made in reducing air pollution in US cities.
examples.chinese: 减少美国城市里空气污染的工作已经取得很大进展。

examples.english: The conference highlighted the great strides made in education in Third World countries.
examples.chinese: 此次会议强调了第三世界国家在教育领域取得的巨大进步。

examples.english: We have made great strides towards equality between the sexes in legal status and rights.
examples.chinese: 我们在两性法律地位和权利平等方面已经取得长足进步。

examples.english: Our export sales have continued to forge ahead this year.
examples.chinese: 今年我们的出口销量继续快速增长。

examples.english: Growing environmental fears have made climate research all the more important, and Europe is forging ahead in this field.
examples.chinese: 对环境与日俱增的担心使气候研究格外重要，欧洲在这方面处于领先地位。

examples.english: The Prime Minister promised that the government would forge ahead with the reforms.
examples.chinese: 首相承诺政府会快步进行改革。

expressions.text: come on in leaps and bounds /improve/develop etc by leaps and bound

examples.english: Jake was slow to learn to read, but now he's coming on in leaps and bounds.
examples.chinese: 杰克以前学习阅读很迟钝，但现在进步非常迅速。

examples.english: We were very surprised to see the way this field of philosophical thought has grown by leaps and bounds.
examples.chinese: 看到哲学思想的这一领域神速发展，我们很惊讶。

centers.english: to make no progress at all

examples.english: The lawyers are trying to reach an agreement but so far no progress has been made.
examples.chinese: 律师们努力想达成协议，但至今没有进展。

examples.english: Because of bad weather we made no progress on the house for the next three days.
examples.chinese: 由于天气不好，往后的三天里我们的房屋修建工程没有取得一点进展。

examples.english: Police were making no progress in their efforts to trace a man seen near the scene of the murder.
examples.chinese: 警方想追查一名出现在凶案现场附近的男子，但未取得进展。

examples.english: The city council have made no progress with their plans to rebuild the town hall.
examples.chinese: 市政委员会重建市政厅的计划没有进展。

examples.english: I feel as though I'm getting nowhere in this job.
examples.chinese: 我觉得我干这项工作好像一点进展也没有。

examples.english: Not surprisingly, the peace talks got nowhere.
examples.chinese: 和平会谈徒劳无功不足为奇。

examples.english: Don started to learn Arabic, but he was getting nowhere with it.
examples.chinese: 唐开始学阿拉伯语，但一无所成。

examples.english: The project was eating up time and money and seemed to be getting nowhere fast.
examples.chinese: 该计划耗费大量的时间和金钱，但似乎毫无进展。

examples.english: My essay isn't going very well. It's difficult to find any useful books on the subject.
examples.chinese: 我的论文进展不太顺利。该主题很难找到有用的书。

examples.english: Despite all the government's efforts, the war on drugs is going badly.
examples.chinese: 尽管政府竭尽全力，但是与毒品的斗争进展不顺。

expressions.text: go around in circles/ go round in circles

examples.english: This conversation's going around in circles again.
examples.chinese: 这场对话又毫无进展。

examples.english: Every time we try to reach a decision, we end up going round in circles.
examples.chinese: 我们每次想要作决定时，结果都是在原地兜圈子。

examples.english: Business here has stagnated compared with other wine-producing regions.
examples.chinese: 与其他产酒地区相比，这里的生意已经停滞不前。

examples.english: Everyone needs new challenges. Otherwise you just stagnate.
examples.chinese: 人人都需要新的挑战，否则就会停滞不前。

centers.english: success when you are trying to achieve something

examples.english: The new national tests are intended to keep a closer check on children's progress.
examples.chinese: 这项新的全国性测试目的在于仔细调查孩子们的进展情况。

examples.english: Any progress in cancer research may help to save lives.
examples.chinese: 癌症研究的任何进展都可能有助于拯救生命。

examples.english: Bad weather has prevented progress on retrieving the plane from the sea.
examples.chinese: 恶劣的天气妨碍了从海中打捞那架飞机的进程。

examples.english: Spencer insisted that free enterprise was the key to social progress.
examples.chinese: 斯潘塞坚称，自由企业制是社会进步的关键。

examples.english: The discovery marks a significant technological advance.
examples.chinese: 这项发现标志着一次重大的技术进步。

examples.english: Dr Martineau had written an article about advances in medicine over the last five years.
examples.chinese: 马蒂诺博士写了一篇文章，内容是关于过去五年里的医学进展。

examples.english: Egypt and Jordan welcomed news of the deal as a major breakthrough.
examples.chinese: 埃及和约旦对有关此项协议的消息表示欢迎，称它为一大突破。

examples.english: There has been an important breakthrough in the search for safe nuclear energy.
examples.chinese: 研究如何安全利用核能源的工作已取得了重大突破。

examples.english: Scientists at Merck were nearing a breakthrough on a new drug to treat HIV.
examples.chinese: 默克公司的科学家在研制一种对抗艾滋病病毒的新药，即将有所突破。

examples.english: Negotiators have made a breakthrough on the most difficult issue of employment security.
examples.chinese: 谈判人员在最难解决的职业保障问题上已有了突破。

examples.english: For most people, the birth of their first child is a milestone in their lives.
examples.chinese: 对大部分人来说，头一次生孩子是生命中的一座里程碑。

examples.english: His decision to accept the university's offer was an important milestone in his career.
examples.chinese: 他决定接受那所大学提出的条件，这是他职业生涯中一座重要的里程碑。

expressions.text: a milestone in the development/history/life etc of something

examples.english: The album ‘Kind Of Blue’ proved to be a milestone in the development of modern jazz.
examples.chinese: 《泛蓝调调》专辑最后成为现代爵士乐发展的里程碑。

examples.english: This year has seen another milestone in the life of the Society, in that our assets passed the £3 billion mark.
examples.chinese: 今年是本会的另一座里程碑，我们的资产突破了30亿英镑。

expressions.text: a milestone on/along the road to something

examples.english: We believe that what we have agreed today will be a milestone on the road to true peace and prosperity in our country.
examples.chinese: 我们相信，今天达成的协议将会是我国通往真正和平及繁荣道路上的一座里程碑。

examples.english: The expedition marked a milestone in the history of exploration.
examples.chinese: 这次探险标志着探索史上的一座里程碑。

examples.english: Of course, starting the job-search is always a big step.
examples.chinese: 当然，开始找工作总是跨出了一大步。

examples.english: The discovery of penicillin was a gigantic step in the treatment of infections.
examples.chinese: 青霉素的发现在治疗感染方面跨出了巨大的一步。

examples.english: The new law on drunk driving is being seen as a major step forward.
examples.chinese: 禁止酒后驾车的新法律的出台被视为一大进步。

examples.english: Identifying the cause of a disease must always be the first step towards finding a cure.
examples.chinese: 发现病因必定是找到疗法的第一步。

examples.english: Re-thinking our management techniques would be an important step in the right direction.
examples.chinese: 反省我们的管理手法会是向正确方向迈出的重要一步。

examples.english: For the unemployed, temporary jobs can be a useful stepping stone.
examples.chinese: 对于失业者来说，临时工作可能是块有用的铺路石。

examples.english: A teaching post is often only a stepping stone to a better paid profession.
examples.chinese: 教书的职位常常只是通往更高薪酬职业的台阶。

examples.english: The agreement was an important diplomatic stepping stone towards independence.
examples.chinese: 此项协议是通往独立的重要的外交基础。

centers.english: a situation in which there is no progress

expressions.text: reach a stalemate/be at a stalemate

examples.english: At that point the strike appeared to have reached a stalemate.
examples.chinese: 那时罢工似乎陷入了僵局。

examples.english: Negotiations with the 200 army rebels are at a stalemate.
examples.chinese: 与200名叛军的谈判处于僵持状态。

examples.english: It looks like the long-running dispute could end in stalemate.
examples.chinese: 看来长期的争端可能最终会陷入僵局。

examples.english: The proposal was aimed at ending the stalemate between environmentalist and business groups.
examples.chinese: 提议的目的在于结束环保主义者和商业团体之间的僵持状态。

examples.english: the stalemate in the three-month long pay dispute
examples.chinese: 长达三个月的工资纠纷的僵局

examples.english: an attempt to break a stalemate in the Middle East peace process
examples.chinese: 打破中东和平进程僵局的努力

examples.english: In the same year the issue came before Parliament, but there was complete deadlock.
examples.chinese: 同年，议案提交国会，但双方完全陷入僵局。

examples.english: There are hopes that an agreement can be made to break the deadlock between the White House and Congress.
examples.chinese: 有希望达成协议，打破白宫和国会之间的僵持局面。

examples.english: The deadlock over the US budget had turned away some investors.
examples.chinese: 美国预算案僵局已把一些投资者拒之门外。

examples.english: Their first trial ended in deadlock when the jury could not reach an agreement.
examples.chinese: 陪审团无法作出裁决，他们的第一次审判以僵局告终。

examples.english: Syria and Israel broke a six-month deadlock in their talks when they sent peace envoys to Maryland.
examples.chinese: 叙利亚和以色列派遣和平使者前往马里兰州，他们的会谈打破了六个月的僵持局面。

examples.english: My mother thought that I should be a model, but I knew that was a dead end.
examples.chinese: 妈妈觉得我应该做模特，但我知道那是条死胡同。

expressions.text: be/feel you are at a dead end

examples.english: At 52, Martin felt he was at a dead end professionally.
examples.chinese: 52岁时，马丁觉得他的职业生涯已到了尽头。

expressions.text: come to/hit/reach etc a dead end

examples.english: The development of this drug has come to a dead end because of doubts about its safety.
examples.chinese: 该药的研制工作因人们怀疑其安全性而停滞不前。

examples.english: A large number of young people who leave school at 16 end up in dead-end jobs.
examples.chinese: 许多16岁离校的年轻人最后从事着没有前途的工作。

examples.english: My sister, Jess, was in a dead-end relationship from which she could see no escape.
examples.chinese: 我姐姐杰丝陷入一段没有结果的感情，无法逃避。

examples.english: The continuing impasse in negotiations made military conflict seem likely.
examples.chinese: 谈判中的持续僵局可能引发军事冲突。

examples.english: an impasse between the US and its European trading partners
examples.chinese: 美国及其欧洲贸易伙伴间的僵局

examples.english: There seemed no way to end the impasse over the Lockerbie affair.
examples.chinese: 似乎没有办法结束洛克比空难的僵局。

expressions.text: reach an impasse/be at an impasse

examples.english: It was clear that the Soviet economy was at an impasse.
examples.chinese: 显然，苏联的经济濒于绝境。

examples.english: On July 25, the situation seemed to have reached an impasse.
examples.chinese: 7月25日，形势似乎已陷入僵局。

examples.english: Accepting the job would be a step backwards for me.
examples.chinese: 对我而言，接受那份工作会是一种退步。

examples.english: Several opposition leaders described the programme as a major step backwards for democracy.
examples.chinese: 几位反对派领导人形容该计划是民主的一大退步。

examples.english: Any sort of stress such as upset in the family may cause a child to take a step backwards in behaviour.
examples.chinese: 家庭内部吵架等任何一种造成紧张的因素都可能令小孩子行为退步。

centers.english: when liquid moves or comes out of something
centers.chinese: 液体移动或从某处出来

examples.english: The river flows more slowly here and it is safe to swim.
examples.chinese: 这一段河水流得较缓慢，游泳很安全。

examples.english: From here, factory waste flows straight into the sea.
examples.chinese: 工厂排放的污水从这儿直接流入大海。

examples.english: Tears flowed down her cheeks as she hugged her children.
examples.chinese: 她拥抱孩子们时泪水顺着她脸颊流下来。

examples.english: Oil flowed from the tanker into the sea.
examples.chinese: 石油从油轮流入海中。

examples.english: When I turned on the tap a brownish liquid came out.
examples.chinese: 我打开水龙头，一股褐色的液体慢慢流出来。

examples.english: There's oil coming out of your engine.
examples.chinese: 你的引擎内有油流出来。

examples.english: I can't get the ketchup to come out of the bottle.
examples.chinese: 我无法把番茄酱从瓶子里弄出来。

examples.english: Sweat poured down his face.
examples.chinese: 他脸上汗流如注。

examples.english: Water was pouring out of the release gates on the dam.
examples.chinese: 水从水坝闸门里往外涌出。

examples.english: Rain poured through the open window, waking me again an hour later.
examples.chinese: 雨从开着的窗户灌进来，一小时后再次把我弄醒。

examples.english: Lava from the volcano is pouring down the mountain towards the town.
examples.chinese: 火山喷出的熔岩从山上淌下来朝着该镇流去。

examples.english: Who left the faucet running?
examples.chinese: 谁没关上水龙头让水在流?

examples.english: Tears ran down her face.
examples.chinese: 泪水顺着她脸颊流淌下来。

examples.english: A stream runs along the bottom of the field.
examples.chinese: 一条小溪沿着田地的最远处流过。

examples.english: I think the fuel tank is leaking.
examples.chinese: 我觉得油箱漏了。

examples.english: Water was leaking from a pipe in the bathroom.
examples.chinese: 浴室内的一条水管漏水了。

examples.english: Yoghurt had leaked out of the pot all over my lunchbox.
examples.chinese: 酸奶从罐里漏出来，流得我的午餐盒内到处都是。

examples.english: The blood was still dripping from the cut on his lip.
examples.chinese: 他嘴唇的伤口上还在滴血。

examples.english: We stood under a tree, with rain dripping onto our heads.
examples.chinese: 我们站在树下，雨滴落到我们头上。

examples.english: Wax from the candle dripped on the tablecloth.
examples.chinese: 蜡烛上的蜡滴到桌布上。

examples.english: A mixture of mud and rainwater oozed out of the bottom of the bucket.
examples.chinese: 泥和雨水的混合物从水桶底下渗出来。

examples.english: Blood was oozing from the wound.
examples.chinese: 血从伤口慢慢渗出。

examples.english: Thick, sticky syrup oozes out of the tree trunk and is collected in buckets.
examples.chinese: 又厚又黏的汁液从树干上渗出，被收集在桶里。

examples.english: The knife wound was gushing blood.
examples.chinese: 刀伤处鲜血喷涌而出。

examples.english: Oil gushed from the hole in the ship's hull.
examples.chinese: 石油从船身的一个洞内喷出。

examples.english: A pipe burst in one of the apartments above, and water gushed down.
examples.chinese: 楼上一个套间内有根管子裂了，水大量涌下来。

examples.english: A sudden gush of liquid spurted out of the plant.
examples.chinese: 这棵植物突然喷出一股液体。

examples.english: Blood trickled down the side of her face.
examples.chinese: 她脸颊淌着血。

examples.english: Water trickled out of the pipe.
examples.chinese: 水从水管内滴出。

examples.english: The fire spread when burning gasoline trickled from the car toward other vehicles.
examples.chinese: 这辆车上滴出的燃烧着的汽油流向别的汽车，火就蔓延开来了。

examples.english: The raging torrent had been reduced to no more than a trickle.
examples.chinese: 狂暴的急流减弱了，至多只剩涓涓细流。

examples.english: Kids were squirting each other with water pistols.
examples.chinese: 小孩子们在用水枪互相喷水。

examples.english: He squirted some ketchup on his fries.
examples.chinese: 他在炸薯条上喷了些番茄酱。

examples.english: The batter is squirted into round molds, then baked.
examples.chinese: 面糊喷到圆形模具里，然后烘烤。

examples.english: Add a couple of squirts of lemon juice to the mixture.
examples.chinese: 给混合物喷一点柠檬汁。

examples.english: The knife hit an artery, and the wound spurted blood.
examples.chinese: 刀划到动脉，伤口喷出血来。

examples.english: Oil from the spill spurted into the crystal waters of Prince William Sound.
examples.chinese: 溢出的石油涌入威廉王子湾清澈的水域。

examples.english: Water spurted from the burst pipe.
examples.chinese: 爆裂的水管中水喷涌而出。

examples.english: The whale sent one final spurt into the air and disappeared.
examples.chinese: 鲸把最后一柱水喷向空中，然后消失了。

examples.english: The walls of the cave are smooth, polished by the water cascading from above.
examples.chinese: 洞壁很光滑，是上面泻下来的水冲刷成的。

examples.english: Water from the broken water main cascaded into a subway station.
examples.chinese: 破裂的主水管中涌出的水倾泻进了地铁站。

examples.english: Rainbows glanced off the cascade of the waterfall.
examples.chinese: 瀑布的急流上空映照着道道彩虹。

centers.english: to make liquid or a substance come out of a container

examples.english: She poured some milk into a glass.
examples.chinese: 她往玻璃杯里倒了些牛奶。

examples.english: Dan picked up the bucket and poured the sand out of it.
examples.chinese: 丹拎起桶，把里面的沙子倒了出来。

examples.english: Pour the garlic sauce over the hot chicken pieces.
examples.chinese: 将蒜蓉酱汁倒在热鸡块上。

examples.english: Gradually pour in the sherry and the stock.
examples.chinese: 慢慢浇上雪利酒和原汤汁。

examples.english: Would you pour out the tea?
examples.chinese: 你来斟茶好吗？

examples.english: Careful - you'll spill it!
examples.chinese: 小心—要洒出来了！

examples.english: Someone had spilled red wine all over the carpet.
examples.chinese: 有人把红酒倒得地毯上到处都是。

examples.english: A tanker has run aground, spilling 60,000 gallons of oil into the sea.
examples.chinese: 一艘油轮搁浅，60,000加仑石油溢入海中。

examples.english: Paul emptied the glass and washed it.
examples.chinese: 保尔把玻璃杯倒空后把它洗干净。

examples.english: Could you empty the wastebasket - it's getting pretty full.
examples.chinese: 你把废纸篓倒干净好吗—很满了。

examples.english: She emptied the contents of the tin into a pan.
examples.chinese: 她把罐头里的东西倒进锅里。

examples.english: We crept up behind him and emptied the bucket of water over his head.
examples.chinese: 我们蹑手蹑脚地走到他后面，把一桶水倒在了他头上。

examples.english: Sprinkle the cheese over the beans.
examples.chinese: 在豆子上撒些干酪。

examples.english: Sprinkle the fish with lemon juice and herbs.
examples.chinese: 往鱼上洒些柠檬汁和香草。

examples.english: She weighed out the flour and tipped it into the bowl.
examples.chinese: 她称出面粉，倒在碗里。

examples.english: Drizzle a little French dressing over the salad.
examples.chinese: 在沙拉上洒些法式调料。

examples.english: Slice the strawberries and drizzle them with the liqueur.
examples.chinese: 将草莓切片，然后洒上烈性甜酒。

centers.english: a place

examples.english: Plant the daisies in a sunny place.
examples.chinese: 将维菊种在阳光充足的地方。

examples.english: Keep your passport in a safe place.
examples.chinese: 要把护照放在一个安全的地方。

examples.english: a quiet, private place to read in
examples.chinese: 一个安静、不受打扰的读书之所

examples.english: Britain is one of the most highly populated places in the world.
examples.chinese: 英国是世界上人口最密集的地方之一。

examples.english: Sign your name on the list, and find yourself a place to sit.
examples.chinese: 在表格上签好名字，然后找个地方坐下。

examples.english: I was looking for a place to park the car.
examples.chinese: 我在找地方停车。

examples.english: This would be a great place for a party!
examples.chinese: 这里真是个举办聚会的好地方！

examples.english: Are you sure this is the right place? I don't see Emma.
examples.chinese: 你确信就是这地方吗？我没看见埃玛。

examples.english: a new hotel in an attractive location
examples.chinese: 地处优美环境的一家新酒店

examples.english: The time, date, and location of the conference have not yet been announced.
examples.chinese: 会议的时间、日期及地点尚未宣布。

examples.english: Authorities say they have pinpointed the location of the sunken ship.
examples.chinese: 当局宣称已确定了沉船的位置。

examples.english: We camped in a pleasant, shady spot beside the river.
examples.chinese: 我们在河边一块荫凉宜人的地方宿营。

examples.english: There are bike trails to the highest spot on the island, which has magnificent views of San Francisco.
examples.chinese: 那里有自行车道通往岛上的至高点，在那里能看到圣弗朗西斯科的壮丽景色。

examples.english: Put some of the hardier plants outdoors in a protected spot.
examples.chinese: 将一些更耐寒的植物放到户外的一处有遮蔽的地方。

examples.english: It looked like a perfect spot for a picnic.
examples.chinese: 这里看上去是野餐的理想地点。

examples.english: Las Vegas has a growing reputation as an entertainment and vacation spot.
examples.chinese: 拉斯韦加斯作为一个娱乐度假地名声越来越响。

examples.english: an important archaeological site
examples.chinese: 一个重要的考古遗址

examples.english: The town has purchased a site on Villa Avenue for the new library.
examples.chinese: 镇政府在别墅大道买下一块地建图书馆。

examples.english: A home for the elderly will be built on the site of the old hospital.
examples.chinese: 养老院将建在医院的旧址上。

examples.english: Green fences were put up around the construction site.
examples.chinese: 工地四周围起了绿色的栅栏。

examples.english: The concert's still on Saturday but the venue has been changed.
examples.chinese: 音乐会仍于星期六举行，但地点变了。

examples.english: The restaurant is one of the few venues for jazz music in the area.
examples.chinese: 这家餐厅是该地区少数爵士乐演奏场所之一。

examples.english: Ministers have not yet agreed on a venue for the next Conference on European Security.
examples.chinese: 部长们还未就下届“欧洲安全会议”的召开地点取得一致意见。

examples.english: The police received an anonymous tip about the suspect's whereabouts.
examples.chinese: 警方接到有关那名嫌疑犯下落的匿名密报。

examples.english: Despite numerous searches and enquiries, her whereabouts are still unknown.
examples.chinese: 尽管已经找了许多次，也问了许多人，但她仍下落不明。

examples.english: The police have appealed for information concerning the whereabouts of the stolen car used in the robbery.
examples.chinese: 劫案中使用的被窃汽车下落如何，警方呼吁人们提供消息。

examples.english: They tried to torture him into revealing the whereabouts of the $90 million, but he didn't know anything.
examples.chinese: 他们对他严刑拷打，要他说出那笔9，000万美元的下落，可他什么也不知道。

centers.english: the exact place where something is or happens
centers.chinese: 某物或某事发生的确切位置

examples.english: Jessica moved to a position where she could see the stage better.
examples.chinese: 杰茜卡移到能够看舞台更清楚的位置。

examples.english: Bombs were dropped on the enemy position.
examples.chinese: 炸弹被投到了敌人的阵地。

examples.english: You can tell roughly what time it is by the sun's position.
examples.chinese: 根据太阳的位置大致能判断出时间。

examples.english: The river at this point is half a mile wide.
examples.chinese: 此处河宽为半英里。

examples.english: Soon they came to a point where the road divided.
examples.chinese: 他们很快来到公路的交叉口。

examples.english: Ward Hill, at over 700 feet, is the island's highest point.
examples.chinese: 700多英尺的沃德山顶峰是该岛的至高点。

examples.english: People had left flowers at the spot where the police officer was killed.
examples.chinese: 民众将鲜花放在那位警察遇难的地点。

examples.english: The museum sits on the exact spot where gold was first discovered.
examples.chinese: 那家博物馆恰好坐落在最早发现黄金的地点。

examples.english: She agreed to meet him at the same spot the next evening.
examples.chinese: 她同意第二天晚上在同一地点见他。

examples.english: The exact location of the ship, which sank in 1857, is being kept secret.
examples.chinese: 1857年沉没的那艘船的确切位置目前保密。

examples.english: A military spokesman would not reveal the exact location of the search area.
examples.chinese: 一位军方发言人不愿公开搜索地区的确切位置。

examples.english: Molecular biologists have found the precise location of the gene.
examples.chinese: 分子生物学家已经发现了那个基因的确切位置。

centers.english: ways of talking about where someone or something is, where they are from etc
centers.chinese: 某人或某物在何处，从哪里来等的说法

examples.english: Where are you?
examples.chinese: 你在哪儿？

examples.english: This is where we keep all our junk.
examples.chinese: 这就是我们堆废旧杂物的地方。

examples.english: I can't remember where I last saw it.
examples.chinese: 我记不起最近一次是在哪里看见的。

examples.english: Could you tell me where the nearest tourist information office is?
examples.chinese: 你能告诉我最近的旅游信息中心在哪儿吗？

examples.english: Where are you going?
examples.chinese: 你去哪儿?

examples.english: Where did you buy those shoes?
examples.chinese: 这双鞋子你在哪里买的？

examples.english: Neighbours have no idea where the couple have moved to.
examples.chinese: 邻居们不知道那对夫妇搬到哪里去了。

examples.english: ‘Would you like to come with us tonight?’ ‘Where to?’
examples.chinese: “今晚你愿意同我们一起去吗？”“去哪里？”

examples.english: Where did you get that magazine from?
examples.chinese: 你从哪里买到那本杂志的？

examples.english: In all that time Naomi never told me where she came from.
examples.chinese: 那个时候，娜奥米一直没有告诉我她是哪里的人。

examples.english: Did he say whereabouts he hid it?
examples.chinese: 他说过躲在哪儿了吗?

examples.english: ‘I'm from Thailand.’ ‘Whereabouts?’
examples.chinese: “我来自泰国。”“哪里？”

examples.english: Whereabouts in Scotland is Perthshire?
examples.chinese: 珀斯郡在苏格兰的什么地方？

expressions.text: where on earth/where in the world

examples.english: Where on earth are you going dressed like that?
examples.chinese: 你穿成那样究竟要去哪里？

examples.english: We've been looking for you for hours. Where in the world have you been?
examples.chinese: 我们找了你几个小时。你究竟在哪里?

examples.english: When he woke up, he could not remember where on earth he was.
examples.chinese: 他醒来时记不清究竟身在何处。

centers.english: in a place

expressions.text: in Africa/the city/the mountains/Oxford Street etc

examples.english: ‘Where's Annie?’ ‘She's in the yard.’
examples.chinese: “安妮在哪儿？”“她在院子里。”

examples.english: I'm going to a conference in Tokyo.
examples.chinese: 我打算去东京参加会议。

examples.english: The plane crashed in the Andes.
examples.chinese: 飞机在安第斯山脉坠毁了。

examples.english: John spent several years teaching in Zimbabwe.
examples.chinese: 约翰在津巴布韦教了几年书。

examples.english: She lives in Fern Street.
examples.chinese: 她住在弗恩街。

examples.english: In the park there were two football matches going on.
examples.chinese: 公园里正举行两场足球比赛。

examples.english: European manufacturers are facing ever increasing competition from companies in the Far East.
examples.chinese: 欧洲的制造商正面临着远东地区的公司日趋激烈的竞争。

expressions.text: at the bank/the doctor's/the theatre/the airport/school etc

examples.english: I'll meet you at the station at 6.30.
examples.chinese: 6点半我与你在车站见面。

examples.english: Joe's at the dentist.
examples.chinese: 乔在牙医诊所。

examples.english: ‘Where were you last night?’ ‘We were at a play.’
examples.chinese: “昨天晚上你们在哪里？”“我们去看演出了。”

examples.english: I get the shopping done when the kids are at school.
examples.chinese: 孩子们在学校里的时候我去买了东西。

expressions.text: on the island/the coast/the outskirts/Oxford Street etc

examples.english: It's a beautiful little fishing village on the south coast.
examples.chinese: 那是南部海岸上的一个美丽的小渔村。

examples.english: We could go to that Chinese restaurant on 23rd street.
examples.chinese: 我们可以去那家在第23大街上的中餐馆。

examples.english: Most superstores are built on the edge of town.
examples.chinese: 大多数超级商场建在城镇边缘。

centers.english: in or to a place, when you do not know which place
centers.chinese: 在或向着某地，但不知何处

examples.english: She lives somewhere near Manchester.
examples.chinese: 她住在曼彻斯特附近的某个地方。

examples.english: I know I saw it somewhere, but I can't remember exactly where.
examples.chinese: 我知道在某个地方看见过它，但记不起到底是在哪儿。

examples.english: From somewhere along the corridor there came the sound of laughter.
examples.chinese: 走廊上的某处传来了笑声。

examples.english: She needs to find somewhere to live before starting her new job.
examples.chinese: 新工作开始前她需要找个住处。

examples.english: I want to go someplace warm on vacation.
examples.chinese: 我想去某个暖和的地方度假。

examples.english: She lives someplace up near Portland, and I haven't seen her for years.
examples.chinese: 她住在波特兰附近的某个地方，我几年没见过她了。

examples.english: A lot of people who use the guide are looking for someplace to eat.
examples.chinese: 许多人利用这本指南寻找吃饭的地方。

examples.english: Is Bob around?
examples.chinese: 鲍勃在附近吗？

examples.english: It's got to be around here somewhere.
examples.chinese: 它肯定在这附近的什么地方。

examples.english: There are some good restaurants around there.
examples.chinese: 那里附近有几家好餐馆。

centers.english: in another place, not here

examples.english: Go and play somewhere else, I'm trying to work.
examples.chinese: 到别的什么地方去玩。我要干活。

examples.english: When the landfill is full, the city will have to find someplace else to dump the garbage.
examples.chinese: 垃圾填埋地满了，那座城市得找其他地方倾倒垃圾。

examples.english: If labor is cheaper somewhere else, that's where companies will go to build new factories.
examples.chinese: 要是别的地方人工更便宜，公司就会去那里建新厂。

examples.english: He'll work as a freelance consultant, unless he finds a better job elsewhere.
examples.chinese: 除非在其他地方找到更好的工作，否则他就做一个自由职业顾问。

examples.english: Make your home difficult to get into, and burglars will go elsewhere.
examples.chinese: 让住宅变得难以闯入，这样窃贼就会去别处了。

examples.english: In North America and Europe, cats are companions for many people. Elsewhere, they are not regarded as pets.
examples.chinese: 在北美和欧洲，猫是许多人的伴侣，而在其他地方，它们不被视为宠物。

examples.english: Elsewhere in the region, conditions are significantly better.
examples.chinese: 在该地区的其他地方，条件明显较好。

centers.english: a place where someone usually is or often goes
centers.chinese: 某人通常在或去的地方

examples.english: Cafes like ‘Les Deux Magots’ were once the favourite haunts of French artists and intellectuals.
examples.chinese: 像“双叟”之类的咖啡馆，曾经是法国艺术家和知识分子最爱去的地方。

examples.english: Johnson will be revisting all his old haunts in Washington.
examples.chinese: 约翰逊会故地重游，再看看以前在华盛顿所有常去的地方。

examples.english: In New York, try one of the celebrity hangouts, such as the Russian Tea Room or Elaine's.
examples.chinese: 在纽约，到名人常去的地方看看，如俄罗斯茶室或伊莱恩餐厅。

examples.english: a teenage hangout on Fountain Street
examples.chinese: 喷泉街上一个青少年常去的地方

examples.english: The bar is a favorite hangout for soldiers from the nearby base.
examples.chinese: 这家酒吧是附近基地士兵最爱去的地方。

examples.english: Gerard was in his usual place by the fire when I reached the pub.
examples.chinese: 我到小酒馆时，杰勒德坐在火炉边他常坐的地方。

examples.english: The children took their places, and the teacher began calling the roll.
examples.chinese: 孩子们就座后，老师开始点名。

centers.english: when an object is in a particular place

examples.english: Do you know where my keys are?
examples.chinese: 你知道我的钥匙在哪儿吗？

examples.english: The television is in the living room.
examples.chinese: 电视机在起居室里。

examples.english: Your supper's in the oven.
examples.chinese: 你的晚饭在烤炉里。！

examples.english: There's a letter for you on the table.
examples.chinese: 桌子上有你的一封信。

examples.english: The linoleum was dented where a washer and dryer once stood.
examples.chinese: 以前放洗衣干衣机的油地毡上有凹痕。

examples.english: A single tall candle stood in the middle of the table.
examples.chinese: 一根长长的蜡烛立在桌子中央。

examples.english: A Christmas tree stood near the fireplace.
examples.chinese: 火炉旁摆着一棵圣诞树。

examples.english: Several letters were lying on the table.
examples.chinese: 桌上有几封信。

examples.english: The children's clothes were lying all over the bedroom floor.
examples.chinese: 孩子们的衣服横七竖八地被扔在卧室地板上。

examples.english: Her packed suitcase was lying near the door.
examples.chinese: 她整理好的手提箱平放在门旁。

centers.english: when a country, town, company etc is in a particular place
centers.chinese: 一个国家、城镇、公司等在某个地方

examples.english: Egypt is in North Africa.
examples.chinese: 埃及在北非。

examples.english: The bank is on the next corner.
examples.chinese: 银行在下一个拐角上。

examples.english: Can you tell me where the station is?
examples.chinese: 你能告诉我车站在哪儿吗？

examples.english: The bookshop is located at 120 Charing Cross Road.
examples.chinese: 那家书店位于查令十字街120号。

examples.english: A U.S. Air Force Base is located nearby.
examples.chinese: 一个美国空军基地在附近。

examples.english: The Duke's home is situated in an attractive part of central London.
examples.chinese: 公爵府位于伦敦中心城区一个迷人的地方。

examples.english: a new hotel, conveniently situated close to the airport
examples.chinese: 一家离机场近而且便利的新酒店

examples.english: The two fisheries are ideally located between major markets in New York and Boston.
examples.chinese: 两座渔场位于纽约和波士顿的大市场之间，位置理想。

examples.english: There is a parking lot now where the old school once stood.
examples.chinese: 以前是学校的地方现在是停车场。

examples.english: The house stood next to a church.
examples.chinese: 那幢房子位于教堂旁边。

examples.english: The United Nations is based in New York.
examples.chinese: 联合国总部设在纽约。

examples.english: More than 200 aircraft will be based at Miramar Air Force Base.
examples.chinese: 200多架飞机将驻扎在米拉马尔空军基地。

examples.english: a London-based insurance company
examples.chinese: 一家总部设在伦敦的保险公司

centers.english: when something is usually kept in a place

examples.english: Put everything back where it belongs when you're through.
examples.chinese: 使用完毕，把所有东西放回原处。

examples.english: ‘Where do these plates go?’ ‘They go in the cupboard above the sink.’
examples.chinese: “这些盘子放哪儿？”“放在水槽上面的橱柜里。”

examples.english: The books belong in the shelves, not on the floor.
examples.chinese: 这些书放在书架上，不是放在地板上。

examples.english: The kids never put anything back in its place.
examples.chinese: 小孩子从来不会把东西放回原处。

examples.english: I can't find the coffee tin -- it isn't in its usual place.
examples.chinese: 我找不到咖啡罐—它不在原来的地方。

centers.english: not in any place

examples.english: Where's Nick? I can't find him anywhere.
examples.chinese: 尼克在哪儿？我到处都找不到他。

examples.english: Yeah, I'll wait. I'm not going anywhere.
examples.chinese: 好的，我等。我哪儿也不去。

examples.english: a path that seemed to lead nowhere
examples.chinese: 一条似乎不通往任何地方的小径

examples.english: In the Sonoran Desert there are plants that grow nowhere else in the country.
examples.chinese: 索诺兰沙漠生长着该国别处没有的植物。

examples.english: The hall was already full, and there was nowhere to sit.
examples.chinese: 大厅已挤得满满的，没有地方可坐了。

examples.english: She had no place else to live, so I let her stay in my apartment.
examples.chinese: 她没有其他住的地方，所以我让她留在我的公寓里。

examples.english: I was lonely and broke with no place to go.
examples.chinese: 我孤单一人而且不名一文，没有地方可去。

examples.english: We had no place else to rehearse.
examples.chinese: 我们找不到其他地方排演。

centers.english: to clap

examples.english: The audience cheered and clapped as the curtain came down.
examples.chinese: 落幕时，观众欢呼、鼓掌。

examples.english: Fans usually clap the batsman when he leaves the field.
examples.chinese: 击球手离场时，球迷一般会为他鼓掌。

examples.english: A crowd gathered to watch the runners, clapping their hands and urging them on.
examples.chinese: 人们聚在一起观看选手赛跑，为他们鼓掌加油。

examples.english: After a while the clapping died down.
examples.chinese: 过了一会儿，掌声渐渐平息下去。

examples.english: The crowd applauded when Evans promised to cut taxes.
examples.chinese: 埃文斯许诺减税时，人群鼓起掌来。

examples.english: A group of supporters applauded the strikers as they were led into court.
examples.chinese: 罢工者被带进法庭时，一群支持者为他们鼓掌。

examples.english: The audience were now on their feet, cheering wildly.
examples.chinese: 现在观众们都站了起来，疯狂地欢呼。

examples.english: Thousands of people lined Broadway to cheer the Yankees and celebrate their World Series triumph.
examples.chinese: 成千上万的民众排列在百老汇大街两旁向洋基队欢呼，庆祝他们赢得世界职业棒球锦标赛。

examples.english: A great cheer went up when the first goal was scored.
examples.chinese: 第一个球进了，爆发出了巨大的欢呼声。

examples.english: Three cheers for the next Governor of Nebraska!
examples.chinese: 为内布拉斯加州下任州长欢呼三声！

examples.english: The cheering went on for ages as the victorious athletes ran around the track.
examples.chinese: 获胜的运动员围绕跑道奔跑时，欢呼声经久不息。

examples.english: There was loud applause when the band members ran onto the stage.
examples.chinese: 乐队成员跑上台时，响起热烈的掌声。

examples.english: The candidate's promise to improve public schools was greeted with a loud round of applause.
examples.chinese: 候选人许诺改善公立学校，赢得一阵掌声。

examples.english: The conductor waited for the applause to die down before signalling for the orchestra to begin.
examples.chinese: 指挥等待掌声平息下去才示意乐队开始演奏。

examples.english: Miller got a standing ovation when he entered the game.
examples.chinese: 米勒上场时，观众起立鼓掌。

examples.english: The speech was given a standing ovation.
examples.chinese: 听众们起身为演讲喝彩。

centers.english: what you say when you want someone to clap
centers.chinese: 想要别人鼓掌时说的话

examples.english: Let's give young Suzy a big hand for the marvellous dancing display!
examples.chinese: 让我们为年轻的苏茜精彩的舞蹈表演热烈鼓掌！

examples.english: Come on everyone, let's give it up for Tom Jones!
examples.chinese: 大家来吧，让我们为汤姆·琼斯鼓掌！

examples.english: Ladies and gentlemen, put your hands together and give a warm welcome to Ricardo Montalban!
examples.chinese: 各位先生女士，请鼓掌，热烈欢迎里卡多·蒙塔尔班！

centers.english: to show that you dislike a person or a performance
centers.chinese: 表示不喜欢某人或表演

examples.english: Some people in the crowd booed when she walked on stage.
examples.chinese: 她走上舞台时人群中有人发出嘘声。

examples.english: Taylor was booed as he left the field.
examples.chinese: 泰勒下场时有人嘘他。

examples.english: Keough denied that the boos affected his performance.
examples.chinese: 基奥否认嘘声影响了他的表现。

examples.english: Relatives of the victim hissed as the killer was led from the courtroom.
examples.chinese: 杀人犯被带出法庭时，受害者的亲戚发出嘘声。

examples.english: Hundreds of people shouted and hissed at the prime minister.
examples.chinese: 数百人对着首相大喊大叫并发出嘘声。

examples.english: This announcement was greeted with boos and hisses.
examples.chinese: 这项宣布引来一片嘘声。

examples.english: The fans jeered as it became obvious that their team was going to lose.
examples.chinese: 自己的球队显然要输了，球迷们谩骂起来。

examples.english: The mayor was jeered and booed as he tried to speak to the crowd.
examples.chinese: 市长试图对人群讲话时招来了嘲笑声和嘘声。

examples.english: The audience interrupted the candidate's speech with jeers and shouts.
examples.chinese: 听众发出嘲笑声和叫声打断了候选人的演讲。

centers.english: your position or rank in an organization, company etc
centers.chinese: 组织、公司等中的地位或职位

examples.english: Her position in the company means that she is responsible for major financial decisions.
examples.chinese: 她在公司的职务使她负责重大的财务决定。

examples.english: He eventually became Lord Chancellor, the most powerful position in the British legal system.
examples.chinese: 他终于当上了大法官，这是英国司法体系中最有权的职位。

examples.english: Thorn holds one of the most senior positions in the Federal Bank.
examples.chinese: 索恩担任联邦银行中最高级的职务之一。

examples.english: The company provides training for staff at all levels.
examples.chinese: 该公司为所有级别的员工提供培训。

examples.english: There are not many part-time workers in the middle and higher levels of management.
examples.chinese: 中高级管理层没有很多兼职员工。

examples.english: Gang members wear clothes or decorations that show the member's rank.
examples.chinese: 帮派成员穿戴显示级别的服装或饰物。

examples.english: He joined the Los Angeles police department and was eventually promoted to the rank of lieutenant.
examples.chinese: 他加入洛杉矶警察局，最终晋升为中尉警衔。

examples.english: Four of the boys in Boy Scout Troop 611 reached the rank of Eagle Scout.
examples.chinese: 男童子军611中队的四名男孩升到了鹰徽童子军级别。

examples.english: The position of Secretary of State holds Cabinet rank.
examples.chinese: 国务大臣一职为内阁部长级别。

examples.english: The tribe buried their dead with ornaments or tools that showed the dead person's status.
examples.chinese: 该部落将显示死者地位的饰物或工具与其葬在一起。

examples.english: In the Middle Ages, priests and other religious figures had a very high status.
examples.chinese: 中世纪时，教士及其他神职人员享有很高的地位。

examples.english: She gained celebrity status with her publication of ‘Mastering the Art of French Cooking.’
examples.chinese: 她因出版《掌握法国烹饪艺术》一书获得名人地位。

examples.english: Stefano's standing as an artist has improved over the past few years.
examples.chinese: 斯蒂芬诺作为艺术家的地位在过去几年里已有所提高。

examples.english: Graduates from certain colleges have a lower standing in the eyes of employers.
examples.chinese: 某些学院的毕业生在雇主眼里地位较低。

examples.english: a man of standing and wealth
examples.chinese: 一个有地位又有财富的男人

examples.english: Genotti was thought to be number two in the Sicilian Mafia hierarchy.
examples.chinese: 吉诺提被认为在西西里黑手党内排名第二。

examples.english: The school district reorganized the administrative hierarchy, which helped to save money.
examples.chinese: 该学区重新安排了管理组织结构，这样有助于省钱。

centers.english: to be in a high position in an organization, company, or list
centers.chinese: 在一组织、公司或名单中处于高位

examples.english: He works for NASA, fairly high up.
examples.chinese: 他在美国国家航空航天局工作，职位相当高。

examples.english: Her father's quite high up in the company.
examples.chinese: 她爸爸在该公司职位很高。

examples.english: The reporter's sources were apparently high up in the government.
examples.chinese: 那位记者的消息看似来源于政府高层。

examples.english: Pele is high on the list of the world's best footballers.
examples.chinese: 贝利在世界最佳足球员名单上排在前列。

examples.english: U2's new record is high in the charts.
examples.chinese: U2的新唱片处于排行榜前列。

examples.english: Women at the top often have to work harder than men.
examples.chinese: 身处最高职位的女性常常得比男性更努力工作。

examples.english: The prizes will be awarded to 600 students who graduate at the top of their class.
examples.chinese: 这些奖将授予毕业时在班内名列前茅的600名学生。

examples.english: The issue is at the top of the agenda.
examples.chinese: 该事件是最重要的一项议程。

centers.english: to be in a higher position than someone else

examples.english: It's not the staff that are the problem. It's the people above them.
examples.chinese: 员工没有问题，问题出在他们的上级。

examples.english: The next person above him is the sales manager.
examples.chinese: 比他高一级的是销售经理。

examples.english: Technically I'm senior to Smith, but we do more or less the same job.
examples.chinese: 严格地说，我比史密斯职位高，但我们几乎做相同的工作。

examples.english: The men said they had no problems taking orders from women senior to them in rank.
examples.chinese: 那些男性称，听从比他们级别高的女性没有问题。

examples.english: He failed to follow a direct order from his superior.
examples.chinese: 他未能服从上司的直接指令。

examples.english: Women who have been harassed by male superiors often don't complain because they are afraid of losing their jobs.
examples.chinese: 受到过男性上司骚扰的女性往往不会去投诉，因为她们害怕失去工作。

examples.english: Successful sales staff will outrank less successful workers, regardless of qualifications.
examples.chinese: 不管资历如何，业绩好的销售人员终将比业绩差的级别高。

examples.english: Because Barnett ranks him, they have to be discreet about their romance.
examples.chinese: 因为巴尼特比他级别高，所以他们得谨慎处理两人的恋情。

centers.english: someone who has a high position

examples.english: He's a senior executive at Volkswagen.
examples.chinese: 他是大众汽车公司的高级行政人员。

examples.english: a job in senior management
examples.chinese: 高级管理层的一个职位

examples.english: one of the country's most senior judges
examples.chinese: 该国地位最高的法官之一

examples.english: The President met with top Korean businessmen.
examples.chinese: 总统会见了一批韩国商界要人。

examples.english: a top fashion designer
examples.chinese: 一位顶级时装设计师

examples.english: A high-ranking State Department official was accused of selling secret information.
examples.chinese: 一名国务院高级官员被控出卖秘密情报。

examples.english: a high-ranking officer in the air force
examples.chinese: 一位空军高级军官

examples.english: Don Shula became the youngest head coach in NFL history.
examples.chinese: 唐·舒拉成为了美国橄榄球联盟历史上最年轻的主教练。

examples.english: The head counsellor commented that substance abuse was pervasive at the school.
examples.chinese: 首席辅导老师评论说，滥用药物的情况在校内普遍存在。

centers.english: to be in a low position in an organization, company, or list
centers.chinese: 在一组织、公司或名单中地位低

examples.english: He doesn't have any authority over you, he's fairly low down.
examples.chinese: 他管不了你，他的职位很低。

examples.english: At that time I was still fairly low down in the company.
examples.chinese: 当时，我在公司职位仍相当低。

examples.english: Surprisingly, last year's champions are low down in the league table.
examples.chinese: 奇怪的是，去年的冠军在联赛积分表上排名很落后。

examples.english: The scandal involved a number of low-ranking officials in the government.
examples.chinese: 丑闻涉及一些低级政府官员。

examples.english: None of the low-ranking members were allowed to vote at the society's meeting.
examples.chinese: 级别低的会员不得在协会大会上投票。

examples.english: Richard started out at the bottom of the firm and worked his way to the top.
examples.chinese: 理查德从公司低层做起，一步一步升至最高职位。

examples.english: The team is at the bottom of the league.
examples.chinese: 该队在联赛中排名最末。

examples.english: You will start at the bottom of the pay scale, but you can expect a raise after 12 months.
examples.chinese: 刚开始时工资级别最低，但12个月后可以加薪。

examples.english: The band's single has been moving steadily towards the bottom of the charts this month.
examples.chinese: 本月，该乐队的单曲渐渐滑向排行榜末尾的位置。

expressions.text: be at the bottom of the pile

examples.english: Immigrants have always been at the bottom of the pile for housing.
examples.chinese: 移民的住房条件一直是最差的。

examples.english: At the bottom of the pile are the runners, young boys who carry messages all day.
examples.chinese: 处于最底层的是送信人，那些男孩子整天奔波送信。

centers.english: someone who is in a lower position than someone else

examples.english: She started work as a junior reporter on a local newspaper.
examples.chinese: 她刚工作时在当地一家报社当初级记者。

examples.english: The most junior officers wore a red stripe on their sleeves.
examples.chinese: 级别最低的军官袖子上有一道红杠。

examples.english: My mother is assistant principal at a school in Washington, D.C.
examples.chinese: 我母亲是华盛顿一所学校的副校长。

examples.english: Noll, an assistant coach with the Colts, was hired by the Steelers as head coach.
examples.chinese: 小马队副教练诺尔被钢人队聘为主教练。

examples.english: Hughes, who was Mott's assistant, will now become head coach.
examples.chinese: 休斯曾任莫特的助手，现在要当主教练了。

examples.english: Costello will have five direct subordinates.
examples.chinese: 科斯特洛将会有五个直接领导的下属。

examples.english: The idea of being evaluated by subordinates makes some managers uneasy.
examples.chinese: 想到要由下属来评估自己，一些经理感到不安。

examples.english: She has at least 40 people under her at Shell.
examples.chinese: 在壳牌公司，她手下有至少40个人。

examples.english: Several of the employees under him complained of his bullying behavior.
examples.chinese: 他手下的几名员工投诉他仗势凌人。

examples.english: McKellon will report to Alan Selles, the company's chairman.
examples.chinese: 麦凯隆将向公司主席艾伦·塞勒斯负责。

examples.english: Alan has five members of the production team reporting to him.
examples.chinese: 艾伦有五名生产部员工向他汇报。

centers.english: someone's position in a competition, race, list etc
centers.chinese: 某人在竞赛、赛跑、名单等中的位置

examples.english: Pollock rose to the No. 2 position in the company, but found that the higher she rose, the less she liked her job.
examples.chinese: 波洛克坐上了公司的第二把交椅，但她发现职位升得越高，她越不喜欢她的工作。

examples.english: The company has a strong position in most international markets.
examples.chinese: 该公司在大多数国际市场上地位稳固。

examples.english: Jonson is in third position after the first part of the competition.
examples.chinese: 经过第一阶段的比赛，琼森位居第三名。

examples.english: Manchester United go up two places after their win at Liverpool.
examples.chinese: 曼彻斯特联队在利物浦获胜后名次上升了两位。

examples.english: The horse I was betting on finished in second place.
examples.chinese: 我押注的那匹马结果跑了第二名。

examples.english: Victoria took first place in a national essay writing competition.
examples.chinese: 维多利亚在全国作文比赛中取得第一名。

examples.english: The football team lost their No. 1 ranking as a result of the decision.
examples.chinese: 由于这一决定，该足球队失去了排名第一的位置。

examples.english: At the end of this event, Davies is sure to have moved up a place in the world rankings.
examples.chinese: 这项赛事结束后，戴维斯在世界排名表上肯定能上升一位。

centers.english: to have a particular position in a competition, race, list etc
centers.chinese: 竞赛、赛跑、名单等中处于某个位置

examples.english: The name Michael always ranks high on the list of the most popular boys’ names.
examples.chinese: 在最常用的男孩名字一览表上，迈克尔这个名字一直位居前列。

examples.english: Volleyball Monthly ranked the team third in the nation.
examples.chinese: 《排球月刊》将该队列为全国第三。

examples.english: Connell, a Canadian ranked 73rd in the world, won the third set.
examples.chinese: 排名世界第73位的加拿大选手康奈尔赢了第三盘。

examples.english: Second-ranked Stanford beat the University of San Diego 103-68.
examples.chinese: 排名第二的斯坦福大学队以103比68击败圣迭戈大学队。

examples.english: Sandoz ranks as one of the 10 largest drug companies in the world.
examples.chinese: 山德士位于世界十大制药公司之列。

examples.english: She was beaten by someone who was ranked only 200th in the world.
examples.chinese: 她被一个世界排名才200位的选手打败。

examples.english: Sandoz won, and Anderson was second.
examples.chinese: 山德士赢了，安德森得第二名。

examples.english: Michael Johnson came first in the 400m final.
examples.chinese: 迈克尔·约翰逊在400米决赛中跑了第一。

centers.english: to carry something or someone
centers.chinese: 拿[提、拎、抱、搬]某物或运送某人

examples.english: A porter helped me carry my bags.
examples.chinese: 一个搬运工人帮我搬运行李。

examples.english: The women have to carry water from the well to the village.
examples.chinese: 妇女必须从井里打水挑到村子里。

examples.english: I've been carrying this tape-recorder around with me all day.
examples.chinese: 我整天到处都拎着这台录音机。

examples.english: A messenger arrived, bearing a letter from the ambassador.
examples.chinese: 送信人到了，带来一封大使的信。

examples.english: At the head of the procession a group of dark-suited men bore the coffin into the church.
examples.chinese: 几个身穿黑衣的男子走在队列的前头把棺材抬进教堂。

examples.english: My job was to tote their golf bags and wash their cars.
examples.chinese: 我的工作是帮他们背高尔夫球袋和洗车。

examples.english: a gun-toting cowboy
examples.chinese: 一个携枪牛仔

examples.english: We lugged our suitcases up the hotel steps.
examples.chinese: 我们费劲地提着行李上了宾馆的楼梯。

examples.english: I've got enough to carry without lugging your bags as well.
examples.chinese: 就算不用拖着你的行李，我拎的东西也够多了。

examples.english: Madge picked up the box and carted it out to the back yard.
examples.chinese: 玛奇提起箱子，把它拖到后院。

examples.english: I'm not going to cart your shopping around all afternoon.
examples.chinese: 我可不想提着你买的东西逛一个下午！

centers.english: carrying a lot of things

examples.english: Cora was loaded down with two 70-pound suitcases.
examples.chinese: 科拉拎着两个70磅重的大箱子。

examples.english: A van loaded with newspapers was parked in front of the store.
examples.chinese: 一辆满载报纸的小型货车停在商店门口。

examples.english: She was carrying a tray laden with dishes.
examples.chinese: 她拿着一个装满碟子的托盘。

examples.english: The bus was heavily laden with passengers and baggage.
examples.chinese: 公共汽车满载着乘客和行李。

examples.english: The branches of the trees were weighed down with fruit.
examples.chinese: 树枝都被累累果实压弯了。

examples.english: She struggled along the street, weighed down by bags.
examples.chinese: 她沿着大街艰难地走着，手里提着沉甸甸的袋子。

examples.english: Paul staggered under the weight of two backpacks.
examples.chinese: 保罗背着两个背包摇摇晃晃地走着。

examples.english: The plane was dangerously overloaded.
examples.chinese: 那架飞机超载了，很危险。

examples.english: The car was so overloaded the bumpers were almost touching the ground.
examples.chinese: 那辆车严重超载，保险杠几乎要碰到地面了。

centers.english: to regularly carry something in your pocket, bag etc
centers.chinese: 口袋、袋子等中经常装着某物

examples.english: The new mobile phones are slim enough to carry in your pocket.
examples.chinese: 那新款的移动电话很薄，可以放在口袋里随身携带。

examples.english: You should always carry at least a little cash with you in case of an emergency.
examples.chinese: 你至少总要带点现金以防万一。

centers.english: designed to be carried

examples.english: There's a portable CD player in the kitchen.
examples.chinese: 厨房里有一台便携式CD播放器。

examples.english: Greenaway still writes his novels on an old portable typewriter.
examples.chinese: 格里纳韦仍然在用一台旧的便携式打字机写小说。

centers.english: to lift a person or thing

examples.english: His doctor has told him that he must not lift anything heavy.
examples.chinese: 医生告诫他不能举重物。

examples.english: She lifted the lid from a huge pot and took a sniff.
examples.chinese: 她揭开一个大锅的盖子闻了闻。

examples.english: They lifted me onto a stretcher and took me to the ambulance.
examples.chinese: 他们把我抬到担架上并送上救护车。

examples.english: Firemen had to use a mobile crane to lift the carriages back onto the rails.
examples.chinese: 消防队员不得不使用移动式起重机把车厢吊起来，重新放回铁轨上。

examples.english: The massive bull lifted him bodily into the air and shook him repeatedly.
examples.chinese: 那头庞大的公牛把他整个身体举向空中，然后不停地摇晃。

examples.english: He lifted her up in his arms.
examples.chinese: 他把她抱起来。

examples.english: Can you help me lift up this table so we can get the carpet under it?
examples.chinese: 你帮我把这桌子抬起来，以便我们把下面的地毯拿出来好吗?

examples.english: Six men lifted up the coffin and carried it out of the church.
examples.chinese: 六名男子抬起棺材走出教堂。

expressions.text: lift something up onto/out of/over etc

examples.english: I couldn't see the game so I asked my dad to lift me up onto his shoulders.
examples.chinese: 我看不见比赛，所以让爸爸把我举起来放到他的肩膀上。

examples.english: She picked up her bag and left the room.
examples.chinese: 她拎起手提包离开了房间。

examples.english: Maurin picked up the gun and put it in his pocket.
examples.chinese: 莫林拿起枪放在口袋里。

examples.english: The lioness picked her cub up by its neck.
examples.chinese: 母狮咬着幼狮的脖子把它衔起来。

examples.english: There are papers all over the floor - could you pick them up and put them away?
examples.chinese: 地上到处都是报纸—你能把它们捡起来放好吗?

examples.english: The little girl's mother laughed and bent down to pick her up.
examples.chinese: 小女孩的母亲笑着弯下腰把她抱起来。

examples.english: The vacuum cleaner won't pick this stuff up.
examples.chinese: 吸尘器吸不起这东西。

examples.english: The phone rang and Hutton picked it up, frowning.
examples.chinese: 电话响了，赫顿皱着眉头拿起电话筒。

examples.english: The bridge can be raised to allow ships to pass under it.
examples.chinese: 这座桥可以升起来让船从下面驶过。

examples.english: ‘Cheers, everyone!’ said Larry, raising his glass.
examples.chinese: “大家干杯！”拉里举起杯子说道。

examples.english: He scooped up a handful of sand and dropped it in the bucket.
examples.chinese: 他舀起一把沙子放进桶里。

examples.english: Slice the eggs in half, then scoop out the yolks into a bowl.
examples.chinese: 把鸡蛋切成两半，然后挖出蛋黄放入碗内。

examples.english: Joe picked up the sack and hoisted it onto the truck.
examples.chinese: 乔拎起麻袋，把它举到卡车上。

examples.english: The crowd hoisted him onto their shoulders and carried him triumphantly down the main street.
examples.chinese: 人群把他举到肩上，意气风发地抬着走在大街上。

examples.english: Fred jacked up the car and started to unscrew the wheel nuts.
examples.chinese: 弗雷德用千斤顶把汽车托高，然后开始旋下轮胎上的螺帽。

examples.english: Why don't you jack it up and we'll have a look at the suspension?
examples.chinese: 你为什么不用千斤顶把它托起来让我们看看悬架？

centers.english: to lift a part of your body to a higher position

examples.english: She raised her eyes from the newspaper when he came in.
examples.chinese: 他走进来时，她把视线从报纸上抬起来。

examples.english: If you have any questions, please raise your hand.
examples.chinese: 有问题请举手。

examples.english: Lori raised her arms over her head.
examples.chinese: 洛莉把双手举过头顶。

examples.english: Mum raised her hand to hit me and then stopped.
examples.chinese: 妈妈抬起手想打我，一下子又停住了。

examples.english: I was feeling so weak that I could hardly lift my head from the pillow.
examples.chinese: 我感到软弱无力，头靠在枕头上几乎都抬不起来。

examples.english: The child lifted up her arms, asking to be picked up.
examples.chinese: 那小孩举起双手要抱。

examples.english: Lie on your side, use your hand for support, and lift your leg to the level of your shoulder.
examples.chinese: 侧身躺着，用手作支撑，把腿抬到齐肩的高度。

examples.english: Put your hand up if you know the answer.
examples.chinese: 知道答案就举手。

examples.english: If you are not able to take part, please put your hand up.
examples.chinese: 如果不能参加就请举手。

centers.english: to remove something from inside something else
centers.chinese: 把某物从另一物里面拿走

examples.english: She opened her briefcase and took out a letter.
examples.chinese: 她打开公文包取出一封信。

examples.english: I need to get to a cash machine and take out some money.
examples.chinese: 我要找个自动提款机去取点钱。

examples.english: We'll have to take out the engine to fix the gearbox.
examples.chinese: 我们得取出引擎来修理齿轮箱。

examples.english: Roland reached inside his jacket and took his passport out.
examples.chinese: 罗兰伸手到夹克衫里，拿出护照。

examples.english: She took a few coins out of her purse.
examples.chinese: 她从钱包里拿出几枚硬币。

examples.english: Cut the fruit in half and remove the seeds.
examples.chinese: 把水果切成两半，取出果核。

examples.english: He opened the torch and removed the bulb.
examples.chinese: 他打开手电筒，取出灯泡。

examples.english: Someone had removed some papers from the file.
examples.chinese: 有人从文件夹里拿走了几份文件。

examples.english: The spare wheel was right at the back of the boot under a load of suitcases, so it took me ages to get it out.
examples.chinese: 备用轮胎放在车后面行李箱内的一大堆皮箱底下，所以我花了很长时间才把它取出来。

examples.english: It's important to get all the dirt out of the wound.
examples.chinese: 把伤口内的脏物都清理掉是很重要的。

examples.english: If you want to get out the old photo albums, you're going to have to dig in the bottom of that trunk.
examples.chinese: 你要把旧相册拿出来的话，就得翻到那只大衣箱底下去寻找。

examples.english: 42 tons of gold were extracted at the mine in 1987.
examples.chinese: 1987年在这个金矿里采掘出了42吨黄金。

examples.english: She had to have three teeth extracted.
examples.chinese: 她有三颗牙齿要拔掉。

examples.english: The nuts are crushed in order to extract the oil from them.
examples.chinese: 压碎果仁是为了从中提取果仁油。

examples.english: The bird uses its long beak to extract nectar from the flowers.
examples.chinese: 鸟用细长的喙汲取花蜜。

examples.english: Make sure you cut out any tough, gristly parts before you cook the meat.
examples.chinese: 煮肉之前，一定要把连着软骨、较老的部分去掉。

examples.english: I knew I would have to cut the bullet out before the wound became infected.
examples.chinese: 我知道先要把子弹挖掉以免伤口受到感染。

examples.english: The man pulled out a gun and fired three shots.
examples.chinese: 那名男子拔出手枪开了三枪。

examples.english: She pulled a notebook out and scribbled a few notes.
examples.chinese: 她拿出笔记本草草地记了几笔。

centers.english: to remove something that is fixed or joined to something else
centers.chinese: 取下固定或连结在另一物上的某物

examples.english: I took the lid off and tasted the soup.
examples.chinese: 我拿掉锅盖，尝了尝汤的味道。

examples.english: He took off the old handle and fixed a new one in its place.
examples.chinese: 他取下旧手柄，换上一个新的。

examples.english: Remove all the fat, then cut the meat into cubes.
examples.chinese: 去掉所有的肥肉，然后把肉切成肉丁。

examples.english: Make sure that the engine has cooled down before removing the radiator cap.
examples.chinese: 拧开散热器的盖之前，要确定引擎已经冷却。

examples.english: She was in the hospital, having a lump removed from her breast.
examples.chinese: 她在医院里，要把乳房的一处肿块切除。

examples.english: Please detach the last section of this form, fill it in, and return it to us.
examples.chinese: 撕下表格的最后一部分，填好并寄回给我们。

examples.english: The control unit can be detached from the base.
examples.chinese: 控制部件可以从底座上拆下来。

examples.english: The coat has a detachable hood that can be detached.
examples.chinese: 这件外衣的风帽是可拆卸的。

examples.english: A van bumped into us, damaging one of the headlights and breaking off the aerial.
examples.chinese: 小货车撞了我们的车，损坏了一个车前灯，折断了天线。

examples.english: Tear off the coupon and send it to this address.
examples.chinese: 把赠券撕下，寄到这个地址去。

examples.english: Winds reached over 100 mph, tearing off roofs and flattening trees.
examples.chinese: 风速高达每小时100多英里，刮掉了屋顶，吹倒了树木。

examples.english: He used to catch spiders and cut off their legs.
examples.chinese: 他以前喜欢捉蜘蛛并把蜘蛛腿剪掉。

examples.english: Gerard broke the handle off accidentally when he was trying to open the door.
examples.chinese: 杰勒德在设法打开门时，不小心将门把手弄断了。

examples.english: I'd like to keep this part -- is it alright if I tear it off?
examples.chinese: 我想留着这部分——把它撕下来行吗？

examples.english: He cut the top off the coconut.
examples.chinese: 他把椰子的顶部削去。

examples.english: He cut all his hair off as a protest.
examples.chinese: 他把头发剪光以示抗议。

examples.english: Migrant workers come to the orchard each autumn to pick apples.
examples.chinese: 流动工人每年秋天会到果园来摘苹果。

examples.english: I'll pick a few flowers to take to mum's.
examples.chinese: 我去采些花拿到妈妈家里去。

centers.english: to remove something such as paint, dirt etc from a surface
centers.chinese: 清除表面上的油漆、尘土等

examples.english: She was told to go to the washroom and take off her lipstick.
examples.chinese: 他们叫她到洗手间去把口红擦掉。！

examples.english: A standard detergent should take most of the grease off the surface.
examples.chinese: 普通洗涤剂应该就能够把表面上大部分的油污去掉。

examples.english: Paintstripper is the easiest way to take old paint off.
examples.chinese: 使用除漆剂是清除旧油漆最简便的方法。

examples.english: I don't know how I'm going to get this old varnish off.
examples.chinese: 我不知道怎样才能把这些旧清漆去掉。

examples.english: How do you get mold stains off the wall?
examples.chinese: 你有什么办法去除墙上的霉斑吗？

examples.english: You can use lemon juice to remove the grease.
examples.chinese: 你可以用柠檬汁来去除这些油污。

examples.english: Remove any dirt from the negative before printing the photograph.
examples.chinese: 冲印照片前要把底片上的污点清除干净。

examples.english: I wiped the paint off with my handkerchief.
examples.chinese: 我用手帕把油漆擦掉。

examples.english: Mitchell tried to rub the dirt off the nameplate with his gloved thumb.
examples.chinese: 米切尔想用戴着手套的拇指把姓名牌上的尘垢擦掉。

examples.english: He wiped the dust off the piano.
examples.chinese: 他把钢琴上的灰尘抹掉。

examples.english: She picked up one of the shoes and carefully wiped off the mud.
examples.chinese: 她拿起一只鞋，仔细地把泥土擦掉。

examples.english: We started by scraping off the old wallpaper.
examples.chinese: 我们先刮掉了旧的墙纸。

examples.english: It took a long time to scrape off all the dirt and bits of food from the top of the cooker.
examples.chinese: 花了很长时间才把锅上面的污迹和食物碎屑全部刮掉。

examples.english: Someone had scratched some of the paint off my car.
examples.chinese: 有人把我的汽车上刮掉了一点漆。

examples.english: The car was covered in rust and Joey had to scrape it off with a knife.
examples.chinese: 汽车外面都生了锈，乔伊不得不用刀把锈刮掉。

examples.english: Lottery cards have silver panels which you scratch off to see if you have won a prize.
examples.chinese: 彩票上有银色方格，刮去后可看到是否中奖。

examples.english: Slice each avocado in half, then peel off the skin.
examples.chinese: 把鳄梨切成两半，然后去皮。

examples.english: When I peeled the label off I discovered that the old price was $2 cheaper.
examples.chinese: 我把标签撕下来时，发现原价要便宜两美元。

examples.english: We stripped the doors down to the bare wood.
examples.chinese: 我们把门的外层铲掉至露出原木料。

examples.english: I think we should strip the old varnish off and see what the wood's like underneath.
examples.chinese: 我想我们应该把旧清漆剥掉，看看下面的木料是什么样的。

centers.english: to remove dirt from a piece of clothing or material
centers.chinese: 把尘垢从衣服或物料上清除掉

examples.english: What can I use to get these wine stains our of the tablecloth?
examples.chinese: 我可以用什么东西把桌布上的这些酒渍清除掉？

examples.english: It's a pity about the mark on your shirt. Dry cleaning will probably get it out.
examples.chinese: 你的衬衫上有污迹，真可惜。干洗也许能把它洗掉。

examples.english: I've washed the tablecloth three times, but I can't seem to shift these stains.
examples.chinese: 我把桌布洗过三次，但好像洗不掉这些污迹。

examples.english: Blood stains are very difficult to shift.
examples.chinese: 血迹很难洗掉。

examples.english: Use plenty of washing powder otherwise mud and grass stains won't come out.
examples.chinese: 多用些洗衣粉，不然的话泥垢和草渍就洗不掉。

examples.english: A lot of hair dyes are designed to wash out after three or four washes.
examples.chinese: 许多染发剂都预定能经得起三到四次的洗发后才被洗掉。

centers.english: to remove writing, film, or music from paper, a tape etc
centers.chinese: 从纸上或磁带等上擦掉字迹、影片或音乐

examples.english: I think you should delete the second paragraph.
examples.chinese: 我认为你应该把第二段删除。

examples.english: The computer automatically deletes any files you have not saved.
examples.chinese: 电脑自动删除你没有储存过的文件。

examples.english: Use a pencil so you can erase your mistakes.
examples.chinese: 用铅笔写，这样的话有错误就可以擦掉。

examples.english: I had to rub the whole thing out and start again.
examples.chinese: 我只好把它全部擦去重新开始。

examples.english: Someone had rubbed out my name.
examples.chinese: 有人把我的名字擦掉了。

examples.english: She crossed out the names of people who had left.
examples.chinese: 她把离开了的人的姓名都划掉了。

examples.english: That's not right. Cross it out and start again.
examples.chinese: 那不对，把它划去重新写过。

examples.english: Is there any way I can erase this videotape so no one will see what's on it?
examples.chinese: 为了不让别人看到录像带上的内容，我能用什么办法把它删掉吗？

examples.english: Somehow the magnets had erased the entire cassette.
examples.chinese: 不知怎么地，磁铁就把整盒磁带的内容都抹掉了。

examples.english: Some of the descriptions are a bit long and should be cut.
examples.chinese: 有些描述太长，应该删掉。

examples.english: A couple of the scenes had to be cut because they were too violent.
examples.chinese: 有几个镜头过于暴力，只得剪掉。

examples.english: If you make a mistake, don't worry - we can edit it out before the interview is shown.
examples.chinese: 如果你出错的话不必担心，访问播出前我们会把它剪辑掉。

examples.english: They had edited out several of the most important points in the article.
examples.chinese: 他们把文章中最重要的几点都删掉了。

centers.english: the process of removing something

examples.english: Treatment usually consists of removal of the tumour combined with drug treatment.
examples.chinese: 治疗通常包括切除肿瘤，再辅以药物治疗。

examples.english: Removal of the brake pads is a simple operation which can be done with a few basic tools.
examples.chinese: 拆除刹车板很简单，有几件基本工具就能做到。

examples.english: The protesters are opposed to the extraction of minerals in the area.
examples.chinese: 抗议者反对在该地区开采矿物。

examples.english: Dentists will only resort to extraction of a tooth when all other treatments have failed.
examples.chinese: 牙医只有在所有别的治疗方法都无效后才会拔牙。

centers.english: a substance that is used to remove something

examples.english: You can usually get coffee stains out with a stain remover.
examples.chinese: 使用去污剂通常能把咖啡迹去掉。

examples.english: Always wear gloves when working with paint stripper.
examples.chinese: 使用去漆剂时一定要戴上手套。

centers.english: to let someone see something

examples.english: Everyone has to show their identity cards at the entrance to the building.
examples.chinese: 在大楼的入口，每个人都必须出示身份证。

examples.english: Stephanie showed us her engagement ring.
examples.chinese: 斯蒂芬妮给我们看她的订婚戒指。

examples.english: Show me what you're hiding under the desk, Johnny.
examples.chinese: 给我看你在书桌下面藏了什么，约翰尼。

examples.english: You have to show the security guard your pass.
examples.chinese: 你得向保安出示通行证。

examples.english: Neil showed his Pokemon card collection to Harry.
examples.chinese: 尼尔给哈里看他收集的宠物小精灵卡。

examples.english: Could you let me see the menu?
examples.chinese: 让我看看菜单好吗？

examples.english: How would you feel if I wrote something about you, but I wouldn't let you see it?
examples.chinese: 要是我写了关于你的什么东西，但是又不让你看，你会怎么想呢?

examples.english: Hold it up to the light and let me see what color it is.
examples.chinese: 把它拿到灯光下面，让我看看是什么颜色。

expressions.text: let somebody take a look/ let somebody have a look

examples.english: At least let Mike take a look -- he might be able to help.
examples.chinese: 起码要让迈克看一看—也许他帮得上忙。

expressions.text: let sb take a look at

examples.english: Let me have a look at your necklace. Perhaps I can fix it.
examples.chinese: 让我看看你的项链，也许我能修理。

examples.english: Take your shirt off, and let me take a look at that cut on your shoulder.
examples.chinese: 把衬衫脱下来，让我看看你肩上的伤口。

examples.english: Please present your boarding card at the gate.
examples.chinese: 请在登机口出示登机证。

examples.english: All passports must be presented to the immigration officer.
examples.chinese: 所有的护照都必须向移民官出示。

examples.english: The man fired from the car window when he was asked by a police officer to produce a license for the weapon.
examples.chinese: 警察要求那人出示持枪证，他就从车窗里开了枪。

examples.english: Failure to produce a valid insurance certificate may result in criminal prosecution.
examples.chinese: 不能出示有效的保险证明书可能会导致被刑事起诉。

examples.english: He flashed his membership card as passed through the door.
examples.chinese: 他在进门时亮了一下会员卡。

examples.english: Two police officers burst in, the latter hurriedly flashing his ID card at her as they made their way upstairs.
examples.chinese: 两名警察闯进来，走向楼上时，后面的一个匆匆地向她亮了一下他的证件。

examples.english: The animal opened its mouth, exposing rows of sharp white teeth.
examples.chinese: 那动物张开嘴露出两排白森森的尖利牙齿。

examples.english: The receding tide had exposed huge expanses of sand.
examples.chinese: 潮水退去，露出大片的沙地。

examples.english: A freezing wind bit at her exposed legs, and she huddled closer to the fire.
examples.chinese: 刺骨的寒风吹在她裸露的双腿上犹如刀割一般，她蜷缩着身子向火边靠得更近了。

examples.english: She lifted the lid of the box to reveal a life-size porcelain baby doll.
examples.chinese: 她掀开盒子的盖，露出了一个真人大小的瓷娃娃。

examples.english: A medical examination may reveal evidence of dietary deficiencies.
examples.chinese: 体检可以反映出饮食方面有哪些摄入不足。

centers.english: to show someone where something is
centers.chinese: 指给某人看某物在哪里

examples.english: The secretary showed him where to hang his coat.
examples.chinese: 秘书指给他看外套挂在哪里。

examples.english: Please find enclosed a map showing where our offices are
examples.chinese: 附件是一份地图，标出了我们办事处的位置。

examples.english: Uncle Joe showed me the best place to go fishing.
examples.chinese: 乔叔叔告诉我哪儿钓鱼最好。

examples.english: I'll show you the way to the station. It's not far.
examples.chinese: 我告诉你到火车站怎么走，不远的。

examples.english: He took out a map and pointed to the island.
examples.chinese: 他取出地图，指着那座岛所在的位置。

examples.english: ‘The whiskey's over there,’ Katie said, pointing to a bottle on the table.
examples.chinese: “威士忌在那儿。”凯蒂指着桌上的一个瓶子说道。

examples.english: Can you point to the one you want?
examples.chinese: 你指给我看你要哪一个好吗？

examples.english: As we drove through Baltimore, Mary pointed out the house where she was born.
examples.chinese: 我们驱车经过巴尔的摩的时候，玛丽指出了她出生的那所房子。

examples.english: Which one's your boss? Can you point her out?
examples.chinese: 哪一个是你的老板？把她指出来好吗？

examples.english: ‘Aren't they beautiful?’ said the guide, pointing out the paintings on the ceiling to us.
examples.chinese: “多漂亮啊！”导游指着天花板上的画对我们说。

examples.english: Once they'd been pointed out for me, I had no trouble identifying the major stars and planets.
examples.chinese: 对于一些大的恒星和行星，只要有人指给我看过，我就不难找出它们的位置。

examples.english: Michael gave us a map of the city and marked some places of interest to visit.
examples.chinese: 迈克尔给了我们一张市区地图，并标出了可以去参观的一些名胜。

examples.english: He put a slip of paper in his book to mark his page.
examples.chinese: 他在书中夹了一张纸片，表示他读到了那一页。

examples.english: A barbed wire fence marks the boundary between the two communities.
examples.chinese: 那两个社区之间以带刺的铁丝网为界。

examples.english: The church marks the spot where St Peter died.
examples.chinese: 这个教堂标示出了圣彼得去世的地点。

examples.english: The Director indicated a small table, where the items were on display.
examples.chinese: 董事指着一张上面摆放着物品的小桌子。

examples.english: ‘Shall we go in here?’ He indicated the coffee bar.
examples.chinese: “我们进去好吗？”他指着一家咖啡馆说。

examples.english: ‘That's my boss,’ he said, indicating with a nod of his head.
examples.chinese: “那是我老板。”他点了一下头说。

centers.english: to show information or measurements on a machine or sign
centers.chinese: 在机器或标牌上显示信息或量度

examples.english: The airline's passenger brochure shows air-routes, aircraft speeds and arrival and departure times.
examples.chinese: 航空公司的乘客指南上写明了航线、飞行速度，以及到达和起飞的时间。

examples.english: A menu showing the options will appear on the computer screen.
examples.chinese: 电脑屏幕上将出现一个显示选项的菜单。

examples.english: I think that clock must be showing the wrong time.
examples.chinese: 我觉得那时钟显示的时间肯定不对。

examples.english: The graph shows that gas volume increases with temperature.
examples.chinese: 图表表明气体的体积随着温度的上升而增加。

examples.english: Although we must have done about 100 miles, the petrol gauge still said half-full.
examples.chinese: 虽然我们肯定已经开了有100英里左右，但是油量表上仍显示还有一半的油。

examples.english: What does your watch say? I think mine's stopped.
examples.chinese: 你的表是几点了？我想我的表停了。

examples.english: Press ‘Enter’ to display the sorted mailing list.
examples.chinese: 按输入键可以显示已分类的邮寄名单。

examples.english: The licence must be clearly displayed in the car windscreen.
examples.chinese: 许可证必须清楚地摆放在汽车挡风玻璃后。

examples.english: The temperature gauge indicated zero.
examples.chinese: 温度计显示为零度。

examples.english: This dial indicates oil pressure in the engine.
examples.chinese: 这仪表显示引擎的油压。

examples.english: The jelly is ready for bottling when the thermometer registers 165 degrees.
examples.chinese: 温度计显示165度的时候，果酱就可以装瓶了。

examples.english: Wind speeds registering between 70 and 100 mph have been recorded.
examples.chinese: 目前记录的风速为每小时70到100英里。

examples.english: The biggest quake registered 5.2 on the Richter scale.
examples.chinese: 最大的一次地震记录是里氏5.2级。

centers.english: to show art, paintings, products etc to a lot of people
centers.chinese: 向许多人展示艺术品、画作、产品等

examples.english: She hopes to show her paintings at the Institute of Contemporary Art.
examples.chinese: 她希望在当代美术学院展出她的画作。

examples.english: His work-in-progress is currently showing at the Guildhall in Manchester.
examples.chinese: 他的未完成作品目前正在曼彻斯特的大会堂展出。

examples.english: Some of Bresson's best photographs are being shown at the National Portrait Gallery this month.
examples.chinese: 布雷森部分摄影佳作本月正在国家肖像画廊展出。

examples.english: The store windows were displaying the latest spring fashions.
examples.chinese: 商店橱窗里陈列着最新的春季时装。

examples.english: Many stalls displayed the work of local artists and craftsmen.
examples.chinese: 许多摊位上陈列着当地艺术家和工匠的作品。

examples.english: In one room, late 19th and early 20th century paintings are displayed.
examples.chinese: 一个房间里展出了19世纪末和20世纪初的画作。

examples.english: The gallery exhibits mainly contemporary sculpture and photography.
examples.chinese: 这个美术馆主要展出当代雕刻和摄影艺术。

examples.english: Picasso's paintings have been exhibited in galleries and museums all over the world.
examples.chinese: 毕加索的画作在世界各地的美术馆和博物馆里展出。

examples.english: The sculpture was first exhibited at the Canadian National Exhibition.
examples.chinese: 这尊雕塑第一次是在加拿大国家展览上展出的。
