examples.chinese: 我们不会搬得很远，你们可以来看我们的。

examples.english: I'm going to see my brother and his family tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 明天我要去看我弟弟一家。

examples.english: Better go and see your father tonight.
examples.chinese: 最好今晚去看你父亲。

examples.english: Why don't you go and see your mother?
examples.chinese: 你为什么不去看妈妈？

examples.english: You really should go see Mattie some time.
examples.chinese: 你真该找个时间去看看马蒂。

examples.english: I saw your Mum today, and I promised that we'd go round later.
examples.chinese: 今天我见到你妈妈，我答应我们稍后再去看她。

examples.english: Let's get a bottle of wine and go over to Simon's place.
examples.chinese: 我们拿瓶酒，到西蒙家去吧。

examples.english: I'll come over at about 7 o'clock,
examples.chinese: 我7点钟左右过来。

examples.english: Why don't you come round later and we'll discuss it over dinner?
examples.chinese: 你等会儿过来，我们吃晚饭的时候谈谈这事好吗？

examples.english: Your hand looks very swollen, I think you should pay a visit to the doctor.
examples.chinese: 你的手看上去非常肿，我认为你应该去看一下医生。

examples.english: Isn't it time you paid your mother a visit?
examples.chinese: 现在你是不是该去看看你母亲？

examples.english: I'll give you my address so you can look me up whenever you're in London.
examples.chinese: 我会把我的地址给你，那么你无论什么时候到伦敦都可以来看我。

examples.english: I looked up a few old friends while I was in Birmingham.
examples.chinese: 我去伯明翰的时候看望了几个老朋友。

examples.english: Sorry for just descending on you like this, Pam -- we had nowhere else to stay.
examples.chinese: 帕姆，很抱歉这样突然就来了—我们没别的地方可住。

examples.english: The following week all my family descended upon me.
examples.chinese: 接下来的一周里，家里人都突然来看我。

centers.english: to visit someone for a short time

examples.english: Why don't you call on Matt on your way back from work and see how he is?
examples.chinese: 你下班回家路上去看一下马特，看看他现在怎样了，好吗？

examples.english: One of our salesmen would be delighted to call in on you in your own home.
examples.chinese: 我们的推销员会很乐意登门拜访。

examples.english: Lizzie said she'd drop in later to let us know what the arrangements are for tonight.
examples.chinese: 莉齐说她晚些时候会来一次，告诉我们今晚的安排。

examples.english: Kate dropped by this morning.
examples.chinese: 凯特今天上午来过了。

examples.english: I'll drop in to see you later.
examples.chinese: 稍后我去看你。

examples.english: I might be able to pop in for about half an hour.
examples.chinese: 我或许可以来坐半小时左右。

examples.english: Just pop by when you've got a minute and I'll show you our holiday photographs.
examples.chinese: 你有空的时候就过来一下，我给你看我们度假的照片。

examples.english: I popped in to see Keith on my way home.
examples.chinese: 回家路上我去看了基思。

examples.english: Fred calls round sometimes on his way to the sports centre.
examples.chinese: 弗雷德在去体育中心的路上有时会过来看看。

examples.english: I'll call in tomorrow then, Mum.
examples.chinese: 那我明天来看你，妈妈。

centers.english: to visit a place as a tourist

examples.english: Every year thousands of tourists visit Turkey.
examples.chinese: 每年有成千上万名游客到土耳其游览。

examples.english: We spent the day visiting temples and other historic buildings.
examples.chinese: 我们白天参观了寺庙以及其他历史建筑。

examples.english: We were near Edinburgh, so we decided to pay a visit.
examples.chinese: 我们在爱丁堡附近，于是决定去看看。

examples.english: We paid a quick visit to New York before flying home.
examples.chinese: 坐飞机回家之前，我们在纽约短暂停留。

expressions.text: go to see/go and see/ go see

examples.english: If you're in Paris, you must go to see the Pompidou Centre.
examples.chinese: 你要是到了巴黎，一定要去参观蓬皮杜中心。

examples.english: Let's go and see the cathedral.
examples.chinese: 我们去看大教堂吧。

examples.english: Why don't we go see the Statue of Liberty?
examples.chinese: 我们为什么不去看自由女神像呢？

examples.english: I wanted to look round Moscow and see the sights.
examples.chinese: 我想在莫斯科参观游览一番。

examples.english: We're going on a bus tour today, to see the sights of Copenhagen.
examples.chinese: 今天我们要坐车游览哥本哈根的风景名胜。

examples.english: After an afternoon's sightseeing we were all exhausted.
examples.chinese: 游览观光了一个下午，我们都筋疲力尽了。

examples.english: We spent the days sightseeing and the evenings sitting in cosy bars drinking the local wine.
examples.chinese: 我们白天游览观光，晚上坐在舒适的酒吧里喝当地产的葡萄酒。

examples.english: Why don't we go sightseeing tomorrow?
examples.chinese: 明天我们为什么不去游览一番呢？

examples.english: I think we ought to do St Paul's while we're in London.
examples.chinese: 我想我们到了伦敦应该去圣保罗大教堂看看。

examples.english: We did the Eiffel Tower yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天我们去了埃菲尔铁塔。

centers.english: to visit a place as part of your official duties

examples.english: The Ambassador last visited Hong Kong in 1982.
examples.chinese: 大使上次访问香港是在1982年。

examples.english: This afternoon the Queen will visit Great Ormond Street Children's Hospital.
examples.chinese: 今天下午，女王将视察大奥蒙德街儿童医院。

examples.english: A police officer will be visiting next week to give the children a talk on crime prevention.
examples.chinese: 一位警官下周会来给孩子讲讲如何预防犯罪。

examples.english: We all had to attend a reception for some visiting dignitaries.
examples.chinese: 我们都得参加一个为一些达官贵人举行的招待会。

centers.english: to visit a person or place on the way to somewhere else
centers.chinese: 去某地的路上拜访某人或参观某地

examples.english: I just stopped in to say goodbye before I go on vacation.
examples.chinese: 我就过来和你说声再见，我要去度假了。

examples.english: Stop by for a drink on your way home from work.
examples.chinese: 下班回家的路上你顺便来喝一杯吧。

examples.english: I promised to look in on Dad and see if he's feeling better.
examples.chinese: 我答应顺便去看望爸爸，看他是不是好些了。

examples.english: Tom will look in on you later to see if you need anything.
examples.chinese: 稍后汤姆会顺路来看看你是否需要什么。

examples.english: Why don't you call in on your way up north?
examples.chinese: 往北去的时候何不顺路过来呢?

examples.english: Come by on Saturday and we'll have a drink together.
examples.chinese: 周六顺路过来，我们一起喝一杯。

examples.english: I called in on Sally yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天我顺路去看望了萨莉。

examples.english: We'll stop off and see you on our way back.
examples.chinese: 我们回来的时候顺路来看你。

examples.english: He stopped off in Paris for a couple of days.
examples.chinese: 他顺路在巴黎停留了几天。

examples.english: The flight to Australia takes 28 hours but we stop over in Singapore for a night.
examples.chinese: 去澳大利亚的飞机航程是28小时，但我们中途会在新加坡停留一晚。

examples.english: The journey includes a two-day stopover in Miami before flying on to Mexico.
examples.chinese: 旅程包括在迈阿密逗留两天，然后再飞往墨西哥。

centers.english: someone who visits someone else

examples.english: We have nowhere for visitors to sleep at the moment as the spare room is being decorated.
examples.chinese: 目前客房正在装修，所以我们没有地方给客人入住。

examples.english: Colette offered her visitor a glass of wine.
examples.chinese: 科莉特给来客倒了杯酒。

examples.english: I've been asked to show some important visitors round the department.
examples.chinese: 我被要求带一些重要的访客参观一下这个部门。

examples.english: You're not supposed to do the dishes -- you're a guest.
examples.chinese: 你不应该洗碗一你是客人。

examples.english: Among the guests was the television presenter Jo Everton.
examples.chinese: 客人中有一位是电视节目主持人乔·埃弗顿。

examples.english: She felt she had to stay in and entertain her guests.
examples.chinese: 她觉得自己得留在家里招待客人。

examples.english: We had a couple of guests for the weekend.
examples.chinese: 周末我们这儿来了几个客人。

examples.english: I don't seem to have many callers these days.
examples.chinese: 最近来访的陌生人似乎不多。

examples.english: When answering the door, always check the identity of callers.
examples.chinese: 去开门时一定要问清楚来访者的身份。

examples.english: I didn't realise you had company, I'll call back tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 我不知道你有客人，我明天再打电话来。

examples.english: There's a surprise waiting for you at home - we have unexpected guests.
examples.chinese: 家里有惊喜等着你，我们有意想不到的客人。

centers.english: an occasion when someone visits a place or person

examples.english: We're all looking forward to your visit.
examples.chinese: 我们都盼望着你的到来。

examples.english: The girls were quite excited because they were expecting a visit from their parents.
examples.chinese: 女孩们非常兴奋，因为她们正期待着父母来看望她们。

examples.english: The Senator's visit to the Military Academy at Andover was a great success.
examples.chinese: 参议员对安多弗军事学院的访问极为成功。

examples.english: The president will make a brief visit to Britain before returning home.
examples.chinese: 总统回国前将到英国进行简短的访问。！

examples.english: The Queen will pay a state visit to China later this year.
examples.chinese: 今年晚些时候，女王将对中国进行国事访问。

examples.english: I'm afraid this is only a flying visit - we have to get to the station by three.
examples.chinese: 恐怕这次我们只能匆匆到访——我们3点之前要赶到车站。

examples.english: We're making a flying visit to Monte Carlo on our way back.
examples.chinese: 回程时我们将在蒙特卡洛短暂停留。

centers.english: to travel to a place

examples.english: My parents are in the Caribbean for Christmas, but I couldn't go this year.
examples.chinese: 我父母在加勒比海过圣诞，但我今年不能去了。

examples.english: We're going to Malta this summer.
examples.chinese: 今年夏天我们打算去马耳他。

examples.english: We went up to Montreal for a long weekend.
examples.chinese: 我们去了蒙特利尔度长周末。

examples.english: She's been out to Africa several times on diplomatic visits.
examples.chinese: 她作外交访问去过非洲好几次。

examples.english: I love to travel.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢旅行。

examples.english: We travelled from China to Russia by train.
examples.chinese: 我们乘火车从中国去俄罗斯旅行。

examples.english: They had been travelling over the dry desert terrain for five days.
examples.chinese: 他们在干旱的沙漠地带游历了五天。

expressions.text: go on a trip/take a trip

examples.english: The geography class has taken a trip to Wales.
examples.chinese: 地理班去威尔士旅行了。

examples.english: I'm going on a business trip to Japan next week.
examples.chinese: 下星期我要去日本出差。

expressions.text: go on a trip/take a trip to/through/up/around etc

examples.english: We decided to go on a trip through the Rocky Mountains in the spring.
examples.chinese: 我们已决定春天到洛基山脉去旅游。

examples.english: Let's take a trip up the Rhine and stop at some of the castles along the way.
examples.chinese: 我们沿莱茵河旅行去吧，一路上在几个城堡停留一下。

examples.english: Every year he was supposed to go, and every year he could think of excuses for not making the journey.
examples.chinese: 每年他都应该去旅行，但每年他都能找出不去的借口来。

examples.english: When the tribe ran out of food, they had no choice but to make the journey north to more fertile ground.
examples.chinese: 这个部落把食物吃光后，就只好向北长途旅行到土地更肥沃的地方去。

examples.english: We stopped en route to meet some friends in Brussels.
examples.chinese: 我们在途中停下来去跟在布鲁塞尔的几个朋友见面。

examples.english: The flight was en route from Tokyo to Sydney when it experienced engine trouble.
examples.chinese: 这个从东京到悉尼的航班在途中出现了引擎故障。

examples.english: He was always on the move, never staying in one town more than a few days.
examples.chinese: 他一直在换地方，在一个镇上从来待不到几天以上。

examples.english: The guerrillas stay on the move to avoid capture.
examples.chinese: 游击队不停地迁移以免被俘。

examples.english: Thousands of refugees are on the move, fleeing heavy shelling in their home towns.
examples.chinese: 几千名难民在不断迁移，以躲避家园里遭到的重炮轰击。

examples.english: It took a lot of courage to cross the Rocky Mountains in those days.
examples.chinese: 在那个年代穿越洛基山脉需要很大的勇气。!

examples.english: They crossed the Atlantic in a convoy of fifty ships.
examples.chinese: 他们随50艘舰船的舰队横渡大西洋。

centers.english: the activity of travelling

examples.english: Her interests are politics, music, and travel.
examples.chinese: 她的兴趣是政治、音乐和旅行。

examples.english: a travel programme
examples.chinese: 旅行计划

examples.english: In the 19th century, travel between the two countries was extremely difficult.
examples.chinese: 19世纪时两国间的旅行是极为困难的。

examples.english: Future generations can possibly look forward to space travel as a holiday option.
examples.chinese: 将来的人有可能把去太空旅行当作是一个度假的选择。

centers.english: different ways of travelling

examples.english: ‘How are you going to get there?’ ‘I'm driving.’
examples.chinese: “你打算怎样去那里？”“我开车去。”

examples.english: Jenny drove to the coast for the weekend.
examples.chinese: 珍妮开车去海滨度周末。

examples.english: My mother never liked flying.
examples.chinese: 我母亲从不喜欢乘飞机。

examples.english: We'll be flying from New York to Munich.
examples.chinese: 我们要从纽约飞到慕尼黑。

examples.english: We sail first thing in the morning
examples.chinese: 明天一早我们就去坐船。

examples.english: He sailed from Southampton on May 6th.
examples.chinese: 5月6日他从南安普敦乘船出发。

examples.english: ‘Did you come by car?’ ‘No, by train.’
examples.chinese: “你坐汽车来的吗？”“不，乘火车。”

examples.english: Some of the beaches can only be reached by boat.
examples.chinese: 有些海滩只有乘船才能到达。

examples.english: We didn't have much time, so we decided to go by plane.
examples.chinese: 我们时间不多，所以决定乘飞机去。

examples.english: The two men had attempted to cross the mountains on foot.
examples.chinese: 这两名男子试图徒步穿越那座山脉。

examples.english: What's the best way to get downtown? Should I take a bus?
examples.chinese: 去市中心怎样走最好？我是否应该乘公共汽车?

examples.english: Take the subway to Montgomery Station and walk from there.
examples.chinese: 乘地铁到蒙哥马利站，然后从那里走过去。

examples.english: It's much quicker if you go by air, but it's also more expensive.
examples.chinese: 乘飞机去要快得多，但也比较贵。

examples.english: Troops entered the region by land and sea.
examples.chinese: 军队由陆、海两路进入该地区。

examples.english: It's certainly quicker to fly but we thought it would be more exciting to go overland.
examples.chinese: 坐飞机当然更快，但我们认为由陆路去更刺激。

examples.english: The overland route is very difficult at times.
examples.chinese: 陆路有时很难走。

examples.english: He lost all his money in a casino in Vegas and had to hitchhike back to San Francisco.
examples.chinese: 他在拉斯韦加斯的一家赌场输了个精光，只得一路搭便车回到圣弗朗西斯科。

examples.english: We hitched a ride with a trucker who took us all the way to the Virginia border.
examples.chinese: 我们搭了一辆路过的货车，司机一路把我们送到弗吉尼亚州的州界。

examples.english: It's a lot cheaper to hitch but it's also more dangerous.
examples.chinese: 沿途搭便车便宜得多，但也比较危险。

examples.english: Backpacking is especially popular among students and young people.
examples.chinese: 背着背包徒步旅行尤其受到学生和年轻人的青睐。

examples.english: a backpacking trip
examples.chinese: 背背包的徒步旅行

examples.english: Last year, he went backpacking in the US.
examples.chinese: 他去年背着背包到美国去徒步旅行。

centers.english: to travel a particular distance

examples.english: We had only gone about five miles when I started to feel sick.
examples.chinese: 我们才行进了大约5英里，我就开始觉得不舒服。

examples.english: How far have we gone today?
examples.chinese: 今天我们已经走了多远？

examples.english: We were riding through the hills, but we still managed to do 30 miles each day.
examples.chinese: 我们骑车穿越山丘，不过我们还是设法每天行进30英里。

examples.english: I bought the car for £3500, and it's only done 30,000 miles!
examples.chinese: 我花了3,500英镑买下这辆车，它跑过的里程数才30,000英里！

examples.english: It took him three days to cover the distance from Laingsbury to Albertsville.
examples.chinese: 从兰斯伯里到艾伯茨维尔的路程他走了三天。

examples.english: In one twenty-five day period, he covered 800 miles.
examples.chinese: 在为期25天的时间里，他走了800英里。

centers.english: when you travel somewhere without stopping
centers.chinese: 中途不停地旅行到某处

examples.english: You can fly non-stop to Hong Kong, but it's more expensive.
examples.chinese: 你可以直飞香港，不过票价要贵些。

examples.english: Is there a non-stop flight to Delhi?
examples.chinese: 有直达德里的航班吗？

examples.english: There isn't a direct flight - you'll have to change planes in Miami.
examples.chinese: 没有直达航班，你得在迈阿密转机。

examples.english: With this ticket you can travel direct from Paris to Berlin overnight.
examples.chinese: 你用这张票可以一夜之间从巴黎直达柏林。

centers.english: to travel to another country

examples.english: Here's a list of things to think about before you go abroad.
examples.chinese: 你到国外去之前可以考虑一下清单上的这些东西。

examples.english: I'm the only person I know who's never been abroad or even on a plane.
examples.chinese: 在我认识的人当中，只有我没有出过国，甚至连飞机都没坐过。

examples.english: When their mother died she was unable to contact her brother because he was abroad somewhere.
examples.chinese: 母亲去世时她无法跟哥哥取得联系，因为他身在国外。

examples.english: I wrote a letter to the interviewer, explaining that I was going overseas for six months.
examples.chinese: 我给主持面试的人写了封信，解释说我要到国外去六个月。

examples.english: The soldiers underwent training for three months before the unit went overseas.
examples.chinese: 军队出国前，士兵先接受了三个月的训练。

examples.english: He was the first traveller from the British Isles to visit Abyssinia.
examples.chinese: 他是第一位从不列颠群岛到阿比西尼亚游玩的旅行者。

examples.english: Thousands of Americans visit Thailand each year.
examples.chinese: 每年有成千上万的美国人到泰国游览。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in passive

examples.english: He went out to West Africa in 1962 and has been there ever since.
examples.chinese: 1962年他出国去了西非，从那以后就一直留在那里。

examples.english: The Chief Financial Officer went out to Korea to oversee the merger.
examples.chinese: 财务总监到日本去监管合并的事。

centers.english: to travel as part of your job
centers.chinese: 作为工作一部分的出行

examples.english: Do you have to travel a lot in your new job?
examples.chinese: 你的新工作需要经常出差吗？

examples.english: The post will involve you travelling to Germany about three times a year.
examples.chinese: 这个职位需要你一年去德国出差三次左右。

examples.english: The job involves a certain amount of travelling.
examples.chinese: 这个工作需要一定量的出差。

examples.english: I don't mind commuting on the train as long as I have a good book to read.
examples.chinese: 我只要有一本好书看，就不在乎每天乘火车来回上下班。

examples.english: Kendall commutes into the city every day from Waltham.
examples.chinese: 肯德尔每天从沃尔瑟姆乘车进城上班。

examples.english: Haynes recorded with Charlie Parker and toured with Sarah Vaughan in the 1950s.
examples.chinese: 20世纪50年代时海恩斯和查利·帕克一起录音，并和萨拉·沃恩一起巡回演出。

examples.english: The theatre company will tour later this year.
examples.chinese: 今年稍后时间剧团将作巡回演出。

examples.english: The team is currently touring Australia in a series of friendly games.
examples.chinese: 该队目前正在澳大利亚进行一系列的巡回友谊赛。

examples.english: Jennings is currently on tour, promoting and reading from his new children's book.
examples.chinese: 詹宁斯目前正在巡回推广和朗读他的新儿童读物。

examples.english: At the moment the band is on tour in Europe.
examples.chinese: 乐队目前正在欧洲巡回演出。

centers.english: to travel to a lot of different places
centers.chinese: 到许多不同的地方旅行

examples.english: David travelled around a lot in the ‘60s and ’70s.
examples.chinese: 六七十年代时戴维周游了许多地方。

examples.english: I'd love to have a job that let me travel around the world.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢有一份可以让我周游世界的工作。

examples.english: She's been traveling around the country trying to get big companies interested in her ideas.
examples.chinese: 她跑遍全国，想让大公司对她的主意感兴趣。

examples.english: For our summer vacation this year we're touring Spain in a camper.
examples.chinese: 今年暑假我们打算坐野营车到西班牙游览。

examples.english: We shall tour the city for two hours and then meet back at the bus.
examples.chinese: 我们将花两小时在这个城市观光，然后回到公共汽车上会合。

examples.english: Last year we did the Greek Islands but we were thinking of the USA this year.
examples.chinese: 去年我们游览了希腊群岛，但今年我们正考虑去美国。

examples.english: There's not a whole lot to see, so you can do the city in two or three days.
examples.chinese: 没有多少好看的，所以你花两三天就可以游览完这个城市了。

examples.english: The metro system in Mexico City is very good. It makes it really easy to get around.
examples.chinese: 墨西哥城的地铁系统非常好，使往来各处都很方便。

examples.english: You can use free shuttle buses to get around the city.
examples.chinese: 你可以乘坐免费往返公共汽车在市内四处游览。

examples.english: We'll be in Istanbul for three days, so there will be plenty of time to explore.
examples.chinese: 我们要在伊斯坦布尔逗留三天，所以有足够的时间进行考察。

examples.english: Whenever possible, she and Flynn would go off and explore the countryside, taking a picnic with them.
examples.chinese: 一有机会，她和弗林便会带着野餐食品出发到乡村考察。

examples.english: After leaving college and earning some money he set off to see the world.
examples.chinese: 他离开大学后挣了些钱，就去周游世界增长见识了。

examples.english: I picked up a few words of Chinese on my travels, but I don't speak it fluently.
examples.chinese: 我在旅行途中学会了几个汉语单词，但说得不流利。

examples.english: Corbett met a number of his contacts on his travels to Taiwan.
examples.chinese: 科比特到泰国旅行时和几个熟人碰了头。

centers.english: a journey

examples.english: We had an awful journey - there was heavy snow and the car broke down
examples.chinese: 我们这段路程糟透了——天在下大雪，汽车又抛锚了。

examples.english: It was a long train journey to St Petersburg.
examples.chinese: 乘火车到圣彼得堡路程很远。

examples.english: They arrived in Nice after an eight-hour journey by car.
examples.chinese: 他们乘汽车经过八小时的旅程后到达了尼斯。

examples.english: These birds make an incredible 10,000-kilometre journey to Africa every winter.
examples.chinese: 每年冬天这些鸟都会令人难以置信地飞越10,000公里去非洲。

examples.english: We had a fantastic trip - the flight was fine and the hotel was perfect.
examples.chinese: 我们这趟旅行棒极了—航班服务佳，旅馆非常理想。

examples.english: The trip to the coast took longer than we expected.
examples.chinese: 去海边的路程所费的时间比我们预期的要久。

expressions.text: take a trip/go on a trip

examples.english: They decided to take a trip to Paris.
examples.chinese: 他们决定去巴黎旅行。

examples.english: My husband's away on a business trip in China.
examples.chinese: 我丈夫去中国出差了。

examples.english: My dad and I used to go on a camping trip alone together every summer.
examples.chinese: 我和爸爸以前每年夏天都一起去野营旅行。

examples.english: It's only a three-hour trip by plane to Seattle.
examples.chinese: 乘飞机到西雅图只需三小时。

examples.english: It's such a nice day - how about going on a boat trip?
examples.chinese: 今天天气很好，我们去乘船旅行好吗？

examples.english: My friend and I took several road trips to New York City.
examples.chinese: 我和朋友坐汽车去过纽约几次。

examples.english: Did you see Bruce Springsteen on his last tour?
examples.chinese: 你看过布鲁斯·斯普林斯廷上一次的巡回演出吗?

examples.english: We took a bicycle tour of Tuscany.
examples.chinese: 我们骑自行车游览了托斯卡尼。

examples.english: The prime minister has left for a three-week tour of South America.
examples.chinese: 首相已启程去南非进行为期三周的访问。

examples.english: Norton is on tour promoting her new children's book.
examples.chinese: 诺顿在巡回推广她新写的儿童读物。

examples.english: The last leg of the tour will take the team to Dallas.
examples.chinese: 巡回赛的最后一站将把球队带往达拉斯。

examples.english: They like to take package tours because they hate dealing with details.
examples.chinese: 他们喜欢参加包办旅游，因为他们讨厌处理琐事。

examples.english: All flights to Tokyo were delayed because of bad weather.
examples.chinese: 由于天气恶劣，所有飞往东京的航班都延误了。

examples.english: It's a 7-hour flight to New York.
examples.chinese: 到纽约的飞行时间是七小时。

examples.english: He pretended to be asleep for the entire two hour ride.
examples.chinese: 整整两小时的车程里，他都在假装睡觉。

examples.english: On the car ride back from the airport he told her all about his trip.
examples.chinese: 从机场坐车回家的路上，他把这次旅行的情况都讲给她听。

examples.english: She took me to see the horse and asked if I wanted to go for a ride.
examples.chinese: 她带我去看那匹马，并问我是否想骑马兜一圈。

examples.english: It's a beautiful day for a drive in the country.
examples.chinese: 这是个在郊外开车旅行的好日子。

examples.english: It's about a 20-minute drive into the city from here.
examples.chinese: 从这里开车到城里大约要20分钟。

expressions.text: take a drive/go for a drive

examples.english: Let's take a drive out to the farm.
examples.chinese: 我们开车去农场吧。

examples.english: The crossing from Dover to Calais is often very rough.
examples.chinese: 从多佛尔横渡到加来常常风浪很大。

examples.english: In those days, the voyage to Australia was long and dangerous.
examples.chinese: 那时候到澳大利亚的航行时间很长，而且非常危险。

examples.english: The purpose of the expedition was to explore the North American coastline.
examples.chinese: 这次探险的目的是考察北美的海岸。

examples.english: an expedition to the North Pole
examples.chinese: 赴北极的考察

examples.english: The team is preparing for a two week trek across the Atlas Mountains.
examples.chinese: 这支队伍正为为时两星期的穿越阿特拉斯山脉的艰苦旅行做准备。

centers.english: a short journey

examples.english: It's such a lovely day - let's go out for the day and visit the zoo.
examples.chinese: 天气这么好，我们去动物园一日游吧。

examples.english: It would be nice to take a day trip to Chicago to do some shopping.
examples.chinese: 去芝加哥购物一日游挺不错。

examples.english: The commute from Kent into London can be horrendous.
examples.chinese: 从肯特郡到伦敦的上班路程简直可怕。

examples.english: I had no money, two small children, and a 90-minute commute to work each day.
examples.chinese: 我没钱，有两个小孩，每天上班路上要花90分钟。

examples.english: Mrs Pollack took her class on an outing to the local museum.
examples.chinese: 波拉克太太带她教的班级去参观当地的博物馆。

examples.english: a school outing to the ballet
examples.chinese: 学校组织外出看芭蕾舞剧

examples.english: The resort also offers daily excursions to nearby towns.
examples.chinese: 这家度假酒店还提供每天去附近城镇的短途旅行。

examples.english: One day he took an excursion to the other end of the island for a change of scene.
examples.chinese: 有一天他想看一下别的景色，于是去了岛的另一边游玩。

centers.english: someone who is travelling

examples.english: Many travellers find that facilities for young children are often inadequate.
examples.chinese: 许多游客认为供幼儿使用的设施往往不足。

examples.english: Travelers going to malarial regions should see their doctor before they start.
examples.chinese: 进入疟疾流行地区的旅行者出发前应该先去看一下医生。

examples.english: 80,000 air travellers pass through the terminal every day.
examples.chinese: 每天有80,000名飞机乘客通过这个航站楼。

examples.english: These days most airlines concentrate their advertising on business travelers.
examples.chinese: 如今许多航空公司把广告的注意力放在商务旅客身上。

examples.english: As a seasoned traveller I know the value of being able to speak at least a few words of the local language.
examples.chinese: 作为一个经验丰富的旅行者，我知道会说至少几句当地话的用处。

examples.english: The driver and all three passengers were killed in the crash.
examples.chinese: 司机和三名乘客全部在车祸中丧生。

examples.english: The airport was jammed with thousands of passengers from delayed or cancelled flights.
examples.chinese: 因航班延误或被取消，机场挤满了数千名乘客。

examples.english: It was a small shop that catered to commuters and local workers.
examples.chinese: 这是一家为长途上下班的人和当地工人服务的小商店。

examples.english: Each region has one organization controlling buses and operating its commuter trains.
examples.chinese: 每个地区都有一个管理公共汽车和通勤列车的机构。

examples.english: A park ranger was answering the tourists’ questions as they looked out over the canyon.
examples.chinese: 游客眺望峡谷时，一名园林管理员在回答他们提出的问题。

examples.english: A tourist visa is required for most nationalities.
examples.chinese: 大多数国籍的人都要办旅游签证。

examples.english: His father was a travelling salesman and was very rarely at home.
examples.chinese: 他父亲是巡回推销员，很少在家。

examples.english: The traveling show includes historical films as well as 300 genuine artifacts that kids can handle.
examples.chinese: 这次巡回表演的内容包括历史影片以及300件儿童能够摆弄的手工艺真品。

examples.english: Sanders’ parents were well-traveled, well-educated people.
examples.chinese: 桑德斯的父母是经常旅行、受过良好教育的人。

examples.english: Duke, heir to a tobacco fortune and an international jet-setter, died at the age of 80.
examples.chinese: 烟草业大笔遗产的继承人、国际知名的旅行家杜克于80高龄去世。

examples.english: He built the hotel to provide accommodation for jet-setting guests at his daughter's wedding.
examples.chinese: 他建了这座酒店为参加他女儿婚礼的富豪们提供住宿。

examples.english: The bar was full of young Australian backpackers.
examples.chinese: 酒吧里挤满了年轻的澳大利亚背包旅行者。

examples.english: She runs a downtown hostel for backpackers - the cost only $5 a night.
examples.chinese: 她在市中心开了一家专门招待背包旅行者的招待所，才五美元一晚。

examples.english: Fears are growing for the safety of a British backpacker who went missing in Vietnam last week.
examples.chinese: 人们越来越担心上周在越南失踪的一名英国背包旅行者的安全。

centers.english: someone does not live in one particular place

examples.english: Many of the city's poorest residents are migrants from rural areas.
examples.chinese: 城里最贫困的居民中有许多都是来自乡村的移居者。

examples.english: 400 migrants won the right to stay in the country yesterday, after a ten-year battle.
examples.chinese: 经过十年的斗争，400个移民昨日获得了在这个国家的居留权。

examples.english: Life for migrant workers is a constant struggle to survive.
examples.chinese: 对移民工人来说，生活就是一场不断求生存的斗争。

examples.english: His grandfather was a drifter from New Mexico, who spent half his life brawling and drinking.
examples.chinese: 他的祖父是从新墨西哥州来的游民，大半生都在斗殴和酗酒。

examples.english: The film follows the nomads as they cross the desert with their camels.
examples.chinese: 影片记述了带着骆驼穿越沙漠的游牧民。

examples.english: The Aborigines are a nomadic people indigenous to Australia.
examples.chinese: 澳大利亚土著居民是澳大利亚本土的游牧民族。

examples.english: City authorities are planning a campaign to get an estimated 300,000 vagrants off the streets.
examples.chinese: 市政府在计划把大约30万名流浪者赶离街道。

examples.english: The town has never been particularly welcoming to transients.
examples.chinese: 这座镇从来都不大欢迎流浪者。

centers.english: the place that you are travelling to

examples.english: At the border you will be asked your destination and how long you plan to stay.
examples.chinese: 到达边境时，你会被问及你的目的地以及打算逗留多长时间。

examples.english: The glorious Inca ruins are the main tourist destination in Peru.
examples.chinese: 壮丽的印加废墟是秘鲁主要的旅游目的地。

examples.english: By the time he reached his destination, seven days later, he was half-starved and broke.
examples.chinese: 七天后当他抵达目的地时，他已经饿坏了，而且身无分文。

examples.english: We were already on the way to the airport when we realized we'd forgotten our passports.
examples.chinese: 当我们意识到忘记带护照时，已经在去机场的路上了。

examples.english: I don't know where she is. She's probably on her way to London by now.
examples.chinese: 我不知道她在哪里，现在她可能正在去伦敦的路上。

examples.english: We passed a ferry full of people bound for one of the outer islands.
examples.chinese: 我们经过一艘渡船，船上满载着去一座边远岛屿的乘客。

examples.english: It was dark when the southbound international express finally passed by.
examples.chinese: 南行的国际快车最后经过这里时，天已经黑了。

examples.english: Take the London-bound train but get off two stations before the end of the line.
examples.chinese: 乘坐开往伦敦的火车，在终点前两站下车。

centers.english: a strong desire to travel

examples.english: It was not wanderlust alone that made him keen to visit Brazil. He thought he might hear news of his natural mother there.
examples.chinese: 他热衷于到巴西去不单是因为喜欢旅游，他认为在那里可能会听到有关自己生母的消息。

examples.english: I always get itchy feet at this time of year, in the spring.
examples.chinese: 一年中春天这个时候我总是忍不住想去旅游。

centers.english: to have something in your hand

examples.english: I held the money tightly in my hand.
examples.chinese: 我把钱紧紧地握在手里。

examples.english: In the photograph there was a small boy holding a flag.
examples.chinese: 照片里，有个小男孩手拿着旗帜。

examples.english: A smiling woman holding a can of beer came over to us.
examples.chinese: 一个女人手里拿着一罐啤酒笑盈盈地朝我们走来。

examples.english: What a lovely picture! Hold it up so everyone can see it.
examples.chinese: 多漂亮的照片！把它举起来，让大家都能看到。

examples.english: I took a glass of champagne from the tray the waiter held out.
examples.chinese: 我从服务员端出的托盘中拿过一杯香槟。

examples.english: What's that in your hand?
examples.chinese: 你手上拿着什么？

examples.english: He arrived at the door with an enormous bouquet of flowers in one hand and a bottle of champagne in the other.
examples.chinese: 他一手拿着一大束花，一手拿着一瓶香槟酒来到门口。

examples.english: Theo walked across the yard with a pail in each hand.
examples.chinese: 西奥两手各提着一只桶穿过院子。

centers.english: to hold something tightly

examples.english: We're coming up to a bumpy bit - you'd better hold on!
examples.chinese: 前面一段路凹凸不平—大家最好抓紧！

examples.english: Just hang on as best you can and I'll try and get some help.
examples.chinese: 你尽量抓牢，我去叫人来帮忙。

examples.english: Mother's not strong. She can't walk without holding on to someone's arm.
examples.chinese: 母亲身体不好，她不扶着别人的手臂就不能走。

examples.english: People stood hanging on to the overhead straps of the swaying subway car.
examples.chinese: 人们站在摇摇晃晃的地铁车厢里，紧紧地抓着头顶上的拉手。

examples.english: As the roller coaster turned upside down I shut my eyes and held on tight.
examples.chinese: 过山车颠倒了过来，我闭上眼睛，抓得紧紧的。

examples.english: He inched across the roof, hanging on as best he could.
examples.chinese: 他缓慢地翻越屋顶，尽可能抓牢。

examples.english: David suddenly gripped my arm and pulled me away from the road.
examples.chinese: 戴维突然抓住我的手臂，把我拉到路旁。

examples.english: His knuckles whitened as he gripped the microphone.
examples.chinese: 他紧紧地握着麦克风，指关节都变白了。

examples.english: She found his hand and gripped it tightly.
examples.chinese: 她找到他的手，紧紧地抓住不放。

examples.english: ‘Ah!’ he cried, clutching his stomach.
examples.chinese: “啊！”他大叫一声，紧紧捂住腹部。

examples.english: A group of tourists stood clutching their phrase books.
examples.chinese: 一群游客站在那里，手里紧握着常用语手册。

examples.english: A little girl stood clasping her mother's hand.
examples.chinese: 一个小女孩站着，紧紧地拉着她妈妈的手。

examples.english: Sally ran out of the house, clasping her schoolbooks to her chest.
examples.chinese: 萨莉胸前抱着她的教科书冲出了屋子。

examples.english: The baby monkey clings to its mother's back until it can climb by itself.
examples.chinese: 小猴子紧紧抓在母亲的背上，直到自己能够独立攀爬。

examples.english: Many children will cling to a soft blanket or toy as a substitute for their mother at night.
examples.chinese: 许多小孩子夜里会抱着软软的毛毯或玩具代替他们的母亲。

examples.english: Rescue workers saved a 9-year-old boy who was clinging to rocks after he was swept into the ocean by the tide.
examples.chinese: 营救人员救起了一名九岁男孩，他被潮水冲到海里后紧紧地攀附在岩石上。

centers.english: to start holding something

expressions.text: get/take hold of/get a hold of

examples.english: I took hold of the handle and pulled as hard as I could.
examples.chinese: 我抓住把手，使劲往外拉。

examples.english: Sheila fished in her handbag until she got hold of her keys.
examples.chinese: 希拉在手提包里摸索着，直到她抓到了钥匙。

examples.english: The baby got a hold of her beads and broke the string.
examples.chinese: 那宝宝抓住她的珠子，把绳子拉断了。

examples.english: Brown grabbed the phone and started shouting.
examples.chinese: 布朗抓起电话就嚷了起来。

examples.english: She turned to him and grabbed his arm so hard it surprised him.
examples.chinese: 她转身对着他，突然紧紧地抓住他的手臂，使他吃了一惊。

examples.english: The boy grabbed hold of my bag and disappeared quickly into the crowd.
examples.chinese: 那男孩抢过我的包，一下子就在人群里消失了。

examples.english: According to the report, Mason grabbed the gun from a friend.
examples.chinese: 根据这篇报道，梅森是从一位朋友那里抢到这支枪的。

examples.english: I clutched at my mother's arm to keep from falling.
examples.chinese: 我抓住母亲的手臂，不让自己倒下。

examples.english: The climber grasped at a small hold just above him.
examples.chinese: 这位登山队员抓住头顶上一个小小的支撑点。

centers.english: to hold something and turn it around in your hands

examples.english: Please do not handle the fruit and vegetables.
examples.chinese: 请不要翻弄水果和蔬菜。

examples.english: This violin is very old and valuable and must be handled carefully.
examples.chinese: 这把小提琴很旧了，而且非常贵重，一定要小心轻放。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in passive

examples.english: Martina was fiddling nervously with her pen.
examples.chinese: 马丁娜紧张地摆弄着钢笔。

examples.english: Stop fiddling with the remote control!
examples.chinese: 别拿着遥控器弄来弄去！

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in passive

examples.english: She played with the red roses on the table as she talked.
examples.chinese: 她一边说话，一边摆弄着桌上的红玫瑰。

examples.english: Is it worth reading to our kids when they're busy playing with their hair or their teddy bears? Yes.
examples.chinese: 小孩子在忙着玩自己的头发或玩具熊的时候，你读书给他们听有用吗？有用的。

examples.english: She could hear someone fumbling with the handle of her door.
examples.chinese: 她听见有人在摸索着拧她房门的把手。

examples.english: I fumbled drunkenly with the keys, dropping them to the floor.
examples.chinese: 我醉后手忙脚乱地用钥匙开锁，结果把它们弄掉在了地上。

examples.english: He stood before them, his eyes lowered, fumbling with his hat.
examples.chinese: 他站在他们面前，低垂着眼睛，不知所措地弄着帽子。

centers.english: to hold a weapon

examples.english: The rioters faced police who were wielding clubs and batons.
examples.chinese: 暴动者面对着挥舞棍棒的警察。

examples.english: Home was a cramped two rooms in a street where gun-wielding criminals walked.
examples.chinese: 家就是两间狭小的房间，所在的那条街上有挥枪乱指的犯罪分子游荡。

examples.english: A man brandishing a gun had threatened staff and customers at a local bank.
examples.chinese: 一名男子挥舞着一支枪，威胁一家当地银行的职员和顾客。

examples.english: Four horsemen dashed up at full gallop, shouting and brandishing their weapons.
examples.chinese: 四名骑手策马全速冲上前去，一边吆喝着，一边挥动手中的武器。

centers.english: to put your arms around someone

examples.english: I held her until she went to sleep.
examples.chinese: 我搂着她直到她入睡。

examples.english: There was nothing I could say so I just held her tight and let her cry.
examples.chinese: 我不知道可以说什么，只有紧紧地抱着她让她哭。

examples.english: She held a baby in her arms.
examples.chinese: 她怀里抱着一个婴儿。

examples.english: Mama put her arms around me and tried to comfort me.
examples.chinese: 妈妈抱住我，尽力安慰我。

examples.english: She put her arms around his neck and kissed his cheek.
examples.chinese: 她搂住他的脖子，亲吻他的脸。

examples.english: My father hugged me affectionately when I got home.
examples.chinese: 我到家时，爸爸亲切地拥抱我。

examples.english: ‘I'll never forget you,’ she said, and we hugged each other for the last time.
examples.chinese: “我永远不会忘记你，”她说。我们最后一次紧紧地拥抱在一起。

examples.english: Jane threw her arms around him and hugged him tight.
examples.chinese: 简张开双臂把他抱得紧紧的。

examples.english: Give me a hug, then it's time for bed.
examples.chinese: 抱我一下，然后就该睡觉了。

examples.english: His arms tightened around her in a bear hug.
examples.chinese: 他双臂紧紧地抱住她。

examples.english: She had fallen asleep in her chair, cuddling a little teddy bear.
examples.chinese: 她在椅子上睡着了，怀里抱着一只小小的玩具熊。

examples.english: They were kissing and cuddling on the sofa.
examples.chinese: 他们在沙发上拥抱亲吻。

examples.english: She was giving the baby a cuddle.
examples.chinese: 她抱了一下宝宝。

examples.english: He took Sophie in his arms and kissed her.
examples.chinese: 他把索菲搂进怀里亲她。

examples.english: Margaret took the little boy in her arms and carried him downstairs.
examples.chinese: 玛格丽特把小男孩抱在怀里，带到楼下。

examples.english: Phoebe ran to embrace her mother.
examples.chinese: 菲比跑过去拥抱她母亲。

examples.english: Before my flight was called we stood and embraced.
examples.chinese: 我的航班通知登机之前，我们就站着拥抱在一起。

examples.english: The children rushed into the embrace of their father.
examples.chinese: 孩子们奔过去投入父亲的怀抱。

centers.english: to hold someone's hand, arm etc

examples.english: Hold Mummy's hand -- there's a good girl.
examples.chinese: 握住妈咪的手—真是个乖女孩。

examples.english: Andrew sat next to Jane and held her hand.
examples.chinese: 安德鲁坐在简的旁边，握着她的手。

examples.english: He held her hand tightly and led her across the street.
examples.chinese: 他紧紧地拉住她的手，带她过马路。

examples.english: She saw Kurt and Eileen coming back from the beach, kissing and holding hands.
examples.chinese: 她看见库尔特和艾琳从沙滩回来，手拉着手亲吻。

examples.english: Then we all sat in a circle and held hands.
examples.chinese: 于是，我们大家手拉手围成一圈坐下。

expressions.text: take somebody by the arm/hand etc

examples.english: Emily took me by the hand and led me into the garden.
examples.chinese: 埃米莉牵着我的手，带我进了花园。

examples.english: A nurse took her arm and led her to a chair.
examples.chinese: 一位护士扶着她的手臂，把带她到一把椅子前。

centers.english: the way that someone holds something

examples.english: I tightened my hold on the child as we crossed the busy road.
examples.chinese: 我们穿过拥挤的马路时，我紧紧拉住了孩子。

examples.english: My mother relaxed, and loosened her hold on my hand.
examples.chinese: 妈妈放心了，松开了握着我的手。

examples.english: Prevost asked me if I still had hold of my camera.
examples.chinese: 普雷沃斯特问我手里是否还拿着照相机。

examples.english: In this form of wrestling there are a number of different holds, each used in a different situation.
examples.chinese: 这种摔跤的形式有多种不同的擒拿法，分别用于不同的情形。

examples.english: The policeman had a firm grip on my arm.
examples.chinese: 警察紧紧地抓住我的胳膊。

examples.english: To play this shot, you need to change your grip on the racquet slightly.
examples.chinese: 要击出这样的球，你需要稍微改变一下握球拍的方式。

examples.english: I lost my grip on the branch, and fell out of the tree.
examples.chinese: 我未能抓牢树枝，从树上掉了下来。

examples.english: She looked anxious and tightened her grip on her shoulder bag.
examples.chinese: 她看上去很不安，把手提包抓得更紧了。

examples.english: She tried to escape Moore's grasp but he was too strong for her.
examples.chinese: 她试图挣脱穆尔的手，但是他力气太大了。

examples.english: Helen tightened her grasp on my collar and shouted ‘Don't fool around with me, Mickey!’
examples.chinese: 海伦把我的衣领抓得更紧，并大声叫道：“不要耍我，米基！”

centers.english: to stop holding something

examples.english: Let go! You're hurting me.
examples.chinese: 放开！你弄疼我了。

examples.english: She wouldn't let go of the letter.
examples.chinese: 她不肯放下那封信。

examples.english: At the end of the fair, the school let go of hundreds of balloons.
examples.chinese: 游园会结束之时，学校里放飞了几百个气球。

examples.english: I dropped my sunglasses and they broke.
examples.chinese: 我把太阳镜掉在地上摔碎了。

examples.english: As soon as she saw him she dropped her suitcases and ran towards him.
examples.chinese: 她一看到他就扔下旅行箱，向他跑去。

examples.english: He took hold of my hand but then released it again quickly.
examples.chinese: 他抓住我的手，但是很快又松开了。

centers.english: a line on paper

examples.english: The teacher had put a red line through the first sentence.
examples.chinese: 老师在第一个句子上画了一条红线。

examples.english: Mike drew a line along the wall to show where the tiles would come up to.
examples.chinese: 迈克沿着墙边画了一条线，标明墙砖铺到哪里。

examples.english: Use your ruler to draw a straight line.
examples.chinese: 用尺画一条直线。

examples.english: a letter written on pale blue lined paper
examples.chinese: 一封用有横线的浅蓝色纸写的信

examples.english: Sign on the dotted line, please.
examples.chinese: 请在虚线上签名。

examples.english: The dotted line on the map shows the path that goes from the church down to the river.
examples.chinese: 地图上的虚线指示从教堂到河边的路。

examples.english: Fold the paper along the dotted line.
examples.chinese: 把纸沿虚线折叠起来。

centers.english: a line of colour

examples.english: The American flag has red and white stripes.
examples.chinese: 美国国旗上有红色和白色的条纹。

examples.english: He was wearing a grey suit with narrow blue stripes.
examples.chinese: 他穿了一套带有蓝色细条的灰色衣服。

examples.english: My horse had a big white stripe down the middle of his nose.
examples.chinese: 我的马沿着鼻子中间有一道粗粗的白色条纹。

examples.english: He was wearing a navy blue suit and a striped shirt.
examples.chinese: 他穿着一套海军蓝的外套和一件有条纹的衬衫。

examples.english: stripey socks
examples.chinese: 有条纹的袜子

expressions.text: red and black striped/pink and blue striped etc

examples.english: My aunt knitted me a blue and white striped sweater for Christmas.
examples.chinese: 姨妈织了一件蓝白条子相间的毛线衫送给我作圣诞礼物。

examples.english: a black snake with orange bands around its back
examples.chinese: 一条黑色的蛇，背部有橙色条纹

examples.english: There was a band of yellow in the rock.
examples.chinese: 岩石里有一条黄带。

examples.english: How many bands of colour are there in a rainbow?
examples.chinese: 彩虹里有多少层颜色？

examples.english: Her hair was brown, with streaks of gold.
examples.chinese: 她的头发是棕色的，夹杂着几缕金发。

examples.english: Karen's dress had a big streak of red wine down the front.
examples.chinese: 卡伦的裙子前面有一道很粗的红酒污痕。

examples.english: ‘What have you been doing?’ asked his mother, pointing at the streaks of dried mud on his arms and legs.
examples.chinese: “你干了些什么呀？”他母亲指着他的手臂和小腿上一条条已经千结的泥印子问道。

centers.english: a line on the ground or on the surface of something
centers.chinese: 地上或某物表面上的线

examples.english: If the ball goes over this line, it's out of play.
examples.chinese: 如果球越过这条线，就算出界。！

examples.english: Monica got a fine yesterday for parking on a yellow line.
examples.chinese: 莫妮卡昨天在一条黄线上停车被罚款了。

examples.english: The road to the farm had deep ruts in it.
examples.chinese: 通往农场的路上有深深的车辙。

examples.english: The carriage became stuck in a rut, and we all had to get out and push.
examples.chinese: 马车轮子嵌入了车辙，我们都只得下车推。

examples.english: Gradually the road became more rutted and muddy.
examples.chinese: 渐渐地，路面上的车辙越来越多，道路越来越泥泞。

examples.english: The police were busy examining the tyre tracks of the two vehicles which were involved in the accident.
examples.chinese: 警察正忙着检查两辆肇事汽车留下的轮胎印。

examples.english: We followed the tracks down a lane and arrived at an abandoned farmhouse.
examples.chinese: 我们顺着巷子上的车辙，来到了一座被废弃的农舍。

examples.english: The record player needle kept jumping out of the grooves.
examples.chinese: 唱针老是跳出槽纹。

examples.english: Then you cut a groove into the wood, so that the two pieces can be slotted together.
examples.chinese: 然后在木头里刻一道凹槽，那两块就可以插接起来。

examples.english: All around the furrows in the fields were filled with snow.
examples.chinese: 田里的犁沟都填满了积雪。

centers.english: a line on cloth where it has been folded or crushed

examples.english: When I unpacked my suitcase, all my shirts had creases in them.
examples.chinese: 我打开旅行箱，所有的衬衫都起皱了。

examples.english: If you hang that dress over the bath, the steam will get the wrinkles out.
examples.chinese: 如果你把那裙子挂在浴缸上面，蒸气会把皱褶熏平的。

examples.english: It's made from a special fabric that doesn't leave any wrinkles after you wash it.
examples.chinese: 这是用特殊面料做的，洗后不会起皱。

examples.english: Your tie's creased, you'll have to iron it.
examples.chinese: 你的领带皱了，得熨一熨。

examples.english: Chris, as usual, came in wearing old jeans and a wrinkled T-shirt.
examples.chinese: 克里斯照例穿了一条旧牛仔裤和一件皱巴巴的T恤衫来了。

centers.english: a line on someone's face or skin

examples.english: When she laughed, little lines formed at the corners of her eyes and mouth.
examples.chinese: 她笑的时候，眼角和嘴角显出了细纹。

examples.english: The deep lines on his forehead showed that he was a worried man.
examples.chinese: 他前额上深深的皱纹说明他是一个操心的人。

examples.english: Her face was old and covered in wrinkles.
examples.chinese: 她老了，脸上布满了皱纹。

examples.english: Delay the effects of ageing with a revolutionary new anti-wrinkle cream.
examples.chinese: 选用一种全新的防皱霜延缓衰老。

examples.english: a small man with a balding head and a very wrinkled face
examples.chinese: 一个逐渐秃顶、满面皱纹的小个子男人！

examples.english: Mrs Franz sat on the step, shelling peas with her wrinkled old hands.
examples.chinese: 弗朗兹太太坐在台阶上，用她那布满皱纹的苍老的双手剥着豆子。

examples.english: When he smiles, you can see the creases around his mouth and his eyes.
examples.chinese: 他微笑的时候，你能看到他嘴巴和眼睛周围的皱纹。

examples.english: The baby howled, its face creased and pink.
examples.chinese: 宝宝哭叫的时候，小脸皱起来，红红的。

centers.english: a line of things

examples.english: Maisie had arranged her teddy bears in a line on the bed.
examples.chinese: 梅茜把她的玩具熊在床上排成一列。

examples.english: In front of the house there is a line of tall trees.
examples.chinese: 房子前面有一排高大的树木。

examples.english: The tiny cottages had been built in long rows.
examples.chinese: 小屋一长排一长排地排列着。！

examples.english: They put a row of chairs out for the visitors.
examples.chinese: 他们在外面摆了一排椅子给来客们坐。

examples.english: Julie arranged her perfumes and creams in neat rows on the dressing table.
examples.chinese: 朱丽把她的香水和面霜一排排整齐地摆放在梳妆台上。

examples.english: The back wall was covered with row upon row of files.
examples.chinese: 一叠叠堆得高高的文件把后墙都遮住了。

examples.english: Fans who couldn't get into the stadium watched the match on banks of TV monitors outside.
examples.chinese: 无法进入体育场的球迷就在场外一排排的电视监视上观看比赛。

examples.english: The scientists sit behind banks of computers, giving instructions to the crew of the spaceship.
examples.chinese: 科学家们坐在一排排电脑前面，向太空船上的宇航员发布指令。

examples.english: We always sat in the top tier of seats.
examples.chinese: 我们总是坐最上面的一排座位。

examples.english: Mason occupied two spaces on a tier of seats normally reserved for the board of directors and important visitors.
examples.chinese: 梅森在其中一排座位上占了两个位子，那排座位通常是为董事会成员和贵宾预留的。

centers.english: a line of writing or numbers

examples.english: Martin opened the letter and read the first few lines - it was bad news.
examples.chinese: 马丁打开信读了前面几行—是坏消息。

examples.english: Start reading at line 12.
examples.chinese: 从第12行开始看。

examples.english: a few lines of poetry
examples.chinese: 几行诗句

examples.english: Sales totals are shown in this column.
examples.chinese: 销售总额在这一栏里。

examples.english: Add up the numbers in the column on the right.
examples.chinese: 把右栏的数目加起来。

centers.english: a line that separates two areas or countries
centers.chinese: 分隔两个地区或国家的边境线

examples.english: They escaped across the border into Thailand.
examples.chinese: 他们越过边境逃到了泰国。

examples.english: Iraq had put thousands of troops along its border with Kuwait.
examples.chinese: 伊拉克在科威特边境上部署了数以千计的部队。

examples.english: The town lies on the border between Chile and Argentina.
examples.chinese: 小镇位于智利和阿根廷交界的边境线上。

examples.english: Strasbourg is very close to the German border.
examples.chinese: 斯特拉斯堡离德国边境非常近。

examples.english: As soon as we crossed the border we began to see signs of poverty.
examples.chinese: 我们一过边境就看到了贫穷的迹象。

examples.english: Jeumont is a small town on the French-Belgian border.
examples.chinese: 热蒙是法国和比利时边境上的一个小镇。

examples.english: The army's main task was to patrol the border regions.
examples.chinese: 这支军队的主要任务是在边境地区巡逻。

examples.english: The two presidents met for the first time to discuss their longstanding border dispute.
examples.chinese: 两国总统首度会晤，就长期以来的边界争端进行协商。

examples.english: More and more people are moving outside the city boundaries.
examples.chinese: 越来越多的人搬到城外去居住。

examples.english: The Mississippi River forms the boundary between Tennessee and Arkansas.
examples.chinese: 密西西比河成了田纳西州和阿肯色州的边界。

examples.english: Politicians drew strangely shaped boundaries, in order to give themselves an advantage in the next election.
examples.chinese: 政客们把边界划得很奇怪，为的是使自己在下一届的选举中更具优势。

centers.english: to draw or mark a line on something
centers.chinese: 在某物表面划出或标出线条

examples.english: The teacher drew a line on the blackboard.
examples.chinese: 老师在黑板上画了一条线。

examples.english: Someone's drawn a line through my name and written in theirs.
examples.chinese: 有人在我的名字上画了一条线，写上了自己的名字。

examples.english: Don't forget to underline the title of the essay.
examples.chinese: 不要忘记在文章的题目下面画线。

examples.english: All the mistakes had been underlined in red ink.
examples.chinese: 所有的错处下面都用红笔画了线。

examples.english: He ruled three lines under the title of his essay.
examples.chinese: 他在自己的文章题目下面画了三条直线。

examples.english: She divided the page into four by ruling two diagonal lines across it.
examples.chinese: 她用尺在纸上画了两条对角线，把它一分为四。

centers.english: a line of people

examples.english: The Queen is walking slowly along the lines of soldiers, occasionally stopping to ask a question.
examples.chinese: 女王在一列列士兵面前慢慢地走过，不时地停下来问问题。

examples.english: The photographer asked us to stand in a line.
examples.chinese: 摄影师请我们站成一排。

examples.english: The teacher got the children to form a line before they went into the hall.
examples.chinese: 老师让孩子们排成一行进入大厅。

examples.english: Can you see me in the photo? I'm in the back row on the left.
examples.chinese: 你能在照片里找到我吗？我在后排的左面。

examples.english: The hotel staff stood in a row to greet their important guests.
examples.chinese: 旅馆员工排成一排迎接贵宾。

examples.english: There was a queue of about fifteen people at the bus stop.
examples.chinese: 公共汽车站大约有15个人在排队。

examples.english: The line for the movie went right around the block.
examples.chinese: 等候购买电影票的队列一直转过了大楼。

examples.english: The women who were waiting outside the toilets began to form a queue.
examples.chinese: 在厕所外面等的女人开始排起了队。

examples.english: Excuse me, are you in the queue?
examples.chinese: 不好意思，你也是在排队的吗？

examples.english: The path was so narrow that we had to walk in single file.
examples.chinese: 小路太窄了，我们只得排成一行跟着走。

examples.english: We were held up by a long funeral procession.
examples.chinese: 我们被一列长长的送葬队伍堵住了路。

examples.english: The children were eager to take part in the carnival procession.
examples.chinese: 孩子们热切地盼望着参加狂欢节的游行。

examples.english: A lot of soldiers were missing from the Victory parade.
examples.chinese: 许多士兵没有去参加胜利巡游。

examples.english: When Johnson arrived home after the championships a big parade was held in his honour.
examples.chinese: 约翰逊参加锦标赛回来后，有人为他举行了一个大游行。

examples.english: The column of French soldiers passed us on their way to the battlefront.
examples.chinese: 一队法军士兵从我们身旁经过，开赴前线。

examples.english: Columns of men and women were making their way towards the central square.
examples.chinese: 一队队的男男女女正走向中央广场。

centers.english: to stand in a line of people

expressions.text: stand/wait/be in line/ stand/wait on line

examples.english: Jerry joined the crowd of people who were waiting in line outside the stadium.
examples.chinese: 杰里也加入了在体育馆外排队等候的队伍。

examples.english: Standing in line for hours at some government office was not exactly my idea of fun.
examples.chinese: 在政府办公室里排队等上几个小时，我觉得那可不是什么好玩的事儿。

examples.english: Are you in line to get tickets?
examples.chinese: 你是排队买票的吗？

examples.english: We had to queue for hours in the rain.
examples.chinese: 我们不得不在雨中排了好几个小时的队。

examples.english: One of the other passengers who was queueing to get on the train suddenly had a heart attack.
examples.chinese: 排队上火车的乘客中有人突然心脏病发作。

examples.english: Thousands queued for tickets to see the final.
examples.chinese: 有成千上万的人排队买票看决赛。

examples.english: We queued up outside the stadium and had to wait over an hour for our tickets.
examples.chinese: 我们在体育馆外面等了一个多小时才买到票。

examples.english: People began lining up to get into the movie theater.
examples.chinese: 人们开始排队进电影院。

examples.english: We used to have to queue up for bread every morning.
examples.chinese: 过去我们每天早晨都必须排队买面包。

examples.english: Hundreds of people lined the streets to see the football team go by.
examples.chinese: 成百上千人排在街道两旁看足球队经过。

examples.english: The route taken by the Queen was lined with crowds of people waving flags.
examples.chinese: 女王经过的路线两旁站满了手中挥动着旗帜的人。

centers.english: to arrange things or people in a line

examples.english: He lined up the plates on the table in front of them.
examples.chinese: 他把桌子上的盘子一个个排开，放在他们面前。

examples.english: They lined the prisoners up and shot them.
examples.chinese: 他们把囚犯排成一行开枪射杀。

examples.english: The horses were being lined up for the start of the race.
examples.chinese: 赛马一字排开等待比赛开始。

centers.english: objects/cups/furniture etc

examples.english: The floor was covered in broken glass.
examples.chinese: 地上满是碎玻璃。

examples.english: This suitcase is no good - the handle's broken.
examples.chinese: 这只手提箱没用了一把手坏了。

examples.english: The birds had gotten into the cabin through a broken window.
examples.chinese: 这些鸟是从破碎的窗户飞进小木屋的。

examples.english: In the corner of the room were a broken chair and a rickety old desk.
examples.chinese: 房间的角落里放着一把破椅子和一张摇摇晃晃的旧书桌。

examples.english: Why do I always get the chipped cup?
examples.chinese: 为何老是我用有缺口的杯子?

examples.english: Don't use that plate - it's chipped.
examples.chinese: 别用那个盘子，它破损了。

examples.english: Throw that jug away. It's cracked.
examples.chinese: 把那个壶扔掉吧，它已经有裂缝了。

examples.english: The tiles were old and cracked.
examples.chinese: 这些瓷砖年代已久，有裂缝了。

examples.english: He's been driving around with a cracked windshield for months.
examples.chinese: 他几个月来一直开着挡风玻璃破裂的车到处跑。

examples.english: I can't carry all the shopping home in this bag - it's bust.
examples.chinese: 我无法用这个袋子把买的所有东西拿回家—它破了。

examples.english: The door's bust again. Can you get it fixed?
examples.chinese: 门又坏了，你能修一下吗？

examples.english: In the yard, Miguel found a writing table with a busted leg.
examples.chinese: 米格尔在院子里看到一张有条断腿的书桌。

centers.english: bones

examples.english: One little boy had a broken arm.
examples.chinese: 有一个小男孩手臂骨折了。

examples.english: I think my ankle's broken.
examples.chinese: 我想我的脚踝骨断了。

examples.english: The X-ray revealed that she had several fractured ribs.
examples.chinese: X光片显示她多处肋骨骨折。

examples.english: Julie's arm is busted and she can't take care of herself.
examples.chinese: 朱莉手臂断了，无法照料自己。

centers.english: machines, cars, phones etc that do not work
centers.chinese: 机器、汽车、电话等不能正常运作

examples.english: The phone's not working.
examples.chinese: 电话坏了。

examples.english: Our car isn't working at the moment, so I've been taking the bus.
examples.chinese: 我们的车坏了，所以我一直在坐公共汽车。

examples.english: The elevator doesn't seem to be working - let's take the stairs.
examples.chinese: 电梯好像坏了，我们走楼梯吧。

examples.english: The headlights don't work and the brakes need fixing.
examples.chinese: 车头灯不亮了，刹车也得修一下。

examples.english: This camera doesn't work - I'll have to take it back to the store.
examples.chinese: 这架相机是坏的—我得把它拿回商店去。

examples.english: There's something wrong with my car: I think it might be the battery.
examples.chinese: 我的车子出了故障，我想可能是电池坏了。

examples.english: There was something wrong with the photocopier, so we called in the service company.
examples.chinese: 复印机坏了，我们就请来了维修公司。

examples.english: If the VCR has something wrong with it, take it back to the store.
examples.chinese: 如果录像机有问题，就把它拿回商店去。

examples.english: ‘What's the time?’ ‘I don't know, my watch is broken.’
examples.chinese: “现在几点了？”“不知道，我的表坏了。”

examples.english: I think the doorbell must be broken - I didn't hear anything.
examples.chinese: 我想门铃肯定是坏了，我一点声音也没听到。

examples.english: a broken dishwasher
examples.chinese: 坏了的洗碗机

examples.english: Every phone I tried was out of order.
examples.chinese: 我试了所有的电话，都坏了。

examples.english: The toilets are almost always out of order.
examples.chinese: 抽水马桶几乎一天到晚出故障。

examples.english: Three of our tanks are out of action.
examples.chinese: 我们有三辆坦克出了故障。

examples.english: These planes may be out of action for a week, just for regular maintenance.
examples.chinese: 这几架飞机也许要停飞一个星期作定期维修。

examples.english: Our washing machine's out of action at the moment, so we use the laundry down the road.
examples.chinese: 我们的洗衣机出了问题，所以我们要把衣服送到马路那头的洗衣店去洗。

examples.english: The computer system was down all afternoon so we went home.
examples.chinese: 电脑系统整个下午都停机，于是我们便回家了。

examples.english: The network went down at 11:00 and we lost the whole morning's work.
examples.chinese: 网络在11时断了，我们丢失了整整一个上午的工作。

expressions.text: be on the blink / be on the fritz

examples.english: My TV's on the blink again.
examples.chinese: 我的电视机又出毛病了。

examples.english: The car's air conditioning went on the fritz just as we reached Dallas.
examples.chinese: 我们刚抵达达拉斯，汽车的空调就出问题了。

examples.english: Jo's car is very temperamental in the mornings. Sometimes it starts and sometimes it doesn't.
examples.chinese: 乔的汽车在上午总时好时坏，有时能发动起来，有时就发动不起来。

examples.english: The only heating was from a temperamental iron stove in the centre of each hut.
examples.chinese: 唯一的取暖设备就是在每间小茅屋中央的那个时好时坏的铁炉。

examples.english: I'm not sure what's wrong with my car - I think the clutch has gone.
examples.chinese: 我不肯定我的汽车出了什么问题一—估计是离合器坏了。

examples.english: If the gearbox is gone it'll cost you a fortune.
examples.chinese: 如果变速箱坏了，那你就得破财了。

examples.english: ‘What's that noise?’ ‘It sounds like the suspension's going.’
examples.chinese: “那是什么声音？”“听起来好像是悬架要出问题了。”

examples.english: I'm afraid the stereo's had it.
examples.chinese: 那台立体声音响器材恐怕已经彻底坏了。

examples.english: Our television's bust, and so's the radio.
examples.chinese: 我们的电视机坏了，收音机也有毛病。

examples.english: There's no point in trying to mend it, it's completely bust.
examples.chinese: 这东西修了也没用处，它已经彻底坏了。

examples.english: You can't record anything - the VCR's busted.
examples.chinese: 你录不了东西了—录像机坏了。

examples.english: a busted air-conditioner
examples.chinese: 有毛病的空调机

centers.english: to stop working

examples.english: Who'll fix my computer if something goes wrong?
examples.chinese: 我的电脑出问题的话谁来修?

examples.english: Occasionally something went wrong with the projector and the movie was canceled.
examples.chinese: 放映机偶尔会出问题，这样就得取消播放电影了。

examples.english: Something's gone wrong with my washing machine.
examples.chinese: 我这台洗衣机出了问题。

examples.english: She was late for the meeting because her car broke down.
examples.chinese: 由于车子抛锚，她开会迟到了。

examples.english: The elevators in this building are always breaking down.
examples.chinese: 这幢楼里的电梯总是出毛病。

examples.english: A mechanical breakdown during the race would mean defeat.
examples.chinese: 比赛中机械出故障的话就意味着要输了。

examples.english: I installed the new program and my computer crashed.
examples.chinese: 我安装了新程序后电脑就停机了。

examples.english: Hundreds of hospital records were wiped out when the network crashed.
examples.chinese: 医院的系统瘫痪了，导致数以百计的病历都丢失了。

examples.english: Every time Mark slowed down the engine cut out.
examples.chinese: 每次马克一减速，发动机就熄火。

examples.english: I started to go up the hill and the engine just cut out on me.
examples.chinese: 我开始驾车爬坡，发动机就熄火了。

examples.english: The driver of the car claims that his brakes failed and he was unable to stop.
examples.chinese: 汽车司机声称他的刹车失灵了，他无法停车。

examples.english: In the last ten minutes of the game, one of the television cameras failed.
examples.chinese: 比赛进行到最后十分钟时，有一架电视摄像机坏了。

examples.english: One of the engines failed at 30,000 feet.
examples.chinese: 在30,000英尺高度时，有一台发动机失灵了。

examples.english: Investigators traced the cause of the crash to engine failure.
examples.chinese: 调查人员查出失事的原因是发动机失灵。

examples.english: This is a sign that the computer's hard disk is malfunctioning.
examples.chinese: 这个信号表示电脑硬盘发生了故障。

examples.english: Both satellites entered orbit but quickly malfunctioned.
examples.chinese: 两颗卫星都进入了轨道，但很快就出了故障。

examples.english: Someone at the plant has to be ready to deal with equipment malfunctions at any time.
examples.chinese: 厂里得安排一个人随时准备处理机器故障。

examples.english: When this record player packs up, I'll buy a CD player.
examples.chinese: 这架唱机坏了以后，我就去买台CD播放器。

examples.english: They won't know what to do if a pipe bursts or if the heater packs up.
examples.chinese: 如果管道爆裂或取暖器出了问题，他们是不知道该如何处理的。

centers.english: to stop a machine from working

examples.english: One of the kids put some rocks in the blender and broke it.
examples.chinese: 其中一个小家伙把一些石块放进了搅拌机，把它弄坏了。

examples.english: I don't know what she did, but she managed to break the sewing machine.
examples.chinese: 我不懂她是怎么弄的，她竟然把缝纫机弄坏了。

examples.english: The robbers had disabled the bank's security system.
examples.chinese: 那些抢劫者破坏了银行的保安系统。

examples.english: The tank's navigational system had been disabled during a grenade attack.
examples.chinese: 坦克的导航系统被手榴弹炸坏了。

examples.english: An electronic mine exploded under the ship and put it out of action.
examples.chinese: 一枚电子水雷在船底爆炸，摧毁了这艘船。

examples.english: Reporting from the area was difficult even before terrorists put all the telephone lines out of action.
examples.chinese: 即使在恐怖分子把全部电话线破坏掉以前，从那个地区进行报道就已经很困难了。

examples.english: Demonstrators immobilized tanks using gasoline bombs.
examples.chinese: 游行示威者用汽油弹把坦克烧得无法行驶。

examples.english: Kendrick had only a few minutes to immobilize the aircraft.
examples.chinese: 肯德里克只有几分钟时间破坏飞机。

centers.english: not broken or damaged

examples.english: Despite the bombing, the house was still intact.
examples.chinese: 尽管受到轰炸，房子仍完好无损。

examples.english: The toys have to be intact in their original boxes or they're not worth anything.
examples.chinese: 玩具要完整无缺地放在原装盒内，不然就不值钱了。

examples.english: Our furniture survived the long journey more or less intact.
examples.chinese: 我们的家具经过这次长途旅程，基本上没受到损坏。

examples.english: I don't know how we got the piano down in one piece!
examples.chinese: 真不知道我们是如何把钢琴完好无损地抬下去的！

examples.english: The china arrived all in one piece, thank God.
examples.chinese: 瓷器运到时全部都完好无损，谢天谢地。

centers.english: at work, at home, when doing a sport etc
centers.chinese: 在上班、在家、在从事体育运动等的时候

examples.english: She has been in almost constant pain since her accident.
examples.chinese: 自从遭遇事故以后，她几乎一直感到疼痛。

examples.english: Robert had an accident in the lab. He was opening a bottle of acid and he spilt some on his hands.
examples.chinese: 罗伯特在实验室里出了事故，他在打开一瓶酸的时候，洒了一些在手上。

examples.english: Most serious accidents in the home involve electrical equipment or hot liquids.
examples.chinese: 大多数严重的家庭意外事故都因电器或高温液体造成。

examples.english: The number of fatal accidents in the construction industry has dropped dramatically in recent years.
examples.chinese: 近年来建筑行业致命事故的数量大幅下降。

examples.english: His best friend was killed in a skiing accident.
examples.chinese: 他最要好的一位朋友在一次滑雪事故中死亡。

examples.english: We managed to reach our destination, despite one or two mishaps earlier on in the day.
examples.chinese: 尽管这天早些时候出现过一两个小小的意外，我们最终还是赶到了目的地。

examples.english: Josh had just had a slight mishap with the breadknife, and was trying to find a Band-Aid.
examples.chinese: 乔希用面包刀的时候受了点小伤，正在找邦迪创可贴。

centers.english: in a car, train, plane etc
centers.chinese: 在汽车上、火车上、飞机上等

examples.english: The accident happened on Interstate 84, during the evening rush hour.
examples.chinese: 这起事故发生在84号州际公路上，正值晚上的高峰时间。

examples.english: Brussels airport was closed today after an accident on the runway.
examples.chinese: 今天布鲁塞尔机场因为跑道上发生一起事故而关闭了。

examples.english: Teenage boys tend to drive wildly and often have accidents.
examples.chinese: 十几岁的男孩子开车总是很疯狂，经常出事故。

examples.english: As usual, the fog and icy roads had led to several very nasty accidents.
examples.chinese: 和往常一样，大雾和路面结冰的道路导致了几起非常严重的事故。

examples.english: Men have twice as many fatal accidents as women do for every mile they drive.
examples.chinese: 以每英里的车程计算，男人发生致命车祸的数量是女人的两倍。

examples.english: Both her parents had been killed in a car accident.
examples.chinese: 她的父母亲都死于一场车祸。

examples.english: She was in an automobile accident, but she's not seriously hurt.
examples.chinese: 她遇上一起车祸，但伤得不重。

examples.english: Ira Louvin was killed in a crash in Montana that also took the lives of six other people.
examples.chinese: 艾拉·卢万死于蒙大拿州的一起车祸，这起车祸还夺去了另外六人的性命。

examples.english: Her husband died in a plane crash in 1981.
examples.chinese: 她的丈夫在1981年死于一起空难。

examples.english: Nobody could have survived the wreck.
examples.chinese: 在这起事故中没人能幸免于难。

examples.english: The pile-up happened in thick fog and caused a seven-mile tailback on the motorway.
examples.chinese: 大雾中发生了一起多车相撞事故，使高速公路上排起了一条七英里长的汽车长龙。

examples.english: a multiple pile-up involving a minibus and five cars
examples.chinese: 一辆小型公共汽车和五辆汽车连环相撞的事故

examples.english: The city has emergency plans for dealing with a major disaster such as a rail crash.
examples.chinese: 该市制定有处理火车撞车等重大灾难的应急预案。

examples.english: At least 264 people died, in one of the worst civilian air disasters of all time.
examples.chinese: 在有史以来最严重的一起民航空难中，至少有264人罹难。

expressions.text: the Lockerbie disaster/the Challenger disaster etc

examples.english: The Challenger disaster cost the lives of seven astronauts, and set back the nation's space program for years.
examples.chinese: “挑战者”号空难夺去了七名宇航员的生命，使国家的太空计划耽误了好几年。

examples.english: A school bus has been involved in a collision with a fuel tanker.
examples.chinese: 一辆校车与一辆油罐车相撞了。

examples.english: The risk of a mid-air collision over central London has increased dramatically.
examples.chinese: 飞机在伦敦市中心上空发生相撞事故的风险急剧增加。

examples.english: These airbags are designed to protect car drivers in head-on collisions.
examples.chinese: 这些安全气囊是为保护汽车司机在车辆迎头相撞时免受伤害而设计的。

centers.english: to have an accident

expressions.gram: verb phrase not in progressive or passive

examples.english: You shouldn't go so fast on that motorcycle, you'll have an accident!
examples.chinese: 你不应该把摩托车开得那么快，会出事故的！

examples.english: Jack's had an accident at school! They've taken him to the hospital.
examples.chinese: 杰克在学校出事了！他们已把他送进医院了。

examples.english: He lost control of his car at the first bend and crashed.
examples.chinese: 他的车在第一个弯失控撞毁了。

examples.english: The plane crashed shortly after take-off.
examples.chinese: 飞机起飞后不久就坠毁了。

examples.english: The bus crashed into an embankment before bursting into flames.
examples.chinese: 公共汽车撞到路堤上，之后就燃烧了起来。

examples.english: Rick crashed his bike before he'd finished paying for it.
examples.chinese: 里克的摩托车还没还完款就撞坏了。

examples.english: If you are involved in an accident, wearing a seat belt will halve the risk of death.
examples.chinese: 如果你遇到车祸，系着安全带会使死亡的风险减少一半。

examples.english: Stolen cars are more likely to be involved in accidents.
examples.chinese: 被盗的车牵涉在事故中的可能性更大一些。

centers.english: the edge of an object, surface, or place
centers.chinese: 物体、表面或地方的边缘

examples.english: The plates have blue lines around the edges.
examples.chinese: 这些盘子的边缘有蓝色线条。

examples.english: Don't put your glass so close to the edge of the table.
examples.chinese: 不要把杯子放在离桌子边这么近的地方。

examples.english: There's an enormous oak tree at the edge of the garden.
examples.chinese: 花园的边缘有一棵巨大的橡树。

examples.english: The stage was lit from the side.
examples.chinese: 舞台是从侧面照明的。

examples.english: Mike always puts his feet on my side of the bed.
examples.chinese: 迈克总是把脚放到床上我这一侧。

examples.english: The new five-dollar bills have shifted the president's head toward the left-hand side.
examples.chinese: 新的五美元纸币把总统头像移到了左边。

examples.english: The program sets the margins automatically.
examples.chinese: 这个程序会自动留出页边。

examples.english: There were notes pencilled in the margin.
examples.chinese: 在页边空白处用铅笔写了些批注。

examples.english: The tablecloth had a brightly patterned border.
examples.chinese: 桌布有一条色彩鲜艳的花边。

examples.english: Samantha was wearing a knee-length skirt with a green border.
examples.chinese: 萨曼莎穿了一条镶有绿色饰边的齐膝短裙。

examples.english: Jill wants to plant a border of flowers around the lawn.
examples.chinese: 吉尔想在草坪周围种花。

examples.english: The china set was blue with a gold rim.
examples.chinese: 这套瓷器是蓝色的，镶有一道金边。

examples.english: John's glasses had small lenses and steel rims.
examples.chinese: 约翰的眼镜片小小的，镜框是钢的。

examples.english: Her lipstick left a red mark on the rim of the cup.
examples.chinese: 她的口红在杯沿上留下了一个红色的印记。

centers.english: the edge of a country, place or area of land
centers.chinese: 一个国家、地方或一块土地的边缘

examples.english: My uncle's house is on the edge of town, near the airport.
examples.chinese: 我叔叔家在小镇的边缘，靠近机场。

examples.english: Gretel lives in a simple cottage on the edge of the forest.
examples.chinese: 格雷特尔住在森林边缘一间简朴的小屋里。

examples.english: Her parents lived in a big house on the outskirts of Manchester.
examples.chinese: 她父母住在曼彻斯特市郊的一幢大房子里。

examples.english: We stayed on the outskirts of the capital.
examples.chinese: 我们住在首府的郊外。

examples.english: We heard gunshots as we drove through the outskirts of the city.
examples.chinese: 我们驱车穿过城郊时听见了枪声。

examples.english: Isn't Manto near the Italian border?
examples.chinese: 曼托不是离意大利的边界很近吗?

examples.english: Jeumont is a small town on the French-Belgian border.
examples.chinese: 热蒙是法国和比利时边境上的一个小镇。

examples.english: Refugees have been warned not to attempt to cross the border.
examples.chinese: 难民已受到警告，不可试图穿越边境。

examples.english: The talks were held in the northeastern state of Nuevo Leon, on the border with the US.
examples.chinese: 会谈在东北部与美国交界的新莱昂州举行。

examples.english: It is a mountainous region, occupying a large area near the border with Nepal.
examples.chinese: 这是一片山区，面积很大，靠近尼泊尔边界。

examples.english: We spent the night in, a miserable little border town.
examples.chinese: 我们在一个破落的边境小镇上过夜。

examples.english: Fighting in border disputes has killed at least 25 people.
examples.chinese: 边界争端的战事已经造成至少25人死亡。

examples.english: Many of the cars crossing the frontier were stopped and searched.
examples.chinese: 许多过境车辆都被拦下来接受搜查。

examples.english: They settled in Ronco, a picturesque village near the Italian frontier.
examples.chinese: 他们在龙科住了下来，那是靠近意大利边境的一个风景如画的小村子。

examples.english: He was questioned by soldiers at a frontier post.
examples.chinese: 他在边防哨所被士兵叫住了问话。

examples.english: A fence marks the property's boundaries.
examples.chinese: 一道篱笆标出了地界。

examples.english: the easternmost boundary of Greater Manchester
examples.chinese: 大曼彻斯特的最东面边界

examples.english: The Mississippi River forms a natural boundary between Iowa and Illinois.
examples.chinese: 密西西比河构成了艾奥瓦州和伊利诺伊州的天然分界线。

examples.english: Security guards patrol the perimeter.
examples.chinese: 周边有卫兵巡逻。

examples.english: the perimeter of the airfield
examples.chinese: 机场四周

examples.english: A secure perimeter fence should be at least two metres high.
examples.chinese: 安全的围栏至少应有两米高。

centers.english: the largest amount that is allowed or possible
centers.chinese: 允许或可能的最大数量

examples.english: He borrowed money up to the limit that the bank allowed.
examples.chinese: 他向银行借的钱达到了银行允许的最高限额。

examples.english: There's no limit on the amount of money that may be brought into the US.
examples.chinese: 可以带进美国的钱没有最高限额。

examples.english: The Interstate speed limit is 65 m.p.h.
examples.chinese: 州际公路上的限速是每小时65英里。

examples.english: Pollution levels in the water were found to be over the official limit.
examples.chinese: 水的污染程度被发现超过了官方的规定。

examples.english: Some families set limits on how much they spend on each other's Christmas present.
examples.chinese: 有些家庭为圣诞节互送礼物设定消费限额。

examples.english: After leaving Calais, the train soon reaches its maximum speed of 300 kph.
examples.chinese: 列车驶出加来后很快就达到了每小时300公里的最高时速。

examples.english: Forty is the maximum number of passengers this bus is allowed to carry.
examples.chinese: 这辆公共汽车限载40名乘客。

examples.english: Ditikins faces a maximum sentence of 15 years in prison.
examples.chinese: 迪提金斯面临着最长15年的刑期。

examples.english: You don't have to wait long for a new passport - 3 weeks is about the maximum.
examples.chinese: 新护照不需要等很长时间—三个星期差不多是最长的了。

examples.english: Individuals may donate a maximum of $1000 to the campaign.
examples.chinese: 个人最多可向这次活动捐赠1,000美元。

examples.english: He likes to gamble, but the most he ever won was $1000.
examples.chinese: 他喜欢赌博，但是他赢得最多的一次也就是1,000美元。

examples.english: Two cakes is the most that I can bake in my oven at one time.
examples.chinese: 我的烤箱一次最多能烤两个蛋糕。

examples.english: A new tyre would cost £70 at the very most.
examples.chinese: 一条新轮胎最多卖70英镑。

examples.english: The explosion had a force that was close to the upper limit allowed by nuclear arms treaties.
examples.chinese: 此次爆炸的威力接近于核武器条约所允许的上限。

examples.english: The Pentagon did not set an upper limit on troop deployments during the war.
examples.chinese: 五角大楼对战时的军队调配没有规定上限。

examples.english: Import quotas may rise from the present ceiling of 18.5 million to 20 million.
examples.chinese: 进口配额可能会从目前1,850万的上限上升到2000万。

examples.english: There is a ceiling on the amount of foreign investment allowed in any company in the country.
examples.chinese: 国内公司所允许的国外投资是有上限的。

examples.english: Congress was once again considering raising the federal debt ceiling.
examples.chinese: 国会又一次在考虑上调联邦债务的上限。

examples.english: The machine's cut-off point is 1000 volts, which is the safety maximum.
examples.chinese: 机器的断电点是1,000伏特，这是最大安全限值。

examples.english: Science has pushed back the cut-off point at which a woman can no longer bear children.
examples.chinese: 科学已经将女性停止生育的年龄往后推了。

centers.english: the smallest amount that is allowed or possible
centers.chinese: 允许或可能的最小数量

examples.english: £20,000 is the least we could accept for a car of this type.
examples.chinese: 这种型号的汽车我们至少要两万英镑才能接受。

examples.english: The least anyone around here works is about 50 hours per week.
examples.chinese: 这里的人每周至少工作50小时左右。

examples.english: What is the minimum wage these days?
examples.chinese: 现在最低工资是多少？

examples.english: The minimum age to buy cigarettes is 18.
examples.chinese: 购买香烟的最低年龄是18岁。

examples.english: He usually just pays the minimum each month on his credit cards.
examples.chinese: 他一般每个月只付信用卡的最低还款额。

examples.english: You have to stay for a minimum of 7 days.
examples.chinese: 你必须至少逗留七天。

examples.english: The hospital has reduced staffing to an absolute minimum.
examples.chinese: 医院已经将职工人数减到不能再减了。

examples.english: Let's try to keep irrelevant comments to a minimum.
examples.chinese: 不相关的话，我们尽量少说。

examples.english: Age 3 is really the lower limit for teaching children to swim.
examples.chinese: 3岁其实是教小孩子学游泳的最小年龄。

examples.english: Deposits are subject to a lower limit of $400.
examples.chinese: 存款的下限是400美元。

examples.english: If the temperature falls below a particular threshold, a warning light comes on.
examples.chinese: 如果温度降到某个底线，警示灯就会亮起来。

examples.english: Under the proposal, those whose earnings were less than a $36,000 threshold would not have to pay taxes.
examples.chinese: 根据这一提议，收入低于36,000美元这一下限者无须纳税。

centers.english: when there are limits on what you can do

examples.english: There are practical limits to the number of cases we can deal with each day.
examples.chinese: 我们每天所能处理的案件数量有实际的限制。

examples.english: He's well aware of the limits of his knowledge.
examples.chinese: 他深知自己知识有限。

examples.english: We want our employees to enjoy themselves, within certain limits.
examples.chinese: 我们要让我们的员工过得愉快，但是要有一定的分寸。

examples.english: The limitations of the computer system make some operations very difficult.
examples.chinese: 该电脑系统的局限性使某些操作变得十分困难。

examples.english: The president was unwilling to accept limitations on his power.
examples.chinese: 总裁不愿意接受权力上的限制。

examples.english: Hikers should know their physical limitations and not take unnecessary risks.
examples.chinese: 远足者应该知道自己体力上的不足，不要去冒不必要的危险。

examples.english: There are certain travel restrictions in effect in certain areas along the border.
examples.chinese: 边境的某些地区实行了一些旅行限制。

examples.english: Unions are pressing for restrictions on steel imports from Japan.
examples.chinese: 工会正敦促限制从日本进口钢材。

examples.english: Because of restrictions on reporting, newspapers were not allowed to cover the story.
examples.chinese: 因为新闻报道方面的限制，报纸不允许报道这一事件。

examples.english: New restrictions have been imposed on immigration.
examples.chinese: 新的移民限制已经实施。

examples.english: Because of time constraints two acts had to be cut from the show.
examples.chinese: 由于时间上的限制，演出删去了两幕。

examples.english: The constraints of prison life are sometimes too much for people to bear.
examples.chinese: 狱中生活的约束有时候使犯人难以忍受。

examples.english: Our choice of shops is somewhat limited because we don't have a car.
examples.chinese: 由于没有车，我们能去的商店有限。

examples.english: We're limited to two weeks of vacation a year, so a three-week safari isn't possible.
examples.chinese: 我们每年的假期只有两个星期，所以三个星期的游猎之旅是不可能的。

examples.english: Many Hong Kong performers are limited by their lack of English skills in making the transition to Hollywood.
examples.chinese: 许多香港艺人因受其英语能力所限，难以进军好莱坞。

examples.english: Access to the President is restricted.
examples.chinese: 总统不能随便接近。

examples.english: In those days, visiting in the hospital was restricted to specific weekend hours only.
examples.chinese: 那个时候，到医院探望病人只限在周末特定的几个小时。

examples.english: Because Forbes was using his own money, he was not restricted by federal limits on campaign spending.
examples.chinese: 因为福布斯用的是他自己的钱，他的竞选开支不受联邦政府规定上限的约束。

examples.english: Sharon's options were severely constrained because of the foolish choices she made as a teenager.
examples.chinese: 由于十来岁时所作的愚蠢决定，莎伦现在的选择受到很大限制。

examples.english: Research is often constrained by lack of sufficient data.
examples.chinese: 研究工作常常因为缺乏足够的数据而受到限制。

examples.english: A clear statement of the goal and scope of a research project is a useful reference point.
examples.chinese: 研究项目有一个明确的目标和范围说明是很有用的参照点。

examples.english: It was determined that the Commissioner had been acting within the scope of his official duties.
examples.chinese: 警察局长被认定是在自己的职责范围内行事。

examples.english: I'm afraid the matter falls outside the scope of this enquiry.
examples.chinese: 恐怕这件事已超出此次调查的范围。

examples.english: Regulations are important in markets that are increasingly international in scope.
examples.chinese: 在活动范围日渐国际化的市场里，法规很重要。

examples.english: The ruling party has granted concessions of considerable scope.
examples.chinese: 执政党已经作出了很大的让步。

examples.english: She felt trapped by the narrow confines of the convent.
examples.chinese: 她感觉被修道院的条条框框束缚了。

examples.english: We must operate within the confines of the law.
examples.chinese: 我们必须在法律允许的范围内经营。

examples.english: Hypothetical thinking goes beyond the confines of everyday experience.
examples.chinese: 假想超越了日常经历的局限。

examples.english: In the private sector there are clear parameters which surround labour relations.
examples.chinese: 私营机构里对于劳资关系有明确的规定。

examples.english: It is only within the parameters of a clear set of goals that a national science program can be successful.
examples.chinese: 只有在明确的目标范围里，国家的科研计划才能取得成功。

centers.english: to put a limit on something

examples.english: The new law limits the number of foreign cars that can be imported.
examples.chinese: 这条新的法规限制了外国汽车的进口数量。

examples.english: Men hold most of the top jobs, and this limits women's opportunities for promotion.
examples.chinese: 大部分高职都由男性担任，这就限制了女性的晋升机会。

examples.english: Let's limit our discussion to the facts in the report.
examples.chinese: 我们把讨论限定在报告中所涉及的事情吧。

examples.english: As you look for material to write about, don't limit yourself to other people's ideas.
examples.chinese: 你在找资料写东西的时候，不要光局限于使用别人的观点。

examples.english: The law would restrict the sale of handguns.
examples.chinese: 这条法律将限制枪支销售。

examples.english: This year's AIDS conference is restricted in size to fewer than 3,000 participants.
