examples.chinese: 今年的艾滋病大会与会人数限制在3,000人以下。

examples.english: McGregor has said he will voluntarily restrict himself to $2.2 million in campaign spending.
examples.chinese: 麦格雷戈说过，他将主动把竞选开支控制在220万美元。

examples.english: Governments should put strict limits on tobacco advertising.
examples.chinese: 政府应该严格限制烟草广告。

examples.english: The courts have imposed limits on school officials’ power to dismiss teachers.
examples.chinese: 法庭限制了学校高级职员解雇教师的权力。

examples.english: The president set a time limit of 6 months for the negotiations to produce an agreement.
examples.chinese: 总统给这次谈判设定了六个月的期限来达成协议。

examples.english: Parents need to know when to set limits for their children's behavior.
examples.chinese: 家长需要知道何时要限制孩子的行为。

examples.english: We need to keep to the schedule if we're going to finish on time.
examples.chinese: 我们若要按时完成，就需按计划进行。

examples.english: Keep within the speed limit and you should have no problems.
examples.chinese: 不超速，你就不会有麻烦。

examples.english: Rebel troops have confined their attacks mainly to the southern part of the country.
examples.chinese: 叛军把袭击目标限定在国家的南部地区。

examples.english: The report confines itself to known and verifiable facts.
examples.chinese: 这篇报道的内容只限于可以核实的已知事实。

examples.english: Interest rates for savings accounts have been fixed at 7% for the rest of the year.
examples.chinese: 今年余下时间的存款利率已定为7%。

examples.english: The project has finally been approved and the budget has been fixed.
examples.chinese: 这个项目终于得到批准，预算也定下来了。

centers.english: when there is a limit on the size or amount of something
centers.chinese: 某事物的大小或数量有限制

examples.english: We only have a limited amount of time in which to finish the work.
examples.chinese: 我们完成这工作的时间有限。

examples.english: Call now - this offer is good for a limited time only.
examples.chinese: 现在就打电话—这个优惠活动只限时推出。

examples.english: The class is limited to 20 students.
examples.chinese: 这班的人数限20名学生。

expressions.text: there are limits/there is a limit

examples.english: Of course, we'd like to have as many children as possible attend, but there are limits.
examples.chinese: 当然我们也希望有尽量多的孩子参加，但是人数有限制。

expressions.text: there are limits/there is a limit on

examples.english: According to the director, there's a limit on the number of computers we can buy.
examples.chinese: 据董事讲，我们能够购买的电脑数量有限。

expressions.text: there are limits/there is a limit to

examples.english: There are limits to what the human body can tolerate.
examples.chinese: 人体的承受力是有限度的。

examples.english: Our health insurance pays a fixed amount for each type of treatment, regardless of what it actually costs.
examples.chinese: 我们的健康保险对每种治疗都赔付一笔固定金额，不管实际费用是多少。

examples.english: fixed interest rates
examples.chinese: 固定利率

examples.english: Fixed costs should be separated from variable costs when working out the annual accounts.
examples.chinese: 做年度报表时，固定成本应与可变成本分开计算。

examples.english: The speed at which light travels is finite.
examples.chinese: 光速是有限的。！

examples.english: The earth has a finite number of resources which we must protect.
examples.chinese: 地球的资源是有限的，我们必须要加以保护。

centers.english: when there is no limit

examples.english: We pay $20 a month for unlimited Internet access.
examples.chinese: 我们每月支付20美元就可以无限量上网。

examples.english: The ticket is good for unlimited travel on the city's transportation system for 3 days.
examples.chinese: 这张票可在三天之内无限次乘坐本市的公共交通系统。

examples.english: At the time of the purchase, the extent of Alaska and its resources must have seemed unlimited.
examples.chinese: 在购买阿拉斯加的时候，阿拉斯加肯定显得面积奇大，资源无穷。

examples.english: If we work together, there's no limit to what we can achieve.
examples.chinese: 我们如果齐心协力，所能成就的是无限的。

examples.english: There's no limit to the number of times you can register to win.
examples.chinese: 登记抽奖的次数不限。

examples.english: Taking care of small children is a job that requires boundless energy.
examples.chinese: 照顾小孩子要有无穷的精力。

examples.english: They felt lost and alone on the vast, boundless sea.
examples.chinese: 他们在浩瀚无际的大海上漂泊，孤零零的，不知所措。

examples.english: The variations of color that a human eye can see are infinite.
examples.chinese: 人眼所能辨识的色彩变化是无穷无尽的。

examples.english: infinite space
examples.chinese: 无边无际的宇宙

examples.english: A natural language contains an infinite number of grammatical sentences.
examples.chinese: 自然语言中含有无数合语法的句子。

examples.english: Pick out whatever you want - the sky's the limit.
examples.chinese: 你想要什么就选什么—没有限制。

examples.english: We try to make our engineers feel that the sky's the limit when it comes to what they can design.
examples.chinese: 我们尽量让我们的工程师感到，他们想设计什么都可以。

centers.english: the natural world that people, animals, and plants live in
centers.chinese: 人和动植物生存的自然环境

examples.english: Many modern farming methods are highly damaging to the environment.
examples.chinese: 许多现代的耕种方式对环境破坏很大。

examples.english: Young people between 18 and 30 tend to be much more concerned about the environment than the older generation.
examples.chinese: 18至30岁的年轻人一般都比老一代人更加关心环境。

examples.english: Ask your local MP what he or she intends to do to help protect the environment.
examples.chinese: 问一问你们这个地区的议员，他或她打算如何来保护自然环境。

examples.english: The bay has a very complex and delicate ecosystem.
examples.chinese: 这个海湾的生态系统非常复杂和脆弱。

examples.english: The rainforest is a self-supporting ecosystem.
examples.chinese: 热带雨林是一个自养自护的生态系统。

examples.english: Many species of burrowing insects are essential for maintaining a healthy soil ecosystem.
examples.chinese: 许多种类的穴居昆虫是维持土壤生态健康所必需的。

examples.english: Plans to build a new airfield could threaten the delicate ecology of the island.
examples.chinese: 建造一个新机场的计划可能会对岛上脆弱的生态环境构成威胁。

examples.english: She is giving a lecture about the natural history and ecology of the sea shore.
examples.chinese: 她要作一个关于自然历史和海岸生态的讲座。

examples.english: Further building development would threaten valuable badger and red squirrel habitats.
examples.chinese: 继续进行建筑开发会对珍稀的獾和红松鼠的生存环境构成威胁。

examples.english: Suburban gardens can provide habitats for many forms of wildlife.
examples.chinese: 郊区的公园可为多种野生生物提供栖息地。

examples.english: Ancient habitats such as grasslands, bogs, and wetlands are rapidly disappearing.
examples.chinese: 草原、沼泽和湿地等古老的天然栖息地正在迅速消失。

examples.english: The oil spill has killed off billions of microscopic sea plants, thus threatening marine life further up the food chain.
examples.chinese: 溢油使无数微小的海洋植物大量死亡，从而对食物链中上层的海洋生命构成了威胁。

examples.english: Pesticides destroy insects that are an important part of the food chain for several species of songbird.
examples.chinese: 农药把对于一些种类的鸣禽来说是食物链中重要一环的昆虫消灭了。

centers.english: relating to the environment

examples.english: The explosion in the nuclear plant led to one of the most serious environmental catastrophes in history.
examples.chinese: 这次核电站爆炸给自然环境造成了历史上最为严重的一场大灾难。

examples.english: We want to stress the environmental benefits of a cheap, efficient public transport system.
examples.chinese: 我们想要强调一下便宜高效的公共交通系统给环境带来的好处。

examples.english: environmental pollution
examples.chinese: 环境污染

examples.english: Environmental groups and residents have united to protest against plans for a new shopping mall.
examples.chinese: 环保团体和居民联合起来反对建造新的购物中心的计划。

examples.english: The group claims that flying is one of the most environmentally damaging forms of travel.
examples.chinese: 这个组织称，乘飞机是对环境危害最大的一种旅行方式。

examples.english: Car manufacturers worldwide are working to develop environmentally cleaner vehicles.
examples.chinese: 全球的汽车制造商正在努力研制对环境污染较小的汽车。

examples.english: A government committee is considering a proposal for a green energy policy.
examples.chinese: 政府的一个委员会正在考虑制定绿色能源政策的提议。

examples.english: More money needs to be invested in developing greener fuel sources.
examples.chinese: 开发更加环保的燃料能源需要投入更多的资金。

examples.english: a conference attended by representatives of all the Green parties of Europe
examples.chinese: 由欧洲各绿党派代表参加的一个会议

examples.english: The government is to provide incentives for people to protect natural ecological assets such as forests.
examples.chinese: 政府鼓励人们保护森林等自然生态资源。

examples.english: There are warnings that the building of the dam will upset the ecological balance of the river basin.
examples.chinese: 有人警告说，修建这个水坝会破坏河流盆地的生态平衡。

examples.english: ecologically sound methods of pest elimination
examples.chinese: 对生态无害的灭虫方法

centers.english: protecting the environment

examples.english: Many shoppers will buy environmentally friendly washing powders even if they are slightly more expensive.
examples.chinese: 对环境无害的洗衣粉即使稍贵，许多人也都愿意购买。

examples.english: Of course public transportation is more environmentally friendly than cars, but it needs to be efficient or people won't use it.
examples.chinese: 公共交通当然比汽车环保，但是公共交通需要有效率，否则人们不会使用。

examples.english: an environmentally friendly alternative to the aerosol spray
examples.chinese: 替代喷雾剂的环保产品

examples.english: eco-friendly agriculture
examples.chinese: 对生态环境无害的农业

examples.english: Activists want the government to invest in low-impact eco-tourist facilities.
examples.chinese: 环保积极分子希望政府投资对环境影响不大的生态旅游设施。

examples.english: Officials see a role for sophisticated eco-technology to help eradicate pollution sweeping across the region.
examples.chinese: 官员们看到了尖端的生态技术对于消除影响整个地区的污染可以发挥的作用。

examples.english: Worried by repeated food scares, more and more people are buying organic products.
examples.chinese: 受到一次又一次食物恐慌的惊吓，越来越多的人都买有机产品了。

examples.english: For this recipe, use a free-range, organic chicken.
examples.chinese: 这个菜要使用放养的有机鸡肉。

examples.english: Several farmers in the county have moved to organic farming recently.
examples.chinese: 县里有些农民最近已经转向实行有机耕种了。

examples.english: The ‘green’ housing community uses renewable energy sources such as solar power.
examples.chinese: “绿色”住宅小区使用太阳能等可再生能源。

examples.english: The problem with fossil fuels is that they are not renewable.
examples.chinese: 化石燃料的缺点是不能再生。

examples.english: All wood used in our furniture comes with a certificate saying it comes from sustainable forests.
examples.chinese: 我们的家具所使用的所有木料都有证书，说是采自可持续性森林。

examples.english: Traditional agricultural methods employed by the local people are highly sustainable.
examples.chinese: 当地人所用的传统农业方法可持续性很强。

examples.english: The bill is an EU attempt to ensure the sustainability of cod fishing groups in the North Sea.
examples.chinese: 这个议案是欧盟为保证北海鳕鱼捕捞业的可持续性所作的努力。

examples.english: School students collected tons of drinks cans and bottles for recycling.
examples.chinese: 在校学生回收了数以吨计的饮料瓶罐。

examples.english: The recycling program involves every household in the neighborhood.
examples.chinese: 这个回收利用计划涉及社区里的家家户户。

examples.english: recycled paper/glass/plastic
examples.chinese: 再生纸/玻璃/塑料

examples.english: We aim to recycle at least 50% of household waste by 2005.
examples.chinese: 到2005年，我们打算回收利用至少50%的生活垃圾。

examples.english: Can computers be recycled?
examples.chinese: 电脑可以回收利用吗？

examples.english: Some plastics aren't recyclable, though many are.
examples.chinese: 有些塑料不可以回收利用，虽然有许多是可以的。

examples.english: recyclable packaging
examples.chinese: 可回收利用的包装

examples.english: The group is mainly concerned with bird conservation in coastal areas.
examples.chinese: 这个团体主要致力于沿海地区的鸟类保护。

examples.english: the conservation of several species of dolphin
examples.chinese: 对若干种海豚类动物的保护

examples.english: The flower now exists only in a small conservation area in Essex.
examples.chinese: 这种花现在只有埃塞克斯的一个小保护区里才有。

centers.english: people who are concerned about the environment

examples.english: Three environmental activists came to speak at the conference.
examples.chinese: 三名环保积极分子来到会上作了讲话。

examples.english: One of the young eco-warriors had to be pulled from a tree by police.
examples.chinese: 警察不得不把其中一名年轻的环保斗士从一棵树上拉下来。

centers.english: damage to the environment

examples.english: Pollution levels in the area shot up as soon as the factory started operating.
examples.chinese: 工厂一开始运作，这个地区的污染程度就直线上升。

examples.english: What pollution controls will the state authorities put in place?
examples.chinese: 州政府会采取什么措施控制污染呢？

examples.english: She says that transporting goods by rail instead of road would cut air pollution dramatically.
examples.chinese: 她说不用汽车而用火车运输货物可大大减轻空气污染。

examples.english: carbon monoxide and other pollutants in traffic fumes
examples.chinese: 一氧化碳等交通废气中的污染物

examples.english: Scientists estimate that global warming could cause a six degree rise in temperatures by 2100.
examples.chinese: 科学家预测，全球变暖可使气温到2100年上升6度。

examples.english: One of the most devastating consequences of global warming could be the melting of the polar ice caps.
examples.chinese: 全球变暖破坏力最强的一个后果是极地冰盖的融化。

examples.english: International controls are needed to reduce emissions of greenhouse gases.
examples.chinese: 需要国际上共同采取控制措施来减少温室气体的排放量。

examples.english: Western countries are overwhelmingly responsible for current levels of greenhouse gases.
examples.chinese: 西方国家要对目前温室气体的含量负绝大部分的责任。

examples.english: Typical symptoms of acid rain include deformed and dying trees, and trees with vastly reduced numbers of leaves.
examples.chinese: 酸雨的主要征候为树木变形、枯死，树叶大大减少。

examples.english: People will have to get used to more flooding and droughts as climate change becomes a reality.
examples.chinese: 气候变化已成现实，人们将不得不适应更多的水灾和旱灾。

examples.english: an international conference on Climate Change
examples.chinese: 一个以气候变化为主题的国际会议

examples.english: The increase in the incidence of skin cancer is directly due to the hole in the ozone layer.
examples.chinese: 皮肤癌患病率的增加与臭氧层空洞有直接的关系。

examples.english: Some parts of tropical America have seen over 70% deforestation.
examples.chinese: 热带美洲的一些地方有70%以上的森林已经惨遭滥伐。

examples.english: The land is severely eroded as a result of widespread deforestation and intensive farming.
examples.chinese: 由于大规模毁林和集约式耕作，土地受到了严重侵蚀。

examples.english: Environmentalists say that the area includes the habitats of at least 20 endangered species.
examples.chinese: 环保人士称，至少有20个濒危物种在这个地区生长栖息。

examples.english: Although the tiger is an endangered species, it is still hunted in some areas.
examples.chinese: 虽然老虎是濒危物种，但有些地方仍在捕猎。

centers.english: in a town

examples.english: They're building a new road around the city centre.
examples.chinese: 他们在修建一条围绕市中心的新道路。

examples.english: I live at 37 King's Road, Birmingham.
examples.chinese: 我住在伯明翰市金氏路37号。

examples.english: Before crossing the road, stop, look, and listen.
examples.chinese: 过马路之前要先停下，看一看，再听一听。

expressions.text: by the side/edge of the road

examples.english: Something was lying in the gutter by the side of the road.
examples.chinese: 路旁的排水沟里躺着什么东西。

examples.english: A widow lives in the house just across the road.
examples.chinese: 一个寡妇就住在马路对面的房子里。

examples.english: I went to the girls’ school down the road.
examples.chinese: 我去了这条路上的那所女子学校。

examples.english: They turned left at the gas station, into the busy main road.
examples.chinese: 他们在加油站左拐，驶上了繁忙的大路。

examples.english: It's amazing how many schools front busy roads.
examples.chinese: 这么多学校面朝交通繁忙的道路，真让人诧异。

examples.english: There were stores on both sides of the street.
examples.chinese: 街道两边都有商店。

examples.english: Wall Street is a famous financial center in New York.
examples.chinese: 华尔街是纽约著名的金融中心。

examples.english: Pablo loved wandering through the streets of Barcelona.
examples.chinese: 巴勃罗喜欢在巴塞罗那的街道上闲逛。

examples.english: We need more police on the streets.
examples.chinese: 我们需要更多的警察在街上执勤。

examples.english: Victoria can't walk down the street without someone recognizing her.
examples.chinese: 维多利亚走在街上时总免不了被人认出来。

examples.english: She had lived in the same street in London all her life.
examples.chinese: 她一辈子都住在伦敦的这条街上。

examples.english: Our street was just a row of brick terraced houses.
examples.chinese: 我们居住的街道上全是砖结构的连排房屋。

examples.english: Our bank used to have a branch in every high street.
examples.chinese: 我们银行过去在每条商业大街上都设有一家分行。

examples.english: The small town of Whitehorse, Alaska consists of a half-mile long main street and a few scattered houses.
examples.chinese: 阿拉斯加的怀特霍斯镇是个小镇，由一条半英里长的大街和一些零星的房屋组成。

examples.english: Albert Road is just off the High Street.
examples.chinese: 艾伯特路就在主要商业街附近。

examples.english: They went exploring the dark, narrow back alleys of the old part of town.
examples.chinese: 他们去考察旧城区阴暗狭窄的偏僻小街。

examples.english: It took us almost an hour to find her house in a narrow little back street.
examples.chinese: 我们花了将近一小时才在一条狭窄的偏僻小街上找到了她家。

examples.english: If the car park's full you might find a space in one of the side streets.
examples.chinese: 如果停车场满了，你也许可以在小街上找到停车位。

examples.english: A narrow alley led up between the houses to the main street.
examples.chinese: 房屋中间的一条狭窄小巷通向大街。

examples.english: Women in white aprons gossiped in the alley between the apartment blocks.
examples.chinese: 系着白色围裙的妇女们在公寓大楼间的小巷里说着东家长西家短。

examples.english: She lives in a large house on Acacia Avenue.
examples.chinese: 她住在阿凯舍街上的一幢大宅里。

examples.english: New York's 5th Avenue
examples.chinese: 纽约市第五大街

examples.english: The apartment is located on Jackson Boulevard.
examples.chinese: 这套公寓位于杰克逊大街。

examples.english: New Delhi, with its elegant wide avenues and impressive government buildings, is a complete contrast with Old Delhi.
examples.chinese: 新德里有漂亮宽敞的林荫大道和宏伟的政府大楼，与旧德里形成鲜明的对比。

examples.english: There are plans to replace the old highway with a braod tree-lined boulevard.
examples.chinese: 有计划要修建一条宽敞的林荫大道来取代那条旧公路。

examples.english: We got to know the neighbors on our cul-de-sac quite well.
examples.chinese: 我们与这条死胡同里的邻居都已很熟悉了。

examples.english: Archie lives on a dead end street, so it is very quiet.
examples.chinese: 阿奇住在一条死巷内，所以很安静。

examples.english: Honey, this is a dead end - you'll have to turn around.
examples.chinese: 宝贝，这是条死巷，你得往回走了。

examples.english: She was found dead at her home in Maple Drive.
examples.chinese: 她被人发现在梅普尔路她的家中死去。

examples.english: Fran lives at 37 Appian Close.
examples.chinese: 弗兰住在阿皮安巷37号。

examples.english: Turn left into Badgerly Crescent.
examples.chinese: 向左转入巴杰利新月街。

centers.english: outside a town

examples.english: Route 66 used to be one of the main roads across the States.
examples.chinese: 66号公路曾经是横贯美国的主要道路之一。

examples.english: I like driving on the French roads - they're so straight, and there isn't much traffic.
examples.chinese: 我爱在法国的公路上开车，这些路很直，而且来往的车辆也不多。

examples.english: As you leave the city, turn right and take the road to Madrid.
examples.chinese: 你出了市区后往右拐，然后走去马德里的那条路。

examples.english: The last stretch of road is a narrow lane bordered by trees.
examples.chinese: 这条马路的最后一段是两旁有树木的狭窄小道。

examples.english: We rode our bicycles along pretty country lanes.
examples.chinese: 我们沿着美丽的乡间小路骑车前进。

examples.english: A dirt road ran from the highway past the dump and into some trees.
examples.chinese: 一条泥路从公路那边伸延过来，经过垃圾场进入了树林。！

examples.english: Rain fell continuously and turned the winding dirt road into a river of slippery mud.
examples.chinese: 雨下个不停，把这条蜿蜒曲折的土路变成了一条湿滑的泥流。

examples.english: The track was only wide enough for one car.
examples.chinese: 这条小径只够一辆汽车通行。

centers.english: a wide road for travelling quickly

examples.english: The speed limit on motorways is 70 mph.
examples.chinese: 高速公路的限速是每小时70英里。

examples.english: We headed east on the Pasadena freeway.
examples.chinese: 我们沿着帕萨迪纳高速公路往东行驶。

examples.english: A new motorway service station has been opened to encourage drivers to take a break.
examples.chinese: 一个新的高速公路服务站启用，以方便司机稍事休息。

examples.english: I got onto the highway and drove as fast as I could.
examples.chinese: 我上了高速公路，能开多快就开多快。

examples.english: There's a rest stop somewhere on Highway 61.
examples.chinese: 61号高速公路上有个休息站。

examples.english: They took the expressway to the airport.
examples.chinese: 他们上了去机场的高速公路。

examples.english: Rockland is hard to miss. Route 1 runs right through it.
examples.chinese: 罗克兰这地方很好找，1号公路就穿过那里。

examples.english: the westerly side of Route 128
examples.chinese: 128号公路西侧

examples.english: It will be much quicker if we take the by-pass rather than drive through the middle of town.
examples.chinese: 如果我们走旁道而不在市镇中央行驶，那会快得多。

examples.english: The village has become much quieter since the creation of the by-pass.
examples.chinese: 旁道修筑好以后，村里安静多了。

examples.english: The property is ideally placed for access to the centre and the ring road.
examples.chinese: 这房产的位置很理想，到城中心和环城公路均很方便。

examples.english: a car park beside the inner ring road
examples.chinese: 内环路边的一座停车场

examples.english: We took the beltway around the city.
examples.chinese: 我们走环城公路。

centers.english: a path for people to walk on

examples.english: A narrow path took us down to the river.
examples.chinese: 我们沿着一条狭窄的小径走到河边。

examples.english: He lead me down a path to a farmhouse.
examples.chinese: 他带我沿小道走到一间农舍。

examples.english: Mrs Smith was singing as she came up the garden path.
examples.chinese: 史密斯夫人唱着歌从花园小径走来。

examples.english: Christopher wandered along the sidewalk, looking into store windows.
examples.chinese: 克里斯托弗沿着人行道闲逛，一边浏览商店橱窗。

examples.english: What annoys me is that everyone parks on the pavement in front of our house.
examples.chinese: 使我生气的是人人都把车子停在我家门前的人行道上。

examples.english: They followed the coastal footpath into the village.
examples.chinese: 他们沿着海滨小径走进村子。

examples.english: There are over 1,000 miles of public footpaths within the national park boundaries.
examples.chinese: 这个国家公园内有一千多英里的公共小径。

examples.english: The trail follows the river most of the way to Avalanche Lake.
examples.chinese: 这小径大部分都沿河而行，通向堰塞湖。

centers.english: a way or method of doing something

examples.english: Websites can be designed in many different ways.
examples.chinese: 网站设计可以有许多不同的方法。

examples.english: Visiting a country is a great way to learn its language.
examples.chinese: 去一个国家是学习该国语言很好的方法。

examples.english: There's more than one way to build a house - all builders work differently.
examples.chinese: 造房子不止一种方法—每个建筑商的方法都不一样。

examples.english: I tried every way I could to make the child go to bed, but she refused.
examples.chinese: 我试了各种办法要孩子上床睡觉，但她都不肯。

examples.english: Is there any way of controlling the heating in here?
examples.chinese: 有没有办法调节这里的暖气？

examples.english: I'll show you the way we calculate the figures.
examples.chinese: 我给你看我们是怎么计算这些数值的。

examples.english: What's the best way to remove wine stains?
examples.chinese: 去除酒渍什么方法最好？

examples.english: The only way to lose weight is to eat less.
examples.chinese: 减肥的唯一方法是少吃东西。

examples.english: The government does not believe that this approach is the right way to deal with the problem.
examples.chinese: 政府不相信这是解决该问题的正确方法。

expressions.text: the way to go about something

examples.english: I think you're going about this in completely the wrong way.
examples.chinese: 我认为你做这事的方法完全不对。

examples.english: Printing methods have changed completely in the last twenty years.
examples.chinese: 在过去的20年里，印刷方法完全改变了。

examples.english: In this school, staff are given complete freedom in their choice of language teaching methods.
examples.chinese: 在这所学校，教师有选择语言教学方法的充分自由。

examples.english: Make a list of the different methods you could use in conducting a survey.
examples.chinese: 把可以使用的不同调查方法都列出来。

examples.english: You can choose whichever method of payment you prefer.
examples.chinese: 你可以选择你喜欢的支付方式。

examples.english: Medical science has not yet found a satisfactory method of treating cholera.
examples.chinese: 医学上还未找到令人满意的方法来治疗霍乱。

examples.english: an environmentally-friendly method for treating household waste
examples.chinese: 一种环保的家居垃圾处理方法

examples.english: The main advantage of this approach is its simplicity.
examples.chinese: 这种方法最大的优点是简单。

examples.english: Today's approach to raising children is very different from 40 years ago.
examples.chinese: 现在的育儿方式与40年前大不相同。

examples.english: Space scientists had to adopt a whole new approach to design and construction.
examples.chinese: 航天科学家在设计和建造方面必须采用一种全新的方法。

examples.english: More and more heart patients are surviving thanks to improved surgical techniques.
examples.chinese: 由于外科技术的改进，越来越多的心脏病患者存活下来。

examples.english: helpful tips on how to improve your exam technique
examples.chinese: 提高应试技巧的有用提示

examples.english: Chapter 6 describes useful techniques for creating on-screen filing systems that really work.
examples.chinese: 第六章描述确实可行的建立屏幕存档系统的实用技巧。

examples.english: We will continue to update our sales strategy.
examples.chinese: 我们会不断更新销售策略。

examples.english: The government has no long-term strategy for reducing crime.
examples.chinese: 政府没有减少罪案的长期策略。

examples.english: a strategy to reduce the level of teenage smoking
examples.chinese: 减少青少年吸烟：人数的策略

examples.english: I do the cooking and Andrew does the shopping; it's an excellent system.
examples.chinese: 我做饭，安德鲁购物，这个办法很好。

examples.english: I work a lot more quickly now I've developed an efficient system of working.
examples.chinese: 我想出一种高效率的工作方法，现在工作的速度快多了。

examples.english: Ryan thinks he's discovered a system for winning at roulette.
examples.chinese: 瑞安认为自己发现了一种赢轮盘赌的方法。

examples.english: Salesmen use all sorts of clever tactics to persuade people to buy from them.
examples.chinese: 销售人员利用各种聪明的手段说服人们购买。

examples.english: The team was busy discussing tactics for the game.
examples.chinese: 球队在忙着商讨比赛的战术。

examples.english: He played with the confidence of a winning captain, instinctively changing tactics when necessary.
examples.chinese: 他比赛时是个胸有成竹的队长，必要时凭直觉改变策略。

centers.english: the correct way of doing something

examples.english: For details on how to install the program, see the instructions on the right.
examples.chinese: 有关如何安装程序，见右边的说明。

expressions.text: show/teach/tell etc somebody how to do something

examples.english: Could you show me how to work the photocopier?
examples.chinese: 你教我怎么使用这台复印机好吗？

examples.english: My father taught me how to make and mend fishing nets
examples.chinese: 我父亲教过我如何结鱼网和补鱼网。

examples.english: I don't know how to load this thing.
examples.chinese: 我不知道这东西怎么装。

expressions.text: learn/find out/work out etc how to do something

examples.english: Find out how to decorate your own Easter eggs on pages 30-31.
examples.chinese: 30至31页.上有自制复活节彩蛋的方法。

examples.english: I want to get a new passport but I don't know the procedure.
examples.chinese: 我想申领新护照，但不知道如何办手续。

examples.english: What is the procedure for opening a bank account?
examples.chinese: 开银行账户有哪些手续？

examples.english: It is very important to follow the safety procedures laid down in the handbook.
examples.chinese: 遵守手册上写的安全程序非常重要。

examples.english: Always observe the correct procedure for the use of ski-lifts.
examples.chinese: 务必按照正确的步骤乘坐滑雪缆车。

examples.english: Stewards spent hours rehearsing the proper procedure for marshalling the huge crowds expected in the stadium.
examples.chinese: 预计体育馆会出现大批人群，服务员花了几个小时排练控制人群的正确程序。

examples.english: Sorry about the body search. It's just standard procedure.
examples.chinese: 抱歉搜你的身，这只是例行手续。

centers.english: the method you use to achieve something

examples.english: We aim to use peaceful means to bring about change.
examples.chinese: 我们力求使用和平手段实现变革。

examples.english: Education and training are the most effective means of improving the nation's economy.
examples.chinese: 教育和培训是改善国家经济最有效的手段。

examples.english: He came to power by means of a military coup in 1960.
examples.chinese: 1960年，他通过军事政变上台掌权。

examples.english: The judge ruled that Smith had been elected by unlawful means.
examples.chinese: 法官裁定，史密斯利用非法手段当选。

examples.english: E-mail has become an increasingly important means of business communication.
examples.chinese: 电子邮件已成为越来越重要的商业通讯手段。

examples.english: You should not regard the course simply as a means to an end.
examples.chinese: 你不应该认为这门课只是达到目的的手段。

examples.english: Pictures of fleeing refugees were used as an effective propaganda tool against the Communists.
examples.chinese: 出逃难民的照片被用作有效的反共宣传工具。

examples.english: Interest rates are one of the Finance Minister's main tools of economic policy.
examples.chinese: 利率是财政大臣推行经济政策的主要手段之一。

examples.english: Dance and aerobics classes are a useful tool for encouraging girls back to school P.E. lessons.
examples.chinese: 舞蹈班和有氧健身操班是鼓励女孩子回去上学校体育课的有用方法。

examples.english: He's threatening to sue us? That's a tactic he's used before.
examples.chinese: 他威胁说要起诉我们吗？他以前也用过那一招。

examples.english: Giving out criticism rather than praise is a tactic that rarely works in the workplace.
examples.chinese: 只提出批评而不表扬，这种策略在工作场所很少行得通。

examples.english: The question was just a delaying tactic to stop her leaving the room.
examples.chinese: 这问题只是个拖延战术，为的是不让她离开房间。

examples.english: The wide variety of electronic media available on the Internet.
examples.chinese: 互联网上各种各样的电子传播媒介

examples.english: DVDs have quickly become an extremely popular medium for film viewing.
examples.chinese: DVD影碟已迅速成为极受欢迎的观看影片的媒介。

examples.english: the use of TV soap operas as a vehicle for spreading public information
examples.chinese: 利用电视肥皂剧作为传播公共信息的工具

examples.english: The secret ballot was an important vehicle for freer elections.
examples.chinese: 无记名投票是更自由选举的重要手段。

examples.english: We explored every possible avenue, but still couldn't come up with a solution.
examples.chinese: 我们研究了各个可能的途径，但还是想不出解决方法。

centers.english: a way of achieving success, happiness etc
centers.chinese: 得到成功、快乐等的方法

examples.english: Her political career followed the usual route of local and then national government.
examples.chinese: 她的政治生涯按照常规途径，先是地方政府，再到中央政府。

examples.english: There's more than one route to a successful marriage.
examples.chinese: 成功的婚姻不止一种途径。

examples.english: the path to happiness and enlightenment
examples.chinese: 通往快乐和觉悟之路

examples.english: In all types of advice work, listening is the key.
examples.chinese: 在各种咨询工作中，聆听是关键。

examples.english: What's the key to getting a good night's sleep?
examples.chinese: 晚上睡得好的关键是什么？

examples.english: We feel that our policy of low-price products in plain packaging is the key to our success.
examples.chinese: 我们认为，包装朴实的低价产品是我们成功的要诀。

examples.english: I don't know what her secret is but she always gets top marks in exams.
examples.chinese: 我不知道她有什么秘诀，但她考试总是名列前茅。

examples.english: Hollywood stars reveal their beauty secrets in next month's edition.
examples.chinese: 好莱坞明星在下月的杂志中透露她们的美容秘诀。

examples.english: Mr. Ritchie, you're a millionaire at the age of twenty. What's the secret of your success?
examples.chinese: 里奇先生，你20岁就成了百万富翁，你成功的秘诀是什么？

centers.english: a clever or dishonest way of getting what you want
centers.chinese: 得到想要之物的精明或不诚实的方法

examples.english: The religious element of their election campaign was a cynical ploy.
examples.chinese: 他们选举运动中的宗教元素是一种不择手段的伎俩。

examples.english: He's not really ill, it's just a ploy to make us feel sorry for him.
examples.chinese: 他不是真的生病，这只是他博取我们同情的伎俩。

examples.english: He used every device possible to prevent inspectors from entering the premises.
examples.chinese: 他用尽一切可能的手段阻止检查员进入工作场所。

examples.english: Commissions and inquiries are little more than a device to allow politicians to put off taking decisions.
examples.chinese: 成立委员会进行调查只不过是让政客推迟作出决定的花招。

expressions.text: ways and means of doing something

examples.english: Dealers have ways and means of making people smuggle drugs for them.
examples.chinese: 贩毒分子有办法让人为他们走私毒品。

centers.english: the way in which something is done

examples.english: How do you get your CD player to work?
examples.chinese: 你是怎么把CD播放器弄响的？

examples.english: We don't know how she managed to escape.
examples.chinese: 我们不知道她是如何逃脱的。

examples.english: My dad's teaching me how to use email.
examples.chinese: 爸爸在教我如何使用电子邮件。

examples.english: She told me how to get to the Johnsons’ house.
examples.chinese: 她告诉我如何去约翰逊家。

examples.english: You have to fold the corners back like this.
examples.chinese: 你得把角往回折叠，就像这样。

examples.english: The program works something like this.
examples.chinese: 这个程序的工作方式大致就是这样。

examples.english: There's a bus strike, but I'm sure Ian will get here somehow.
examples.chinese: 公共汽车工人在罢工，但我肯定伊恩总会有办法来的。

examples.english: The newspaper had somehow got hold of some secret government papers.
examples.chinese: 报纸不知怎么拿到了政府的一些秘密文件。

examples.english: I'll find out her address somehow or other.
examples.chinese: 我会想办法查到她的地址。

examples.english: They got the information by bribing officials.
examples.chinese: 他们贿赂官员获取情报。

examples.english: She earns a living by selling insurance.
examples.chinese: 她以推销保险为生。

examples.english: FBI officers recorded the conversation by means of a tiny bug hidden in the phone.
examples.chinese: 联邦调查局人员通过藏在电话里的微型窃听器录下了谈话。

examples.english: She paid for the goods by means of a stolen credit card.
examples.chinese: 她用偷来的信用卡买东西。

centers.english: the way someone behaves or does something
centers.chinese: 某人的行为或做事的方式

examples.english: Losing a job affects different people in different ways.
examples.chinese: 失业对不同的人有不同的影响。

examples.english: I just love the way she laughs.
examples.chinese: 我就是喜欢她笑的样子。

examples.english: I could tell by the way he looked at me that he was annoyed.
examples.chinese: 从他看我的样子我就知道他生气了。

examples.english: The younger girls admired Louise, and tried to copy her way of dressing and talking.
examples.chinese: 年纪较小的女孩子崇拜露易丝，力图模仿她的穿着打扮和言谈方式。

examples.english: We try to treat all the children in the same way.
examples.chinese: 我们尽量对所有孩子一视同仁。

examples.english: The doctor had a relaxed and friendly manner.
examples.chinese: 那位医生态度轻松、友善。

examples.english: a young man with a slightly shy, awkward manner
examples.chinese: 一个态度有点腼腆、不自然的年轻人

examples.english: Have you noticed how she reacts when you mention her husband?
examples.chinese: 你有没有注意到你提起她丈夫时她的反应？

examples.english: Just watch how he tricks the other player into going in the wrong direction.
examples.chinese: 你就看他是怎么欺骗对方球员跑错方向的。

examples.english: Cameron found my style aggressive, although I thought I was just being direct and honest.
examples.chinese: 卡梅伦觉得我的作风咄咄逼人，但我认为我只是直接和坦率。

examples.english: Her friendly style of management works well with small groups of people.
examples.chinese: 她客气友善的管理风格适用于人数少的小组。

examples.english: an authoritarian style of leadership
examples.chinese: 专制的领导风格

centers.english: done in a particular way

examples.english: She was looking at me in a very strange way.
examples.chinese: 她很奇怪地看着我。

examples.english: The wedding ceremony was conducted in quite a formal manner.
examples.chinese: 婚礼办得相当正式。

examples.english: There's no reason why we can't behave in a civilized fashion even though we're getting divorced.
examples.chinese: 虽然我们要离婚，但为什么就不能表现得客客气气的呢？

examples.english: A sign warned motorists to drive with care.
examples.chinese: 有一块告示牌警告司机小心驾驶。

examples.english: He has borne his illness with great courage.
examples.chinese: 他以极大的勇气忍受着病痛。

examples.english: They set about tackling the problem with a great deal of enthusiasm.
examples.chinese: 他们以极大的热情着手处理那个问题。

examples.english: ‘My daughter's been selected for the Olympic team,’ she said, with understandable pride.
examples.chinese: “我女儿入选了奥运会参赛队。”她说道，话语中带着合情合理的自豪。

examples.english: You mustn't talk to people like that - it's very rude.
examples.chinese: 你不可以那样对人说话一那是非常粗鲁的。

examples.english: They were all waving their arms around, like this.
examples.chinese: 他们都挥动着手臂，就像这样。

examples.english: He stood bolt upright, like a soldier.
examples.chinese: 他站得笔直，就像一名军人。

examples.english: He moves and talks just like his father.
examples.chinese: 他的言谈举止就像他父亲。

examples.english: Although he was educated in India, he went to an English-style boarding school.
examples.chinese: 他虽然是在印度受教育，但他上的是一所英式的寄宿学校。

examples.english: They live in a beautiful little country-style house on the edge of town.
examples.chinese: 他们住在镇边缘一幢小小的美丽的乡村式房子里。

examples.english: He wore his gun at the hip, cowboy-style.
examples.chinese: 他把枪挎在腰上，像牛仔那样。

examples.english: The school was run along almost military lines.
examples.chinese: 该校几乎是军事化管理。

examples.english: We must have been thinking along the same lines, because we both said together, ‘Let's get out of here!’
examples.chinese: 我们肯定想的一样，因为我们异口同声说：“让我们离开这里吧！”

examples.english: Dreen looked as if he'd seen a ghost.
examples.chinese: 德伦看上去像见到鬼似的。

examples.english: She moved her legs slowly, as though in pain.
examples.chinese: 她慢慢地挪动双腿，好像很痛。

examples.english: The affair had been conducted with an air of mystery which he disliked.
examples.chinese: 这件事做得神秘兮兮的，他不喜欢这样。

examples.english: Lila came out into the yard with an air of happy confidence.
examples.chinese: 莉拉带着高兴又自信的神情走出来到了院子里。

centers.english: the way to go from one place to another
centers.chinese: 从一地去另一地的路线

examples.english: The road was blocked, so we came back a different way.
examples.chinese: 这条路给堵住了，所以我们走了另一条路回来。

examples.english: Are you sure this is the way?
examples.chinese: 你肯定是这条路吗？

examples.english: Is this the way to Grand Central Station?
examples.chinese: 去中央火车站是走这条路吗?

examples.english: I think this is the quickest way into town.
examples.chinese: 我认为走这条路线进城最快。

examples.english: Do you think you can find the way home by yourself?
examples.chinese: 你认为你自己能找到回家的路吗？

examples.english: I don't recognize this part of town - we must have come the wrong way.
examples.chinese: 镇上的这块地方我认不出来—我们肯定走错路了。

examples.english: Will you come with me? I don't know the way.
examples.chinese: 你跟我一起去好吗？我不认识路。

examples.english: Can you tell me how to get to the Piazza Venezia?
examples.chinese: 你能告诉我威尼斯广场怎么走吗？

examples.english: Come with me. I know how to get there.
examples.chinese: 跟我来，我知道怎么去那里。

examples.english: If you don't enjoy driving on the main highways, try some of the rural routes.
examples.chinese: 你驾车要是不喜欢走大路，可以走走乡村邮道。

examples.english: It looked as though the most direct route was through the forest.
examples.chinese: 看起来最直接的路线好像是穿越森林。

examples.english: I try to vary my route to and from work a little.
examples.chinese: 我尽量在上下班时走不同的路线。

examples.english: There are two routes we can take - this one along the coast or this one through the mountains.
examples.chinese: 我们有两条路线可以走——这一条是沿着海岸走，这一条是穿越山区。

examples.english: Taxi-drivers know all the short cuts.
examples.chinese: 出租车司机所有近路都知道。

examples.english: Let's take a short cut across the field.
examples.chinese: 我们抄近路，从田里穿过去吧。

examples.english: I checked the directions and turned left as I was told to.
examples.chinese: 我查了一下路线指示，然后照上面所说的向左转。

examples.english: The letter contained a wedding invitation and directions to the church.
examples.chinese: 信里面有一张婚礼请柬和去教堂的路线说明。

examples.english: If you follow these directions you'll have no problem finding the house.
examples.chinese: 如果你照着这些路线指示走，便很容易找到那幢房子。

centers.english: to find out how to get to a place by using maps
centers.chinese: 使用地图找出如何去某地

examples.english: Unable to find our way, we stopped at a local hotel to ask directions.
examples.chinese: 我们找不到路，便在一家当地旅馆停下来问路。

examples.english: Somehow, I managed to find my way out of the forest.
examples.chinese: 不管怎样，我想办法找到了走出森林的路。

examples.english: If I take you there, do you think you'll be able to find your own way back?
examples.chinese: 如果我带你去那里，你觉得你自己能找到回来的路吗？

examples.english: I don't mind driving but I'd like you to navigate.
examples.chinese: 由我来开车没关系，但是我要你来领路。

examples.english: Some birds fly at night and navigate by the stars.
examples.chinese: 有些鸟儿在夜间飞行，靠星星来指引方向。

examples.english: The fog and heavy rain made navigation difficult.
examples.chinese: 有雾加上大雨使辨认方向很困难。

centers.english: the outside part of an object

examples.english: The plant has light green leaves with silver marks on their upper surfaces.
examples.chinese: 这种植物的叶子呈淡绿色，叶面有银白色的斑点。

examples.english: When using glue, make sure both surfaces are completely clean.
examples.chinese: 使用这种胶水，两个表面都一定要非常干净。

examples.english: Half-empty glasses covered every flat surface in the room.
examples.chinese: 房间里凡是平的地方都有半空的杯子。

examples.english: Exfoliators remove dead cells from the surface of your skin.
examples.chinese: 去角质霜可以去除肌肤表面的死细胞。

examples.english: In a kitchen all work surfaces should be kept spotlessly clean.
examples.chinese: 厨房的所有工作台必须保持一尘不染。

examples.english: A cube has six sides.
examples.chinese: 立方体有六个面。

examples.english: Please use both sides of the paper to write your answers.
examples.chinese: 请利用纸的正反两面答题。

examples.english: The word FRAGILE was written on every side of the box in big, red letters.
examples.chinese: 箱子的每一面都写着红色大字“易碎品”。

examples.english: I'll paint the other side of the fence after lunch.
examples.chinese: 篱笆的另一面我午饭后再漆。

examples.english: There were many unsuccessful attempts to climb the North Face of Mount Everest.
examples.chinese: 有许多人试图攀登珠穆朗玛峰北坡，但都未能成功。

examples.english: One of the faces of the cube has a line across it.
examples.chinese: 立方体的其中一面上有一条线。

examples.english: The cliff face was starting to crumble into the sea.
examples.chinese: 悬崖表面开始崩塌，碎石坠入大海。

examples.english: This jewellery box would be worth a lot of money if the top wasn't chipped.
examples.chinese: 这个珠宝盒如果不是盖面上有缺损的话，可以值很多钱。

examples.english: a dressing-table with a glass top
examples.chinese: 有玻璃台面的梳妆台

examples.english: The top of the piano was covered with a lace cloth.
examples.chinese: 钢琴的上面盖着一块蕾丝纱。

centers.english: the top part of an area of water or land

examples.english: The moon's surface is covered with rocks and dust.
examples.chinese: 月球表面全是岩石和尘埃。

examples.english: She watched as the bubbles rose to the surface and popped.
examples.chinese: 她看着泡泡升上水面，然后破裂。

examples.english: Leaves floated on the surface of the pool.
examples.chinese: 叶子漂浮在池塘水面上。

examples.english: The clay is about a metre below the surface of the soil.
examples.chinese: 黏土在泥土下面1米左右深的地方。

centers.english: the middle

examples.english: ‘Did you enjoy the movie?’ ‘It was OK but I got a little bored towards the middle.’
examples.chinese: “你喜欢这部电影吗？”“还可以，只是看到中间时我觉得有一点不耐烦。”

examples.english: Gary rowed out towards the middle of the lake.
examples.chinese: 加里朝着湖心划去。

examples.english: It was the middle of summer.
examples.chinese: 正是仲夏时节。

examples.english: Going through the middle of Tokyo in the rush hour can be a nightmare.
examples.chinese: 在交通高峰时通过东京市中心可能犹如一场噩梦。

examples.english: The flower has white petals, and is deep pink at the centre.
examples.chinese: 这种花长着白色花瓣，中心是深紫色的。

examples.english: I love chocolates with soft centers.
examples.chinese: 我爱吃软夹心巧克力。

examples.english: Draw a line through the center of the circle.
examples.chinese: 通过圆心画一条线。

expressions.text: at the centre/in the centre (of something)

examples.english: A bomb has exploded in the crowded business district in the centre of the old city.
examples.chinese: 一颗炸弹在旧城区中心拥挤的商业区爆炸了。

examples.english: The women all wore a red dot right in the centre of their foreheads.
examples.chinese: 那些妇女的额头正中都画着一粒红点。

examples.english: The hotel is located in the heart of Moscow.
examples.chinese: 这家旅馆位于莫斯科市中心。

examples.english: a quiet village in the heart of the English countryside
examples.chinese: 英国郊外中心地区的一座宁静的小村庄

examples.english: The Earth has a solid inner core 2500 km in diameter.
examples.chinese: 地球有个实心内核，其直径有2,500公里。

examples.english: Only the core of the volcano remained.
examples.chinese: 只有火山的中心部分保存了下来。

centers.english: in the middle

examples.english: At the back there was a small garden with a fishpond in the middle.
examples.chinese: 后面有个小花园，花园中央有个鱼池。

examples.english: I was never at the top of my class. I was somewhere in the middle, I suppose.
examples.chinese: 我从没有在班里名列前茅，估计是在中游位置。

examples.english: Lizzie woke up in the middle of the night with a toothache.
examples.chinese: 莉齐半夜里被牙痛弄醒了。

examples.english: At the time, the country was in the middle of an economic recession.
examples.chinese: 当时这个国家正处于经济衰退中。

examples.english: You'll find the scissors in the middle drawer of my desk.
examples.chinese: 你可以在我课桌的中间那格抽屉里找到剪刀。

examples.english: Jane was wearing a gold ring on her middle finger.
examples.chinese: 简的中指上戴着一枚金戒指。

examples.english: There were three children in my family, and I was the middle one.
examples.chinese: 我家共有三个子女，我是中间的一个。

examples.english: The houses face onto a central courtyard.
examples.chinese: 这些房子都面朝一个中心庭院。

examples.english: the tropical rainforest in central Africa
examples.chinese: 中非的热带雨林

examples.english: central London
examples.chinese: 伦敦市中心区

examples.english: On the center panel of the screen there is a painting of a Greek goddess.
examples.chinese: 围屏中间那一块是一幅希腊的女神图。

examples.english: There's usually a picture of some glamorous girl on the centre page.
examples.chinese: 通常在中间页上都有一幅美女的图片。

examples.english: It was a huge room with a high ceiling and an oak table in the centre.
examples.chinese: 那是个很大的房间，屋顶很高，中央放着一张橡木桌子。

examples.english: At the center of the atom is the nucleus.
examples.chinese: 在原子的中心是原子核。

examples.english: The city of Turin stands at the centre of the Piedmontese plain.
examples.chinese: 都灵市位于皮埃蒙特平原的中心地带。

examples.english: Our car broke down halfway across the bridge.
examples.chinese: 我们的车在桥中间抛了锚。

examples.english: We were halfway down the mountain when it started snowing.
examples.chinese: 我们下山到半途中，天开始下雪了。

examples.english: Joe was pretty unhappy and left the college halfway through the year.
examples.chinese: 乔很不开心，在学年中段离开了大学。

examples.english: The Scots opened up a 29-17 lead, and at the halfway mark they were still in front.
examples.chinese: 苏格兰人开场后以29比17领先，到半场时他们仍然领先。

examples.english: The house was built in the mid-18th century.
examples.chinese: 这幢房子是18世纪中期建造的。

examples.english: As the value of the US dollar fell in the mid-1980s, so did the value of UK reserves.
examples.chinese: 20世纪80年代中期随着美元币值的下跌，英国的货币储备价值也随之下跌。

examples.english: Let's meet again mid-week.
examples.chinese: 我们周中再见面吧。

examples.english: The islands lie in the Indian Ocean midway between Madagascar and Tanzania.
examples.chinese: 这些岛屿位于马达加斯加和坦桑尼亚中间的印度洋上。

examples.english: United took the lead midway through the first half.
examples.chinese: 曼联队上半场比赛进行至一半时领先。

examples.english: At a guess, I'd say he was midway between 50 and 60.
examples.chinese: 我估计他年龄是55岁左右。

examples.english: The Redskins and the Giants were the leaders as the midpoint in the season drew near.
examples.chinese: 红皮队和巨人队在赛季进行到将近一半时占据领先位置。

examples.english: By the midpoint of the twentieth century, the economy had begun to improve.
examples.chinese: 到了20世纪中叶，经济开始好转。

centers.english: the lowest part of something

examples.english: The bottom of the mountain was strewn with rocks and debris.
examples.chinese: 山脚下满布岩石和瓦砾。

expressions.text: on/around/at etc the bottom of something

examples.english: There's a small creek at the bottom of the hill.
examples.chinese: 山下有一条小溪。

examples.english: The answers are at the bottom of page 62.
examples.chinese: 答案在第六十二页下端。

examples.english: Your account number is the last set of numbers on the bottom of your cheque.
examples.chinese: 你的账号是支票底部的最后一组数字。

examples.english: The lamp has a square base.
examples.chinese: 这盏灯有一个方形底座。

examples.english: The base of the column was cracked.
examples.chinese: 柱基裂开了。

centers.english: the lowest one of two or more things that are on top of each other
centers.chinese: 两层或两层以上的东西中最底层

examples.english: The bottom layer of the cake is made of chocolate and strawberries.
examples.chinese: 蛋糕的最底层是用巧克力和草莓做成的。

examples.english: She looked in the bottom drawer of the chest.
examples.chinese: 她在柜子最下面的抽屉里翻找。

examples.english: We drove onto the lower deck of the ferry.
examples.chinese: 我们把车开到了渡轮的下层甲板上。

examples.english: The dentist filled two teeth in my lower jaw.
examples.chinese: 医生把我下颌牙齿中的两颗补了一下。

examples.english: The baby's lower lip quivered and then she began crying.
examples.chinese: 婴儿的下唇微微颤抖，然后就开始哭了。

centers.english: the bottom part of something such as a box, cup, or lake
centers.chinese: 盒子、杯子、湖泊等的底部

examples.english: The bottom of the pond was dark and dirty.
examples.chinese: 水塘底下又黑又脏。

examples.english: Susan found the keys at the bottom of her handbag.
examples.chinese: 苏珊在手提包底部找到钥匙。

examples.english: Heavy objects should be packed in the bottom of your suitcase.
examples.chinese: 你要把重的东西放到手提箱的最下面。

examples.english: The boys found some bones on the floor of the cave.
examples.chinese: 男孩子们在洞穴底部发现了一些骸骨。

examples.english: the floor of the Mediterranean
examples.chinese: 地中海海底

examples.english: They're still attempting to recover the plane's wreckage from the ocean floor.
examples.chinese: 他们仍在努力想要从海底寻回飞机残骸。

examples.english: Smooth stones covered the creek bed.
examples.chinese: 小溪的底部满是光滑的石块。

centers.english: the flat bottom surface on the outside of an object

examples.english: I flipped over the rock and saw that the bottom was covered with insects.
examples.chinese: 我把石头翻过来，看到底下都是昆虫。

examples.english: The bottom of the glass is wet. You'd better put a napkin under it.
examples.chinese: 玻璃杯底是湿的，你最好在下面放一块餐巾。

examples.english: There are some markings on the bottom of the vase.
examples.chinese: 花瓶底部有些印纹。

examples.english: When she drove over the curb, she damaged the underside of the car.
examples.chinese: 她开车越过路缘时把车子底部给损坏了。

examples.english: Workers are repairing the underside of the bridge.
examples.chinese: 工人正在维修桥梁的底部。

examples.english: They used to put chalk dust on the underneath of the horse's saddle.
examples.chinese: 他们以前常在马鞍底下撒些粉笔灰。

centers.english: next to the bottom of a mountain etc

examples.english: Jordan waited for her at the bottom of the stairs.
examples.chinese: 乔丹在楼梯底下等她。

examples.english: At the bottom of the ladder there was a large tin of paint.
examples.chinese: 梯子底下有一大罐油漆。

examples.english: The inn is situated in a beautiful village at the foot of Mt. Mitchell.
examples.chinese: 这家小旅馆坐落于米切尔山山脚下一座美丽的村庄里。

centers.english: the part of something that is nearest to you or furthest away from the back
centers.chinese: 离你最近或离后面最远的部分

examples.english: She was wearing a T-shirt with a picture of an elephant on the front.
examples.chinese: 她穿着一件T恤衫，正面印着一头大象。

examples.english: Could you cut my hair short in the back but leave it a little longer in the front?
examples.chinese: 请把我的头发后面剪短，但前面留得稍稍长一点好吗?

examples.english: They painted the front of the house bright green.
examples.chinese: 他们把房子正面漆成鲜绿色。

examples.english: He wrote her name on the front and back of the envelope.
examples.chinese: 他在信封的正、反面写上她的名字。

centers.english: the part of a space, room, vehicle etc that is furthest forward
centers.chinese: 空间、房间或车辆等最前面的部分

examples.english: Let's get to the concert early so we can sit near the front.
examples.chinese: 我们早点去音乐厅，这样可以坐得靠前些。

examples.english: The teacher was standing at the front of the classroom.
examples.chinese: 教师站在教室前面。

examples.english: There's only room for two people in the front of the car.
examples.chinese: 汽车前面只有两个人坐的空间。

examples.english: At the front of the cage was a dish with a few scraps of food in it.
examples.chinese: 笼子前面有一个碟子，里面盛了一些食物碎屑。

centers.english: the position at the front of a crowd or line of people, cars etc
centers.chinese: 一群人或一队人、汽车等前面的位置

examples.english: I stood in the line for two hours before I got to the front.
examples.chinese: 我在队伍里站了两个小时才排到了前面。

examples.english: Joseph pushed to the front of the crowd to see what was happening.
examples.chinese: 约瑟夫挤到人群前面去看发生了什么事。

examples.english: Halfway through the race, Cami was still at the front of the pack.
examples.chinese: 赛程跑至一半时凯米仍然处于前列位置。

centers.english: at, in, or towards the front

examples.english: You should have knocked on the front door.
examples.chinese: 你应该敲前门才对。

examples.english: The dog rested its head on its front paws.
examples.chinese: 那条狗把头靠在前爪上。

examples.english: Laura always sits in the front row at the movies.
examples.chinese: 劳拉看电影的时候总是坐在前排。

examples.english: He leaned across the front seat of the car and grabbed her arm as she tried to get out.
examples.chinese: 他倾身横过汽车前排座位，在她要出去时抓住了她的手臂。

examples.english: There was a large picture of Bush on the front page of the evening newspaper.
examples.chinese: 晚报头版上登了很大一幅布什的照片。

examples.english: He sat in front beside the driver.
examples.chinese: 他坐在前排靠司机旁边的位置。

examples.english: Miss Abbot led me through the classroom to an empty desk in the front.
examples.chinese: 阿博特小姐领着我穿过教室到前面一张空着的书桌前。

examples.english: We were looking for a two-storey building with a verandah in the front.
examples.chinese: 我们在找一幢两层高的、前面带阳台的房子。

examples.english: Why don't you sit up front with the driver so you can give him directions?
examples.chinese: 你就和司机一起坐在前排为他指方向吧，怎么样？

examples.english: The only people who laughed were the American soldiers who sat up front.
examples.chinese: 只有坐在最前排的美国兵在笑。

examples.english: A man at the head of the line was arguing with the sales lady.
examples.chinese: 排在最前面的那个男人正跟女售货员吵架。

examples.english: Two soldiers carried flags at the head of the procession.
examples.chinese: 队伍最前面有两名士兵举着旗帜。

examples.english: Mr Hoffman stepped forward to collect his prize.
examples.chinese: 霍夫曼先生走上前去领奖品。

examples.english: Can we sit a little further forward? I can't see from here.
examples.chinese: 我们往前一点坐好吗？我在这儿看不见。

examples.english: The figures in the foreground are painted more brightly than those farther away.
examples.chinese: 前景里的人物比起后景里的人物画得更明亮。

examples.english: ‘That's me,’ he said, pointing to a child in the foreground of the faded photograph.
examples.chinese: “那是我。”他说道，一边指着在那张褪了色的照片上前景的一个孩子。

centers.english: at, in, or towards a position that is further forward than you
centers.chinese: 处在或朝着比你所在的位置更前面的位置

examples.english: The car in front started to slow down.
examples.chinese: 前面那辆汽车开始减速。

examples.english: Ellie walked in front, carrying the baby.
examples.chinese: 埃莉抱着婴儿走在前面。

examples.english: Because of the fog, we could only see a few yards in front of us.
examples.chinese: 因为有雾，我们只看得见前面几码远。

examples.english: He looked ahead down the road towards the village.
examples.chinese: 他顺着那条路朝村子的方向往前望去。

examples.english: Let Tom walk ahead of you - he knows this path very well.
examples.chinese: 让汤姆走在你前面一这条路他很熟悉。

examples.english: Albert was staring straight ahead, pretending not to listen.
examples.chinese: 艾伯特盯着前方看，装作没在听。

examples.english: Traffic is awfully slow - there must be an accident up ahead.
examples.chinese: 路上车辆跑得慢极了，前面一定出事故了。

examples.english: Up ahead we could see the bright lights of the city coming into view.
examples.chinese: 我们可以看见该市明亮的灯光在前面不远处闪烁。

centers.english: directly in front of a person, building etc
centers.chinese: 在某人、建筑物等的正前方

examples.english: The kids are playing out in front.
examples.chinese: 小孩子正在房子前面玩。

examples.english: There was a tall man standing in front of me, so I couldn't see what was happening.
examples.chinese: 有个高个子男人站在我前面，所以我看不见发生了什么事。

examples.english: She parked the car right in front of the main entrance.
examples.chinese: 她把汽车停在大门的正前方。

centers.english: the part that is furthest from the middle

examples.english: Two men were sitting at the side of the road.
examples.chinese: 两个男人坐在路边。

examples.english: Dancers came on from both sides of the stage.
examples.chinese: 舞蹈演员从舞台的两边上台。

examples.english: People had formed a long queue that went around the sides of the room.
examples.chinese: 人们贴着房间的四边排成了很长的队伍。

examples.english: Just put your things over there on the side.
examples.chinese: 把你的东西放在那个边上。

examples.english: There were high walls on all four sides of the prison yard.
examples.chinese: 监狱放风场的四周都是高墙。

examples.english: A group of children were playing at the water's edge.
examples.chinese: 一群孩子在水边玩耍。

examples.english: The edges of the carpet were torn.
examples.chinese: 地毯的边缘磨破了。

examples.english: Keep away from the edge of the cliff - you might fall.
examples.chinese: 不要靠近悬崖的边缘—你可能会掉下去的。

examples.english: He set the ashtray down on the edge of the table.
examples.chinese: 他把烟灰缸放在桌子的边上。

examples.english: We camped right at the edge of the desert.
examples.chinese: 我们就在沙漠的边缘露营。

examples.english: He cut a thick slice from the end of the loaf.
examples.chinese: 他从面包的一头切下厚厚的一片。

examples.english: Mrs Deacon sat at one end of the long table and I sat at the other.
examples.chinese: 迪肯夫人坐在长桌的这一头，我坐在长桌的那一头。

examples.english: There are scoreboards at both ends of the stadium.
examples.chinese: 体育场里两头都有记分牌。

examples.english: A boy was carrying a stick across his shoulders with a pail of water at each end.
examples.chinese: 一个男孩用棍棒挑着两桶水。

examples.english: Someone had written a note in the left-hand margin.
examples.chinese: 有人在左边的空白处写了一个批注。

examples.english: She widened the margins so her essay would look longer.
examples.chinese: 她把页边放宽，使论文显得长一些。

centers.english: one of the two areas on either side of a line, wall, river etc

examples.english: A small river cuts through the property with the house on one side and the gardens on the other.
examples.chinese: 一条小河穿过这个庄园，小河的一边是房子，另一侧是花园。

examples.english: This side of the fence is private property.
examples.chinese: 篱笆的这边是私人地产。

examples.english: From the other side of the wall came the sounds of children playing.
examples.chinese: 墙那边传来孩子们在玩耍的声音。

examples.english: The sun was setting behind the opposite bank.
examples.chinese: 夕阳落到河对岸后面。

examples.english: They were building a new theatre on the south bank of the Thames.
examples.chinese: 他们在泰晤士河的南岸修建一家新的剧院。

examples.english: Portland is a sprawling city on the banks of the Willamette River.
examples.chinese: 波特兰是一座布局凌乱的城市，位于威拉米特河的两岸。

centers.english: one of two sides of something thin and flat
centers.chinese: 薄而扁的物体的两面之一

examples.english: Instructions on how to get there are on the other side.
examples.chinese: 到那里怎么走的指示写在反面。

examples.english: Look at the beautiful decorations on this side of the coin.
examples.chinese: 你看硬币的这一面，装饰图案很漂亮。

centers.english: not the front, back, top, or bottom

examples.english: One of its sides was covered with intricate patterns.
examples.chinese: 其中的一面有复杂的图案。

examples.english: A truck ran into the side of the car, killing the driver and two passengers.
examples.chinese: 一辆卡车撞到轿车侧面，造成司机及两名乘客死亡。

examples.english: Something had been inscribed on the side of the box.
examples.chinese: 盒子的侧面刻了一些东西。

examples.english: There was another entrance at the side of the building.
examples.chinese: 大楼的侧面有另一个入口。

centers.english: the left or right half of an object, area, or road
centers.chinese: 物体、地区或道路的左半边或右半边

examples.english: OK, let's have all the girls on this side and all the boys on that side.
examples.chinese: 好了，女孩子都到这边来，男孩子都在那边。

examples.english: You stay on your side of the bed and I'll stay on mine.
examples.chinese: 你睡你的那边，我睡我的这边。

examples.english: The left side of the brain controls the right side of the body.
examples.chinese: 左脑控制身体的右半部分。

examples.english: In Japan they drive on the left-hand side of the road.
examples.chinese: 在日本，汽车靠路的左侧行驶。

centers.english: towards the side, or from side to side

examples.english: The car skidded sideways off the road.
examples.chinese: 汽车发生侧滑，冲出了马路。

examples.english: Tony swayed sideways but caught himself before he fell.
examples.chinese: 托尼摇晃得侧着身子，但他还是稳住了自己，没有摔倒。

examples.english: If we turn the chest sideways, I think we can get it through the door.
examples.chinese: 如果我们把箱子侧过来，我想就可以通过门口了。

examples.english: She pushed her plate to one side and leaned forward.
examples.chinese: 她把盘子推到一边，然后向前弯身。

examples.english: Could you move a little to the side so we can get past?
examples.chinese: 你往那边挪挪让我们过去好吗？

examples.english: The tractor swayed from side to side, almost throwing me out of my seat.
examples.chinese: 拖拉机左右摇晃，差一点把我抛出座位。

examples.english: Ezra rocked impatiently from side to side as he waited.
examples.chinese: 埃兹拉在等候时着急得左右摇晃。

centers.english: about a subject or person

examples.english: Toby talks about you all the time.
examples.chinese: 托比总是说起你。

examples.english: This leaflet should answer all the questions you have about switching to digital TV.
examples.chinese: 这本小册子应该可以解答你关于如何转换到数字电视的所有问题。

examples.english: I'm reading a really good book at the moment - it's about the French Revolution.
examples.chinese: 我正在看一本非常好的书，是关于法国大革命的。

examples.english: What's all the fuss about?
examples.chinese: 干吗这么手忙脚乱的?

examples.english: I've been thinking about what you said, and I've decided that you're right.
examples.chinese: 我一直在考虑你的话，现在我肯定你是对的。

examples.english: Lucia Piatti has written several books on the subject.
examples.chinese: 露西娅·皮亚蒂写了好几本关于该题材的书。

examples.english: If you want any advice on where to stay, Jan should be able to help you.
examples.chinese: 如果你对住在哪里需要什么建议的话，简应该能帮助你。

examples.english: His views on women are really old-fashioned.
examples.chinese: 他对女性的看法太陈旧了。

examples.english: Do you have any ideas on where to eat tonight?
examples.chinese: 今晚你想去哪里吃饭?

examples.english: a book on 19th century English Literature
examples.chinese: 一本关于19世纪英国文学的书

examples.english: a lecture on Native American customs and folklore
examples.chinese: 一次关于印第安人习俗和民间传说的讲座

examples.english: Did you see that programme on South Africa last night?
examples.chinese: 昨晚你看了那个关于南非的节目吗?

examples.english: For any details concerning a particular country you should check with the embassy.
examples.chinese: 若想了解有关某个国家的详细情况，应该向大使馆查询。

examples.english: Richard was called in by the police to answer questions concerning the disappearance of Thomas Ripley.
examples.chinese: 理查德被警方传去回答有关托马斯·里普利失踪的问题。

examples.english: If you have any questions regarding any of our services, please feel free to call me.
examples.chinese: 如果你对我们的服务有什么问题，请随时打电话给我。

examples.english: Thank you for your letter regarding the annual subscription to our magazine.
examples.chinese: 您的关于年度订阅我社杂志的信已收到，谢谢。

examples.english: Marie said nothing at all on the subject of Mr Bertram.
examples.chinese: 关于伯特伦先生，玛丽什么都没说。

examples.english: While we're on the subject of money, do you have that $10 you owe me?
examples.chinese: 既然我们谈到钱的问题，那你欠我的十美元能还给我吗？

examples.english: Re planning meeting on Friday, please bring sales figures.
examples.chinese: 关于星期五的策划会议，请把销售数据带来。

examples.english: To: John Deacon. From: Maria Soames. Re: computer system.
examples.chinese: 收件人：约翰·迪肯。发件人：玛丽亚·索姆斯。关于：电脑系统。

examples.english: With regard to the proposed new shopping mall, I would like to add a few remarks to those of the previous speaker.
examples.chinese: 关于提议的这个新的购物中心，我想给前一位的发言补充几句。

examples.english: With regard to your letter concerning my January payment, this matter has now been settled.
examples.chinese: 至于你在信中提到的关于我1月份的付款事项，这件事现已经解决了。

examples.english: Wrt your looking out for a new computer, I saw a good offer in the paper yesterday.
examples.chinese: 关于你留意要买新电脑一事，我昨天在报上看到一个优惠的报价。

examples.english: I'll be contacting Jean tomorrow wrt the Christmas party - is there anything you'd like me to suggest to her?
examples.chinese: 关于圣诞聚会的事，我明天就与琼联系，你有什么要我向她建议的吗？

centers.english: to have something as the main subject

examples.english: The play is about life in the Deep South in the 1930s.
examples.chinese: 该剧讲的是20世纪30年代美国南方腹地的生活。

examples.english: What's tonight's documentary about?
examples.chinese: 今晚的纪录片是关于什么内容的?

examples.english: Have you ever read ‘Hideous Kinky’? It's about an English woman and her daughter travelling in Morocco.
examples.chinese: 你看过《北非情人》吗?是关于一位英国妇女及其女儿在摩洛哥旅行的故事。

examples.english: The story deals with the psychological conflicts between mother and son.
examples.chinese: 这个故事讲的是母子之间的心理冲突。

examples.english: The earliest films made in India dealt with mythological subjects.
examples.chinese: 印度最早期的电影都以神话故事为题材。

examples.english: Elton's books are often concerned with environmental issues.
examples.chinese: 埃尔顿写的书经常涉及环境问题。

examples.english: Much of the material in her early letters concerns events which happened some years before.
examples.chinese: 她早期的信中很多内容都是讲几年前发生的事情。

examples.english: The next chapter will focus on this problem in greater detail.
examples.chinese: 下一章将更详细地讨论这个问题。

examples.english: a weekly magazine mainly focusing on business-related issues
examples.chinese: 一本主要讨论商务问题的周刊

examples.english: The controversy centred on the question of illegal arms sales.
examples.chinese: 争论集中在非法军火销售的问题上。

centers.english: around someone or something

examples.english: A group of students sat around the table chatting.
examples.chinese: 一群学生围坐在桌子旁边聊天。

examples.english: She was wearing a silver chain round her neck.
examples.chinese: 她脖子上戴了一条银项链。

examples.english: On the kitchen table was a package with tape wrapped around it.
examples.chinese: 餐桌上放着一个包裹，上面系着带子。

examples.english: Enemy soldiers were now all around us.
examples.chinese: 这时我们周围全是敌军。

examples.english: At the bottom of the hill was a small pond with trees all round.
examples.chinese: 山麓下是一个小小的池塘，四周都是树。

examples.english: Mountains rose steeply on all sides.
examples.chinese: 四周都是高山耸立。

examples.english: There was the sound of gunfire from all sides.
examples.chinese: 枪声从四面八方传来。

centers.english: to be surrounded by something

examples.english: The tops of the hills were surrounded by clouds.
examples.chinese: 山顶上云雾笼罩。

examples.english: Jill sat on the floor surrounded by boxes.
examples.chinese: 吉尔坐在地上，周围都是箱子。

examples.english: Hoover Dam is ringed by snow-capped mountains that reach high above the desert plain.
examples.chinese: 胡佛大坝被白雪覆盖的山峦包围着，群山高高地耸立在沙漠平原之上。

examples.english: Fifteen minutes after the explosion, the embassy was ringed by police officers and armed guards.
examples.chinese: 爆炸发生15分钟以后，大使馆被警察和武装警卫包围了。

examples.english: I could see the church tower framed by the windows.
examples.chinese: 我通过窗户可以看到教堂的塔楼。

examples.english: Her small face was framed by a mass of red hair
examples.chinese: 一头散乱的红发衬托着她的一张小脸。

examples.english: The fence enclosing the prison compound is constantly patrolled by armed guards.
examples.chinese: 监狱大院四周的围栏有武装警卫在不断地巡逻。

examples.english: The garden was completely enclosed by a high wall.
examples.chinese: 这花园被一堵高墙完全围住。

examples.english: The fish live in a shallow tropical lagoon, which is enclosed by a coral reef.
examples.chinese: 这种鱼生活在由珊瑚礁环绕形成的热带浅水潟湖里。

examples.english: Jerry had to spend two months enclosed in a huge plastic bubble, to prevent him from catching germs from other children.
examples.chinese: 杰里得住在大的透明塑料罩里两个月，以免传染上其他孩子的病菌。

centers.english: to move into a position around someone or something

examples.english: Football fans ran onto the field and surrounded the referee.
examples.chinese: 球迷们冲进球场围住了裁判。

examples.english: Police officers moved to surround Evans as he came out of the courtroom.
examples.chinese: 埃文斯从法庭出来，警察上前围护着他。

examples.english: A crowd of young boys had gathered round to admire the car.
examples.chinese: 一群小伙子围过来羡慕地看着这辆汽车。

examples.english: After supper we gathered around the kitchen table and listened to Grandma tell stories about her childhood.
examples.chinese: 吃过晚饭，我们围坐在餐桌旁边，听祖母讲她童年的故事。

examples.english: Troops encircled the city and began firing rockets at the government buildings.
examples.chinese: 军队包围了城市，开始向政府大楼发射火箭弹。

examples.english: The photo showed the captive sitting down, encircled by several armed men.
examples.chinese: 照片上显示囚徒坐着，由几名武装分子围着。

examples.english: Fire officers asked the people who had crowded round to stand back.
examples.chinese: 消防员叫围观的人群往后站。

examples.english: Dozens of journalists crowded around the Princess and started asking her questions.
examples.chinese: 不少新闻记者围住王妃，开始向她提问。

centers.english: moving in a circle or moving around something
centers.chinese: 绕着圈子移动，或绕着某物移动

examples.english: The Earth goes around the Sun.
examples.chinese: 地球绕着太阳转。

examples.english: The helicopter flew round and round above us.
examples.chinese: 直升机在我们头上盘旋。

examples.english: Birds flew in circles above the lake.
examples.chinese: 鸟儿在湖上盘旋飞翔。

examples.english: As the dog got more and more excited, it started running around in circles.
examples.chinese: 那狗越来越兴奋，竟绕着圈子跑了起来。

examples.english: The plane circled the airport several times before landing.
examples.chinese: 飞机绕着机场飞了好几圈才降落。

examples.english: As we walked along the beach, I could see seagulls circling above the cliffs.
examples.chinese: 我们走在沙滩上，我看到海鸥在悬崖上方盘旋。

examples.english: The satellite will orbit the Earth for the next 15 years.
examples.chinese: 这颗人造卫星将绕地球轨道运行15年。

examples.english: The team confirmed the discovery of a planet orbiting the star 51 Pegasi.
examples.chinese: 该小组确认发现了一颗环绕飞马座51这颗恒星运行的行星。

centers.english: everywhere in the world

examples.english: Everywhere, even in the Antarctic, there are signs that the Earth is getting warmer.
examples.chinese: 各个地方，甚至在南极地区，都有地球变暖的迹象。

examples.english: Women everywhere are beginning to assert their rights.
examples.chinese: 各个地方的妇女都开始坚持自己的权利。

examples.english: Poverty affects children everywhere - not just in developing countries, but in Europe and North America as well.
examples.chinese: 贫穷威胁着各地的孩子——不仅仅在发展中国家，而且还有欧洲和北美。

examples.english: We deliver goods the next day in the UK and within a week everywhere else.
examples.chinese: 英国国内我们第二天把货物送达，其他各地一星期之内送达。

examples.english: There has been a worldwide decrease in the number of whales.
examples.chinese: 鲸的数量在全球各地都减少了。

examples.english: Campaigners are calling for a worldwide ban on the use of land mines.
examples.chinese: 一些活动家在呼吁全球禁止使用地雷。

examples.english: a worldwide TV audience of over a billion people
examples.chinese: 全球超过十亿的电视观众

examples.english: The company employs about 20,000 worldwide.
examples.chinese: 公司在全球聘用了大约20,000人。

examples.english: On the Internet, people can send messages worldwide in seconds.
examples.chinese: 在互联网上，人们瞬间就可以把信息发往世界各地。

examples.english: The Red Cross is a large organization with members all over the world.
examples.chinese: 红十字会是个规模庞大的组织，成员遍布世界各地。

examples.english: Teams from all over the world will compete in next week's tournament.
examples.chinese: 来自世界各地的球队将在下周的锦标赛上进行角逐。

examples.english: All over the world people's lives are being changed by the new technology.
examples.chinese: 在世界各地，新技术正改变着人们的生活。

examples.english: The new global economy is exciting and full of possibilities.
examples.chinese: 新的全球经济令人振奋，充满了机遇。

examples.english: Only the UN can tackle global problems like pollution of the atmosphere.
examples.chinese: 只有联合国才能对付大气污染等全球问题。

examples.english: Anything the US does is likely to have an impact on a global scale.
examples.chinese: 美国的一举一动都有可能产生全球性影响。

examples.english: The goal of the treaty is to reduce the number of nuclear weapons globally.
examples.chinese: 这个条约的目的是要减少全世界的核武器数量。

examples.english: Hollywood films are popular the world over.
examples.chinese: 好莱坞电影在世界各国都很受欢迎。

examples.english: Children the world over love a good story.
examples.chinese: 全世界的孩子都喜欢听好听的故事。

examples.english: Globalization can often lead to the destruction of local customs and cultures.
examples.chinese: 全球化往往会破坏地方习俗和文化。

examples.english: Thanks to globalization, the burger you buy in Moscow is exactly the same as the one you buy in New York.
examples.chinese: 因为是全球一体化，在莫斯科买的汉堡包和在纽约买的一模一样。

examples.english: Anti-globalization protesters clashed with police on the streets of Geneva today.
examples.chinese: 反对全球化的抗议者今天在日内瓦的大街上与警察发生了冲突。

centers.english: everywhere in a place or country
centers.chinese: 在某地或某国的各个地方

examples.english: The whole street was flooded - there was water everywhere.
examples.chinese: 整条街都淹了—到处都是水。

examples.english: Where did you find my keys? I've been looking everywhere for them.
examples.chinese: 你是在哪里找到我的钥匙的？我在到处找呢。

examples.english: You see bank machines everywhere nowadays.
examples.chinese: 如今银行的自动提款机到处都是。

examples.english: They go every place together.
examples.chinese: 他们去哪里都在一起。

examples.english: There were beautiful rice fields everywhere in the region.
examples.chinese: 这一地区到处都是美丽的稻田。

examples.english: Doctors in Colorado, like doctors everywhere else, did not have enough of the vaccine.
examples.chinese: 科罗拉多的医生，一如其他各地的医生，也没有足够的疫苗。

examples.english: We spent two weeks in Mexico and traveled all over.
examples.chinese: 我们在墨西哥逗留了两周，游遍了各个地方。

examples.english: The choir has sung in concerts all over the country.
examples.chinese: 该合唱团在全国各地的演唱会都献唱过。

examples.english: Katie's toys were spread out all over the floor.
examples.chinese: 凯蒂的玩具摊得地板上到处都是。

examples.english: He went all over the place looking for a shop selling corkscrews but couldn't find one.
examples.chinese: 他跑遍了那个地方想找一家卖瓶塞钻的商店，可是找不到。

examples.english: You could hear their laughter throughout the building.
examples.chinese: 整栋大楼里都能听到他们的笑声。

examples.english: The house is in excellent condition with fitted carpets throughout.
examples.chinese: 这房子条件非常好，到处都铺了地毯。

examples.english: There seem to be fountains wherever you look in this park.
examples.chinese: 这座公园里你无论朝哪儿看，好像都有喷泉。

examples.english: He seems to make friends wherever he goes.
examples.chinese: 他好像不管到哪里都能交到朋友。

examples.english: We lived here, there, and everywhere as I was growing up.
examples.chinese: 我从小到大什么地方都住过。

examples.english: The adults sat on the porch while the children ran here, there, and everywhere.
examples.chinese: 大人坐在门廊上，小孩子到处跑。

examples.english: Workers held nationwide strikes and demonstrations all over Spain.
examples.chinese: 西班牙各地工人举行了全国性大罢工和示威游行。

examples.english: A nationwide hunt was launched yesterday for the killer of 13-year-old Nicola Jones.
examples.chinese: 昨天发起了一场全国性的追捕行动，缉拿杀害13岁女孩妮古拉·琼斯的凶手。

examples.english: We have a total of 96 stores nationwide.
examples.chinese: 我们在全国各地一共拥有96家店。

examples.english: There has been widepread flooding in Germany, and the rivers are still rising.
examples.chinese: 德国多个地区遭遇洪水，河水仍在上涨。

examples.english: Government corruption is widespread in the country.
examples.chinese: 在这个国家，政府普遍腐败。

centers.english: in or to any place
centers.chinese: 在任何地方或去任何地方

examples.english: You can buy them anywhere, and they're very cheap.
examples.chinese: 你到处都买得到它们，而且很便宜。

examples.english: We never go any place or do anything interesting.
examples.chinese: 我们从来都不去什么地方，也不做什么有趣的事情。

examples.english: Is there any place in the neighborhood where I can get a quick lunch?
examples.chinese: 这一带有什么地方我可以很快吃个午饭的吗?

examples.english: I'm so happy here. I couldn't possibly imagine living anywhere else.
examples.chinese: 我在这里很开心，想不出还能住在别的什么地方。

examples.english: I don't want that man anywhere near my house.
examples.chinese: 我不想看到那人在我家附近的任何地方出现。

centers.english: not inside a building

examples.english: When I woke up it was still dark outside.
examples.chinese: 我醒来时外面仍漆黑一片。

examples.english: It's such a nice day. Why don't you play outside?
examples.chinese: 天气那么好，你们为什么不出去玩呢？

examples.english: Outside, joggers in shorts and t-shirts ran by.
examples.chinese: 人们穿着短裤和T恤在外面慢跑。

examples.english: Parents stood out in the rain waiting to collect their children from school.
examples.chinese: 家长冒雨站在外面等着接孩子放学。

examples.english: We camped and slept out under the stars every night.
examples.chinese: 每天晚上我们都在星空下扎营露宿。

examples.english: What's that dog doing out there in our yard?
examples.chinese: 那只狗在我们的院子里干什么？

examples.english: We often eat outdoors on summer evenings.
examples.chinese: 夏天的晚上我们经常在室外吃饭。

examples.english: Kids should spend as much time out of doors as possible.
examples.chinese: 小孩子应该尽量多在户外活动。

examples.english: Move the pots outdoors as soon as there is no more danger of frost.
examples.chinese: 如果没有霜冻就立即把盆栽移至户外。

examples.english: Mexicans traditionally dry chillies in the open air.
examples.chinese: 墨西哥人传统上都是在露天晾干辣椒的。

examples.english: It was nice to be out in the open air after being stuck in the office all day.
examples.chinese: 整天窝在办公室里，能去户外走走真好。

centers.english: outside a place, country, organization etc
centers.chinese: 在某个地方、国家、机构等的外面

examples.english: It was the Emperor's first journey outside Japan since 1921.
examples.chinese: 那是天皇自1921年以来第一次走出日本。

examples.english: This is the only museum of its kind outside London.
examples.chinese: 这样的博物馆在伦敦以外的地方这是唯一的一家。

examples.english: He is well-regarded even outside of the company.
examples.chinese: 他甚至在公司以外也备受尊敬。

examples.english: She'd been out of the country for three months, traveling in Europe.
examples.chinese: 那时她已出国三个月，在欧洲旅行。

examples.english: The prisoners spend only four hours a day out of their cells.
examples.chinese: 囚犯每天只有四小时在牢房外面活动。

examples.english: At the time, the country prevented citizens from having any relations with the outside world.
examples.chinese: 那时候，国家不允许人民和外界有任何联系。

examples.english: Many of the prisoners have no contact at all with the outside world.
examples.chinese: 许多囚犯与外面的世界毫无联系。

examples.english: Telephone and cable lines link your home office to the outside world.
examples.chinese: 电话线和电缆线路把家庭办公室和外面的世界联系起来。

centers.english: close to a place, town etc, but not in it
centers.chinese: 靠近一个地方、城镇等，但不在其里面

examples.english: Most of the development is outside the city centre.
examples.chinese: 大多数的新建住宅区都在市中心以外的地方。

examples.english: He first played hockey on frozen ponds outside of town.
examples.chinese: 他最初在小镇外面结冰的湖面上打冰球。

examples.english: The university is situated on a hill just outside the city.
examples.chinese: 那所大学就坐落在市区外的一座小山上。

examples.english: The train stopped three miles outside Doncaster.
examples.chinese: 火车停在离唐克斯特三英里远的地方。

expressions.text: two miles/three kilometres etc out of

examples.english: The car broke down just a few miles out of town.
examples.chinese: 汽车就在离小镇几英里远的地方抛锚了。

expressions.text: ten minutes/two hours etc out of

examples.english: Mason's farm is about ten minutes’ drive out of the town of Taber.
examples.chinese: 梅森的农场离塔伯镇大约有十分钟的车程。

centers.english: not in a room or building but close to it
centers.chinese: 在房间或建筑物的外面

examples.english: Could you wait outside, please?
examples.chinese: 你在外面等着好吗？

examples.english: Some people were collecting for charity outside of the supermarket.
examples.chinese: 超级市场外面有几个人在做慈善募捐。

examples.english: A crowd of people were standing outside the theatre.
examples.chinese: 有一群人在剧院外面站着。

examples.english: The car was parked just outside the house, on the driveway.
examples.chinese: 汽车就停在屋子外面的车道上。

examples.english: You go on in. I'll wait out here.
examples.chinese: 你进去吧，我在外面等。！

examples.english: Leave your coat out in the hallway.
examples.chinese: 把大衣放在外面的门厅里。

centers.english: moving or looking away from the inside of something

examples.english: Janice opened the door and looked out.
examples.chinese: 贾尼斯开门望出去。

examples.english: Two firemen carried his body out and laid it on the ground.
examples.chinese: 两名消防队员把他的尸体抬出来放在地上。

examples.english: When I dropped my bag, some of my money must have fallen out.
examples.chinese: 我的手袋掉在地上时，肯定有一些钱掉了出来。

examples.english: I heard meowing, opened the trunk of the car, and out jumped a thin black cat.
examples.chinese: 我听见“喵喵”的叫声，打开车尾的行李箱，一只瘦瘦的黑猫蹿了出来。

examples.english: She's coming out of the office now.
examples.chinese: 她正从办公室里出来。

examples.english: Don't lean so far out of the window. It's dangerous.
examples.chinese: 不要把头探出窗外太多，很危险。!

examples.english: Thousands of refugees are now streaming out of the city.
examples.chinese: 成千上万的难民现正涌出市区。

examples.english: Why don't you go outside and get some fresh air?
examples.chinese: 为什么不出去透透气呢？

examples.english: I walked outside to the car.
examples.chinese: 我出去走到汽车旁边。

examples.english: The police asked each person in turn to step outside the room for questioning.
examples.chinese: 警察把他们逐一从房间里叫出来盘问。

examples.english: She ran out the door and down the street.
examples.chinese: 她走出门跑到大街上。

examples.english: If you look out of the bedroom window, you can see the ocean.
examples.chinese: 从卧室的窗户往外看可以见到大海。

examples.english: Hey, look out the window! See the hot-air balloon?
examples.chinese: 嗨，朝窗外看！看到热气球了吗？

examples.english: The windows open outward.
examples.chinese: 窗户朝外开。

examples.english: As the plane exploded, the metal of the fuselage was blown outwards.
examples.chinese: 飞机爆炸时，机身的金属片猛地向外飞弹。

examples.english: London is expanding outwards at an alarming rate, swallowing up large areas of beautiful countryside.
examples.chinese: 伦敦正以惊人的速度向外扩展，吞食了大片美丽的乡村地区。

centers.english: on or covering the outside of something
centers.chinese: 在某物的外面；覆盖在某物的外面

examples.english: The external walls of the castle are beginning to crumble.
examples.chinese: 城堡的外墙开始剥落。

examples.english: Most backpacks today have internal rather than external frames
examples.chinese: 现在的背包大都采用内撑支架，而不是外撑框架。

examples.english: There are no external signs of injury.
examples.chinese: 表面没有受伤的迹象。

examples.english: Boil the beans for ten minutes and then remove the tough outer skin.
examples.chinese: 把豆子煮十分钟，然后去掉坚硬的外壳。
