examples.english: the rocks that make up the outer layers of the Earth's surface
examples.chinese: 构成地表外层的岩石！

examples.english: the outer wall of the temple
examples.chinese: 寺院的外墙

centers.english: the part of something that you see from the outside

examples.english: The outside is green, the inside is blue.
examples.chinese: 外面是绿的，里面是蓝的。

examples.english: The outside of the house needs painting.
examples.chinese: 房子的外墙需要粉刷。

examples.english: The emergency blankets are lined with plastic on the outside and paper on the inside.
examples.chinese: 救生毯外面衬塑料，里面衬纸。

examples.english: The door can only be locked from the outside.
examples.chinese: 这扇门只能从外面锁上。

examples.english: The building has an attractive wood exterior.
examples.chinese: 这幢建筑物的外部是木质结构，很漂亮。

examples.english: The exterior of Durham cathedral is one of the most magnificent in England.
examples.chinese: 达勒姆教堂外观宏伟，是英格兰的名胜之一。

examples.english: Clean the exterior of the car thoroughly before applying paint.
examples.chinese: 在喷漆前要把汽车的外部彻底洗净。

centers.english: happening or existing outside a building rather than inside
centers.chinese: 在建筑物的外面发生或存在

examples.english: When my dad was growing up, they only had an outside toilet.
examples.chinese: 我爸爸小时候，他们只有一个室外厕所。

examples.english: You reach the apartment by going up an outside staircase at the back of the building.
examples.chinese: 大楼后面有条室外的楼梯可以通到公寓。

examples.english: The hotel has an outdoor swimming pool.
examples.chinese: 酒店里有一个室外游泳池。

examples.english: The program of outdoor activities includes skiing, climbing, and hiking.
examples.chinese: 户外活动计划包括滑雪、登山和远足。

examples.english: Younger volunteers tend to prefer outdoor work.
examples.chinese: 较年轻的志愿者一般喜欢做户外的工作。

examples.english: We had lunch at an open-air cafe in the city square.
examples.chinese: 我们在城市广场的一家露天小餐馆里吃午饭。

examples.english: There's a big open-air market there on Saturdays.
examples.chinese: 每逢星期六这里都有一个很大的露天集市。

examples.english: In summer there are open-air concerts and theatre performances in the park.
examples.chinese: 夏天的时候，公园里有露天音乐会和戏剧表演。

centers.english: coming from outside a country or organization
centers.chinese: 来自外国或外面的机构

examples.english: Outside observers believe that the election was conducted fairly.
examples.chinese: 外来观察员认为这次选举是公正的。

examples.english: There were seven applicants for the position, including three outside candidates.
examples.chinese: 有七人应征这个职位，包括三位外来的求职者。

examples.english: The government uses outside contractors for some of the work.
examples.chinese: 政府把部分工作外包给承包商。

examples.english: Without external pressure, it is unlikely the civil rights abuses would have stopped.
examples.chinese: 假如没有外界的压力，践踏民权的情况是不可能停止的。

examples.english: An external auditor is brought in to examine the accounts.
examples.chinese: 外聘了一名审计员来核查账务。

examples.english: An outsider, for example someone from another school district, should evaluate the teachers.
examples.chinese: 应该由外面的人，比如其他学区的人，来评估教师。

examples.english: The university library is closed to outsiders.
examples.chinese: 大学图书馆不对外开放。

examples.english: We don't want outsiders getting involved in our local politics.
examples.chinese: 我们不希望外面的人干涉我们的地方政治事务。

centers.english: in this place

examples.english: We've lived here for over a year now.
examples.chinese: 我们在这里已经住了一年多了。

examples.english: I'll stay here and wait for the others.
examples.chinese: 我留在这里等其他人。

examples.english: I love it here - it's so quiet and peaceful near the ocean.
examples.chinese: 我很喜欢这里—靠近海边，那么地宁静。

examples.english: Did you grow up around here?
examples.chinese: 你是在这里长大的吗？

examples.english: I think Jeff lives somewhere near here.
examples.chinese: 我想杰夫住在这里附近的什么地方。

examples.english: The keys were right here 15 minutes ago. Where did they go?
examples.chinese: 15分钟之前钥匙还在这里，哪里去了？

examples.english: I know a good Japanese restaurant not far from here.
examples.chinese: 我知道离这里不远有一家很好的日本餐厅。

examples.english: ‘Where are you?’ ‘I'm down here in the basement.’
examples.chinese: “你在哪里？”“我在这里，地下室。”

examples.english: They got here about 15 minutes before you did.
examples.chinese: 他们比你早到15分钟左右。

examples.english: I'm sick of living in this place - there's nothing to do.
examples.chinese: 这个地方我住腻了—没什么事情可做。

examples.english: It's impossible to find a decent restaurant in this place.
examples.chinese: 这个地方不可能找到像样的餐馆。

examples.english: It was on this very spot that President Kennedy was assassinated.
examples.chinese: 肯尼迪总统就在这个地方被人暗杀。

examples.english: It's exciting to think that so many great men and women have made speeches on this spot.
examples.chinese: 想到那么多伟人曾在此地发表过演说，真让人激动。

centers.english: to be here

examples.english: Check the names off the list to make sure everyone is here.
examples.chinese: 核对名单上的名字，看大家是不是都到了。

examples.english: ‘Have you seen the can opener anywhere?’ ‘Yes, it's here on the counter.’
examples.chinese: “你在什么地方见过开罐器吗？”“这里，台子上。”

examples.english: I'm not going out - I want to be here when Tony arrives.
examples.chinese: 我不出去—我想在这里等托尼来。

examples.english: The monument has been here since 1876.
examples.chinese: 这纪念碑从1876年起就在这里了。

examples.english: Chuck must be around - I just saw him a few minutes ago.
examples.chinese: 查克肯定在附近—我几分钟前还看到过他。

examples.english: Are you going to be around at Christmas or are you going on holiday?
examples.chinese: 你圣诞节留在这里还是去度假?

examples.english: Yesterday's newspaper must still be around somewhere.
examples.chinese: 昨天的报纸肯定还在附近什么地方。

examples.english: Hello Mrs Baxter. Is Mark in?
examples.chinese: 你好，巴克斯特太太，马克在家吗?

examples.english: Sonia won't be in today - she's not feeling very well.
examples.chinese: 索尼娅今天不来上班了—她身体不太舒服。

examples.english: You can go out for a while but make sure you're in by 11 o'clock.
examples.chinese: 你可以出去一会儿，但11点前一定要回来。

examples.english: The teacher keeps a daily record of who is present.
examples.chinese: 老师每天都记录学生的出席情况。

examples.english: The President was not able to be present for the ceremony.
examples.chinese: 总统没法出席这场典礼。

examples.english: Among those present were several film and television stars.
examples.chinese: 到场的还有一些影视明星。

centers.english: to not be here

examples.english: How would she know what happened? She wasn't even here.
examples.chinese: 她怎么会知道发生了什么事？她根本不在这里。

examples.english: Why aren't the scissors here where they belong?
examples.chinese: 剪刀为什么没了？它应该放在这里的。

examples.english: The supermarket hasn't been here long but it's already doing a lot of business.
examples.chinese: 这超级市场开了没多久，但生意已经很好了。

examples.english: If Julie isn't around, maybe Maria could help you.
examples.chinese: 如果朱莉不在，也许玛丽亚可以帮你。

examples.english: Every time I want to talk to Ted, he's not around.
examples.chinese: 我每次想找特德说话，他都不在。

examples.english: Why isn't there ever a taxi around when you need one?
examples.chinese: 为什么在你需要的时候总是没有出租车？

examples.english: Sally phoned while you were out. I told her to phone back later.
examples.chinese: 你出去时萨莉打电话来，我叫她过一会儿再打过来。

examples.english: Mr Rogers isn't in at the moment. Can I help you?
examples.chinese: 罗杰斯先生现在不在。我能帮忙吗？

examples.english: I'm going to be out all afternoon.
examples.chinese: 我整个下午都将外出。

examples.english: I'm so busy. If anyone calls for me, tell them I'm not in.
examples.chinese: 我很忙。如果有人打电话找我，就说我不在。

examples.english: ‘We're taking a trip to California.’ ‘Oh, how long do you plan to be away?’
examples.chinese: “我们要去一趟加州。”“噢，你们打算去多久？”

examples.english: My job requires me to be away from home for five months of the year.
examples.chinese: 因为工作需要，我每年要出差五个月。

examples.english: While Kurt was away on business, his wife completely redecorated the house.
examples.chinese: 库尔特在外头出差的时候，他妻子把房子彻底重新装修了一遍。

examples.english: According to the personnel department you have been absent twice this week already.
examples.chinese: 据人事部说，本周你已缺勤两次了。

examples.english: James was absent from school again today.
examples.chinese: 詹姆士今天又没去上学。

examples.english: I'll be off all next week, so I can do some of the yard work then.
examples.chinese: 我下个星期都休息，所以到时候可以干点院子里的活。

examples.english: Becky's been off for several days with a bad back.
examples.chinese: 贝姬因为背部的毛病好几天没上班了。

examples.english: Chris has been off sick a lot lately.
examples.chinese: 克里斯最近经常生病休假。

examples.english: Jenkins isn't off school again, is he? What's his excuse this time?
examples.chinese: 詹金斯不会又没来上学吧？这次他是什么借口呢？

examples.english: One of my earrings is missing - have you seen it?
examples.chinese: 我的一个耳环不见了，你看到过吗?

examples.english: Oh no! The last page is missing from the book!
examples.chinese: 啊呀，书的最后一页不见了！

centers.english: a place that you are not in now
centers.chinese: 你现在非身处的某个地方

examples.english: I love Italy - I worked there for a year.
examples.chinese: 我爱意大利——我曾在那里工作了一年。

examples.english: Jackie's arriving at the station at 3.15 and I said I'd meet her there.
examples.chinese: 杰姬会在3点15分到达车站，我说我会到那里去接她。

examples.english: When I came home Sean was just sitting there waiting for me.
examples.chinese: 我回到家时，肖恩就坐在那里等我。

examples.english: We drove down to Baltimore, and on the way there we stopped for lunch.
examples.chinese: 我们驾车去巴尔的摩，途中我们停下来吃了顿午餐。

examples.english: Where's my umbrella? I'm sure I left it right there, next to my bag.
examples.chinese: 我的伞在哪里？我肯定就把它放在那儿了，在我提包的旁边。

examples.english: We flew in to Munich and from there we took the train to Prague.
examples.chinese: 我们乘飞机到慕尼黑，从那里我们再乘火车去布拉格。

examples.english: How did you get up there on the roof?
examples.chinese: 你是怎么爬到屋顶上去的？

examples.english: My car's over there by that big tree.
examples.chinese: 我的汽车在那里，在那棵大树旁。

examples.english: See those rocks over there? Be careful to keep the boat away from them.
examples.chinese: 看见那边的那些岩石了吗？要小心让小船远离它们。

examples.english: You went to Camp Chippewa too? I hated that place.
examples.chinese: 你也去过奇珀瓦营地吗？我很讨厌那个地方。

examples.english: They'll never let us back in that place after the way you behaved.
examples.chinese: 你的举止如此不堪，他们再也不会让我们回到那里去了。

examples.english: Do you remember we went down to that place along the river and had a barbecue?
examples.chinese: 你记得我们顺河而下到过那个地方，还吃了顿烧烤吗？

examples.english: We usually go to Lake Como for our holidays - it's beautiful round there.
examples.chinese: 我们经常去科莫湖度假，那周围景色很美。

examples.english: Judy's looking for an apartment in Greenwich Village. A lot of her friends live around there.
examples.chinese: 朱迪正在格林尼治村找房子，她的许多朋友都住在那附近。

examples.english: One of the largest tornadoes ever seen was photographed near there.
examples.chinese: 历来看到的最大的龙卷风之一就是在那附近被拍摄到的。

centers.english: to be in a place where you are not now
centers.chinese: 在你现在非身处的地方

examples.english: ‘Have you seen the newspaper?’ ‘It's there, next to your chair.’
examples.chinese: “你看见过报纸吗？”“它在那里，你的椅子边。”

examples.english: I want to be there when he comes out of surgery.
examples.chinese: 他做完手术出来时，我要在那里等他。

examples.english: When I worked at the factory, I was there every day from nine till six.
examples.chinese: 我在工厂工作时，每天要从9点干到6点。

examples.english: The bathroom's up there, on your right.
examples.chinese: 浴室在那上面，在你的右边。

examples.english: I tried to call you last night, but I guess you weren't around.
examples.chinese: 昨晚我想给你打电话，但我估计你不在那里。

examples.english: Go and look downstairs. There must be a coffee machine around somewhere.
examples.chinese: 到楼下找找，那里肯定有个煮咖啡机。

examples.english: It doesn't matter if no one is around - I'm still not going through a red light.
examples.chinese: 附近没有人无所谓，我照样不会闯红灯。

examples.english: Is Marsha in? I have a letter for her.
examples.chinese: 玛莎在吗？我这里有她的一封信。

examples.english: I'll phone back later when Mr Boswell is in.
examples.chinese: 等博斯韦尔先生在时我再打电话来。

examples.english: I walked over to Sonia's house but when I got there only her brother was in.
examples.chinese: 我一路走到索尼娅家，但当我到那里时只有她哥哥一人在家。

examples.english: When acid is present, the chemical in the test tube turns red.
examples.chinese: 存在酸的话，试管内的化学物就会变成红色。

examples.english: The virus is present in tears and saliva, but in very small amounts.
examples.chinese: 这种病毒存在于眼泪和唾液里，但是量很少。

examples.english: Tests revealed that large quantities of alcohol were present in the driver's blood.
examples.chinese: 化验显示该司机的血液里含有大量酒精。

centers.english: to be at an event where you are not now
centers.chinese: 在你现在未参加的某个活动中

examples.english: What was the game like? Were there many people there?
examples.chinese: 比赛怎么样？那里有很多人吗？

examples.english: I went to a party last night and your sister was there too.
examples.chinese: 昨晚我去参加了一个聚会，你姐姐也在那里。

examples.english: A lot of the people at the charity event were only there to look at other people.
examples.chinese: 许多去参加那个慈善活动的人只是为了去看在场的其他人。

examples.english: Most of the actors in the movie were at the New York preview.
examples.chinese: 这部电影中的大部分演员都参加了在纽约举行的试映会。

examples.english: I don't remember Uncle Bob. I don't think he was at the funeral.
examples.chinese: 我不记得鲍勃舅舅，我想他没有参加葬礼。

examples.english: Were you at the meeting when they announced the layoffs?
examples.chinese: 他们宣布裁员时你在会上吗？

examples.english: The only people who were present for the ceremony were the bride and groom, the priest, and two witnesses.
examples.chinese: 出席婚礼的只有新郎和新娘、牧师以及两个证婚人。

examples.english: It was very important to Jim to be present for the birth of his first child.
examples.chinese: 对吉姆来说，第一个孩子出生时他在场是很重要的。

examples.english: Those present at the trial said that the accused looked cheerful.
examples.chinese: 出席庭审的人说被告看上去挺高兴的。

examples.english: Journalists were on the scene within minutes of the plane crash.
examples.chinese: 飞机失事后几分钟记者们就到了现场。

examples.english: A Safety Board team was on the scene Monday morning to try to determine the cause of the accident.
examples.chinese: 一个安全委员会小组于周一早上到达现场，试图确定事故原因。

examples.english: I'm going to the stadium. I want to be on the spot when they announce the international team.
examples.chinese: 我要到体育馆去。他们宣布国家队球员名单时我想在场。

examples.english: Many reporters, in an attempt to be on the spot in war time, have ended up being killed.
examples.chinese: 为亲临战场，许多记者结果都丧了命。

examples.english: Over 2000 police were in attendance at yesterday's demonstration.
examples.chinese: 在昨天的示威活动中，有两千多名警察在场。

examples.english: The First Lady was in attendance for most of the conference sessions.
examples.chinese: 第一夫人出席了这次大会的大部分会议。

examples.english: He always enjoyed going to Stewart's parties where famous people were sure to be in attendance.
examples.chinese: 他一直很喜欢参加斯图尔特办的聚会，那些聚会肯定有名人到场。

centers.english: the number of people who are at an event

examples.english: The game had an attendance of over 50,000 people.
examples.chinese: 观看比赛的有五万多人。

examples.english: Attendance at the national championships is already higher than expected.
examples.chinese: 全国锦标赛的入场观众已经比预期的多了。

examples.english: We had pretty good attendance despite the bad weather.
examples.chinese: 尽管天气不好，我们的观众人数仍相当可观。

examples.english: Considering the seriousness of the matter to be debated there was an unusually low attendance at the meeting.
examples.chinese: 考虑到辩论议题的严肃性，出席会议的人是出奇的少。

examples.english: We had a much better turnout for the company picnic this year than last.
examples.chinese: 今年参加公司野餐的人数比起去年要多得多。

examples.english: Turnout for the game was lighter than expected.
examples.chinese: 这场比赛的观众比预料的要少。！

examples.english: There was an unusually high turnout in the election, nearly twice the number predicted.
examples.chinese: 参与选举投票的人出奇的多，几乎是预计人数的两倍。

examples.english: Inviting a soap star or two to your opening night is always a good way of getting bums on seats.
examples.chinese: 请一两个肥皂剧明星来出席首映之夜一向是招徕观众的妙方。

centers.english: to not be there

examples.english: She says the bottle is in the cupboard, but it just isn't there.
examples.chinese: 她说那瓶子在食橱里，但它却不在那里。

examples.english: He was supposed to wait for me by the fountain, but he wasn't there when I arrived.
examples.chinese: 他说好在喷水池边等我，但我到那里时他却不在。

examples.english: Maybe you should try talking to Michael when his wife isn't around.
examples.chinese: 也许你应该在迈克尔的妻子不在时想办法和他谈谈。

examples.english: According to Caroline, Larry isn't around much since he started traveling for work.
examples.chinese: 据卡罗琳说，拉里自从开始出差后就不大在家了。

examples.english: He wasn't in, so I left a message.
examples.chinese: 他不在，我就留了个口信。

examples.english: She told me not to stop by today - she'll be out most of the day running errands.
examples.chinese: 她叫我今天别去探访，她差不多一整天都要在外面跑腿。

examples.english: After I've been away for a few days, there's always so much work waiting when I get back.
examples.chinese: 我几天没去上班，然后再回去时总有一大堆工作等着我去做。

examples.english: Selina's off today? Then can you ask her to phone me when she's back in the office ?
examples.chinese: 塞利娜今天没来？那么等她回到办公室时，请你叫她打电话给我。

examples.english: He's been off work ever since he hurt his back in a riding accident.
examples.chinese: 自从在一次骑马事故中伤了背后，他就没有上过班了。

examples.english: The virus develops most quickly when antibodies are absent.
examples.chinese: 在缺乏抗体的情况下，这种病毒繁殖得最快。

examples.english: If you're absent more than five times, you fail the course.
examples.chinese: 如果你缺课超过五次，就不能通过这门课了。

examples.english: While the boss was absent everyone started taking very long lunchbreaks.
examples.chinese: 老板不在时，大家都把午休时间拖得很长。

examples.english: For some reason, Young's name was absent from the list.
examples.chinese: 由于某种原因，杨的名字不在名单上。

examples.english: The Adkinson children were absent from school about a dozen times last fall.
examples.chinese: 去年秋天，阿德金森家的孩子们缺课约有十几次了。

examples.english: Some of the puzzle pieces are missing.
examples.chinese: 有些拼图块不见了。

examples.english: Can you spot the missing number in this series?
examples.chinese: 你能找出这串数列中缺了哪个数字吗？

examples.english: Suddenly he looked around and realized one of the children was missing.
examples.chinese: 他突然环顾四周，意识到有个孩子不见了。

examples.english: Three buttons were missing from his shirt.
examples.chinese: 他的衬衫上丢了三个纽扣。

centers.english: ACROSS

examples.english: The children ran across the road.
examples.chinese: 孩子们跑过马路。

examples.english: I've always wanted to sail across the Atlantic.
examples.chinese: 我一直想驾船横渡大西洋。

examples.english: We gazed across the valley.
examples.chinese: 我们凝望着山谷的那一边。

examples.english: The traffic was heavy so it took a long time to get across.
examples.chinese: 交通很拥挤，要花很长时间才能开过去。

examples.english: He walked across to the window.
examples.chinese: 他走到窗前。

examples.english: A cat jumped over the fence.
examples.chinese: 一只猫跳过篱笆。

examples.english: the road over the mountains
examples.chinese: 翻过山岭的路

examples.english: one of the bridges over the Rhine
examples.chinese: 莱茵河上的一座桥

examples.english: I pushed my way through the crowd.
examples.chinese: 我推推挤挤穿过人群。

examples.english: walking through the forest
examples.chinese: 步行穿过森林

examples.english: We drove through Baltimore on our way to Washington.
examples.chinese: 我们开车去华盛顿的路上穿过巴尔的摩。

examples.english: I could see her through the window.
examples.chinese: 我能通过窗户看到她。

examples.english: The trip through the tunnel takes about 40 minutes.
examples.chinese: 隧道的行程大约是40分钟。

examples.english: We found a gap in the fence and climbed through.
examples.chinese: 我们发现篱笆上有个缺口，就爬了过去。

examples.english: transatlantic flights
examples.chinese: 横跨大西洋的班机

examples.english: the first transcontinental railroad
examples.chinese: 首条横贯大陆的铁路

examples.english: Antonia went to cross the street to buy us some sodas.
examples.chinese: 安东尼娅穿过马路去给我们买些苏打水。

examples.english: He plans to cross the Himalayas on foot.
examples.chinese: 他计划徒步翻越喜马拉雅山脉。

examples.english: How are we going to cross the river?
examples.chinese: 我们打算怎么过河?

examples.english: Before you cross, make sure there are no other cars coming.
examples.chinese: 过马路之前要看清楚没有其他车辆开来。

examples.english: Farmers have begun putting up fences to prevent visitors from cutting across their land.
examples.chinese: 农民们开始建起篱笆，以阻止游客在他们的田地上抄近路穿过去。

examples.english: They moved south along the edge of a field, then cut across Highway 18.
examples.chinese: 他们沿着一片田野的外围南行，然后在18号公路上横穿过去。

examples.english: Instead of taking the main road I cut through the churchyard and jumped over the wall at the bottom.
examples.chinese: 我没有走大路，而是抄近路穿过教堂墓地，走到尽头时跳过了围墙。

examples.english: Her house wasn't far, if he cut through the woods.
examples.chinese: 他要是在树林里抄近路，她家就不是很远。

examples.english: The Atlantic crossing took nearly three months.
examples.chinese: 横渡大西洋花了将近三个月。

examples.english: His party made the first east-west crossing of the Sierra Nevada in 1833.
examples.chinese: 1833年，他带领的一行人首次由东向西翻过内华达山脉。

centers.english: to think something is wrong

examples.english: Lundgren is against abortion.
examples.chinese: 伦德格伦反对堕胎。

examples.english: Most people are opposed to the privatization of the city's public transportation system.
examples.chinese: 大多数人都反对将城市的公共交通系统私有化。

examples.english: There are two or three groups that are strongly against construction of the dam.
examples.chinese: 有两三个团体强烈反对修建大坝。

examples.english: She wants to marry him, but her parents are dead set against it.
examples.chinese: 她想嫁给他，但她父母坚决反对。

examples.english: Senator Thompson remains totally opposed to any form of gun control.
examples.chinese: 汤普森参议员依然极力反对任何形式的枪支管制。

examples.english: Conservative MPs say they will oppose the new bill.
examples.chinese: 保守党议员称他们会反对这个新议案。

examples.english: The Church strongly opposes same-sex marriage.
examples.chinese: 教会强烈反对同性婚姻。

examples.english: My grandmother doesn't agree with divorce.
examples.chinese: 我的祖母不赞成离婚。

examples.english: There are many people in the US who do not agree with capital punishment.
examples.chinese: 美国有许多人都不赞成死刑。

examples.english: Fiona doesn't believe in having sex before marriage.
examples.chinese: 菲奥娜不赞成婚前性行为。

examples.english: I don't believe in hitting children for any reason.
examples.chinese: 我不主张打孩子，不管有什么理由。

examples.english: Anti-war demonstrators gathered in the city's main square.
examples.chinese: 反战的示威人群聚集在市里的中心广场。

examples.english: The anti-smoking laws seem ridiculous to me.
examples.chinese: 禁烟法在我看来很可笑。

examples.english: Anti-American sentiment remains high in the region.
examples.chinese: 这地区的反美情绪依然很高。

examples.english: A hostile audience refused to listen to Senator Drummond's reply.
examples.chinese: 怀有敌意的听众不愿意听德拉蒙德参议员的回答。

examples.english: Local people are hostile towards the plan, which would involve a significant tax increase.
examples.chinese: 这个计划牵涉到大幅度加税，当地人强烈反对。

examples.english: Lydon was openly hostile to any kind of criticism of the project.
examples.chinese: 莱登公开反对对这项工程的任何批评。

examples.english: A lot of people refuse to work with Paula. Her manner is just too antagonistic.
examples.chinese: 许多人都不愿意与葆拉共事，她的态度太不友好了。

examples.english: The right-wing press has always been deeply antagonistic towards the Labour party.
examples.chinese: 右翼媒体一向对工党深怀敌意。

centers.english: a person or group that opposes something

examples.english: In some countries, any opponent of the government is likely to lose their job.
examples.chinese: 在有些国家，任何反对政府的人都有可能失去工作。

examples.english: One notable opponent of the proposal was the mayor.
examples.chinese: 这项提议的一大反对者是市长。

examples.english: Opinion polls showed the opposition pulling ahead in some areas.
examples.chinese: 民意测验显示，反对党于部分地区领先。

examples.english: Newspapers must reflect the views of the opposition as well as those of the government.
examples.chinese: 报纸不仅要反映政府的观点，而且还要反映反对派的意见。

examples.english: the enemies of democracy
examples.chinese: 民主的反对者

examples.english: an enemy of the Jewish people
examples.chinese: 犹太人的敌人

centers.english: words or behaviour that show that you oppose something
centers.chinese: 表示反对的言语或行为

examples.english: If anyone has any objections, please let us know as soon as possible.
examples.chinese: 如果谁反对的话，请尽早告诉我们。

examples.english: When I told him about my plans, my father raised one objection after another.
examples.chinese: 我把我的计划告诉父亲，他提出了一个又一个的反对意见。

examples.english: If you have no objection, I would like to use your name as a reference when I start applying for jobs.
examples.chinese: 如果你不反对，我求职的时候推荐人就写你的名字。

examples.english: Widespread opposition to the military government led to violence in the streets.
examples.chinese: 对军政府普遍的反对引发了街头暴力。

examples.english: Opposition to the war grew rapidly.
examples.chinese: 反战呼声越来越高。

examples.english: Plans for the new stadium will no doubt face a lot of opposition.
examples.chinese: 筹建新体育馆的计划肯定将会遭到许多人的反对。

examples.english: Thousands of people plan to gather on Sunday to express their opposition to the government's handling of the crisis.
examples.chinese: 有数千人计划在星期天集会，对政府的这种危机处理方式表示反对。

examples.english: Despite strong opposition, the law was passed.
examples.chinese: 这条法律尽管遭到强烈反对，还是通过了。

examples.english: The announcement was greeted with hostility from some employees.
examples.chinese: 这项声明遭到一些雇员的强烈抗议。

examples.english: Recently there has been hostility towards the Prime Minister from members of his own party.
examples.chinese: 最近党内成员也对首相怀有敌意。

examples.english: Given his open hostility, it seemed pointless to try and continue to persuade him.
examples.chinese: 他既然公开反对，再继续劝说看来是没有意义了。

examples.english: Hines made no effort to conceal his antagonism towards his supervisor.
examples.chinese: 海因斯毫不掩饰对上司的敌意。

examples.english: Mitchell sees no clear way to end the antagonism between the two groups.
examples.chinese: 米切尔看不出有什么方法可以结束这两个团体间的对抗情绪。

centers.english: to say that you oppose something

examples.english: His supporters will certainly object if he is fired.
examples.chinese: 如果他被解雇，他的支持者肯定会起来反对。

examples.english: Rebecca objects to being told what to do.
examples.chinese: 丽贝卡不喜欢别人盼咐她做这做那。

examples.english: The committee strongly objected to the report's recommendations.
examples.chinese: 委员会强烈反对报告中的建议。

examples.english: None of the committee members raised any objections, so we took a vote.
examples.chinese: 委员会中无人提出异议，所以我们就投票表决。

examples.english: Several church members raised objections to the way the money had been spent.
examples.chinese: 有几个教会成员对这种花钱方式提出了反对。

centers.english: in the same place with another person

examples.english: Don't leave me alone with her.
examples.chinese: 别留下我和她单独在一起。

examples.english: ‘Where's Jill?’ ‘I don't know, I thought she was with you.’
examples.chinese: “吉尔在哪里？”“我不知道，我以为她跟你在一起呢。”

examples.english: I try to make sure I have a couple of hours to spend with David every evening.
examples.chinese: 我尽量确保每晚有几个小时可以和戴维在一起。

examples.english: We live with my parents-in-law.
examples.chinese: 我们和岳父岳母住在一起。

examples.english: At the moment, she's in a meeting with the President.
examples.chinese: 此刻她正在和总统一起开会。

examples.english: Lindsay arrived with her husband but left by herself.
examples.chinese: 林赛是和她丈夫一起来的，但走的时候却是一个人。

examples.english: I saw Rick go out of the building with Susan.
examples.chinese: 我看到里克和苏珊一起从大楼出来。

examples.english: Nicola and I were at school together.
examples.chinese: 我和妮古拉一起上学。

examples.english: Each year the whole family spends Christmas together.
examples.chinese: 每年全家人一起过圣诞节。

examples.english: For years, these people who are now at war lived together very peacefully.
examples.chinese: 现在在交战的这些人，多年来都是和平共处的。

examples.english: We'd better stay together, or we might get lost.
examples.chinese: 大家最好待在一起，否则会迷路的。

examples.english: We're sitting over there. Why don't you join us?
examples.chinese: 我们坐在那边，你为什么不加入我们呢?

examples.english: Her parents are going to Paris next week and she will join them later.
examples.chinese: 她父母下星期要去巴黎，稍后她也会过去和他们在一起。

examples.english: Children under fourteen must be accompanied by an adult.
examples.chinese: 14岁以下儿童必须有成人陪同。

examples.english: Wherever she goes she has to be accompanied by a bodyguard.
examples.chinese: 她去哪里都必须有一名保镖陪同。

examples.english: The Prince, accompanied by the Princess, spoke to many of the disaster victims in the hospital.
examples.chinese: 王子在王妃的陪同下，与医院里的许多受灾者交谈。

examples.english: I was grateful for Jean's company on the long journey up to Edinburgh.
examples.chinese: 在前往爱丁堡的漫长旅途中，我感激有琼的陪伴。

examples.english: ‘Do you mind if I join you?’ ‘No of course not, it's nice to have some company.’
examples.chinese: “我和你一起去行吗？”“当然行啦，有个伴还不好吗。”

examples.english: I go to French evening classes, for the company as much as for the French.
examples.chinese: 我去上法语夜校，既学法语又可以和人交往。

examples.english: Now that she's gone, I really miss her company.
examples.chinese: 现在她走了，我真的很想念和她在一起的日子。

examples.english: I always feel very relaxed in Nick's company.
examples.chinese: 有尼克在身边，我总是感觉非常放松。

examples.english: Many people are uneasy in the company of strangers.
examples.chinese: 和陌生人一起时，许多人都感到不自在。

examples.english: What was it like to be actually in the Queen's presence?
examples.chinese: 真的站在女王面前会是什么样子？

examples.english: I could think of very little to say in the presence of so many important people.
examples.chinese: 在那么多要人面前我想不出来要说些什么。

examples.english: It was a great experience - people from so many very different backgrounds living side by side.
examples.chinese: 这真是了不起啊一那么多背景很不相同的人能相安无事地生活在一起。

examples.english: The Muslim residents say they are ready and willing to live side by side with their neighbors again.
examples.chinese: 穆斯林居民称，他们非常乐意和邻居重修旧好，和睦相处。

centers.english: doing something with another person/group etc
centers.chinese: 与另一个人/团体等一起做某事

examples.english: My family and I went camping in the mountains with some old friends of ours.
examples.chinese: 我和家人同我们的一些老朋友一起去山里露营。

examples.english: I'd like you to work with the person sitting beside you and see if we can come up with some new ideas,
examples.chinese: 我希望你们跟坐在旁边的人一起动动脑筋，看看是否能想出什么新的主意来。

examples.english: There's no point in taking two cars - let's go together.
examples.chinese: 没有必要开两辆车—我们一起走吧。

examples.english: The police and army worked together to track down the terrorists.
examples.chinese: 警方与军队合作追捕恐怖分子。

examples.english: It was a strange situation with Washington, Pretoria and Peking fighting side by side.
examples.chinese: 彼得、汤姆和约翰并肩作战，这真是个奇怪的局面。

examples.english: Soldiers worked side by side with civilians to rebuild the city.
examples.chinese: 军民合作，共同重建这座城市。

examples.english: The team collectively must decide what resources they need and how they are to be used.
examples.chinese: 全队必须集体商定需要哪些资源以及如何使用这些资源。

examples.english: Individually, people have little power, but collectively they can be more influential.
examples.chinese: 个人的力量很小，但集体的力量就更有影响力了。

examples.english: The business is jointly owned and run by six TV companies.
examples.chinese: 这家公司由六家电视公司共同拥有和管理。

examples.english: It was a major research project, jointly funded by the university and the Health Department.
examples.chinese: 这是一项重要的研究计划，由那所大学和卫生部共同出资。

examples.english: The exhibition is sponsored by the Arts Council in conjunction with British Airways.
examples.chinese: 展览由艺术委员会与英国航空公司共同赞助。

examples.english: Stenmann is working in conjunction with leading scientists and has invested $5 million in the scheme.
examples.chinese: 斯滕曼公司与顶尖科学家合作，已向该计划投资了500万美元。

examples.english: The city council is working in partnership with local businesses to build new sports facilities in the area.
examples.chinese: 市议会正在与地方企业合作，在本区建造新的体育设施。

examples.english: I wrote the article in collaboration with a number of my colleagues.
examples.chinese: 我与一些同事合写这篇文章。

examples.english: This course has been developed in collaboration with major professional bodies involved in the financial services sector.
examples.chinese: 这门课程是与金融服务业几家大的专业机构合作开发的。

examples.english: British soldiers fought shoulder to shoulder with American and French troops.
examples.chinese: 英国士兵和美国、法国的军队并肩作战。

examples.english: Mitterrand, although a socialist, stood shoulder to shoulder with the NATO allies during the challenges of the early 1980s.
examples.chinese: 密特朗虽然是社会党人，但是在20世纪80年代初的挑战中，他还是支持北约盟友。

centers.english: when people do something together in a dishonest way
centers.chinese: 人们以不诚实的方式一起做某事

examples.english: Anyone suspected of being in league with the rebels was arrested.
examples.chinese: 被怀疑与叛乱分子勾结的人都遭到逮捕。

examples.english: There was a suggestion that the authorities were in league with the drug dealers.
examples.chinese: 有迹象显示当局与毒犯勾结。

examples.english: Some of the police force were working in collusion with the Mafia.
examples.chinese: 有些警察与黑手党勾结。

examples.english: Journalists suspected that the army was acting in collusion with the terrorists.
examples.chinese: 记者怀疑军队与恐怖分子串通一气。

examples.english: Assassins, in cahoots with the army, were sent to kill two top members of the parliament.
examples.chinese: 他们与军队串通，派了刺客去杀害两位高级议会成员。

examples.english: By the middle of the book we've learned that the church and the local politicians are in cahoots to try to slow Sonja's research.
examples.chinese: 书看了一半的时候，我们知道教会与地方政客勾结，试图拖住索尼娅的研究。

examples.english: The politicians are hand in glove with the military, everyone knows that.
examples.chinese: 政客们与军队互相勾结，这一点人所共知。

centers.english: to work together

examples.english: We can only succeed if we all work together as a team.
examples.chinese: 我们只有团结一致才能成功。

examples.english: Both sides are going to have to work together to find other ways of settling their differences.
examples.chinese: 双方必须共同努力，找出其他办法来解决分歧。

examples.english: The president said that Mexico would continue to cooperate with the US in the fight against drugs.
examples.chinese: 总统称墨西哥将会继续与美国合作，打击毒品。

examples.english: Aid agencies and UN forces are cooperating to get food supplies to the people who need them.
examples.chinese: 援助机构和联合国部队一起合作，将食品送到需要的人手里。

examples.english: Finance ministers and central bankers agreed to cooperate closely to sustain the strength of the pound.
examples.chinese: 财长和中央银行家同意紧密合作，保持英镑的坚挺。

examples.english: Traditionally management has called upon workers to cooperate in increasing productivity.
examples.chinese: 管理层历来要求工人配合，提高产量。

examples.english: In the future there will be greater military cooperation among all the nations of Europe.
examples.chinese: 未来，欧洲各国间的军事合作将会加强。

examples.english: Researchers in Stanford and Princeton collaborated to manufacture a completely new waterproof textile.
examples.chinese: 斯坦福大学与普林斯顿大学的研究者合作生产一种全新的防水面料。

examples.english: Hewlett Packard collaborated with Nokia to produce the palmtop-telephone.
examples.chinese: 惠普与诺基亚合作生产掌上电脑电话。

examples.english: Fellini collaborated with Rossellini on the script of the film.
examples.chinese: 费利尼与罗塞利尼合写这部电影的剧本。

examples.english: Educators and employers need to collaborate in preparing the next generation for employment and adulthood.
examples.chinese: 教育工作者和雇主要合作，指导下一代为就业和成年作好准备。

examples.english: We couldn't have done it without their collaboration if they had not collaborated with us.
examples.chinese: 没有他们的合作我们是做不成的。

centers.english: someone who does something with someone else
centers.chinese: 和别人一起做某事的人

examples.english: Have you got a partner for the dance on Saturday?
examples.chinese: 星期六的舞会你找好舞伴了吗？

examples.english: The firm was so successful that she took on a partner.
examples.chinese: 公司生意兴隆，她接纳了一个合伙人。

examples.english: We called a meeting with Russco, our partners in the construction project.
examples.chinese: 我们和拉斯科公司召开了一次会议，他们是我们建筑项目的合伙人。

examples.english: Manson and I were business partners, but not friends.
examples.chinese: 我和曼森是生意伙伴，不是朋友。

examples.english: People who have many sexual partners are more at risk from AIDS.
examples.chinese: 有多个性伴侣的人罹患艾滋病的危险较大。

examples.english: Let's have a game of cards -- you and Frank can be partners.
examples.chinese: 我们玩一局牌吧—你可以和弗兰克搭档。

examples.english: The accident happened when Roland was walking home with fellow student Karl Xavier.
examples.chinese: 事故发生的时候，罗兰和他的同学卡尔·泽维尔正走路回家。

examples.english: Toni's views on the Kyoto Treaty were echoed by her fellow workers.
examples.chinese: 托妮对于《京都议定书》的看法引起了同事的共鸣。

examples.english: Mum and Dad didn't seem to approve much of my new companions.
examples.chinese: 爸妈似乎不太认可我新结交的朋友。

examples.english: He left the major part of his £60 million fortune to his close friend and companion, Jerry Edwards.
examples.chinese: 他把六千万英镑的财产大部分留给了他的密友和伙伴杰里·爱德华兹。

examples.english: Ed is a great travelling companion - funny and sensible at the same time.
examples.chinese: 埃德是个很好的旅伴，既风趣又有理智。

examples.english: Tom and his sidekick Larry sauntered into the bar, plainly looking for a fight.
examples.chinese: 汤姆和他的跟班拉里不紧不慢地走进酒吧，明显想找人打架。

examples.english: Sherlock Holmes and his sidekick Dr Watson
examples.chinese: 夏洛克·福尔摩斯和他的助手华生医生

examples.english: After the robbery, the men escaped in a stolen car driven by an accomplice.
examples.chinese: 抢了东西之后，那伙人坐上一辆同谋开的赃车逃跑了。

examples.english: Two other boys were accused of being accomplices in the attack.
examples.chinese: 另外两个男孩子被控在袭击中充当帮凶。

centers.english: done by people working together

examples.english: We both wanted to move to Canada - it was a joint decision.
examples.chinese: 我们俩都想移居加拿大—这是共同的决定。

examples.english: a joint declaration by Israeli and Palestinian leaders
examples.chinese: 以色列和巴勒斯坦领导人的联合声明

examples.english: ‘Did you cook the dinner, Jane?’ ‘No, it was a joint effort.’
examples.chinese: “是你做的晚饭吗，简？”“不，是大家一起做的。

examples.english: The combined efforts of four police officers and two paramedics were needed to lift the driver from the wreckage.
examples.chinese: 四名警察和两名医务辅助人员一起出力才把驾驶员从残骸里抬出来。

examples.english: It was a combined operation involving troops from the US and Europe.
examples.chinese: 这是美国和欧洲部队的联合行动。

examples.english: A jury's verdict is the result of a collective agreement.
examples.chinese: 陪审团的裁决是集体同意的结果。

examples.english: Kerry called the labor laws ‘a legitimate collective effort to protect our children’ and said he supported them.
examples.chinese: 克里称劳动法是“保护孩子的合法共同努力”，他说他支持。

examples.english: The bureau was without a manager for some time, so the staff took collective responsibility for all the tasks.
examples.chinese: 这个机构有一段时间没有经理，所以所有的工作都由员工共同承担责任。

examples.english: A manager's main task is to coordinate the collaborative efforts of a number of people.
examples.chinese: 经理的主要工作是把大家的共同努力协调起来。

examples.english: The new system was the product of a collaborative project between Apple and IBM.
examples.chinese: 新系统是苹果公司和国际商业机器公司一个合作项目的产品。

examples.english: a collaborative youth training program involving several businesses
examples.chinese: 数家公司共同参与的青年培训计划

centers.english: people or groups who work together

examples.english: The song-writing partnership has been very productive.
examples.chinese: 他们这样合作写歌很有成效。

examples.english: Crime prevention is most effective when it is a partnership between the police and the public.
examples.chinese: 警民合作预防犯罪最见成效。

examples.english: Elliot and Elver decided to form a partnership and launch their own business.
examples.chinese: 埃利奥特和艾尔弗决定合伙开公司。

examples.english: NATO is a formal military alliance with America at its head.
examples.chinese: 北约是以美国为首的正式军事联盟。

expressions.text: enter into an alliance/form an alliance

examples.english: The two countries entered into a defensive alliance.
examples.chinese: 两国订立了防御同盟。

examples.english: Apple and online service provider America Online formed an alliance.
examples.chinese: 苹果公司和网络服务供应商美国在线结成联盟。

centers.english: to be together again after being separated

examples.english: Did you know that Denise and Jonathon are back together?
examples.chinese: 丹尼丝和乔纳森又在一起了，你知道吗?

examples.english: It's so nice to have all the family back together again.
examples.chinese: 一家人和好如初真好。

examples.english: I'm back together with Johnny now and things are going pretty well.
examples.chinese: 我与约翰尼重归于好，现在关系很不错。

examples.english: Jack wants to get back together, but I've really had enough.
examples.chinese: 杰克想和好，但是我真的受够了。

examples.english: After 50 years apart, the twin sisters were eventually reunited.
examples.chinese: 分别50年后，这对孪生姐妹终于团聚了。

examples.english: In the early hours of this morning, the hostages were reunited with their families at Point Reach airbase.
examples.chinese: 今天凌晨，人质在里奇角空军基地与家人团聚。

centers.english: with another thing or other things

examples.english: I've put our passports in your handbag with the travellers cheques.
examples.chinese: 我把我们的护照和旅行支票一起放在你的提包里了。

examples.english: I hope you haven't thrown that letter out with the garbage!
examples.chinese: 希望你没有把那封信和垃圾一起扔了！

examples.english: a traditional Christmas dinner of roast turkey with all the trimmings
examples.chinese: 备有各种配料的传统圣诞烤火鸡晚餐

examples.english: Mix the butter and the sugar together.
examples.chinese: 将黄油和糖搅拌在一起。

examples.english: That skirt and jacket look really good together.
examples.chinese: 那条裙子配那件外套很好看。

examples.english: Together these two paintings are worth more than $10,000.
examples.chinese: 这两幅画合起来价值超过10,000美元。

examples.english: I keep my insurance policy in the top drawer, along with my other important documents.
examples.chinese: 我把保单连同其他重要文件放在最上面的抽屉里。

examples.english: Put it over there along with the other presents.
examples.chinese: 把它放到那边去，和其他礼物放在一起。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in progressive or passive

examples.english: Every new camera comes with a leather case and free film.
examples.chinese: 每台新相机都附有皮套和免费胶卷。

examples.english: All the main courses come with salad and chips.
examples.chinese: 主菜都附送沙拉和炸薯条。

examples.english: We have 5000 log cabins to rent. All come with their own private sauna.
examples.chinese: 我们有5,000间原木小屋出租，都带独立桑拿浴室。

examples.english: The video recorder has an accompanying booklet which contains full instructions.
examples.chinese: 录像机附带一本含详细说明的小册子。

examples.english: Each coursebook has an accompanying workbook for grammar practice.
examples.chinese: 每本教科书都有配套的语法练习册。

centers.english: when something is used together with something else
centers.chinese: 某物同其他物品一起使用

examples.english: The shampoo and conditioner should be used together for the best possible result.
examples.chinese: 洗发水和护发素得一起使用才能达到最佳效果。

examples.english: When you're slowing down, use the gears and the brakes together.
examples.chinese: 减速的时候，排挡和刹车要并用。

examples.english: A sensible diet along with regular exercise is the best way to lose weight.
examples.chinese: 合理的饮食加经常锻炼是最好的减肥方法。

examples.english: I love Italian food, together with a good bottle of red wine.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢意大利菜，配上一瓶优质的红酒。

examples.english: Small children need firmness combined with loving care.
examples.chinese: 对待小孩子要严格和关心相结合。

examples.english: The standard treatment is surgery, often combined with radiation.
examples.chinese: 标准的治疗方法是手术，常和放射治疗结合使用。

examples.english: The drug company recommended using Losec in combination with antibiotics for the treatment of ulcers.
examples.chinese: 制药公司建议洛赛克与抗生素混合使用以治疗溃疡。

examples.english: The flavor of paprika, in combination with sour cream, is used in many Eastern European cuisines.
examples.chinese: 红辣椒粉加酸奶油用于许多东欧的菜肴里。

examples.english: Learners will benefit from using the book in conjunction with the video.
examples.chinese: 这本书配合录像一起使用，学习者会有所得益。

examples.english: The file viewing functions can be used in conjunction with file manager.
examples.chinese: 文件阅读功能可与文件管理器配合使用。

examples.english: The new advertisement will be broadcast alongside AMV's two existing commercials during prime time viewing.
examples.chinese: 这则新广告将在黄金时段和AMV已有的两则商业广告一起播出。

examples.english: Only the island of Bali preserved, alongside its own traditions, the Brahman heritage of those ancient times.
examples.chinese: 只有巴厘岛把古代的婆罗门文化遗产随着该岛的传统保存了下来。

examples.english: Certain kinds of drug are not compatible and should never be taken together.
examples.chinese: 某些药不相容，千万不能一起使用。

examples.english: The two businesses have compatible aims, and a merger would be to everyone's advantage.
examples.chinese: 两家公司目标一致，合并对大家都有好处。

examples.english: Unfortunately he bought a printer that was not compatible with his computer.
examples.chinese: 真遗憾，他买的打印机与他的电脑不兼容。

centers.english: several different things or people considered together
centers.chinese: 一起考虑的几个不同的事物或人

examples.english: The Executive, Legislative, and Judiciary branches together make up the US government.
examples.chinese: 行政、立法和司法三个部门一起构成美国政府。

examples.english: Taken together, these measures should ensure a rapid return to financial stability.
examples.chinese: 整体考虑的话，这些措施应可保证很快就能使金融恢复稳定。

examples.english: Collectively, these studies showed a clear link between smoking and cancer.
examples.chinese: 这些研究都表明了吸烟与癌症之间的明确联系。

expressions.text: collectively called/collectively known as/collectively referred to as etc

examples.english: Belgium, Luxembourg, and the Netherlands are collectively known as the "Benelux' countries.
examples.chinese: 比利时、卢森堡和荷兰统称为“比卢荷经济联盟”国家。

examples.english: These substances are referred to collectively as ketone bodies.
examples.chinese: 这些物质被总称为酮体。

centers.english: next to someone or something

examples.english: Roy had the seat next to the window.
examples.chinese: 罗伊坐在靠窗的位置。

examples.english: I parked my car next to yours.
examples.chinese: 我把汽车停在了你的车的旁边。

examples.english: ‘Have you and Chris met?’ ‘Yes, we were sitting next to each other at dinner.’
examples.chinese: “你和克里斯见过面吗？”“见过了，吃饭时我们坐在一起。”

examples.english: ‘Where's the French dictionary?’ ‘On the bottom shelf, next to the encyclopaedia.’
examples.chinese: “法语词典在哪儿？”“在底层架子上，百科全书旁边。”

examples.english: I couldn't believe it. There was Tom Cruise, right next to me!
examples.chinese: 我简直不敢相信，汤姆·克鲁斯就在我旁边！

examples.english: The hotel was right next to the airport.
examples.chinese: 酒店就在机场的隔壁。

examples.english: I saw him standing by the window.
examples.chinese: 我看见他站在窗边。

examples.english: Weymouth is a pretty little town by the sea.
examples.chinese: 韦茅斯是一个美丽的海滨小镇。

examples.english: Several soldiers were sitting on the grass by the side of the road.
examples.chinese: 几名士兵坐在路边的草地上。

examples.english: Relatives are anxiously waiting by the phone for more news about the plane crash.
examples.chinese: 亲属焦急地守在电话机旁，等待更多有关飞机失事的消息。

examples.english: Ella came and sat down beside me.
examples.chinese: 埃拉走过来在我旁边坐下。

examples.english: On the table beside the bed were several medicine bottles.
examples.chinese: 床边的桌子上有几个药瓶。

examples.english: They were sitting beside the pool, eating breakfast.
examples.chinese: 他们坐在游泳池的旁边吃早餐。

examples.english: ‘Is this Maria's office?’ ‘No, hers is next door.’
examples.chinese: “这是玛丽亚的办公室吗？”“不是，她的在隔壁。”

examples.english: Have you met the people who've just moved in next door?
examples.chinese: 你见过隔壁刚搬来的人吗?

examples.english: Why don't we meet at that little French bistro next door to the theater?
examples.chinese: 我们就在剧院隔壁的那家法国小餐厅里碰面吧。

examples.english: ‘How do you know Marsha?’ ‘I used to live next door to her.’
examples.chinese: “你怎样认识玛莎的？”“我以前住在她隔壁。”

examples.english: I like to have a Thesaurus at my side whenever I do any writing.
examples.chinese: 我写东西的时候身边喜欢放一本分类词典。

examples.english: Dirk went and stood by her side, his arm around her slender waist.
examples.chinese: 德克走过去站到她的身边，一手揽着她纤细的腰。

expressions.text: at the side of something/on the side of something

examples.english: Richard left his motorcycle on the side of the road and started to walk.
examples.chinese: 理查德把摩托车停在路旁，开始步行。

examples.english: Tests in April showed that police cars parked at the side of motorways reduce speeds by ten miles per hour on average.
examples.chinese: 4月份的调查显示，在高速公路旁边停一些警车可以使汽车的车速平均每小时减慢10英里。

examples.english: We followed the path along the shore for several miles.
examples.chinese: 我们沿着岸边小路走了好几英里。

examples.english: Walk along the canal as far as the bridge.
examples.chinese: 沿着运河走到有桥的地方。

examples.english: The Rif Mountains were visible as we sailed along the African coast.
examples.chinese: 我们沿着非洲海岸航行，里夫山脉映入了眼帘。

examples.english: Troops were stationed all along the border.
examples.chinese: 整个边境上都有驻军。

examples.english: We walked along slowly, side by side.
examples.chinese: 我们并肩慢慢地走着。

examples.english: Sabina and Mel sat side by side in the back seat.
examples.chinese: 萨比纳和梅尔并排坐在后座上。

examples.english: The two boats were moored alongside each other in the harbor.
examples.chinese: 两只小船并排停在港口。

examples.english: I decided to take the path alongside the railway track.
examples.chinese: 我决定走铁路旁边的小路。

examples.english: The driver was just getting out of his car when a police car pulled up alongside.
examples.chinese: 司机正要下车，这时一辆警车在旁边停了下来。

examples.english: The sidewalk was wide enough for us to walk three abreast.
examples.chinese: 那人行道够宽，我们可以三个人并排一起走。

centers.english: when something is next to something else

examples.english: I could hear a furious argument going on in the next room.
examples.chinese: 我能听到隔壁房间有人在激烈地争吵。

examples.english: There's a bakery just around the corner in the next street.
examples.chinese: 就在隔壁那条街上有一家面包店。

examples.english: The blaze spread to two adjacent buildings before firefighters were able to contain it.
examples.chinese: 消防员还没来得及控制火势，熊熊的烈火就蔓延到了毗邻的两栋大楼。

examples.english: Fields adjacent to the nuclear facility were found to have high levels of radioactivity.
examples.chinese: 在与核设施毗邻的田地上发现有很强的辐射。

examples.english: We had adjoining rooms at the hotel, so we could just go backwards and forwards between them.
examples.chinese: 我们在旅馆里的房间都是相连的，所以我们可以穿梭其中。

examples.english: Three planes were waiting to take off on an adjoining runway.
examples.chinese: 在相邻的跑道上有三架飞机等候起飞。

centers.english: to be in a position next to something

examples.english: Cindy's house was next to ours.
examples.chinese: 辛迪家在我们家隔壁。

examples.english: The primary school is next to the town hall.
examples.chinese: 这所小学在市政厅的隔壁。

examples.english: The kitchen adjoins the sitting room, which is spacious, high and airy.
examples.chinese: 厨房与起居室相连，宽敞通风，屋顶很高。

examples.english: The 100-acre parcel of land adjoins Seagal's ranch, about 30 miles north of Santa Barbara.
examples.chinese: 这块100英亩的土地毗邻西加的农场，位于圣巴巴拉以北大约30英里的地方。

examples.english: The Black Sea borders a half-dozen countries.
examples.chinese: 黑海周围有六个国家。

examples.english: France borders Spain along the length of the Pyrenees.
examples.chinese: 法国沿着比利牛斯山脉与西班牙邻接。

centers.english: a long distance

examples.english: Have you driven far?
examples.chinese: 你开了很远吗？

examples.english: We won't be able to go much farther because of the snow.
examples.chinese: 由于下雪，我们无法走得更远。

examples.english: Who do you think can jump the farthest?
examples.chinese: 你认为谁跳得最远？

examples.english: Cleveland isn't very far from here.
examples.chinese: 克利夫兰离这儿不很远。

examples.english: We were sitting too far from the stage to hear what the actors were saying.
examples.chinese: 我们坐得离舞台太远，听不清演员的台词。

examples.english: I was now far behind the others and knew I couldn't catch up.
examples.chinese: 我现在已经落后别人很多，知道自己赶不上了。

examples.english: The ship was so far away that we could hardly see it.
examples.chinese: 船这么远，我们几乎看不见它了。

examples.english: She wanted to get as far away from New York as possible.
examples.chinese: 她要离开纽约，越远越好。

examples.english: Because of the snowstorm on the east coast, flights for Boston were sent as far away as Montreal.
examples.chinese: 由于东海岸有暴风雪，去波士顿的航班要转飞到其他地方，最远到蒙特利尔去。

examples.english: Thousands of people had come from far away for a chance to see the Pope.
examples.chinese: 成千上万的人远道而来，希望有机会看到教皇。

expressions.text: a long way/ a long ways

examples.english: You must be tired - you've come a long way.
examples.chinese: 你远道而来，一定很累了吧。

examples.english: The farm is a long way from the highway.
examples.chinese: 这家农场离公路很远。

expressions.text: a long way away/a long way off

examples.english: We could hear them shouting from a long way away.
examples.chinese: 我们能听到他们在远处高声叫喊。

examples.english: From the map, it looked as if the lake was still a long way off.
examples.chinese: 从地图上看这个湖似乎还有很长一段路。

examples.english: It's a long way down - hold on tight.
examples.chinese: 下面很深，抓牢。

expressions.text: a fair way/quite a way/a good way/ quite a ways

examples.english: Look at the map. It's a fair way to drive in one day.
examples.chinese: 看看地图，一天内要开完这些路真够远的。

examples.english: The children will have to walk quite a way if we take them into the woods.
examples.chinese: 如果我们带孩子去树林，他们得走相当远一段路。

expressions.text: some distance/quite a distance/a good distance

examples.english: José accompanied us for some distance until we reached the highway.
examples.chinese: 乔斯陪我们走了很长一段路，一直到我们上了大路。

examples.english: Their house is actually quite a distance from the edge of town.
examples.chinese: 他们家的房子其实离城边上有相当长的一段距离。

examples.english: We hiked miles yesterday.
examples.chinese: 我们昨天走了老远一段路。

examples.english: I don't see Jane much any more - she lives miles away.
examples.chinese: 我不再经常见到简了，她住得很远。

examples.english: The hotel is miles from the station - I'll come and get you.
examples.chinese: 旅馆离火车站很远，我会来接你。

examples.english: They live up in the mountains, miles from anywhere.
examples.chinese: 他们居住在高高的山上，远离尘嚣。

examples.english: Around here you can walk miles and miles and never see anyone.
examples.chinese: 这一带你走上很长很长的路也看不到一个人。

examples.english: The car was parked in the middle of the street, nowhere near the curb.
examples.chinese: 这辆汽车停在路中央，离路缘很远。

examples.english: After eight hours climbing, we were still nowhere near the top of the mountain.
examples.chinese: 我们爬了八个小时后离山顶还是远得很。

examples.english: With the car they could travel far afield each summer.
examples.chinese: 有了这辆车，每年夏天他们就能跑得很远了。

examples.english: His work took him as far afield as Moscow and Delhi.
examples.chinese: 他的工作使他跑到像莫斯科和德里这样远的地方。

examples.english: The next day we ventured farther afield and sailed out to one of the islands.
examples.chinese: 第二天我们大着胆走得更远，航行到那些岛中的一个上去了。

centers.english: when something you can see or hear is far away
centers.chinese: 可看到或听到的东西在远处

examples.english: In the distance, he could see the tall chimneys of the factory.
examples.chinese: 在远处他看得见那家工厂的高耸的烟囱。

examples.english: Dogs were barking somewhere in the distance.
examples.chinese: 远处什么地方狗在吠叫。

examples.english: By now, the plane was just a distant speck in the sky.
examples.chinese: 现在飞机在空中只是远远一个小点了。

examples.english: There was a flash of lightning and then the rumble of distant thunder.
examples.chinese: 先是一道闪电，接着远处传来一阵隆隆的雷声。

examples.english: Another ship appeared on the horizon.
examples.chinese: 又一艘船出现在地平线上。

examples.english: Storm clouds on the horizon were rapidly blowing in our direction.
examples.chinese: 天边暴风雨的乌云迅速朝我们这个方向飘来。

examples.english: From a distance, the two birds look similar.
examples.chinese: 从远处看，这两只鸟看起来很相像。

examples.english: He followed her at a distance, making sure she didn't see him.
examples.chinese: 他隔得远远地跟着她，小心不让她看到。

expressions.text: a long way off/far off/far away

examples.english: Then, from a long way off, I heard high-pitched laughing.
examples.chinese: 然后，我听到远处传来尖利的笑声。

examples.english: There was a sound of a car backfiring far off in the night.
examples.chinese: 夜里远处有一辆汽车发出的回火声。

examples.english: Far away, to the east, you can just see the spire of the cathedral.
examples.chinese: 向东边看，你刚能看到远处教堂的尖塔。

examples.english: He could hear voices from way off in another part of the house.
examples.chinese: 他能听到从屋子的另一边传来的说话声。

examples.english: Way off in the distance I could see a light shining.
examples.chinese: 我能看到远处有一点灯光。

examples.english: The police officer fired one shot at long range and hit the man.
examples.chinese: 警察在很远的地方开了一枪打中了那人。

examples.english: The guns are not nearly as accurate at long range.
examples.chinese: 这些枪远距离射击就没有那么准了。

centers.english: far away from other places

examples.english: Food at the fair comes from such far-off places as Brazil and Lithuania.
examples.chinese: 商品展览会上的食品来自像巴西和立陶宛这么远的国家。

examples.english: How can we send our young men off to distant lands to die in foreign wars?
examples.chinese: 我们怎么可以把自己的青年送往遥远的国度去死在外国战争中呢？

examples.english: Ed told us stories of all the faraway countries he had visited.
examples.chinese: 埃德对我们说起他去过的所有遥远的国家。

examples.english: Avis always dreamed of an exotic vacation in some faraway place.
examples.chinese: 阿维斯总是梦想要去某个遥远的地方去度一个富于异国情调的假期。

examples.english: They moved to a remote farmhouse in North Wales.
examples.chinese: 他们搬到了北威尔士的一处遥远的农舍去了。

examples.english: The helicopter crashed in a remote desert area.
examples.chinese: 直升机在荒无人烟的沙漠上坠毁了。

examples.english: If you travel to isolated areas, make sure you have a good guide.
examples.chinese: 如果你到偏僻的地区去旅行，一定要找个好向导。

examples.english: The area is extremely isolated because of the hills that surround it.
examples.chinese: 这个地区被群山环抱，因此与外面隔绝。

examples.english: The community was protected from change by its isolation because it was isolated.
examples.chinese: 这一社会由于与世隔绝而原封不动。

examples.english: They drove to a secluded spot in the country to have their picnic.
examples.chinese: 他们开车到乡下一个僻静的地方去野餐。

examples.english: We rented a little cabin on the edge of a secluded lake.
examples.chinese: 我们在一个幽静的湖边租了间小木屋。

expressions.text: in the middle of nowhere/miles from anywhere/in the back of beyond

examples.english: Amazingly, we found a really nice motel in the middle of nowhere.
examples.chinese: 出人意料的是我们在偏僻的地方找到一家很好的汽车旅馆。

examples.english: We were miles from anywhere and had no idea how to get back.
examples.chinese: 我们离城镇很远，不知该怎么回去。

examples.english: I'm not moving to that place - it's out in the boondocks.
examples.chinese: 我不要搬到那个地方去—太偏僻了。

examples.english: Gayle lives out in the boonies - it would take at least an hour to get there.
examples.chinese: 盖尔住得很远，到他那里至少得一小时。

examples.english: The house is a little out of the way, but you should be able to find it.
examples.chinese: 这房子有点儿偏远，但你应该能找到。

examples.english: This must be one of the most out-of-the-way places in Scotland.
examples.chinese: 这里肯定是苏格兰最偏远的地方之一。

expressions.text: off the beaten track/ off the beaten path

examples.english: The little restaurant was so far off the beaten track that we almost didn't find it.
examples.chinese: 这家小餐馆在很偏远的一个地方，我们差点就没找着。

examples.english: Greg likes to get off the beaten path and discover places that other tourists don't find.
examples.chinese: 格雷格喜欢跑到偏僻地方去寻访其他旅游者错过的地方。

examples.english: I live way out in Laurel Canyon.
examples.chinese: 我住在劳雷尔谷一个很偏远的地方。

examples.english: We drove way out past Reno to the old Fielding place.
examples.chinese: 我们开车越过里诺很远直到菲尔丁家的老房子。

examples.english: Our job is to organize the company's far-flung offices.
examples.chinese: 我们的工作是负责公司外地事务所的业务安排。

examples.english: Participants come from nations as far-flung as Iceland and Japan.
examples.chinese: 参加者来自像冰岛和日本这样遥远的国家。

centers.english: too far away to reach

examples.english: Gary jumped for the ball but it was just out of reach.
examples.chinese: 加里跳起来接球，但差一点儿够不着。

examples.english: Put the food somewhere out of reach of the dog.
examples.chinese: 把这些食物放到狗够不着的地方去。

expressions.text: out of somebody's reach/out of reach of

examples.english: All medicines should be kept out of children's reach.
examples.chinese: 所有药品都应该放在儿童够不到的地方。

examples.english: We'd better shoot now before the trucks get out of range.
examples.chinese: 我们最好现在射击，否则卡车要开出射程了。

examples.english: Villagers are moving south, out of range of enemy gunfire.
examples.chinese: 村民们现在往南搬到敌人炮火射程之外的地方。

centers.english: travelling or reaching over a long distance

examples.english: There are fears that the country has produced long-range missiles capable of reaching across the border.
examples.chinese: 人们担心该国已生产出能打过国界的远程导弹。

examples.english: Long-distance phone calls have gotten so much cheaper.
examples.chinese: 长途电话已便宜得多了。

examples.english: A long-distance bus service now links the cities.
examples.chinese: 现在有连接各城市的长途汽车服务。

examples.english: The development of long-distance commerce led to greater cultural contacts between continents.
examples.chinese: 远距离贸易的发展促进了更大程度上的洲际文化交流。

examples.english: It's so much nicer to fly business class on long-haul flights.
examples.chinese: 长途飞行乘坐商务舱要舒适得多。

examples.english: long-haul routes between Europe and Asia
examples.chinese: 欧洲与亚洲之间的长途飞行路线

centers.english: not travelling or reaching a long distance
centers.chinese: 不越过长途或到长距离外

examples.english: Short-range missiles in Asia do not pose a direct threat to the U.S.
examples.chinese: 亚洲的短程导弹不对美国构成直接威胁。

examples.english: The airline plans to increase the number of short-haul flights between European capitals.
examples.chinese: 该航空公司计划增加欧洲各国首都之间的短程航班。

centers.english: words for describing extreme opinions or people
centers.chinese: 描述偏激的观点或人的词语

examples.english: Buchanan's political views are too extreme for most Americans.
examples.chinese: 布坎南的政见对大多数美国人来说太偏激了。

examples.english: extreme left-wing groups
examples.chinese: 极端左翼团体

examples.english: We like to present an extreme position to get people to react to it.
examples.chinese: 我们喜欢表现得很极端来激起人们的反应。

examples.english: The military is expecting a violent response from extremist groups.
examples.chinese: 军方预料极端组织会有暴力的反应。

examples.english: extremist elements within the party
examples.chinese: 党内的极端分子

examples.english: Neither of these extremist solutions seemed very popular with the voters.
examples.chinese: 这两个过激的解决办法似乎没有一个受到选民欢迎。

examples.english: Both the far-left Communists and the far-right National Alliance are calling for new elections.
examples.chinese: 极左的共产党人和极右的国民联盟都在呼吁进行新的选举。

examples.english: Observers are disturbed by the rise in the number of far-right militias.
examples.chinese: 观察家对于极右国民自卫队人数的增长深感不安。

examples.english: The army is run by a few hardline generals.
examples.chinese: 军队由一些走强硬路线的将领所掌管。

examples.english: Hardline separatists have rejected the proposed constitution.
examples.chinese: 态度强硬的分离主义者拒绝了所提议的宪法。

examples.english: He spoke before the ultra-right-wing Heritage Foundation on Thursday.
examples.chinese: 星期四他向极右翼的传统基金会发表了讲话。

examples.english: The Socialist party has been infiltrated by members of the ultra-radical ‘True Path’ group.
examples.chinese: 社会党中已渗进了极为激进的“真理道路”组织的成员。

centers.english: someone who has extreme opinions

examples.english: The government condemns anyone who disagrees with it as extremists.
examples.chinese: 该政府把所有异己者都谴责成是极端分子。

examples.english: The regime has been accused of supporting extremists in other countries in the region.
examples.chinese: 该政权被指责支持本地区其他国家的极端分子。

examples.english: Left-wing extremists have threatened to disrupt the political convention.
examples.chinese: 左翼极端分子威胁说要扰乱这次政治会议。

examples.english: His parents were religious fanatics who didn't allow him to play with other children.
examples.chinese: 他的父母是狂热的宗教信徒，不允许他和其他孩子一起玩。

examples.english: Pro-Fascist fanatics have continued their attacks on foreigners.
examples.chinese: 支持法西斯主义的狂热分子继续攻击外国人。

examples.english: His government has supplied weapons to fanatical separatist groups abroad.
examples.chinese: 他的政府向国外狂热的分离主义组织提供了武器。

examples.english: Her religious fanaticism has alienated most of her old friends.
examples.chinese: 她在宗教方面的狂热态度使她大多数老朋友都与她疏远了。

examples.english: Cuban-American hardliners continue to reject any dealings with Castro.
examples.chinese: 古巴裔美国人中的强硬者依然拒绝和卡斯特罗作任何交易。

examples.english: The Prime Minister has been criticized by hardliners in his party for giving away too much in the treaty.
examples.chinese: 总理受到党内强硬派的批评，说他在条约中作出了太多的让步。

examples.english: He is one of the militants convicted of the World Trade Center bombing.
examples.chinese: 他是已经判罪的世贸中心爆炸事件的激进分子之一。

examples.english: A crowd of militants took to the streets to protest the government's policies.
examples.chinese: 一群激进分子走上了大街，抗议政府的政策。

examples.english: Yassin is the founder of the militant Islamic movement Hamas.
examples.chinese: 亚辛是伊斯兰激进运动组织哈马斯的创始人。

examples.english: an organized Christian fundamentalist movement
examples.chinese: 一个有组织的基督教原教旨主义运动

examples.english: They belong to a fundamentalist church.
examples.chinese: 他们属于一个原教旨主义的教会。

examples.english: The organization has only about 30 hardcore supporters.
examples.chinese: 这个组织只有30名左右核心支持者。

examples.english: Dole at least had the support of loyal hard-core Republicans.
examples.chinese: 多尔至少有忠诚的共和党中坚分子的支持。

examples.english: A few zealots strongly objected to the proposed sale of alcohol at the local store.
examples.chinese: 有几个狂热分子强烈反对在本地商店里售酒的建议。

examples.english: Anti-abortion zealots are responsible for the bombing of the clinic.
examples.chinese: 反对堕胎的狂热分子对诊所的爆炸事件负有责任。

examples.english: Salisbury, Walton, and a few other diehards still refused to join the coalition.
examples.chinese: 索尔兹伯里、华尔顿和其他几个强硬分子仍拒绝加入联盟。

examples.english: Taylor is one of the diehards willing to push the development program at any price.
examples.chinese: 泰勒是强硬派之一，他们要不惜任何代价推进这个开发计划。

examples.english: The government supported Burnell to keep his diehard supporters happy.
examples.chinese: 政府支持伯内尔，以取悦他的顽固支持者。

examples.english: Many think the lunatic fringe has really harmed the public image of gays among the middle class.
examples.chinese: 许多人认为极端分子大大损害了中产阶级中同性恋者的公众形象。

examples.english: Animal rights campaigners blame the latest set of bomb attacks on the lunatic fringe within the movement.
examples.chinese: 动物权利活动家把最近发生的一连串炸弹袭击事件归罪于这一运动内的狂热分子。

centers.english: between two or more people or things
centers.chinese: 两个或两个以上的人或物之间的

examples.english: The ball rolled between the goalkeeper's legs.
examples.chinese: 球在守门员的双腿之间穿过。

examples.english: I had to sit between my two little brothers at dinner.
examples.chinese: 吃饭时我得坐在我的两个小弟弟中间。

examples.english: The house is somewhere between here and the airport.
examples.chinese: 那所房子在这里和机场之间的某处地方。

examples.english: Between the trees and the river, the slope was covered with beautiful daffodils.
examples.chinese: 树林与小河间的斜坡上满是美丽的水仙花。

examples.english: Barnegat Books is situated on Eleventh Street, about halfway between Broadway and University Place.
examples.chinese: 巴恩盖特书店位于第十一街，约在百老汇与大学区之间的地方。

examples.english: She found a small pool in between the rocks.
examples.chinese: 她在岩石中间发现一个小水塘。

examples.english: Why don't you put the television in between the bookcase and the window?
examples.chinese: 你干吗不把电视机放在书架和窗户之间的地方？

examples.english: Rachel got in between Rob and Chris for a better view.
examples.chinese: 雷切尔插在罗布和克里斯之间想看得更清楚些。

examples.english: The farmer knocked off the lumps of earth in between the blades of his plough.
examples.chinese: 农夫把犁板片中间的泥块敲掉。

examples.english: I saw him standing among a group of students.
examples.chinese: 我看到他站在一群学生中间。

examples.english: The house was hidden among the trees.
examples.chinese: 这房子被树木掩蔽。

examples.english: We helped Mom search for her wedding ring among the rocks below the boardwalk.
examples.chinese: 我们帮妈妈在木板小道下的石子间寻找她的婚戒。

examples.english: Cindy and Marcia sat at either end of the sofa with me in the middle.
examples.chinese: 辛迪和马西娅分别坐在沙发两头，我在中间。

examples.english: Here's a photo of my brother's baseball team -- that's Sean in the middle.
examples.chinese: 这张是我哥哥那支棒球队的照片，中间那个是肖恩。

examples.english: Just over the hill we saw a pond in the middle of the pines.
examples.chinese: 就在山顶上我们看到松林间有一个小池塘。

examples.english: I spent a very uncomfortable evening at the concert sandwiched between two very large ladies.
examples.chinese: 听音乐会时，我被挤在两个大块头女士中间，整个晚上都很不舒服。

examples.english: Alan got back to the parking lot only to find his car sandwiched between a pick- up and a big truck.
examples.chinese: 艾伦回到停车场，却发觉他的车被夹在一辆皮卡车和一辆大卡车中间。

centers.english: moving backwards

examples.english: He looked back over his shoulder.
examples.chinese: 他转过头往后看去。

examples.english: I stepped back to let them pass.
examples.chinese: 我朝后退了一步让他们过去。

examples.english: Sarah fell backwards in the snow.
examples.chinese: 萨拉向后跌倒在雪地里。

examples.english: Can you skate backward?
examples.chinese: 你会倒滑吗？

examples.english: Stepping backwards, Harry trod on the foot of the woman behind him.
examples.chinese: 哈里向后退时，踩着了身后一名女子的脚。

examples.english: She gently rocked the baby backwards and forwards.
examples.chinese: 她轻轻地前后摇晃着婴儿。

centers.english: to move backwards

examples.english: Hardy backed slowly toward the door.
examples.chinese: 哈迪慢慢地朝门口退去。

examples.english: Simms quietly backed out of the office, his face red with embarrassment.
examples.chinese: 西姆斯满脸通红，尴尬地默默退出了办公室。

examples.english: When she was sure the baby was asleep, she backed softly through the bedroom door.
examples.chinese: 当她肯定孩子已经睡着时，就轻轻地从卧室门退了出去。

examples.english: ‘Are you crazy?’ she cried, backing away.
examples.chinese: “你疯了吗？”她边叫边往后退。

examples.english: We slowly backed away from the rattlesnake.
examples.chinese: 我们慢慢地退离了那条响尾蛇。

examples.english: Back up a bit so that everyone can see.
examples.chinese: 往后退一点让大家都能看见。

examples.english: Can you back up a few steps so that I can open the door?
examples.chinese: 你往后退几步让我开门行吗？

examples.english: Jim saw me approaching and quickly retreated down a side street.
examples.chinese: 吉姆看见我走近，就赶快退避到一条小街上去。

examples.english: ‘You haven't heard the last of this!’ shouted Spencer, retreating up the stairs.
examples.chinese: “这件事还没有了结！”斯潘塞边叫边退着上了楼。

examples.english: Myers quickly stepped back into the house when he caught sight of us.
examples.chinese: 迈尔斯一看见我们就赶快退进房子里去。

examples.english: As the lights of a car approached he stepped back into the shadows.
examples.chinese: 当一辆汽车的灯光靠近时，他退入了阴暗处。

examples.english: She looked at the dead body and recoiled.
examples.chinese: 她看见那具尸体便往后缩。

examples.english: She recoiled from his touch.
examples.chinese: 他一碰她，她便往后缩。

examples.english: When Helen took his arm he tried to pull away.
examples.chinese: 当海伦挽住他的手臂时，他想向后挣脱。

examples.english: I tried to kiss her but she pulled away.
examples.chinese: 我想吻她，但她避开了。

centers.english: to make a vehicle go backwards

examples.english: You'll have to reverse to let them pass.
examples.chinese: 你得倒一下车，让他们过去。

examples.english: He slowly reversed the van into the parking place.
examples.chinese: 他慢慢地把小货车倒着开进了停车场。

examples.english: As I approached the house a car reversed out of the driveway and sped off down the road.
examples.chinese: 当我走近房子时，一辆车从车道里倒了出来，沿着马路急驰而去。

examples.english: The car stopped and then began to back up.
examples.chinese: 那辆车停了下来，开始倒着行驶。

examples.english: Back the truck up a little more, will you?
examples.chinese: 把卡车再往后倒一点，好吗？

examples.english: Cindi backed up the car and stopped in front of the door.
examples.chinese: 辛迪把车倒到门前。

examples.english: I wouldn't park there -- it's going to be very difficult to back out again.
examples.chinese: 我不会把车停在那儿—再想倒出来可就难了。

examples.english: Morris carefully backed the truck into the shed.
examples.chinese: 莫里斯小心翼翼地把卡车倒进了车棚。

centers.english: the back part of something

examples.english: Someone crashed into the back of my car.
examples.chinese: 有辆车撞进了我的车后部。

examples.english: You can leave your bike around the back.
examples.chinese: 你可以把自行车停放在后面。

examples.english: They walked past the back of the cottage.
examples.chinese: 他们在那间村舍后面走过。

examples.english: Did you know you have paint on the back of your skirt?
examples.chinese: 你知道自己裙子后面沾了点油漆吗？

examples.english: ‘How do I turn the computer on?’ ‘There's a switch at the back.’
examples.chinese: “这电脑我怎样打开？”“它后面有个开关。”

examples.english: Access to the kitchen is from the rear.
examples.chinese: 厨房是从后面进入的。

examples.english: There are more seats at the rear of the theater.
examples.chinese: 剧场后面有更多座位。

centers.english: the back of something flat

examples.english: I wrote down her address on the back of an envelope.
examples.chinese: 我把她的地址写在一个信封后面。

examples.english: He was trying to scrape the wax off with the back of a knife.
examples.chinese: 他尝试用刀背把蜡刮掉。

examples.english: If you look on the back, you'll see the artist's signature.
examples.chinese: 你看看反面就会见到那位艺术家的签名。

examples.english: ‘I can't see the wine list.’ ‘It's on the back.’
examples.chinese: “我没看见有酒单。”“在背面。”

examples.english: Write your name here and on the other side put your phone number.
examples.chinese: 在这里写上姓名，在另一面写上电话号码。

examples.english: Sign the check on the reverse side.
examples.chinese: 在支票背面签名。

examples.english: The reverse side of the coin has the president's head on it.
examples.chinese: 这枚硬币的背面有总统的头像。

centers.english: at the back of something

examples.english: I couldn't see very well because we were seated in the back.
examples.chinese: 因为我们坐在后面的关系，我看得不太清楚。

examples.english: There's something rotting at the back of the refrigerator.
examples.chinese: 冰箱靠近里面的地方有东西腐烂了。

examples.english: I found your passport -- it was at the back of the drawer.
examples.chinese: 我找到你的护照了—就在抽屉最里面。

examples.english: Passengers for Birmingham should sit at the rear of the train.
examples.chinese: 前往伯明翰的乘客应坐在列车的后部。

examples.english: Brenda sat at the reception desk at the rear of the main hall.
examples.chinese: 布伦达坐在位于大厅后部的接待处。

examples.english: A VW's engine is at the rear of the vehicle.
examples.chinese: “大众”汽车的引擎装在车身的后部。

examples.english: Just throw all your bags in the back.
examples.chinese: 把所有的包都扔到后面去。

examples.english: Don't let the dog sit in the front -- he has to go in the back.
examples.chinese: 别让狗坐在前面—它得到后面去。

examples.english: She couldn't see out of the rear window because of all the junk in the back of the truck.
examples.chinese: 由于卡车后部堆满了乱七八糟的东西，她不能从后窗往外看。

examples.english: The burglars broke into the house through the back door.
examples.chinese: 窃贼们从后门闯进了屋子。

examples.english: The rear brakes are completely worn out.
examples.chinese: 后刹车完全磨损了。

examples.english: You can put your suitcase on the back seat of the car.
examples.chinese: 你可以把手提箱放在汽车后座上。

examples.english: They made their way toward the rear exit.
examples.chinese: 他们走向后面的出口。

examples.english: The rear carriage of the train is reserved for non-smokers.
examples.chinese: 火车后面的车厢是专门留给不吸烟的乘客的。

centers.english: under something that is directly above

examples.english: The pen fell under the desk.
examples.chinese: 钢笔掉到桌子下面去了。

examples.english: If there's no one at home, just shove the letter under the door.
examples.chinese: 如果家里没人，就把信塞在门下面。

examples.english: A small dog scampered into the room and dived under the table.
examples.chinese: 一只小狗蹦蹦跳跳进了房间，一下子钻到桌子底下。

examples.english: We stood close together under his umbrella, trying to keep dry.
examples.chinese: 我们紧靠着站在他的雨伞下面躲雨。

examples.english: We found your keys in the sofa underneath a cushion.
examples.chinese: 我们在沙发的一个靠垫下面找到了你的钥匙。

examples.english: The cats like to sleep underneath the wood stove when it's cold.
examples.chinese: 天冷的时候，猫咪喜欢睡在柴炉底下。

examples.english: Sheets of newspaper had been laid underneath the carpet.
examples.chinese: 地毯下面铺了一张张报纸。

examples.english: A pipe was leaking, so we put a bucket underneath to catch the drips.
examples.chinese: 一条管道漏水，我们就在下面放了一个水桶接滴下来的水。

examples.english: The ship passed beneath the Golden Gate Bridge into San Francisco Bay.
examples.chinese: 船从金门大桥下经过，进入圣弗朗西斯科湾。

examples.english: As he walked across the hall, the boards creaked beneath his feet.
examples.chinese: 他穿过大厅时，木地板在他脚下吱吱作响。

centers.english: in a lower position or at a lower level than something

examples.english: John lives on the top floor and Julie lives on the floor below.
examples.chinese: 约翰住顶楼，朱莉住在他楼下。

examples.english: They looked down from the mountain to the valley far below.
examples.chinese: 他们从山上俯瞰，下面是深深的山谷。

examples.english: The dog's leg was broken just below the hip.
examples.chinese: 小狗的一条腿正好在臀部靠下的位置摔断了。

examples.english: Her hair hangs down below her shoulders.
examples.chinese: 她秀发垂肩。

examples.english: Our pilot spotted two MiG29s flying below us.
examples.chinese: 我们的飞行员发现两架米格一29型战斗机在我们下面飞行。

examples.english: Beneath the east window of the church stands the great altar.
examples.chinese: 教堂东边的窗户下面是大祭坛。

examples.english: The army was encamped beneath the castle walls.
examples.chinese: 部队在城墙下安营。

examples.english: They stood on the cliff and gazed down at the raging sea beneath.
examples.chinese: 他们站在悬崖上，凝视着下面汹涌的大海。

centers.english: under the ground or under water

examples.english: It is one of the largest mountain ranges under the Pacific Ocean.
examples.chinese: 这是太平洋下面最大的山脉之一。

examples.english: Several of the stolen items were found buried under Mackie's house.
examples.chinese: 其中的几件被盗物品被发现埋在麦凯的房子下面。

examples.english: When the project is finished, most of Boston's major roads will run under the city.
examples.chinese: 这项工程竣工以后，波士顿的大多数主要道路都将引入地下。

examples.english: Far beneath the waters of the North Atlantic lies the wreck of the great liner, the Titanic.
examples.chinese: 北大西洋的深海底下躺着巨轮“泰坦尼克”号的残骸。

examples.english: Petroleum occurs in natural deposits beneath the surface of the earth.
examples.chinese: 石油出现在地表下面的天然沉积物中。

examples.english: The men work underground for 12 hours a day.
examples.chinese: 工人们每天在地下工作12小时。

examples.english: The explosives will be stored below ground in concrete bunkers.
examples.chinese: 炸药将存放在地下的混凝土掩体里。

examples.english: The nuclear waste is buried a half-mile underground.
examples.chinese: 核废料被埋在地下半英里处。

examples.english: an underground parking garage
examples.chinese: 地下停车库

examples.english: A subterranean stream is believed to flow underneath the town.
examples.chinese: 据认为这个镇下面有地下小河流过。

examples.english: a subterranean explosion
examples.chinese: 地下爆炸

examples.english: Electronic sensors have located a huge subterranean cavern in the Sierre Madre mountain range.
examples.chinese: 电子感应器在马德雷山脉中发现了一个很大的地下洞穴。

examples.english: I don't like opening my eyes underwater.
examples.chinese: 我在水下不喜欢把眼睛睁开。

examples.english: a camera specially designed for use under water
examples.chinese: 专门为水下使用而设计的照相机

examples.english: On land the seal is a clumsy creature, but underwater it moves with grace and agility.
examples.chinese: 海豹在陆上是一种笨拙的动物，可在水中它们的行动却优雅敏捷。

examples.english: The research is done in underwater laboratories, so that scientists can study the creatures in their natural habitat.
examples.chinese: 研究在水下实验室进行，这样科学家就可以研究生活在自然栖息地的水下生物。

examples.english: The boat hit a submerged rock.
examples.chinese: 船撞上了一个暗礁。！

examples.english: Sometimes at low tide you can just see the submerged wreck of a large ship.
examples.chinese: 有时退潮的时候，你正好可以看到水下一艘大船的残骸。

examples.english: The flight recorder was found smashed and partially submerged in a creek nearby.
examples.chinese: 飞行记录仪被发现时已经撞坏，部分没入附近的一条小溪里。

centers.english: under something such as clothes, skin, or paint
centers.chinese: 在衣服、皮肤或涂料等下面

examples.english: I was wearing a thick sweater under my coat, but I was still cold.
examples.chinese: 我在外套里面穿了一件厚毛衣，可是仍觉得冷。

examples.english: Scabies is a disease caused by a tiny insect that lays its eggs just underneath the skin.
examples.chinese: 疥疮是一种由在皮肤表皮下面产卵的小虫子引起的疾病。

examples.english: Padding prevents the rug's color from seeping through onto the floor underneath.
examples.chinese: 铺上垫料可防止地毯的颜色渗到下面的地板上去。

examples.english: The boy lay trembling beneath the bedclothes.
examples.chinese: 男孩躺在被子下面瑟瑟发抖。

examples.english: The inscription was hidden beneath a layer of dirt and grime.
examples.chinese: 碑文隐藏在一层污垢之下。

centers.english: in a higher position than something

examples.english: There was a light above the table.
examples.chinese: 桌子上方有一盏灯。

examples.english: Above his bed is a picture of two old men sitting on a park bench.
examples.chinese: 他床头上方有一幅画，是两个老人坐在公园的一条长凳上。

examples.english: During my last year of college, I lived in a little apartment above a grocery store.
examples.chinese: 我在读大学的最后一年，住在一家杂货店楼上的一套小公寓房里。

examples.english: We looked up and saw a helicopter hovering directly above us.
examples.chinese: 我们抬起头，看到一架直升机就在我们头顶上盘旋。

examples.english: We could hear noises in the room above.
examples.chinese: 我们能听到楼上房间传来的声音。

examples.english: The light came from above them and to their right.
examples.chinese: 灯光从上面照向他们的右方。

examples.english: Mexico City is 2400 metres above sea level.
examples.chinese: 墨西哥城海拔2,400米。

examples.english: The sign over the door said ‘Employees Only’.
examples.chinese: 门上方的牌子写着“员工专用”。

examples.english: A thick layer of smoke hung over the city.
examples.chinese: 城市上空弥漫着一层厚厚的烟雾。

examples.english: About 400 fans jumped over barricades and invaded the playing field.
examples.chinese: 大约有400名球迷越过障碍冲进球场。

examples.english: As the planes flew over, Selim could see the Russian markings on their wings.
examples.chinese: 飞机从上空飞过，塞利姆能看到机翼上有俄罗斯的标记。

examples.english: Riot police fired over the heads of the demonstrators.
examples.chinese: 防暴警察向示威人群头顶上方开枪。

examples.english: A flock of birds passed overhead.
examples.chinese: 一群鸟儿在头上飞过。

examples.english: Suddenly, they heard the rumble of thunder overhead.
examples.chinese: 突然，他们听到天空中雷声隆隆。

examples.english: Please put your luggage in the overhead compartment.
examples.chinese: 请把行李放在上方的行李架上。
