examples.english: I found some old pictures of my mother up in the attic.
examples.chinese: 我在阁楼里找到了母亲的一些旧照片。

examples.english: Are you able to see up there or do you need a flashlight?
examples.chinese: 你能看到那上面吗？是不是需要一个手电筒？

examples.english: The bathroom is upstairs on your left.
examples.chinese: 浴室在楼上左手边。

examples.english: Don't you think the woman upstairs is kind of strange?
examples.chinese: 你不觉得楼上那女人有点怪吗?

examples.english: The thieves got in through an upstairs window.
examples.chinese: 小偷是从楼上的窗户爬进来的。

examples.english: The bird was sitting on a branch overhanging the water.
examples.chinese: 鸟儿在悬垂于水面上的一根树枝上栖息。

examples.english: An ancient vine overhangs the terrace.
examples.chinese: 一条古藤悬垂在平台上。

examples.english: Julian waited under an overhanging rock until the rain stopped.
examples.chinese: 朱莉安在一块悬伸的岩石下面等到雨停。

examples.english: We rowed down the river beneath overhanging branches.
examples.chinese: 我们在垂枝下划着小船顺流而下。

centers.english: at the back of something and usually hidden by it
centers.chinese: 在某物后面，通常被其遮掩

examples.english: The sun went behind a cloud.
examples.chinese: 太阳跑到云后面去了。

examples.english: Put a cushion behind you. You'll feel more comfortable.
examples.chinese: 在身后放个垫子，这样你会感觉更舒服一些。

examples.english: I got stuck behind a truck on the way to the airport.
examples.chinese: 开车到机场去时，我一路上都被堵在一辆卡车的后面。

examples.english: There's a small garden at the back.
examples.chinese: 后边有座小花园。

examples.english: You can park your car in back.
examples.chinese: 你可以把车停到后面。

examples.english: Their house has a pool in the back.
examples.chinese: 他们的房子后面有个水池。

examples.english: The tennis courts were at the back of the main school building.
examples.chinese: 网球场在学校主楼的后面。

examples.english: They parked in a small carpark at the rear of the hotel.
examples.chinese: 他们把车停在旅馆后面的小停车场内。

examples.english: To the rear of the house is an old shed.
examples.chinese: 房子后面是一间旧棚屋。

examples.english: We need to go round the back. I don't have keys to the front door.
examples.chinese: 我们得绕到后面去，我没有前门钥匙。

centers.english: the area behind the things or people in a picture, on a stage etc
centers.chinese: 照片、舞台等中物件或人后面的地方

examples.english: The invitations had red lettering on a white background.
examples.chinese: 请柬是白底红字。

examples.english: The flag's five orange stripes stand out against a silver background.
examples.chinese: 旗帜上的五条橙色线条在银色的底色衬托下非常显眼。

examples.english: In the photograph, a statue of St. Andrew stood in the background.
examples.chinese: 在这幅照片的背景中，有一尊圣安德鲁塑像。

examples.english: Palm trees swayed in the background.
examples.chinese: 棕榈树在背后摇曳。

examples.english: While I was on the phone with Julie, I could hear the sound of a television in the background.
examples.chinese: 我和朱莉通电话时能隐约听见电视机的声响。

examples.english: The snow-covered Rocky Mountains made a wonderful backdrop for the concert.
examples.chinese: 白雪皑皑的落基山脉为这场音乐会做了绝佳的背景。

centers.english: before you do something or before something happens
centers.chinese: 做某事或某事发生之前

examples.english: The family left France just before the war.
examples.chinese: 这家人在战争刚要爆发之前离开了法国。

examples.english: Think carefully before you give your final answer.
examples.chinese: 请仔细考虑后再作最后答复。

examples.english: Before I had a chance to say anything, David walked away.
examples.chinese: 我还来不及说什么，戴维已经走开了。

examples.english: Before joining IBM, Frank worked for Toshiba.
examples.chinese: 在加入国际商业机器公司以前，弗兰克在东芝公司工作。

examples.english: You should check the oil before beginning a long car journey.
examples.chinese: 开车长途旅行之前你应该先检查一下油量。

examples.english: We spent two years in Thailand, and before that we lived in China.
examples.chinese: 我们在泰国待了两年，在这以前我们在中国生活。

examples.english: I was a waiter for six months, and before that I worked in a supermarket.
examples.chinese: 我当过六个月的侍应生，这以前我在一家超级市场工作过。

expressions.text: a week/two days/five years etc before

examples.english: I was born just eleven months before my brother.
examples.chinese: 我就比弟弟早出生11个月。

examples.english: Let me know ahead of time if you need a ride to the airport.
examples.chinese: 如果你要人开车送你去机场，请预先告诉我。

examples.english: We had agreed beforehand not to tell anyone else about our plans.
examples.chinese: 我们事前同意不把计划告诉别人。

examples.english: Add the onions and garlic first, then the mushrooms.
examples.chinese: 先加洋葱和大蒜，然后加蘑菇。

examples.english: ‘Shall we go for some lunch?’ ‘Yeah, great, let me just make a quick call first.’
examples.chinese: “我们去吃饭吧？”“好，太好了！让我先很快打个电话。”

examples.english: Pasta salad is a dish that you can easily prepare in advance.
examples.chinese: 通心粉沙拉是一道很方便的、可预先准备好的菜式。

examples.english: I wish you'd told me in advance that you were going to be late.
examples.chinese: 我觉得你该事先告诉我你要晚到。

examples.english: Your passport application should be submitted well in advance of your departure.
examples.chinese: 你应该在出发前提早递交护照申办表。

expressions.text: three days/six months/a year etc in advance

examples.english: Preparations for the president's visit had been made several months in advance.
examples.chinese: 为总统访问而作的准备工作几个月前就开始了。

examples.english: Life in pre-war Britain was simpler and less fast-paced.
examples.chinese: 战前英国的生活较单纯，节奏也较缓慢。

examples.english: As usual, the government seems to have forgotten most of its pre-election promises.
examples.chinese: 一如以往，政府似乎忘记了其在竞选前所作的承诺了。

examples.english: I spoke with Sarah prior to the meeting.
examples.chinese: 我在开会前和萨拉说过话。

examples.english: The doctor should have told you about the possible side effects prior to starting you on the medication.
examples.chinese: 医生在进行治疗前，应先告诉你这种药物可能会带来的副作用。

expressions.text: on the eve of/in the run-up to

examples.english: On the eve of the election, some of the candidates were showing signs of strain.
examples.chinese: 大选前夕部分候选人表现得很紧张。

examples.english: No-one claimed responsibility for the bombing, which occurred on the eve of the Prime Minister's visit.
examples.chinese: 爆炸发生在首相访问前夕，但没有人声明对事件负责。

examples.english: Another round of TV debates will be held in the run-up to the referendum.
examples.chinese: 在举行全民投票之前将有另一轮电视辩论会。

examples.english: Aid workers say the village had no advance warning of the floods.
examples.chinese: 救援人员说这个村子事前没有收到有关洪水的警告。

examples.english: Advance bookings for the concert start today.
examples.chinese: 这场音乐会今天开始预售门票。

examples.english: Airport visas may be obtained if forty-eight hours advance notice has been provided.
examples.chinese: 如果提前48小时通知，就可拿到机场签证。

examples.english: The airline says that some flights may be cancelled without prior warning.
examples.chinese: 这家航空公司说部分航班有可能不经预先通知就被取消。

examples.english: The phone company is required to give you prior notice before disconnecting your service.
examples.chinese: 电话公司在停止提供服务之前按规定应该事先通知你。

examples.english: The tenant must get the prior consent of the landlord before doing any redecorating in the flat.
examples.chinese: 房客在重新装修住房前必须事先征得房东的同意。

centers.english: before a particular time or date

examples.english: Call me back before 5.30.
examples.chinese: 今天下午5点半以前请给我回个电话。

examples.english: You should go, before John gets back.
examples.chinese: 在约翰回来之前，你该走了。

examples.english: Our daughter was born just before Christmas.
examples.chinese: 我们的女儿就在圣诞节前夕出生的。

examples.english: I'll be home by 6.30, I promise.
examples.chinese: 我保证6点半前回家。

examples.english: By 9.00, most of the guests had arrived.
examples.chinese: 到9点时大部分客人都到了。

examples.english: Please try to have this done by Friday.
examples.chinese: 请尽量在星期五之前把它做好。

expressions.text: no later than/by something at the latest

examples.english: I want your essays back no later than Wednesday, nine o'clock.
examples.chinese: 我希望你们能在周三9点前把这篇文章交回来给我。

examples.english: Jenny should be back by Monday at the latest.
examples.chinese: 珍妮最迟星期一会回来。

examples.english: Entry forms for the competition should arrive no later than Friday, November 1st.
examples.chinese: 参赛表格不得迟于11月1日星期五递交。

examples.english: The dinner party will be over by ten-thirty at the very latest.
examples.chinese: 晚宴聚会最迟10点半结束。

centers.english: before now

examples.english: I had never seen such an ugly baby before.
examples.chinese: 我以前从未见过这么丑的婴儿。

examples.english: Wendell had never been on a plane before.
examples.chinese: 温德尔以前从未乘过飞机。

examples.english: Sheila and I became friends in 1995, although we had actually met several years before.
examples.chinese: 1995年希拉与我成了朋友，虽然这以前好几年我们已经见过面。

expressions.text: five minutes/two weeks/20 years etc ago

examples.english: George went out half an hour ago. Can I have him call you back?
examples.chinese: 乔治半小时前出去了，我让他给你回电话好吗？

examples.english: Lucy's aunt died a few months ago.
examples.chinese: 露西的姑妈几个月前去世了。

examples.english: ‘When did you live in Germany?’ ‘Oh, it was a long time ago.’
examples.chinese: “你什么时候在德国生活过？”“噢，很久以前了。”

examples.english: Pauline wrote to me once, but that was ages ago.
examples.chinese: 保利娜给我写过一次信，但那是很久以前了。

examples.english: Didn't I give you the key earlier?
examples.chinese: 我刚才不是给你钥匙了吗？

examples.english: I saw Barbara earlier in the day - she looked pretty upset.
examples.chinese: 今天早些时候我看见芭芭拉，她好像很不开心。

expressions.text: 20 years earlier/10 minutes earlier/moments earlier etc

examples.english: Three years earlier, Miller had been happily married, with a good job.
examples.chinese: 三年前米勒幸福地结了婚，有一份很好的工作。

examples.english: Hastings previously worked for a software company in Richmond.
examples.chinese: 黑斯廷斯以前在里士满的一家软件公司工作过。

examples.english: The bombing is being blamed on a previously unknown group of terrorists.
examples.chinese: 一群以前不知名的恐怖分子被指为造成这次爆炸的罪魁祸首。

expressions.text: two days/three weeks/six months etc previously

examples.english: She had met Atwood at a conference a few weeks previously.
examples.chinese: 在几周前的一次会议上她遇到了阿特伍德。

examples.english: Milligan, 43, was formerly a deputy foreign minister.
examples.chinese: 43岁的米利根是前外交部副部长。

examples.english: Peru was formerly ruled by the Spanish.
examples.chinese: 秘鲁以前受西班牙统治。

examples.english: Watkins was formerly editor of the Express, a local weekly newspaper.
examples.chinese: 沃特金斯以前当过《快报》的编辑，那是当地的一份周报。

centers.english: someone or something that existed before or that you had before
centers.chinese: 以前存在过或你曾拥有过的某人或某物

examples.english: The car's previous owner didn't take very good care of it.
examples.chinese: 原先的车主没有小心地保养这辆车。

examples.english: Please ignore my previous instructions.
examples.chinese: 请不要理会我先前的指令。

examples.english: The last apartment we lived in was much smaller than this one.
examples.chinese: 我们上一套房子比这套小得多。

examples.english: Beth broke up with her last boyfriend because he drank too much.
examples.chinese: 贝丝和她的前一个男友分手是因为他喝酒太多。

examples.english: Her dad's an ex-policeman.
examples.chinese: 她爸爸以前是警察。

examples.english: Lydia is still friends with her ex-husband.
examples.chinese: 莉迪娅与前夫仍是朋友。

examples.english: The new stadium is much bigger than the old one.
examples.chinese: 新体育场比起以前的那个要大得多了。

examples.english: I saw Phil with one of my old girlfriends.
examples.chinese: 我看到菲尔和我以前的一个女友在一起。

examples.english: We all liked the old teacher better.
examples.chinese: 我们都更喜欢以前的那位老师。

examples.english: I didn't enjoy Spielberg's last film but I thought the one before was all right.
examples.chinese: 我不喜欢斯皮尔伯格最近的一部影片，但这之前的那一部很不错。

examples.english: Each year, the convention is a little larger than the one before.
examples.chinese: 这个会议每年都比前一次的规模大一些。

examples.english: Her former husband now lives in Houston.
examples.chinese: 她前夫现住在休斯敦。

examples.english: Weinberger was an advisor to former president Ronald Reagan.
examples.chinese: 温伯格是前总统罗纳德·里根的顾问。

examples.english: Vandenberg has been a more active director than his predecessor.
examples.chinese: 范登堡比起他的前任来是个更主动积极的主管。

examples.english: Sally's predecessor had warned her about Nick, one of the company vice-presidents.
examples.chinese: 萨莉的前任告诫她要当心尼克，他是公司的副总裁之一。

examples.english: The abacus was the precursor of the modern electronic calculator.
examples.chinese: 算盘是现代电子计算器的前身。

examples.english: The Office of Strategic Services was the precursor of the CIA.
examples.chinese: 战略情报局是中央情报局的前身。

examples.english: The P-50 is a forerunner of today's supersonic jet.
examples.chinese: P-50型飞机是现今超音速喷气式飞机的先导。

examples.english: Hansen played in the American Basketball League, a forerunner of the NBA.
examples.chinese: 汉森在全美篮球联盟打球，那是美国职业篮球协会的前身。

centers.english: before someone or something else in a list, line, series etc
centers.chinese: 在名单或序列中位于某人或某物之前

examples.english: I think you were before me in line, weren't you?
examples.chinese: 我想你是排在我前面的，对吗？

examples.english: Islington station is one stop before Finsbury Park on the Victoria Line.
examples.chinese: 伊斯灵顿在维多利亚铁路线上是芬斯伯里公园的前一站。

examples.english: Churchill was a much stronger leader than the man who came before him.
examples.chinese: 作为领导人，丘吉尔要比他的前任强得多。

examples.english: A planning session at eleven-thirty will precede the noon lunch discussion.
examples.chinese: 11点半先进行计划会议，接下来是午餐讨论会。

examples.english: Witnesses say the fire was preceded by a loud explosion.
examples.chinese: 证人都说先是一下巨大的爆炸声，然后就起了这场大火。

examples.english: In most cases the illness is preceded by vomiting and chills.
examples.chinese: 在大部分情况下，发病前会出现呕吐和发冷。

examples.english: The man in front of me looked very familiar.
examples.chinese: 我前面那个男子看上去很眼熟。

examples.english: There were about fifty people ahead of us waiting for tickets.
examples.chinese: 我们前面约有50人在等着买票。

examples.english: The previous chapter examined how children learn language.
examples.chinese: 在前面一章里我们探讨了儿童是如何学习语言的。

examples.english: Each number in the series 2 - 4 - 8 - 16 is twice as large as the previous number.
examples.chinese: 在2-4-8-16这一列数字中，每个数都是前一个数的两倍。

examples.english: He used a lot more color in his earlier paintings.
examples.chinese: 他在自己早期的绘画中运用了大量的色彩。

examples.english: The play lacks the wit and energy of Jergen's earlier work.
examples.chinese: 这部戏剧缺乏杰根早期作品中的智趣与活力。

examples.english: When you're in prison, every day feels just like the one before.
examples.chinese: 坐牢时，每天的感觉都和前一天没有两样。

examples.english: The preceding chapters have described several key events in recent French history.
examples.chinese: 前面几章描述了法国近代史上的几个重大事件。

examples.english: In the preceding section of the poem, Whitman is talking about how important it is to live in the present.
examples.chinese: 在这首诗的前一段中，惠特曼讲到了活在当下的重要性。

examples.english: Write to the above address for more information.
examples.chinese: 请写信至上述地址索取更多资料。

examples.english: The above diagram shows a diesel car engine.
examples.chinese: 上图显示的是一部汽车柴油机。

examples.english: Contact any of the above for more details.
examples.chinese: 如需更详细资料可与上述任何一位人士联系。

examples.english: None of the organizations mentioned above answered our inquiries.
examples.chinese: 上面提到的机构没有一家回复我们的查询。

centers.english: a time, day, month etc that comes before another one
centers.chinese: 早于另一个时间、日子、月份等的时间、日子、月份

examples.english: The company recorded a 50% increase in profits over the previous year.
examples.chinese: 这家公司录得的利润比去年增长了50%。

examples.english: Kirsty's baby had been born the previous October, while she was still in England.
examples.chinese: 柯丝蒂的孩子是前一年的10月生的，当时她还在英格兰。

examples.english: My sister and I went shopping yesterday lunchtime.
examples.chinese: 我和妹妹昨天午饭时间去购物了。

examples.english: We met yesterday morning to discuss plans for the conference.
examples.chinese: 昨天上午我们见面讨论了会议的计划。

examples.english: I spoke to Neil and Sandra last weekend.
examples.chinese: 上周末我和尼尔及桑德拉讲过话。

examples.english: We still haven't paid last month's rent.
examples.chinese: 我们还未付上月的房租。

examples.english: The day before the exam, I felt worried and unprepared.
examples.chinese: 考试的前一天我感到很担心，觉得没有准备好。

examples.english: Last week she was in Paris, and the week before she was in Rome.
examples.chinese: 上周她在巴黎，再上一周她在罗马。

examples.english: The company made more profit in that one month than it made in the whole of the preceding year.
examples.chinese: 公司在那一个月里所获的利润比之前一整年里所获的利润还要多。

examples.english: He had been arrested at least fifteen times in the preceding five years.
examples.chinese: 过去5年里他至少被逮捕过15次。

centers.english: to happen or exist before someone or something else
centers.chinese: 比别人或其他事发生或存在得要早

expressions.gram: verb phrase not in progressive or passive

examples.english: The paragraph says basically the same thing as the one that came before.
examples.chinese: 这一段落叙述的内容与前一段大致相同。

examples.english: The salad usually comes before the main course.
examples.chinese: 沙拉一般要比主菜先上桌。

examples.english: In the Greek alphabet, the letter delta comes before the letter epsilon.
examples.chinese: 在希腊字母表中，字母δ在ε之前。

examples.english: In English, the subject precedes the verb.
examples.chinese: 英语中主语在动词之前。

examples.english: On vehicle licence plates in the UK, the numbers are preceded by a single letter.
examples.chinese: 英国汽车车牌的数字前面有一个英文字母。

examples.english: Many economic systems predate capitalism.
examples.chinese: 有许多经济制度先于资本主义制度出现。

examples.english: The steam engine predates the internal combustion engine by at least 100 years.
examples.chinese: 蒸汽机比起内燃机至少早问世100年。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in passive

examples.english: Monroe still refuses to talk about the events which led up to his resignation.
examples.chinese: 门罗依然拒绝谈论导致他辞职的事件。

examples.english: The book describes some of the events leading up to the First World War.
examples.chinese: 该书叙述了导致第一次世界大战的一些事件。

examples.english: The rains came first, then the storms.
examples.chinese: 先是下雨，接着是暴风雨。

examples.english: The air-strike was just a prelude to the invasion.
examples.chinese: 空袭只是大举入侵的序幕。

examples.english: The revolution of 1789 was a prelude to a more just and equal society.
examples.chinese: 1789年的那场大革命为建立一个更公正平等的社会揭开序幕。

centers.english: to do something before someone else does it

examples.english: It's mine - I saw it first.
examples.chinese: 那是我的，是我第一个看见的。

examples.english: Who wants to go first?
examples.chinese: 谁要先去？

examples.english: Sandy finished the puzzle first.
examples.chinese: 桑迪第一个解出了字谜。

examples.english: Many people have copied her style, but she was definitely the first.
examples.chinese: 许多人模仿她的风格，但她绝对是第一个。

expressions.text: be the first/first to do something

examples.english: Of the four of us, my sister was the first to get married.
examples.chinese: 我们四个中姐姐是第一个结婚的。

examples.english: I was going to have that last piece of pie but somebody beat me to it.
examples.chinese: 我想吃最后一块馅饼，但有人捷足先登了。

examples.english: When Charlie finally got down there to buy the car, he discovered that someone else had beaten him to it.
examples.chinese: 查利最后赶去买那辆车时，却发现有人抢先一步把它买了。

examples.english: Carrie got to the pub ahead of us.
examples.chinese: 卡丽比我们先到酒吧。

examples.english: Cole finished the race ahead of Jewison.
examples.chinese: 科尔比朱伊森先赛完全程。

examples.english: As an architect, Sir John Soan was ahead of his time.
examples.chinese: 作为一名建筑师，约翰·索恩爵士超越了他那个时代。

examples.english: Ashton's educational theories were way ahead of their time.
examples.chinese: 阿什顿的教育理论远远超越了他们那个时代。
